chapters.title: Chapter 949: Marriage
chapters.body:
Chapter 949: Marriage

On the way out of the Shion Palace, Chen Rui was lost in thought.

Veronica asked him to leave the Dragon Bright Empire because the return of the Prince ‘Arthur’ would create some kind of hindrance and put ‘Arthur’ in danger?

When Chen Rui said unreservedly about ‘Arthur’’s true feelings to Veronica, with his peak stage of the Kingdom level sensing ability, he keenly captured a slight emotional fluctuation in it.

It was… fear.

Veronica was actually fearful.

Veronica of the Kingdom level, is fearful of Arthur, whose apparent strength is not even Demon King level?

It should have nothing to do with strength, but heart.

Her heart, as if it was frozen, was so cold that it could cut off everything, but she was afraid of the sincerity that could melt the cold. This state was somewhat similar to Isabella back then.

This fluctuation was only fleeting, and it soon returned to silence. Chen Rui would definitely not give up just like that. Whether it was to find out the truth or to fulfill Arthur’s state of mind, he would approach that frozen heart again.

No matter what the truth was, Chen Rui would make every effort to try to ‘rescue’ her. He had made all kinds of mental preparations for that, even including giving her the final liberation.

“Your Highness Arthur!” The voice of the imperial guards at the gate of the Shion Palace interrupted Chen Rui’s thoughts, “His Majesty summoned Your Highness to go to the side hall to discuss matters.”

Chen Rui nodded and walked toward the side hall of the palace.

When he was in the corridor, there were 2 people who happened to be coming from the opposite direction; 1 of which was Second Prince Garfield.

Garfield was talking and laughing with the man beside him, but when he saw Chen Rui, his face suddenly turned cold.

“Second brother.” Chen Rui greeted him with a smile.

“Brother Arthur.” Garfield forced a smile, “You’ve been in the limelight lately. The whole empire is talking about the yellow dragon wine.”

“Thanks to second brother for taking care of Golden Estate for so many years. Especially when you left, you took painstaking effort.”

This was an obvious irony. Garfield couldn’t help but snort coldly. The troubles he left behind when he handed over the Golden Estate instead brought out Arthur’s extraordinary talent. The current development of the Golden Estate far exceeded his 7 years of operation. Which could see at a glance who was better or worse.

The atmosphere became awkward for a while, then the handsome and imposing purple-haired man on the side said in time, “Proyo. Kurwich, it’s an honor to meet the Royal Highness Third Prince.”

The name made Chen Rui frown. Proyo was the eldest son of the Military Administration Council’s Dean Chamosco; he was also the deputy legion commander of the Dragon Scale Legion, an upstart in the imperial army, and the fiancé of Princess Freya, the sister of ‘Arthur’.

Chen Rui had a very good impression on Freya, especially the kind of special intimacy. The Golden Estate was adjacent to the capital, but the Golden Estate City to Yerodisha was at least a day’s journey away. However, in just 2 months, Freya came no less than 10 times to the Golden Estate. Even when the estate was in the most ‘dire’ situation, the princess forked out her own money to help her brother.

“ Oh it’s General Proyo, I heard that you just returned from the Cold Winter Fortress? Nice to meet you.” Chen Rui nodded to Proyo, “It’s a pity that I’m going to see His Majesty now. We’ll get together again next time. “

Proyo laughed, “I have heard the reputation of the yellow dragon wine all the way from the Cold Winter Fortress back to the capital. Since the Royal Highness Third Prince has said it, I have to go to the Golden Estate for a drink. I hope Your Highness will not be stingy by then.”

“You’re most welcome.” Chen Rui glanced at Garfield, “As for some people, don’t humiliate yourself.”

After speaking, Garfield walked straight forward without even looking at the pale-faced Garfield.

In the side hall, Chen Rui met Lex the Great.

“You went to the Shion Palace just now?”

“Yes.”

“You seem to be a little diligent in visiting there recently? Is there nothing to do in your estate?”

“It’s manageable.” Chen Rui nodded, “The estate is developing very well now, so don’t worry about it for the time being.”

“Are you showing off?”

“Yes.” Chen Rui’s answer was somewhat surprising, “If I don’t even have the capital to show off, I don’t deserve to stand in front of Your Majesty.”

Lex the Great squinted slightly, “I don’t know whether to admire or hate your confidence, but too much confidence is arrogance. Your achievements are still insignificant. In other words, there’s still a long time before you can be arrogant.”

“I know.” Chen Rui smiled lightly, “These are really insignificant; perhaps you can call them warm-ups. I believe the real good show will be staged soon.”

In all fairness, the ‘achievements’ of the yellow dragon wine, the auction, the rapid pacification and development of the Golden Estate, even Lex the Great himself or any talent in the empire, couldn’t do it; but these were just warm-ups?

Lex the Great’s brows twitched. After 7 years, this son has really changed completely. Whether it’s words or actions, it’s completely unexpected, almost… out of control.

As a father, there was a little gratification in his heart, but for the Dragon Bright Empire’s ruler who was used to controlling everything, it was not so gratifying.

“Very good, I’m looking forward to your really good show.” Lex the Great nodded. His tone changed, “I called you here today for another matter. I initially wanted to send someone to the estate to inform you, but you happened to come to the palace, so I’ll tell you face to face. The news of your return has spread throughout the human world, including our largest alliance, the Blue Glory Empire. Your marriage to Princess Pearl Landbis, which has been dragging on for 7 years, should be completed. The last time you disappeared before the engagement ceremony. According to royal protocol, this ceremony must be completed first. So, before the 20th of next month, you have to rush to the Blue Glory Empire to hold the engagement ceremony with Princess Landbis. Then, bring Princess Landbis back to the Empire for marriage.”

“Go to the Blue Glory Empire to get engaged? Then bring the princess back to get married?” Chen Rui was surprised and asked deliberately, “Can I refuse?”

Lex the Great glanced at him, “What do you think?”

“I have 1 condition.”

Lex the Great sneered coldly, “You’re not qualified to negotiate terms right now.”

“I have.” Chen Rui’s words carried an undeniable firmness. Although his strength shown now was only ‘Warrior’ while Lex the Great’s strength was peak stage of Saint, once these 2 words were uttered, even this ruler couldn’t help but tremble.

Lex the Great took a deep breath and stopped arguing with the qualification problem, “Veronica?”

Chen Rui changed his mind and asked, “No? Didn’t Your Majesty say that anyone can be a bargaining chip?”

There was a strange light in Lex the Great’s eyes, and he shook his head with certainty, “You’re not qualified enough to trade, my son.”

Son? Not the prince? Chen Rui showed a strange expression, “It’s surprising, Your Majesty. As far as I know, she’s just a poor victim who has no value anymore. Reasons like sudden death due to illness or disappearance can accomplish this deal. However, from Your Majesty’s determination, it seems that you would rather give me the Dragon Knight Legion… no, even the Holy Light Robe, than let Veronica come with me?”

The real focus of these words was not Veronica, but the Holy Light Robe used as an ‘example’.

Lex the Great didn’t have too much suspicion, and he just sneered, “No matter what it is, your qualifications are far from enough… However, if you are really interested in the legion, I can consider putting you in a fortress for a period of time to train.”

“It’s just an example. My hobby is internal affairs, and I’m not interested in the military for the time being.” Chen Rui spread his hands, showing no indifference, “I’d better go back to the estate first. Today is the 3rd, next month’s 20th… It’s just a month and a half. I need to think about something seriously.”

“It’s better not some kind of botched plan to escape marriage or pretend to be sick.”

“How could it be? Your Majesty underestimates me too much.” Chen Rui shrugged, “But to be honest, this marriage came too fast, I’m not mentally prepared at all. Can you…”

Lex the Great interrupted immediately, “No way! The Dragon Bright Empire and the Blue Glory Empire have been preparing for 7 years! As for you, you don’t need to prepare at all now. Don’t think about delaying it for even a day!”

“What if I want to accumulate some bargaining chips before then?”

“Your intellect and attention seem to have foolishly diverged.” Lex the Great said coldly, “I don’t care what plans or deals you have. This time you must go to the Blue Glory Empire. I will send Proyo and the elites of the Dragon Scale Legion to escort you there. There must be no mistakes!

“Okay, Your Majesty, if it’s your order.” Chen Rui sighed and agreed.

He had no particular resistance to going to the Blue Glory Empire to participate in the engagement ceremony because the holy relic of the town of the Blue Glory Empire was his goal. Meanwhile, he was also an ‘old friend’ of the aspiring Madam Princess, so he believed that there would be a common ‘topic’ at that time. The Elf Grand Master Finoia invited him to go to the Jade Forest Sea when he had time last time, saying that he had something to give away, so he could drop by this time.

“You must be focused in this trip to the Blue Glory Empire! You represent the entire Dragon Bright Empire. I can see that you have almost forgotten the court etiquette. I will send someone to teach you. As for the engagement gift… As a mechanical grand master, I believe you don’t need me to worry about it. Now you can go back to the estate; go back directly!”

Chen Rui bowed, frowning a little.

As a bargaining chip, Veronica seems to be placed in a high position by Lex the Great; is it to use against Arthur?

The most troublesome thing was that although the wedding time with Landbis was expected, it came too soon.

At this time, there was still a month and a half before the engagement time of the Blue Glory Empire. If he went directly to the teleportation array, it would take at least half a month on the road, so he had less than a month left on hand.

Chen Rui’s original plan was to first promote aromatic millet wine, then promote the magic game and its subsidiary products, magic phone, to expand to the entire human world step by step. After finishing, he would use this as a bargaining chip to showdown with Lex the Great, get Holy Light Robe from the Dragon Bright Empire, and deal with Veronica’s matter. Following that, he would go to the Blue Glory Empire to get the Holy Grail. The final destination was the most difficult mission location —The Holy Light Mountain.

In the Holy Light Mountain, he was likely to encounter a fierce battle or even face a powerful enemy like Michael again, but at that time he wasn’t worried. He just had to bring Tiffany back and understand the creation origin along the way. Even if he was exposed, it didn’t matter. Therefore, all matters must be handled in advance.

Now that the wedding was going to be held so soon, his plans were completely disrupted. The promotion of magic games was no easier than the promotion of aromatic millet wine. It needed to build the ‘base stations’ piece by piece. 1 month was not enough to launch it into popularity into the whole human world.

chapters.title: Chapter 950: Being Popular
chapters.body:
Chapter 950: Being Popular

When Chen Rui returned to the estate, night had fallen, but an unexpected visitor was waiting for him in the mansion, Cardinal Birmingham of the Holy Church.

The Holy Church had 3 cardinals, but these 3 cardinals belonged to 3 factions, which represented the 3 archangels of the light.

The first Roger whom Chen Rui met belonged to the Pope Vantis Faction, that was, the Michael Faction; Gralin belonged to the archbishop, Holy Lady Eudora Faction, that was, the Raphael Faction; Birmingham in front of him was another Archbishop Pusmeer Faction, that was, the Gabriel Family.

When Chen Rui followed Python to the Holy Light Mountain last time, he sensed Tiffany’s presence, but due to the urgency of the situation, it was too late to investigate. He was not sure whether Tiffany was at the Holy Blessing Summit of Holy Lady Eudora or the Star Summit of Archbishop Pusmeer.

In fact, he left a star spot before in the Light Divinity Temple at that time. Later, he used [Sneak] to venture there once, but the temple that was originally close at hand could no longer be seen. Instead, there were extremely powerful ancient runes everywhere that sealed the entire space. If it weren’t for Chen Rui’s extremely keen response to ancient runes, he would have returned to the same path and gotten lost before even touching the runes.

This was also the reason why Chen Rui was close to Gralin. Now that Birmingham was visiting, he must have received news about the ‘Crown of Thorns’ and come to win over the ‘Holy Child’.

Birmingham was a poignant man who looked younger than Gralin. His gaze was sharp, but when facing Chen Rui, he still showed a very polite attitude.

“Your Highness Arthur, it’s the first time we met. Please forgive me for taking the liberty of coming here.”

Chen Rui said in his mind. This is not the first time we have met. When we were at the Snowy Summit Stage of the Snow Dallet Tree, I let you taste [Star Explosion], but now I can only pretend, “Don’t’ mention it. I have long admired Sir Birmingham’s reputation. It’s an honor for my entire Golden Estate that you are here. Please take a seat.”

“Your Highness Arthur is too polite.” Birmingham sat down, “Your Highness Arthur is the third prince of the Dragon Bright Empire, the lord of Golden Estate, and 1 of the 3 mechanic grand masters of human, even the most senior of the elf tribe, Grand master Master Finoia, is full of praise for Your Highness’ alchemy skills. In just 2 months, the Golden Estate has grown to an astonishing level. The yellow dragon wine is even famous all over the world. To be able to meet Your Highness Arthur is my honor.”

“I just got the inheritance of the ancient civilization by chance. I copied the achievements of my predecessors; how can I deserve the praise of Sir Birmingham.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, ‘Arthur’ having the inheritance of the ancient civilization was already an open secret to those in the circle. This was the most ‘reasonable’ explanation for why he had grand master-level mechanical skills.

“No one can deny that luck is also a kind of strength, such as… the Crown of Thorns.” Birmingham changed his tone and finally introduced the topic.

“The Crown of Thorns is indeed luck and an accident.” Chen Rui frowned and shrugged, “There are many accidents in this world, such as my disappearance for 7 years, and my sudden achievement as a grand master. Oh, yes, getting to know Sir Birmingham is also an accident, a pleasant accident.”

Chen Rui said a few words, but he changed the topic without hesitation. Birmingham frowned secretly while chatting with him. No doubt, this third prince is not simple. He is so young, yet so calm.

“Your Highness, you are a sensible person, so I won’t make a fool of myself.” Birmingham smiled, “Actually, You Highness should have guessed my intention. I wonder if Your Highness intends to be the blessed 1 of the Light God?”

“I have been recognized by the Crown of Thorns, so naturally I cannot ignore my relationship with the Holy Church.” Chen Rui said indifferently, “However, I’m the third prince of the Dragon Bright Empire, and I’m also a strong contender for the future throne. Sir should not deny this, right?”

“There is no conflict of being the ruler of the empire and the blessing of Light God… and even the leader of the entire church. If possible, there will be the first double ruler in human history who will have control of the Holy Empire and the church at the same time. Not only unprecedented but also very likely there is nothing like this in the future! His Holiness Pusmeer and all the forces of the Star Hall will fully support Your Highness to leave such a mark in the annals of history that countless future generations will look up to.”

Chen Rui looked at Birmingham’s smile and said lightly, “The same thing was said by another cardinal of your religion, Sir Gralin, but the difference is that my supporter has been replaced by Her Holiness Holy Lady Eudora and the Holy Blessing Hall. I’m curious, should I pay attention to this distinction between believers of the Light God?”

“About this…” Birmingham’s expression was stagnant, but he quickly reacted, “Just like the Dragon Emperor has the difference between the second prince, the third prince and the fourth prince, the Holy Light Mountain also has some corresponding differences. The difference is that the distinction between the Holy Light Mountain will not end as time passed. Therefore, Your Highness need not pay too much attention to this distinction, but it cannot be completely ignored. In essence, we are all Light God’s believers.”

Chen Rui revealed a playful expression, “Sir Birmingham means that me affirming the support of His Holiness Pusmeer and the Star Hall, is no different from me affirming the support of Her Holiness Holy Lady and the Holy Blessing Hall?”

Birmingham’s eyes flashed, “Yes.”

“Since there is no difference, why should I choose the Star Hall?” Chen Rui’s smile became more and more implicit. “I knew Sir Gralin first. Pardon me, but my friendship with Sir Birmingham is not as good as Sir Gralin’s.”

Birmingham instead calmed down, “Friendship is a bargaining chip. As long as there are enough chips, we can trade. Your Highness has managed the Golden Estate to such a point in such a short period of time, so you should know this better than me.”

“Chips?” Chen Rui smiled, “Any chip?”

Birmingham nodded, “Anything within my power.”

“What if… Holy Light Robe and Holy Grail?” Chen Rui looked into Birmingham’s eyes, “I’ve got the Crown of Thorns, Sir Birmingham should know what I want.”

“It seems that Gralin has already told Your Highness about the 3 Holy Artifacts…” Birmingham nodded slowly, but he shook his head again, “These are extraordinary times, and the Church is joining forces with the 2 Holy Empires to deal with the Black Death Follower. It’s not realistic to directly ask the 2 empires’ Holy Light Robe and Holy Grail, but for Your Highness, these 2 items are not difficult to obtain. Holy Light Robe is almost in Your Highness’ bag. As for Holy Grail…I heard the engagement news announced by the Blue Glory Empire. With that Princess Pearl there, Your Highness can win back both beauty and holy relic. Of course, no matter the former or the latter, I think Your Highness should be clear that it is inseparable from the support of the church.”

These words were actually similar to what Gralin said last time. Chen Rui nodded, and he already understood. It seems that the way to directly obtain the holy relics from the 2 Holy Empires through the church is indeed not feasible. At least, it cannot be done with the identity of ‘Arthur’ now .

“What if I only want 1 of them?” Chen Rui thought to himself, “Or the woman I want is someone else?”

“Surprising choice.” Birmingham was slightly surprised. He recalled some intel about the Royal Highness ‘Arthur’ past, and he nodded, “Is Your Highness mentally prepared to have a bad relationship with the Blue Glory Empire? If ‘His Holiness Holy Child’ serves the Light God wholeheartedly… it can be justified. The church should be able to solve it without any problem.”

“Really?” Chen Rui’s smile became more determined, “Then, I would like to know some introductions about the Star Hall, including His Holiness Pusmeer and the members. It is best to be more detailed.”

Birmingham’s eyes brightened. While the 2 were talking, Samuel came to report, “The Holy Church Cardinal Sir Roger has arrived in the Golden Eagle Land, and he is currently staying at the Red Eagle Inn. He sent an envoy to send a gift, saying that he will come to visit tomorrow morning. Your Highness.”

“Understood, Samuel. Go to the Red Eagle Inn to thank Sir Roger on my behalf and tell him that I’ll be waiting for Sir Roger at the mansion tomorrow morning.”

“Yes.”

Birmingham’s facial expression was a bit unsightly, “ Hmph , how arrogant of Sir Cardinal Roger.”

“Compared to another Sir Cardinal who waited all day in the mansion, it is indeed a little different. I feel more sorry for Sir Birmingham.”

“Your Highness is being courteous.” Birmingham smiled, “Actually, I didn’t wait here all day. During the day, I went to the estate of Your Highness. The Golden Estate is indeed the most prosperous estate in the Dragon Bright Empire. Especially after this trade fair, the yellow dragon wine will become the most famous fine wine in the world. But… Pardon my bluntness, due to the short time of Your Highness’ return, plus the previous His Highness Garfield, the Golden Estate has left many problems In terms of manpower, material resources, control and other aspects… If Your Highness wants to absolutely control the estate, the road ahead is not smooth. His Holiness Pusmeer once explained that he will do everything he can to help Your Highness, I don’t know if Your Highness will accept this kindness? Also, as a mechanical grand master, Your Highness definitely needs a variety of materials, the Star Hall just happens to be in charge of a large number of related resources, Your Highness can ask for anything.”

No doubt, when there is a competitor, there is motivation. Birmingham, who was still hiding in the tuck, immediately revealed all the chips in his hand when he heard Roger’s arrival.

In the same way, Roger and Gralin will also become one of the ‘bidders’, but these guys don’t know what kind of ‘surprise’ that the ‘His Holiness Holy Child’ whom they ‘bid’ for will bring to the Holy Light Mountain.

Chen Rui’s mind suddenly flashed, and his eyes shone with incomparably bright light.

“Sir Birmingham’s kindness is really hard to refuse,” Chen Rui nodded. “For the sake of this ‘friendship’, Sir Birmingham, let me give you a hint. I like money, I like it very much, because no matter the location, the benefits of money are always beyond imagination.”

Birmingham was a little surprised, “How much does Your Highness want?”

“I think you got it wrong, Sir Birmingham. I don’t want hard money, but liquid money, which is an avenue to make money like the yellow dragon wine. According to my insider information, the Dragon Valley recently successfully researched a kind of training magic game, but unfortunately, those stubborn dragons are unwilling to…”

As Chen Rui said, he habitually squinted his eyes slightly. Anyone who knew him well knew that this was the rhythm of scamming someone.

chapters.title: Chapter 951: The Holy Church, The Good Guy Who Gave Pillows When He Wanted To Sleep
chapters.body:
Chapter 951: The Holy Church, The Good Guy Who Gave Pillows When He Wanted To Sleep

Taking advantage of the moonlight, Birmingham and the servants left the lord’s mansion of the Golden Estate City in a hurry.

He had got what he wanted, or more precisely, what ‘Arthur’ wanted.

The magic game successfully developed by dragons in the Dragon Valley could make everyone within the area train and improve in the magic illusion. This kind of game could even cover the whole world. It was an amazing innovation that would benefit every user, which was also a golden business opportunity as Prince ‘Arthur’ said.

It was a pity that, unlike the aromatic millet wine ‘completed’ by the dragon rider Samuel, the Dragon Emperor did not agree to ‘Arthur”s request to promote the magic game all over the world. This was most likely due to the selfish special attribute of dragons who just wanted to use this good thing for their own use.

What ‘Arthur’ wanted was to get the right to sell this magic game. Of course, this pie was too big to be eaten by the Golden Estate alone, so ‘Arthur’ was willing to share the profits of the magic game with the Holy Church. No doubt, before that, dragons must take the bulk of the total interest.

The Golden Estate was responsible for the manufacture of all equipment for magic game signal towers and all sales as well as operations related to magic games. The church was responsible for establishing the magic game signal towers in the Hall of Light in each of its church district and promoting it to all empires.

For the Holy Church, where the church district was located in every town, it was easy to set up the signal towers, and it didn’t take much effort to promote it. If magic games could achieve huge long-term benefits as Arthur said, then this investment was simply nothing. Instead, the church took a huge advantage.

It was also a good deal for the Golden Estate. It was really a win-win for ‘Arthur’ and the church. If you add those short-sighted and selfish dragons, it was an all-win.

A slight trouble was that ‘Arthur’ regarded this as a criterion for choosing a faction. This meant that he would officially accept the invitation to join the church as the ‘Holy Child’ of whichever of the 3 major factions that could hand over the ‘representative power’ of the magic game to him. This ‘invitation’ clearly represented the future lineup of ‘Arthur’. Although the 3 dignified giants of the church were a little unhappy to actually participate in this ‘competition’, ‘Arthur’ did have this bargaining power now, because now the Snow Dallet Tree was missing, and the Crown of Thorns was the only replacement.

What made Birmingham happiest was that ‘Arthur’ had given him the greatest benefit to be the first to get the news. This meant that the other 2 factions didn’t know about ‘Arthur”s decision. In this competition, time was the key to victory.

Speaking of which, the dragons’ side was a little troublesome because the strongest branch of the holy dragon split into 2 factions. Apart from the Dragon Valley, the other branch was a refugee in the church. Nevertheless, Rodriguez later betrayed, and there had always been a lot of grudges between the church and the dragons all these years. If he went to the Dragon Valley to discuss the cooperation, the result may be unknown, but 4 words were certain: bring contempt on himself.

As for how to negotiate with the giant dragons, it was all up to the top level. It had nothing to do with him. To be able to get the answer from ‘Arthur’ was not a great achievement, but it could be considered a successful completion of the task from the top level.

What Birmingham needed most now was to immediately report this matter to Pusmeer, so that the actions of the Star Hall would be ahead of the rest of the 2 factions!

The next morning, Chen Rui met the visiting Cardinal Roger at the lord’s mansion. He ‘unintentionally’ pointed out Birmingham’s chips. After Sir Roger increased his chips without hesitation, Royal Highness ‘Arthur’, who had benefited, finally said what he wanted, magic game.

Sir Roger hurried away.

In the afternoon, Chen Rui visited Gralin, who was still in the estate, and repeated the previous scene.

Gralin hurried away in the same way.

Behind him was the smiling estate lord.

When I am worried about the magic game, the Holy Church offers themselves to me. This is like a pillow sent over when I want to sleep. What a good church.

Moreover, since the magic game is launched in this form, even if ‘Arthur’ is exposed or turned against the church in the future, it will not be banned. Because this is the ‘selfish’ dragons’ own repertoire. ‘Arthur’ just wanted huge profits and to make money through the hands of the church. What’s more, once the church gets the huge benefits of magic games, it will be more difficult to give up this cash cow.

With the power of the Holy Church, the magic game would begin to spread throughout the human world at a much faster rate than expected. Even if Chen Rui was not in the Golden Estate, there was no need to worry too much, so he could implement his next plan with peace of mind.

Thinking of this, Chen Rui, who couldn’t help laughing, once again gave the 3 cardinals lots of thumbs ups in his mind.

2 days later, the lord’s mansion.

“Aunt Meria.” Chen Rui looked at the communication projection of Mother-in-law Fairy Dragon. He held the hands of Isabella and Zola beside him and smiled.

The mother-in-law looked at the 2 daughters happily cuddling beside the human son-in-law, “It seems that you all have been having a good time recently, my daughters. As for you… the greedy human who hugs 2 women, although your passion has made me very unsatisfied, the Sir Dragon Emperor has a surprising appreciation for you. Therefore, I shall also reluctantly praise you for doing a good job in this matter.”

Having said that, Mother-in-law Fairy Dragon looked at the human with incomparably satisfied eyes. Her son-in-law was so talented which made her proud in front of the Dragon Emperor. The most important thing was that her 2 daughters were blissful.

“The Holy Church always has a conflict with the Dragon Valley, and now they are competing to work with the Dragon Valley, which really delighted Royal Majesty Pagris.”

Chen Rui also laughed. That Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor was not a kind man. Since more than a faction of the Holy Church came to ask for it, if he didn’t mention the conditions, it was no longer Pagris. He could make a lot of money anyhow.

“I think Royal Majesty Pagris will not go too harsh on the church. After all, this is a business that will also bring huge benefits to dragons. However, dragons must keep things secret about ‘Richard’, especially Stanwell, Pelin, and those guys.”

“Rest assured, this involves the development and interests of the entire dragons. The Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor has his own plan. In this world, there is a magic called erasing memory. If necessary, Royal Majesty Pagris does not mind to use it on all dragons.”

The last sentence made Chen Rui a little moved. The courage of the lazy-looking Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor is really surprising.

“By the way, the Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor wants to ask for your opinion, which party should this representative power be given to?”

Chen Rui didn’t think too much, and he directly said the name of a faction, which was another gain from his ‘chat’ with the 3 cardinals.

This allowed him to implement his plan with greater peace of mind, placing the Holy Light Mountain as the last stop of this ‘main quest’ in the human world.

“Appropriate patience can bring more benefits, but don’t go too far, so as not to be self-defeating. Moreover, the time left for me is very limited. I believe that with the wisdom of the Royal Majesty Dragon Emperor, he should be able to master the timing, right?”

“Of course.” Meria nodded, “The magic communication is about to end… Zola, Yini, you all have to be careful. Mommy is not by your side, but I will always be watching from behind…”

Zola and Isabella nodded in unison as Meria’s figure gradually faded and disappeared.

“ Hey , why are your eyes red? It hasn’t been long since you all left Dragon Valley? Especially you, Zola, who lived in the Demon Realm for 10,000 years. Now, after meeting Aunt Meria, how come you seem to have become more fragile… Ouch! “

Before he could finish speaking, the soft flesh on his waist was pinched by the fingernails from the left and the right almost at the same time.

“Zola, I heard that someone seems to be going to the Blue Glory Empire to marry his fiancée?”

“That so called Princess Pearl is called Landbis. Sherbert.” When it comes to key issues, Ms. Fairy Dragon would not fake daze, “I heard that she is a famous human beauty.”

“Really? There will be 1 more woman for this guy?”

Chen Rui felt the fingers of the 2 hands exerting force at the same time, and the flesh on the waist suddenly made a 360-degree… twist. He could not help baring his teeth in pain, “Actually, she doesn’t want to marry me at all. I just want to make a deal with her to get the Holy Grail, 1 of the 3 holy relics!”

“She doesn’t want to marry you?” Isabella smiled and let go of her hand, “How do you know? It seems that you met this fiancée not long ago? Let me guess, was it your first time in the human world? Also, during this time, what about the old lover whom you always meet at Yerodisha Palace? What’s the name…”

“Veronica.” Ms. Fairy Dragon continued to add fuel to the fire, uh , support.

“I heard some stories about the Royal Highness Third Prince and this wife of the prince consort back then. It seems that there are quite a few things that someone has hidden from us.”

Chen Rui felt that the remaining hand was more forceful, and he looked at Zola next to him innocently. Ms. Fairy Dragon looked back at him blankly with a dazed expression as if the hand which was twisting the soft flesh belonged to someone else.

“Zola…”

“What?”

“Stop twisting.”

“ Oh .” (Exert more force)

“…”

“Okay, it’s unavoidable that men sometimes lie, but these are white lies.” Chen Rui looked at the 2 lovers affectionately, “For more peace and happiness for the woman whom I value the most in my heart.”

Ms. Fairy Dragon seemed to be moved and let go of her fatal fingers, then she looked at Madam Aunt, and they suddenly said in unison, “Who is the woman you value most?”

Chen Rui, “…”

Well, these were just unrelated details. Don’t worry about it. In the end, the male protagonist coaxed the 2 harem ladies. As for the 4 crescent-like red marks on his waist, it was a completely negligible amount of loss for the crystal harem who needed the male protagonist blood sacrifice.

So, Ms. Fairy Dragon continued the closed-door training with satisfaction. She had now completely absorbed the Pseudo-God spiritual imprint of Python. Plus the special training with her parents in the Dragon Valley before, she had faintly sensed a trace of ability to turn the pseudo-kingdom into real kingdom. This was the first step into the Demi-God level.

Just when Chen Rui was closing his eyes and thinking about his next move, Samuel came to report that the female officer sent by Lex the Great to teach etiquette had arrived.

“Teaching etiquette? I don’t have time to see her.” Chen Rui thought of what Lex the Great had said to let him learn royal etiquette before going to the Blue Glory Empire to attend the engagement ceremony, and he couldn’t help sneering secretly. Who knows how will the engagement turn out?

“Madam Isabella has met her…”

“Then it’s no problem, Yini will send her away.”

“Your Highness, in this case, the problem will be bigger…” Samuel expressed a strange expression, “Your Highness better go there in person.”

“What do you mean?”

“Because that lady officer is… Her Highness Veronica.”

chapters.title: Chapter 952: Angel Avatar
chapters.body:
Chapter 952: Angel Avatar

Chen Rui walked quickly to the hall of Golden Estate’s lord mansion and he saw Isabella chatting cordially with Veronica.

These 2 women actually had a lot in common. They both wear veils, and they were both beautiful women, uh … Although Chen Rui had not seen Veronica’s face yet, at least the temperament of the 2 women was superb.

Isabella gave full play to the ‘attribute’ of the former ‘Devil’s Snare Flower’. No matter what she said or did, she displayed an elegant and confident demeanor. If there was a man on the side, they must have been attracted right now.

From Chen Rui’s familiarity with Ms. Yini, it could be seen that Madam Aunt has entered a special state of ‘combat mode’ because the woman opposite was also perfect and excellent, which had brought her a lot of pressure.

How weird, why did Lex the Great ask Veronica to teach etiquette. Is it a concession? Or is it another form of coercion?

“ Cough …” Chen Rui coughed deliberately, and the 2 women’s attention suddenly shifted.

“Your Highness.” In the presence of Isabella, Veronica’s name had obviously changed, “I have been ordered by His Majesty to teach Your Highness etiquettes…”

“Teacher, call me ‘Arthur’. ” Chen Rui interrupted Veronica, “Yini is not an outsider. She is 1 of the guardians of the ancient civilization that I have inherited and my most cherished wife.”

When Veronica heard the word ‘wife’, her pupils shrank slightly, and an expression of surprise flashed by.

“You should add the words ‘one of’ in front.” Isabella added with a smile, “Your Highness cherishes more than 1 woman, isn’t it?”

Chen Rui smiled awkwardly, and Veronica also smiled, “It seems that ‘Little Arthur’ really grew up, right? My student and younger brother.”

“‘Little Arthur’.” Isabella nodded solemnly, “It’s a good name, I’ve always wanted to call you that.”

The 2 women looked at each other and laughed at the same time. Chen Rui, who was acting as a kind of mascot, could only be speechless.

Veronica sincerely praised, “Ms. Yini has a rare temperament and demeanor. You must have come from a royal family. It seems unnecessary that His Majesty asked me to come here to teach Little Arthur etiquettes.”

“What kind of royal family, I’m just a remnant of a lost empire.” Isabella’s blue eyes flashed with a hint of sadness, “My relatives are basically gone.”

In terms of the royal etiquette of noble families in the Demon, Ms. Yini could be regarded as a professor level, but if it was applied to the human world, perhaps it would be exposed.

“Whatever it is, it is already in the past.” Veronica’s eyes showed a gentle expression, “If Ms. Yini doesn’t mind, I would like to invite you to participate in the study of court etiquettes with Little Arthur. I believe that Ms. Yini and I can benefit from it.”

“Can I?” Isabella regained her original elegance and looked at Chen Rui with a smile.

Chen Rui could see that Ms. Yini’s gaze clearly read “If you don’t agree, you will surely die.” At this time, can I still say ‘no’?

The study of etiquette was originally a boring thing, but with Isabella there, interspersed with some appropriate interludes from time to time, it turned into a kind of fun.

Relaxing days always pass very fast. Soon, the etiquette class in the morning was over.

“It was a pleasant morning.” Veronica declined Chen Rui’s invitation to dine together, “Arthur, Yini, His Majesty’s imperial guards team have been waiting in the city, and they will escort me back, so you don’t have to worry. If His Majesty doesn’t change his mind, I’ll come back in a few days. Or you can go to my Shion Palace. I also want Yini to give me some pointers on the floral design.”

Isabella watched Veronica’s disappearing figure, then sighed softly, “That woman… even though her face was smiling, her heart has become a pool of ashes. She hides it almost perfectly, but she still couldn’t hide it from me. Because when I looked at her, it was like I saw myself in the mirror – My past self.”

Chen Rui gently held Isabella’s hand, “It’s all over now.”

“I think that the past 100 years…” Isabella stared into his eyes affectionately, “is for today’s happiness. Without the pain and suffering of the past, I could not be so happy today. I’m very lucky to meet you, my love.”

“It’s also my luck.”

The lips of the 2 blended together, feeling the warmth in each other’s hearts.

“ Hey , I’m going back to prepare lunch. Yesterday, I learned a new dish, called bacon fillet. Coincidentally, you can be the guinea pig.”

“If you want to grab a man’s heart, you must first grab his stomach?”

Ms. Yini smiled coquettishly, “Your stomach is not easy to grab. On the other hand, we poor sisters have been grabbed by your food long ago.”

Chen Rui shrugged, “This can be understood as equality between men and women.”

Isabella smiled and walked forward. She suddenly stopped at the door, “Chen Rui.”

“ En .”

“That Veronica…”

“ En ?”

“If you can’t help her reborn in the ashes, then help her… annihilate completely.”

“Really?”

“I know better than anyone that that is the best liberation…”

Chen Rui lowered his head and remained silent.

Time passed day by day.

On this day, Golden Estate finally welcomed the long-awaited ‘guest’.

The Holy Church’s Cardinal Gralin, along with a man and a woman.

There were also 2 ‘guardians’ to add momentum to Chen Rui’s side, Master Poison Dragon and his wife.

Gralin was probably the person from the Holy Church who was most familiar with ‘Arthur’ by now. Sir Cardinal, who looked radiant, joked as soon as he walked in, “Your Highness, glad to disturb you again.”

“I’m glad to be disturbed by Sir Gralin again.” Chen Rui’s eyes quickly glanced over at the man and the woman as he also smiled, “Looking at Sir Gralin’s appearance, I believe you bring good news this time.”

“It’s really good news!” Gralin seemed very confident, “Within 3 days, the dragons from the Dragon Valley will come to the Golden Estate to discuss cooperation with Your Highness about the magic games.”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up, “Wonderful! Sir Gralin, your presence is a huge surprise! I can imagine how much effort the church… uh , the Holy Blessing Summit put into this. I promise that the Holy Blessing Summit and the Holy Church as a whole will not regret this decision.”

“Then, the promise of Your Highness last time…”

“I will do as I say, Sir Gralin.” Chen Rui nodded without hesitation, “When I get the 2 holy relics of the Dragon Bright Empire and the Blue Glory Empire, I will accept the recommendation of the Holy Blessing Summit to join the Holy Church. Next month, I will go to the Blue Glory Empire to participate in the engagement ceremony with Princess Landbis. The goal of course… is the Holy Grail of the Blue Glory Empire. I will have to use the help of the Holy Blessing Summit at that time.”

Gralin noticed Chen Rui’s special emphasis on the ‘Holy Blessing Summit’, and he smiled a little more, “Of course. Please rest assured Your Highness, whether Your Highness marry that Princess Landbis or ascend to the throne of the Dragon Bright Empire, it does not conflict with joining the Holy Church. En … I will introduce, 2 people to Your Highness first. This is Miranda, the direct apprentice of Her Holiness Holy Lady.”

Chen Rui looked at the fair-skinned blond woman with beautiful facial features and a slightly cold face, and he nodded slightly, “Ms. Miranda.”

He and this girl with elf blood were actually ‘acquaintances’. When he was in the Holy Light Mountain as Paul’s subordinate, he played a character who was proficient in soul language and had a coveted heart for Miranda. Later, Eliza, who was also the Holy Lady’s apprentice, showed her true hideous face and used Miranda to set up a vile plan to capture Chen Rui’s ‘soul language’ power. In the end, it was self-defeating and she became an idiot with a mental breakdown.

Of course, Miranda didn’t know that the popular person who was fought over by the 3 factions of the church was ‘Richard’ who made a fuss at the Holy Light Mountain and stole the Snow Dallet Tree back then. However, Prince ‘Arthur”s gaze was very clear without the slightest distraction. This made the half-elf girl had a better impression of him in her mind as she bowed, “Your Highness Arthur, teacher was thinking to come in person, but she was holding a baptism of light for a newly acquired apprentice before. It will take a while and she couldn’t stop in the middle, so she send me here to extend her sincerest regards.”

“The new apprentice… is Ms. Tiffany mentioned by Sir Gralin.” Chen Rui said casually, “Her Holiness Holy Lady is too polite, I should be the one going to the Holy Blessing Summit to meet her. “

The news of the ‘new apprentice Tiffany’ was exactly the news that Chen Rui got from Gralin, and it was precisely for this reason that Chen Rui instructed Dragon Emperor Pagris to ‘authorize’ the magic game to the Holy Lady Faction. As for how much benefit Pagris got, then it was none of Chen Rui’s business.

Chen Rui planned this magic game layout from beginning to end. For this reason, he also got a lot of practical benefits from the competition between the 3 major forces. However, the game had its rules. After this matter was finalized, he chose the Holy Blessing Summit. Before the ability and strength reached a certain level, he could no longer wait for good offers from the 3 factions as before.

Miranda said some words of courtesies, then she bowed again without speaking. Gralin introduced the black-haired man with his eyes closed to Chen Rui, “This is the Holy Light Guardian Knight of the Holy Blessing Summit, Rafael.”

The 3 main peaks of the Holy Light Mountain had their own guardian knights, which were divided into 3 types: White Brilliance, Silver Splendor, and Holy Light. Holy Light was the highest level guardian knight.

Chen Rui stared deeply at the man as his eyes narrowed slightly, revealing an extremely rare expression of awe. His tone even trembled, “I wonder if every Holy Light Guardian Knight is so special? Why do I see an unprecedented light in this Holy Light Guardian Knight? It is so bright and holy that it is impossible to look directly…”

Chen Rui’s awe and trembling were naturally faked; he had to pretend.

Race: Angel (avatar)

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SSS+.

Physique: SSS+, strength: SSS+, spirit: SSS+, speed: SSS+.

[Analysis]: Light attribute, wind attribute, restraint, dispel, light of healing, soul power.

Danger level: Extremely high!

This Rafael had the strength of the peak stage of the Demi-God, yet he was just an avatar.

Since he came here with Gralin from the Holy Blessing Summit Faction, the angel’s identity was obvious!

TL: Raphael? He won’t see through Chen Rui’s disguise right?

chapters.title: Chapter 953: Gift! Swear By That Light God’S **
chapters.body:
Chapter 953: Gift! Swear By That Light God’S **

“Impressive sensing power. ” Rafael’s eyelids moved slightly and slowly opened, “As expected by the person chosen by the Crown of Thorns, you can see my might at a glance.”

Those pupils were actually white. It seemed to have the power to penetrate everything as they shot directly into Chen Rui’s eyes. Chen Rui only felt his soul tremble, and he couldn’t help shivering. The poison dragon and emerald dragon behind Chen Rui immediately became alert, and they made a move with a shout.

When Rafael’s eyes flashed, Paglio and Krobelus felt their bodies go numb, and the flashing figures returned to their original position as if they were entangled by countless invisible chains. Their power was also sealed by this entanglement, making them unable to move.

“Don’t worry, dragons.” Rafael smiled lightly, “I didn’t mean to hurt him. If I really want to do something, it’s impossible to stop me with your strength.”

Chen Rui’s body suddenly radiated a strong light. Circles of light waves rippled, and he seemed to become crystal clear. In the blink of an eye, he returned to his original state.

“No doubt it’s the [Body of Light Glory]. It completely absorbed the holy light.” Rafael’s white pupils gradually reverted to black color, but his face became blurred.

Chen Rui’s eyes had regained clarity as he bowed, “Thank you, sir.”

Raphael was a little puzzled, “Your body is a bit surprising to me. I wanted to improve your power just now, but there is a special devour power in your body. The holy light power I gave you was absorbed in another way.”

“Yes, sir, this is the spirit imprint power that I inherited from the ancient alchemy civilization. Since I have not fully digested the power of imprint, the imprint will automatically convert the external force into the perception of the grand master of alchemy. My strength cannot be improved for the time being. I can only absorb external forces and increase my strength when I have full control of the imprint.”

“Ancient alchemy civilization? En … no wonder you became a mechanical grand master at such a young age.” Rafael glanced at the stagnant dragon couple, “Are these 2 dragons your guardians?”

Chen Rui nodded and said, “The poison dragon and emerald dragon. To be precise, they are the guardians left to me by the ancient alchemy civilization. Besides them, there are 4 others who are not here for the time being.”

Rafael nodded slightly. Meanwhile, Paglio and Krobelus felt that the restraint disappeared. The 2 looked at each other without making any move. The strength of this enemy was far beyond what they could match. This powerhouse should have no ill will toward Chen Rui, so they didn’t go all out now.

Chen Rui breathed a sigh of relief. He was secretly glad that he passed the most important level.

Raphael’s light element holy power was indeed absorbed by the [Body of Light Glory] just now, but since he used the [Breath Holding] of the Super System to show his strength as a Warrior (Higher Demon) level, with Raphael’s powerful eyesight, if he easily changes the breath to ‘advance’, it was likely to reveal flaws. Fortunately, he successfully fooled him with the inheritance of the ancient alchemy civilization.

“Let me see the power of the Crown of Thorns.”

“Yes.” Chen Rui replied respectfully. A crystal clear white crown appeared on his head, and circles of divine light spread out.

“Quite pure power of [Divine Blessing], very good! As expected of the master chosen by the Crown of Thorns.” Rafael’s tone was full of approval, “My name is Raphael, 1 of the 3 archangels.”

Chen Rui had already anticipated that this was Raphael’s avatar, and he showed a realization expression on his face. He once again bowed deeply, “I didn’t expect it to be Sir Raphael in person!”

“The [Body of Light Glory], the blessed one recognized by the Crown of Thorns, are you willing to follow my footsteps and be under the blessing of the Holy Light forever?”

Chen Rui’s thoughts turned, and he said without hesitation, “I do.”

“From today onward, you are the Holy Child of the Holy Church, responsible of spreading the teachings, inspiring and converting the most loyal believer with the Crown of Thorns. Your status is slightly lower than the 3 archbishops and higher than the cardinal. As long as you maintain your piety and be cautious, you will be the pioneer and guide of the future of the church. As for loyalty… you are a wise man. I don’t have to remind you of that.”

Gralin and Miranda showed strange expressions. It was more respectful and joyful. Raphael’s words had been obvious, ‘Arthur’ would be the next pope, which also represented the supreme controller of the entire Holy Blessing Summit in the future.

“The official canonization ceremony of the Holy Child will be officially held at the Holy Light Mountain in the future.” Raphael said indifferently, “Now you can do what you want to do, and the church will provide maximum support, including the throne, holy relics… and everything.”

“Understood, Sir Raphael!” Chen Rui showed his triumphant expression as his mind brightened: The reason why the supreme being of the Holy Blessing Summit descended and canonized personally is a final decision, which completely marked ‘Arthur’ with the ‘Raphael’ tag, making it impossible for me to change my mind to go to another faction.

There should also be a corresponding competition between the 3 archangels, which was likely to be reflected in aspects such as faith power, but these were not important to Chen Rui. Raphael’s promise of ‘support’ was what he wanted the most.

Chen Rui’s guess was not far off. His real worth was the [Body of Light Glory] and the Crown of Thorns.

[Divine Blessing] of the Crown of Thorns could convert someone into light-element physique. Although the effect was inferior to the Snow Dallet Tree, now the Snow Dallet Tree had disappeared, the Crown of Thorns became a necessary replacement. Otherwise, the Holy Church would be equivalent to losing its own blood-making ability, and he could only absorb the people from the 2 Holy Empires to become the backbone of the church. The [Body of Light Glory] appeared in the 2 Holy Empires because of the 2 holy relics. However, unlike the Crown of Thorns, which had its own convert function, the Holy Grail and Holy Light Robe did not have the convert function. It’s just that its own sacred attribute would affect the bloodline, and there would be a certain chance of creating light-element physique. This chance was highly dependent on luck. The probability was far less than the Crown of Thorns.

After the Snow Dallet Tree ‘disappeared’, the church could no longer convert the light-element physique, so the [Body of Light Blessing] became less and less, and the [Body of Light Glory] became even rarer. By convention, 1 of the prerequisites for the pope was the [Body of Light Glory]. Although Vantis was still in place, in the absence of a light-element physique, Chen Rui had already entered the vision of the church’s higher level with the [Body of Light Glory] alone.

Therefore, Raphael, 1 of the 3 archangels, would personally come to recruit this ‘talent’ who carried many titles such as imperial prince, internal affairs genius, alchemy grand master, the [Body of Light Glory], and the Crown of Thorns.

Raphael nodded, “Here is 2 more things. The first is the Holy Ring Badge. This badge represents my will and privilege. You can issue orders to any church personnel below the archbishop, including Glorious Knight and judges. This badge also has another function that is to summon my avatar, but this summoning can only be used once, and it consumes a lot of my original body power, so you should not use it unless it is a last resort. The second is the ‘Chain’ of Mind’. It is a powerful artifact that imprisons the soul and spirit power. Even if the opponent is a super powerhouse with a kingdom strength, he cannot be immune to it. With this artifact and the Holy Ring Badge, plus the poison dragon Kingdom level guardian, it should be able to keep you safe until you return to the Holy Light Mountain as the Holy Child.”

“Thank you sir!” Chen Rui looked very excited when he looked at the silver-white chain and the round badge that appeared in front of him. He stared at the chain, and he suddenly spoke up, “Sir Raphael, with all due respect, this artifact seems to be…”

“You actually see through it?” Raphael was slightly surprised, “Your eyesight is even better than I expected. You deserve to accept the ancient inheritance alchemy grand master. The ‘Chain of Mind’ is actually a part of a powerful artifact. Another part is called the ‘Shackles of True Flame’. The merging of the 2 can form a more powerful artifact, ‘Seal of Fire and Wind’. Even Pseudo-God may not be able to avoid its shackles. Unfortunately, this requires a special law merging. I have not been able to find the most suitable method, so the 2 artifacts are used separately. I gave the ‘Shackles of True Flame’ to others, but unfortunately, I lost it unexpectedly. Otherwise, with your grand master-level mechanics attainments, there is a good chance that the 2 will be merged into a true ‘Seal of Fire and Wind’.

“That’s the case.” Chen Rui’s regretful expression swept past. He took the Chain of Mind and the Holy Ring Badge, bowed deeply, and said loudly, “Thank you, sir! I, Arthur. Roland, swear by the great Light God that I will not disappoint sir!”

That’s right, swear by the little ** of the corpse in the Chaos Realm…

How could Raphael know the ‘Holy Child”s careful thoughts? Only when he had completely subdued the ant, a satisfied smile appeared on his slightly blurred face as his figure gradually faded away.

Sir Archangel didn’t see the ecstatic look in the eyes of a human who lowered his head – The Shackles of True Flame? That’s right, I will definitely ‘perform’ well, and you will never be ‘disappointed’!

Well, you’ve won all my favors, Sir Raphael!

In fact, Chen Rui didn’t see the specialty of Chain of Mind just now, but that some kind of power in his body had a kind of faint throbbing because of the Chain of Mind. It was strange that Raphael actually said it himself.

Law merging?

In the battle with back then, he used the ‘absorption law’ of the Super System to ‘devour’ the Shackles of True Flame. If he could ‘devour’ the Chain of Mind now, he could get the 2 purest and powerful law. As long as the 2 laws were truly integrated, even if he couldn’t get the ‘Seal of Fire and Wind’, he could produce a more powerful binding force than the Shackles of True Flame!

No doubt Gralin’s promise was effective. The dragons sent a representative to discuss cooperation about the magic game the next day.

An ‘old acquaintance’, the Holy Dragon Gueroas.

After some tacit ‘negotiations’, the 2 parties reached an ‘agreement’ on the distribution of benefits, then the Dragon Valley entrusted the Golden Estate with the signal towers and the magic helmet ‘technology’ needed to establish the magic game.

This kind of the magic game helmet was actually a simplified version, separated from magic television, and it only had a simple game function.

The long-prepared Golden Estate immediately began to produce the magic helmet and signal towers components, then they immediately handed over the produced signal towers components to the Holy Church who came to pick up the goods. At the same time, the church-led propaganda work began in full-swing in the human world.

The Holy Church’s faith coverage was extremely huge, and its influence far exceeded any kind of force. It could even be said that it was the sum of the entire human empire and kingdom.

For the magic games, it was equivalent to a terrifying commercial propaganda group. For a time, training, entertainment, glory, battle… and other magic game-related keywords spread all over the human world.

The storm of the magic game began to sweep the entire human world!

TL: He just gave away an artifact that could possibly bind him…

chapters.title: Chapter 954: Moon Night
chapters.body:
Chapter 954: Moon Night

Palace, study room

“Your Majesty, the Golden Estate first distributed a limited-edition batch of the free magic game helmet to nobles and believers of all empires and kingdoms throughout the human world through the Hall of Light everywhere.”

“Free?” Lex the Great on the throne frowned. “The entire human world? Even if it’s part of it, the cost is quite staggering.”

“That’s right, it’s really shocking. According to my preliminary estimate, this investment accounts for almost 70% of the entire early income of the yellow dragon wine or even more.” Old Kovax said emotionally, “When I got this data, my first reaction was that the Royal Highness Third Prince was crazy. He left and abandoned the yellow dragon wine with such a good source of money to make some magic game and invested such a huge amount of money, but…

“Now the first sale of the magic game has caused the whole world to boil…” Old Kovax said with a wry smile, “The magic game helmet order fair at the Golden Estate almost caught up with the triennial trade fair of the human world. Even the elf tribe, who has always been aloof, is here. This is just the beginning! In terms of the income of the magic game, the magic game helmet itself is still a small part. The charging cost of the magic game helmet can theoretically continue indefinitely! You can imagine what huge and long-term benefits this magic game will bring! If the dragons are the creator of the magic game, then Royal Highness Third Prince is the ‘mother’ who gives the game a vast life force! With such a vision, such courage, and such talent, whether it is the empire’s Government Administration Council, the Commerce Department, or even the entire human world, no second person can match it!”

“It’s been the first time in 30 years that I’ve heard you compliment someone like that.” Lex the Great took a deep breath and nodded, “He’s really dazzling, too dazzling… Will he be even more dazzling?”

Old Kovax’s lips moved as if he was about to say something, but the words turned into, “I don’t know.”

“Ancient heritage, mechanic grand master, the Holy Church, the yellow dragon wine. ” Lex the Great didn’t say a word. His brows moved slightly, “These are all secondary. Why even…”

Lex the Great didn’t say the words the ‘Dragon Valley’, but his mind was full of ups and downs, “Real good show” – The magic game is what Arthur referred to as the ‘real good show’!

Compared with outsiders, Lex the Great was much clearer about the inside story of the Dragon Valley. Whether it was the yellow dragon wine or the magic game, he had never heard any news before. He only heard that the dragons became an association partner with the Storm Island about a year ago, and they used some kind of ‘ancient illusion’ of the Storm Island to test dragons and dragon riders. What does this ‘ancient illusion’ have to do with the magic game? How does it relate to the ‘ancient alchemy civilization’?!

So, even the dragons…

“I don’t know.” Old Kovax replied, his head dropped even lower. No one knew if the answer was referring to Lex the Great’s ‘why’ or the unspoken name.

“You really don’t know,” Lex the Great gave him a half-smile, as if reading the old courtier’s mind, “because you’re just Old Kovax, and he is ‘Arthur’.”

“Arthur. Roland.” Old Kovax added somewhat redundantly, but Lex the Great was lost in thought. His right index finger on the armrest of the seat was tapping continuously.

As an old minister who had served for many years, Old Kovax felt a chill in his mind. There were only 2 situations in which His Majesty would have such habitual things. The first was anxiety; the second was… killing intent.

Either way… Old Kovax shuddered.

Lex the Great waved his hand, and Old Kovax bowed and retreated. Unknowingly, a drop of cold sweat fell from his forehead.

The ruler of the Dragon Bright Empire stood up, paced back and forth in the study, turned his head abruptly, and saw the portrait on the wall on the side. The dignified and beautiful woman was bathing in the moonlight shone into the window, smiling toward him.

Under the same moonlight.

The Shion Palace.

Under the laurel tree in the garden.

“This is the last etiquette class.” Veronica sat down with a smile, “Unfortunately, Yini didn’t come today. I prepared her favorite rose cake.”

Chen Rui glanced at the empty plate and said with a smile, “So, I will solve this regret for her.”

Veronica glanced at him angrily, “You don’t know to save some to take back to Yini. Man can’t be so selfish.”

“ Haha ,” Chen Rui’s palm showed 2 delicate cakes, “Teacher was fooled. I secretly hid 2 pieces in the space ring.”

“You…” Veronica smiled and shook her head. Suddenly, a small cup was stuffed into her hand.

“Teacher, this is the pudding I made before I came here. It’s a very novel snack. You can try it.”

“Did you make it yourself?” Veronica looked at the strange dessert with a fruity fragrance in surprise. She picked up a spoon, scooped a piece and put it in her mouth. Her eyes slightly brightened, “It’s delicious.”

“As long as the teacher likes it, I will often make it for you in the future.”

Veronica looked at the pudding in her hands, and her eyes suddenly turned red. She lowered her head.

“Teacher?”

“It’s okay, I just feel warm.” Veronica raised her head. The strangeness in her eyes had long since disappeared, and she still smiled, “Teacher is very happy, because I haven’t felt this way for a long time.”

“Teacher… If you want, I can always accompany you.”

“What if,” Veronica’s smile became more indifferent, “I have fallen into the abyss where there is no sunlight?”

The abyss…? Chen Rui looked straight into her eyes and slowly stretched out his hands, “Then I will use these hands to pull you out of the abyss.”

Veronica’s fingers trembled. She slowly raised her hands as if to reach out to his outstretched hands, but she finally changed direction and touched his face.

The hand gently caressed the face. It was as warm as ‘Arthur’ remembered.

It’s just that in Chen Rui’s sense, Veronica’s emotions at this time were uneasy and fear. There was a hint of strange breath that had been hidden for a long time.

This trace of breath was very familiar to Chen Rui.

Destruction.

This warm hand, stroking his face, was like a sharp knife stroking back and forth between his throat.

As long as the other party moved a thought, his head would be separated from his body… If Chen Rui was still the original ‘Arthur’.

Chen Rui didn’t evade; he just stared into her eyes. At this moment, he felt a trance, but his memory became clearer.

In college, the teenager met Veronica who was like an older sister. The teenager who lost his mother since childhood was deeply attracted by this teacher.

There was no identity coercion, and no superfluous evil thoughts. Only a heart that longed for care and closeness.

True feelings could always move people. Veronica, who had always been withdrawn, finally accepted this younger brother.

In the beginning, it was a very pure sibling relationship, and that was Arthur’s 2 happiest years.

With the growth of age, the mind of the young man had quietly changed. In his life, except for his mother who died of illness, no woman could replace Veronica.

Until the marriage was announced.

The warm hands moved away, and the boy’s tears blurred the vision.

He braved the rain and rushed back to the Dragon Bright Empire.

Then, he knelt and begged outside Lex the Great’s bedroom for 3 whole days until he fell into a coma and became seriously ill.

Unfortunately, that result still could not be changed.

Veronica seemed to see these past events through his eyes, and another emotion began to appear. It was entangled with destruction and fear, stuck at a stalemate.

The destructive breath became stronger and stronger as if it would burst out immediately.

Chen Rui’s Star Power was charged, but unexpectedly, there was neither massacre nor destruction, only 2 quivering lips lightly pressed on his face.

Despite the veil, he could still feel the warmth as if even the soul could melt in it.

The warmth gradually faded away.

“You’re going to the Blue Glory Empire tomorrow. This is a farewell from your teacher. If you get married in the future, don’t come here again. Treat Princess Landbis well, as well as Yini and Zola.”

“Teacher…” Chen Rui clearly felt that instead of weakening, the power of the fierce struggle at the moment became stronger.

The other hand that she hid behind her back clenched into fist while trembling. The skin on the back of the hand was already showing strange cracks. The fingers that were pinched into the palm penetrated deep into the flesh. Traces of blood seeped out and dripped onto the ground.

Looking at that gentle smile, if he hadn’t known what had just happened, he would have thought it was just an ordinary kiss.

Calm and warm.

Another familiar feeling.

In the memory, the fragments that had been broken were recovering bit by bit.

“Go on, I’m a little unwell. I need to rest.” Veronica’s voice was calm.

Chen Rui gently stroked his face that was kissed just now, and he gave her a deep look, “Veronica, wait for me.”

At this moment, instead of calling him ‘teacher’, he called out her name directly and turned away.

After walking a few steps, the petals beside Veronica suddenly turned into powder.

As if he didn’t seem to notice, he walked all the way out of the Shion Palace without looking back.

The moment Chen Rui disappeared, the space beside Veronica suddenly changed, turning into a blood-red world. A terrifying roar came from her throat, and a fierce power surged out as if some kind of beast was raging. The sky was torn apart, and the whole space was shaking.

With the eyesight of the maids in the distance, they couldn’t see it at all. Even if they looked closely, they could only see that the shape of the shade under a certain tree was a little distorted, and the fallen petals disappeared one after another. They didn’t know the real change in space.

After a long time, the terrifying turbulent power in the blood-red space just stopped.

Only that vaguely graceful figure was left, holding her shoulders with her hands that had turned into terrifying claws. She sat down tremblingly, and she curled up like a lone wild goose with broken wings.

Under the deep moonlight, a pair of star-like eyes in the distance were silently watching this scene.

TL: Star-like eyes? Princess Landbis?

chapters.title: Chapter 955: The Truth Back Then
chapters.body:
Chapter 955: The Truth Back Then

“Teacher… What happened to you?” The boy asked in surprise, looking at the woman who was a little strange.

“Teacher is fine.” The woman’s voice was calm and gentle, but her trembling shoulders betrayed her.

The teenager keenly discovered the abnormality of the woman. Although she had been forced to marry his uncle, in his heart, she would always be the closest and most cherished sister and teacher. Even if it was a little pain, it seemed to stab in his heart.

“Teacher, tell me, what happened?”

“Teacher is really fine.” It was still a warm smile.

“I know! I’m useless! You must hate me very much!” The originally cowardly young man finally got angry rarely. He shouted, “I was stupid back then! I should have brought the teacher out of college! “

“It’s none of your business…” The woman shook her head and sighed, “It’s all destiny, my destiny from birth. Even if the teacher hates anyone, I won’t hate you. Little Arthur, you are teacher’s closest person… the only one. Go away, don’t meet the teacher again. Teacher is an ominous person. Anyone close to me will be doomed.”

“I don’t believe in doom! I’ll take teacher away now! Get out of this damn cage! Even if I give up everything!”

“Everything… Hate everything, destroy everything.” The woman’s shoulders shook even more, and she couldn’t help but murmur as cold as an abyss, “Bearing the most noble hatred, can’t leave any spirit flaws!”

“Teacher, what did you say?”

“You… go quickly!” The woman’s body was shaking, and her breathing became a little heavier.

“Teacher…” The boy hurried over to support the woman.

The woman took a deep breath and her body became stable again.

She stretched out 1 hand and gently stroked the boy’s face. The gaze as deep as the sea was so gentle. Although the other hand hidden behind her was trembling and dripping blood, this hand was warm and gentle.

“Goodbye, Little Arthur. No matter where you’re taken, please live. My student, my younger brother, the only thing I can look up to in the endless abyss, that ray of sunlight…”

The warmth gradually faded away. Although he didn’t understand what was going on, he clearly felt the farewell and sadness, and the boy’s vision couldn’t help being blurred by tears.

Immediately afterward, a space fissure appeared, and the boy’s figure disappeared into the fissure.

Before disappearing, a terrifying roar and the sound of space bursting could vaguely be heard.

In the memory, the consciousness alternated from hazy to clear several times before it finally returned to calm.

Chen Rui slowly opened his eyes – It turned out that this was the truth back then! The ‘real culprit’ who made ‘Arthur’ cross over to the Demon Realm was actually Veronica!

In fact, Veronica launched the space power to banish ‘Arthur’ with all her strength before she lost control and destroyed everything. The real intention was to save his life.

Even at the last moment of the outbreak, the deep blue eyes were still as gentle as water. It was a trace of residual tenderness wrapped in endless construction and hatred.

It’s just that Arthur’s luck was too bad. He was banished to the Demon Realm by the space power. Because his body was too weak, he not only lost most of his memory, but he was also on the verge of death. At this time, it happened that Chen Rui’s soul crossover and merged with Arthur. In the end, the consciousness reborn, becoming the now brand new ‘Arthur-Chen Rui’.

Because it was merging rather than a complete devour, Arthur still had a certain residual consciousness. Due to the insufficient strength, he did not feel this residual at first. The higher the level of strength, the clearer the sense of this consciousness.

The stronger the strength, the harder the road. Every nuance was enough to affect the overall situation. To reach a higher realm, Chen Rui must solve all the redundant factors, and Arthur’s consciousness was one of them.

Veronica is the biggest obsession – and now it seems, this obsession is indeed living up to its name.

In fact, it wasn’t just Veronica whom he was obsessed with enough to cause an effect, there was another man whom Arthur loved and hated.

The human mind is the most unpredictable thing.

It seems that the most difficult mission is not the last stop at the Holy Light Mountain, but the first stop at the Dragon Bright Empire.

However, he had now temporarily left the first stop and was heading to the second stop, the Blue Glory Empire.

There was a fiancee who had ‘waited’ for 7 years, and she was also an ‘old friend’ whom he had met several times.

The sales of the magic game have stabilIzed now. The ‘popularity’ of the Holy Church was indeed very strong. The magic game had far more coverage than the aromatic millet wine. Although Chen Rui himself was no longer in the Golden Estate, there were Isabella and Samuel, and other people there. Even if he left, the development and growth of the magic game was not a problem.

Zola, Paglio, and Dodo became the ‘guardians’ of this entourage. Zola got the secret news from Ms. Yini, her biggest purpose of this trip was to supervise certain matters between someone and his fiancée; Master Slime had been in the Golden Estate for a while, and he was a little bored of staying there, so he faithfully said that ‘I wanted to follow the master’. In fact, he planned to follow the master to enjoy the food, drink, and fun. Master Poison Dragon originally wanted to take his wife to join the tour group, but Ms. Emerald Dragon stayed in the Golden Estate for closed-door training as her strength just broke through.

Krobelus had completely digested the power of the law fragment, and the distance from kingdomization was just a step. When eating a few days ago, Ms. Betty suddenly demonstrated her prowess and ate all the food, then she started closed-door training in enlightenment. This way of breaking through made Chen Rui a little speechless – the advancement of foodies?

As for safety, there was no need to worry. There was now a dragon presiding in the Golden Estate; that was the Holy Dragon Gueroas, ‘the cooperative representative of the dragon’. Although regarded as a mortal enemy by the Old Father-in-law Elf King and defeated by Chen Rui, this Demi-God level dragon elder was still quite good to Zola, Chen Rui and other ‘juniors’. With his protection, nothing could basically go wrong with the Golden Estate. Worse comes to worst, he could bring Isabella and Samuel back to the Dragon Valley.

Veronica, wait for me.

We will meet again.

I will face the real you.

Perhaps, with the real me, with these hands… A smirk appeared on Chen Rui’s face.

“Master, stop smirking. What’s so good about your hands. You’re about to lose this game!” The slime’s voice sounded.

Paglio’s smug laughter came from the opposite side, “ Haha , what kind of magic card king. Aren’t you showing off just now? How come your main force is eaten by Master Poison Dragon now? Eh , Zola, you are cheating for this guy!”

It turned out that they were playing ‘Fate Showdown’, the ancient magic card game, in the carriage. Paglio was actually a rookie, but now he was just at the stage of ‘getting addicted’, and his interest was quite large.

Taking advantage of Chen Rui’s distraction, the poison dragon sent a team to set up an ambush to kill all the Glorious Knight Captains led by Chen Rui’s main force. The poison dragon’s army pursued after the victory and went straight to the location of the castle.

Ms. Fairy Dragon beside Chen Rui could not stand seeing the triumphant villain expression of the poison dragon, so she gave him a lightning strike with just the right power. As a result, Master Poison Dragon’s hair stood up and turned into a punk style explosive head.

“Don’t be too happy, rookie.” Chen Rui shook the jade hand of Ms. Fairy Dragon, indicating that he didn’t need his wife for such a rookie.

No doubt, Master Poison Dragon couldn’t laugh anymore. After his army reached the position, there was no castle, but a large area of defensive towers, causing the entire army to be wiped out. At the same time, a team of a Silver Queen led a few Champion Swordsman to demolish the houses while activating treatment at the poison dragon’s own site, demolishing all defense and resource buildings such as the defense tower, farmhouse, logging yard, and so on. The poison dragon had hundreds of manufacturable soldiers; he just didn’t have the money to build them, so he could only watch the most elementary Champion Swordsmen openly demolish them within their own sphere of influence. The buildings that took great effort to build and upgrade were demolished one by one. This process was quite painful to watch. Master Poison Dragon lost his temper completely and conceded defeat.

“Cunning human!”

“The so-called show off is just to attract your attention, rookie. The real killing move comes later. As long as the method is right, even the smallest power can change the whole battle.” Chen Rui implicitly said. No one knew if he was referring to the poker game or something else.

Ms. Fairy Dragon cast a demonstrative glance at the dejected Master Poison Dragon, then she continued to lean comfortably on Chen Rui’s shoulder.

“Master Truly Handsome!” Master Slime hurriedly flattered, and one ‘hand’ sneaked out a wine bottle and took a sip. This was Paglio’s wine.

Although the ride was a carriage, in this independent space item, the degree of turbulence was greatly reduced, so it was just like in an ordinary room.

At this moment, someone knocked on the door; it was Proyo.

Proyo looked like a young man in his early 20s, but his real age was actually in his 30s. His strength was Pseudo-Saint (Demon Emperor), and he was the deputy legion commander of the Dragon Scale Legion of the empire. He was appointed as the leader of this escort team. There were also 2 Saint (Demon Overlord) powerhouses, Bedell and Cardo, as well as dozens of elites of the Dragon Scale Legion, all of whom obey Proyo’s dispatch.

Proyo was capable of doing things and had a cheerful temperament, which gave a good first impression. Anyway, he was also Freya’s fiancé, so Chen Rui’s attitude was more friendly.

Dodo’s ‘hand’ extended a few meters and opened the door. Proyo saw the magic cards on the table, and he was stunned for a moment, then he spoke up, “Your Highness, we have arrived at the Yang Shao Capital.”

Meanwhile, in another place.

Another Chen Rui’ showed an implicit smile with a frightening red light flashing in his eyes. As the most trusted guardian of the east district’s Chief Bishop Soranly, he held a secret order that Soranly had just received from above.

The mission of this secret order was not only aimed at the east district, but also the heads of all areas of the mysterious cult. The content was only 1 sentence: Use all efforts to kill the third prince of the Dragon Bright Empire, Arthur. Roland, who is going to the Blue Glory Empire to hold a wedding!

TL: He wants to disappear in the assassination of the Black Death Followers? What about the holy relic?

chapters.title: Chapter 956: Ambush
chapters.body:
Chapter 956: Ambush
