The ‘Bride Escort Team’ of the Dragon Bright Empire entered the Yang Shao Capital and received a grand welcome from King Robben XIX.

Although the Yang Shao Empire was a famous ‘mercenary kingdom’ in the human world, its territory was not vast, and many countries border the Dragon Bright Empire. When Robben I founded the kingdom as a mercenary, he received strong support from the Dragon Bright Empire, so the Yang Shao Empire had always existed as a vassal state similar to the Dragon Bright Empire.

Compared with the founders and ancestors, the current Robben XIX was all-smiles with a big belly. There was no look of a mercenary at all; he was totally a king. Facing the arrival of the third prince of the Dragon Bright Empire, Robben XIX did not dare to neglect. He held a welcoming ceremony with the highest reception specifications.

Not only because of the status of the prince of His Highness, but also because ‘Arthur’ was the lord of the Golden Estate who controlled the magic game and aromatic millet wine, plus the title of 1 of the 3 major mechanical grand masters of human.

Such an important person was likely to be the king of the Dragon Bright Empire in the future, so a good relationship was absolutely necessary.

Chen Rui politely declined Robben XIX’s kindness to hold a grand banquet for him. He only made a short stay and left toward the Garden City.

Before leaving, Chen Rui gave Robben XIX a few bottles of the most excellent yellow dragon wine, plus a long-term aromatic millet wine supply list, which brought a smile to Robben XIX’s chubby face.

The team’s route was to go through the Garden City to the Clear Mirror City of Loya Empire, then to Starlight Empire through the teleportation portal of the Clear Mirror City, and finally from Starlight Empire to the Jade Forest Sea.

The carriage was equipped with the most sophisticated mutated warhorses of the Dragon Bright Empire with the best speed and endurance. They could see things clearly even at night, which was far from what civilian vehicles could compare to, so it could greatly save travel time.

After all, Chen Rui saved a lot of work because the magic game had the ‘assistance’ of the Holy Church. Therefore, he set off earlier than planned with plenty of time on hand. It wasn’t that he was in a hurry to go to the Blue Glory Empire to get engaged, but to go to the Jade Forest Sea and meet the 2 grand masters again. As for what Finoia said he wanted to give, he didn’t really take it to heart.

These 2 were his true friends in the human world. When he met them, he had only just reached the state of mechanics quasi-grandmaster. The 2 grand masters gave him selfless guidance and help. In the end, he succeeded in advancing to the grand master, thus defeating Saman and Ukleus in the life and death battle of the Demon Realm’s mechanic master contest. Now Chen Rui’s mechanic skills had faintly surpassed the 2 grand masters, and his combat power was far better than the 2, but no matter what his strength or mechanic skills were, friends were friends.

Friendship would not change because of high or low status.

The speeding carriage suddenly stopped. The pause was so sudden that even Chen Rui in the carriage space felt it. He immediately notified Zola and the others, then he kept the space. There were sounds of clamor and fighting from outside the carriage.

“Your Highness, please don’t leave the carriage!” The Saint powerhouse Bedell said solemnly, “We are attacked by an unknown force, and General Proyo is directing the battle.”

Chen Rui stuck his head out to take a glance and he already saw the entire situation.

This was a concave-shaped terrain with taller peaks on both sides. There were burning huge logs on the ground in front and behind. The air was filled with the scorching breath after the magic circle was activated, and the firelight reflected the nearby corpses. There were people and horses.

It seemed that the enemy was using the terrain to launch an attack, blocking the way the convoy. Judging from the power and layout of the magic circle, it was by no means ordinary bandits, but a preplanned ambush.

Under the command of Proyo, the knights restrained the horses, huddled into a circle, and protected the carriage in the middle.

In the darkness, there were countless piercing sounds and faintly flickering light. It should be feather arrows enchanted with magic.

The wand in Bedell’s hand shook slightly, and the arrows seemed to hit the intangible shield. They broke and fell. A strange machine sounded, and there was another sharp whistling sound breaking through the air.

“Huge crossbow!” Bedell’s facial expression had changed. Huge crossbow was a giant and complex ballista originally used to deal with giant demon beasts such as giant dragons. It was quite time-consuming to reload, but its momentum and destructive power were extremely terrifying.

Although powerful, it was a lifeless machine after all. Bedell had a way to deal with it if faced individually, but at present, his duty was to protect the carriage, which meant that he could only resist it forcefully on the spot.

It was just a split second from the time he heard the sound to the time he realized it. Bedell had no time to react. The wand lit up with dazzling light. The territory power surged out. There were several thick soils in the air that condensed into a shield, floating in front.

Almost the next second, there was the sound of the earth shield being pierced through, followed by a crackling sound. The ground trembled, and almost all the earth shields were shattered. Fortunately, there were only large cracks in the last 2 layers, barely resisting the ‘arrow.’ Many of the knights nearby were injured by the bursting impact.

“Damn, it’s the giant bolts cast with the strongest explosion magic circle!” Another Saint swordsman, Cardo, couldn’t help but scold, “Even in the army, the huge crossbow machine is a strictly prohibited ordnance. Where did these bastards get it?!”

Proyo immediately ordered the knights to dismount and put the horses behind them. They further narrowed the circle in standby mode.

Bedell forcibly activated the territory power just now to block the blow. He dared not to neglect and waved the wand again. The ground shook, and tall and hard thick walls rose in all directions, protecting the carriage like a city wall.

The sound of the machine and the sharp whistle sounded again. This time, there was more than 1 giant crossbow. The surrounding earth walls were pierced through several layers and collapsed under the explosive power, but the innermost layers were not damaged.

Bedell was proficient in earth element magic, and his ability to adapt was extremely fast. This kind of earth wall technique that condensed territory power was really the best way to defend against the giant crossbows.

After a round of unsuccessful shooting, the sound stopped temporarily. After all, reloading was the biggest weakness of this huge crossbow. However, ghostly figures began to appear behind the collapsed earth wall, rushing toward the carriage – After the shooting was unsuccessful, the enemy used melee combat.

The knights near the carriage were all the elites of the Dragon Scale Legion. They didn’t panic or move rashly, just waiting quietly for Captain Proyo’s order.

The phantoms were pretty close. Proyo gave an order, and the swordsmen in the front row swung their long swords in unison, slashing out at an angle: Straight, horizontal, then straight, then horizontal… Even the weakest swordsmen were of Master level. The fierce winds rushed out neatly like a giant net. Those phantoms turned into countless pieces before they got close to the body.

Chen Rui could see that these knights had a kind of power similar to magical tattoos on their bodies. When they were combined into a formation, the power could be several times greater.

These well-trained, battle-hardened elites knew when to advance and retreat as if they were 1 unit. Even in the face of the Saint powerhouse, they also had the strength to fight.

The formation of combined attacks was the best way of war for humans, and the Demon Realm was much weaker in this regard. Sometimes, they rely more on individual strength. Generally speaking, due to their lifespan and physical strength, demons were better than human powerhouses of the same level.

The elites of the Dragon Scale Legion in front of Chen Rui taught him a lesson. In the blink of an eye, they beheaded enemies that outnumbered them like a meat grinder.

Bedell around the carriage suddenly looked up and saw countless luminous spots in the night sky, and those luminous spots magnified a lot in an instant. They were actually burning meteorites.

“[Meteor Rain]!” Bedell exclaimed. [Meteor Rain] was a powerful fire magic. The lethality to fixed targets on the ground was extremely high. There were hundreds of these meteorites. Even at this distance, one could feel the terrifying fire element wave. It seemed that there was a powerful fire magician among the enemy.

Since the carriage couldn’t move now, Bedell could only resist it like resisting the giant crossbow before. He immediately raised his wand high, aimed it at the sky, and quickly chanted a spell.

At this moment, a warning sign suddenly appeared in his mind. A golden light lit up, flying toward him like a lightning bolt, but the whistling sound came after – Arrow!

This arrow condensed an incomparably strong territory power, and the timing was extremely accurate. It was when Bedell condensed his magic power to resist the [Meteor Rain] in the air, so he didn’t have time to make a second reaction.

The magician’s melee combat ability was almost equal to zero. If the arrow struck him, Bedell would be severely injured even if he didn’t die, then he would not be able to resist the [Meteor Rain] falling from the sky. The carriage and the people nearby would subsequently become melted meat sauce.

“ Ding! ” The arrow was blocked by a greatsword. It was another Saint powerhouse Cardo holding the sword.

Cardo no doubt lived up to Bedell’s expectations and took the arrow for him. Bedell’s magic power surged out, and the [Meteor Rain] in the sky quickly slowed down.

The golden light lit up, and this time the target was Cardo. It was 5 consecutive arrows in a line. The front arrow accurately shot into the back nock tail, which was equal to nearly 5 times the impact. Cardo parried his greatsword. He was pushed back for more than 10 meters.

Before he could recover, dozens of golden lights whistled toward Bedell who was resisting the meteor rain. Cardo had no time to rescue him. Bedell knew he had to make a choice, and his figure instantly appeared in the air. This teleportation made the [Meteor Rain] fall a little faster. Bedell quickly stabilized the magic power he resisted and shouted, “Take His Highness out of here!”

If they stayed still like this, they could only be passively beaten, so they must give up the carriage.

However, just as Bedell said it, the golden lights that missed the target actually turned an arc and tracked the mid-air Bedell as though they had eyes.

Bedell was shocked. At this critical moment, the golden light suddenly stopped, revealing the original shape inside – Arrows made of golden metal.

The next scene made everyone stunned. These dozens of gleaming arrows instantly turned into ash, and these faintly radiant ash quickly retreated, following the trajectory of the arrows when they came as if the scene was rewinded.

In the blink of an eye, the faint lights had flown backward and returned to the place where the arrow was fired, and a shrill cry sounded. The cry stopped abruptly, and there was no sound.

Bedell in the air could see it most clearly. It was a slender figure who tried to avoid the receding light several times, but he was unable to succeed. The moment the light returned to his body, he screamed and his body was turned to ashes.

Bedell only felt that the pressure from above had loosened. The hundreds of meteorites with flames turned to ashes in the blink of an eye, and they were blown away by the night wind in the sky.

What is this power? It is actually so powerful! That slender figure is obviously the powerhouse of peak stage Saint, but he actually turned into ash in an instant. Judging from the disperse, this power is not like magic but more like a poison!

Everything just now was naturally the masterpiece of Paglio sitting on the top of the carriage. He only needed to move his fingers to solve these lowly assassins.

Master Poison Dragon took a sip of wine and winked at the human as if to show off. – Ain’t I amazing? So what if you are powerful? You can only pretend to be a grandson…

Chen Rui had an indifferent expression, but Zola gave the poison dragon a glare before withdrawing it. Anyway, if I made a move, 10 Paglios would have to kneel as well. Why bother to compare with this fellow?

Only the slime looked downcast. Such a good opportunity to make credits was missed because of the greed to drink the last half bottle of wine.

“The enemy has retreated!” Bedell could clearly see that after the powerhouse that shot the arrow was killed, the ghostly black figures seemed to have received some order and quickly retreated, including the fire-element Saint magician who cast the [Meteor Rain].

Cardo stepped forward with Bedell who just landed and bowed to Paglio with awe in their eyes. Others might not know it yet, but as a powerful Saint, he and Bedell could both sense that it was the casual-looking man next to the Royal Highness Third Prince who took down the enemy.

With a wave of his hand, the peak stage Saint powerhouse was turned into ashes. The guardian of ‘Arthur’ has far surpassed the Saint-super powerhouse!

Seeing the enemy retreat, the knights raised their long swords in unison and cheered for victory.

Zola whispered in Chen Rui’s ear, “I felt the wave of water element teleportation. Those people should have used the one-time teleportation array to escape.”

Chen Rui nodded, revealing a thoughtful expression.

Proyo didn’t hear Zola’s voice. He just frowned and spoke up, “I keep feeling that there’s something wrong. I think the enemy is retreating a little too hastily…”

“General is overthinking it.” Bedell shook his head disapprovingly, “I can see very clearly that the leader of the enemy was killed by His Highness’ sir guardian, which caused their morale to drop, so they retreated.”

“It’s just a commander’s intuition; I hope I’m wrong.” Proyo nodded. When he was arranging the soldiers to clear the road, Paglio suddenly frowned and stood up.

chapters.title: Chapter 957: Misunderstanding And Conspiracy
chapters.body:
Chapter 957: Misunderstanding And Conspiracy

Just as Paglio stood up, there was a roar in the distance.

The voice was so loud that it could penetrate one’s soul. The knights only felt their hearts throbbing. The hands holding the sword trembled as they covered their chests, showing an uncomfortable expression. Even Proyo and the 2 Saint powerhouses were no exception.

Chen Rui was not affected because of the ‘protection’ of Dodo and Zola.

Paglio snorted, let out a low roar – A dragon roar.

Although this dragon roar was not very loud, it had an incomparably powerful strength, completely defeating the strange power of the opponent, then the abnormality of everyone disappeared immediately.

The raging whistle sound immediately pinpointed the direction of the dragon roar. In the blink of an eye, someone had approached. Paglio flicked and disappeared on the top of the carriage.

In the blink of an eye, the night sky in the distance lit up with a muffled sound, accompanied by raging roars and violent collisions. The moonlight in that space became distorted. One could imagine a fierce battle was taking place.

Chen Rui used his eyesight to look. He saw Paglio and a figure fighting fiercely. The man had silver and white hair, wore black full-body armor, and held a large dark red hammer. His strength was comparable to the poison dragon, which had now reached the intermediate stage of Kingdom level, but his stature was surprisingly short— Hobbit!

Chen Rui suddenly remembered that this area was the location of the Black Rock Mountain. When he and Ina’s Iron Shield Mercenary Squad went to the Garden City, they had visited the Thick Soil Castle of the hobbit. He proved himself with his forging skills. Chen Rui comprehended the realm of mechanics as a quasi-grand master, formed a friendship with the Hobbit King Ovge, and accepted the Holy Leaf Heraldry on behalf of the mountain hobbit as an ambassador to the Jade Forest Sea.

The hobbit who is fighting with Paglio should be the super powerhouse guarding the mountain hobbit. Generally speaking, unless it is out of self-defense, the hobbit will not take the initiative to attack humans. Why did they want to assassinate me, the prince of the Holy Empire?

At this time, there was a heavy and tidy sound in the front, which was the sound of footsteps. It seemed that a large number of enemies were approaching.

“The hobbit! It’s the mountain hobbit’s elite large shield warriors!” The investigating knight ahead panted while reporting, “There are thousands of them!”

The knights were shocked, and Proyo showed a solemn expression. The hobbits have extremely strong melee combat capabilities. The elite large shield warriors are the main infantry troops of the hobbits whose combat power is above the Dragon Scale Legion. Furthermore, there are thousands of them. There must be a Saint powerhouse hobbit commanding them. Whether in terms of the difference in strength or number of people, and the super powerhouse of our side is being held off, the odds of winning are almost zero.

Proyo immediately ordered, “Immediately clear the obstacles behind to retreat. Abandon the carriage and retreat at full speed in the direction of the Yang Shao Capital!”

Using the speed of the warhorse to throw off the hobbit army was the only way to survive.

“Not good! General, there are many enemies rushing out from the mountain behind. It’s the bear cavalry of the mountain hobbit! We are surrounded!”

Bear cavalry was the unique cavalry of the hobbits. The mount was not a war horse, but a war bear raised by the hobbits. It was fierce and berserk with strong offensive and defensive capabilities. It was best at mountain combat, and it had a natural deterrent effect on war horses.

“Damn it! The mountain hobbit actually colluded with the assassins!” Proyo gritted his teeth, “The situation is extremely critical now, so we can only take a risk to break through! I will first lead the warriors of the Dragon Scale Legion into 2 teams of cavalry to lead the hobbit away. The main force, Bedell and Cardo plus the sir guardian protect His Highness Arthur while waiting for the opportunity to escape to the mountain!”

Proyo’s decision was equivalent to sacrificing himself and the Dragon Scale Legion’s elites to cover Chen Rui’s escape. Bedell and Cardo simultaneously expressed moving. Chen Rui suddenly spoke up, “I don’t think the hobbit is necessarily an accomplice of the assassin. There must be some misunderstanding?”

“In any case, Your Highness must be out of danger first!” Proyo frowned, “Every minute we delay, Your Highness’ danger increases by 1 point!”

“You all are the most loyal and heroic warriors.” Chen Rui shook his head, “I will not give up all your lives to escape. Besides, now is not the time of despair yet. Proyo, I order you to send someone to try to communicate with the large shield warrior hobbit in front. If he can’t communicate, return immediately.”

“Your Highness! Now is not…”

“This is my order!”

Proyo sighed and bowed his head, “Yes.”

The knights around clenched the swords in their hands. No matter what, this Royal Highness Third Prince was able to stay and share the woes with everyone, so he had won everyone’s respect. Even if they had to shed the last drop of blood, they would stand before His Highness.

Soon, the knight sent from the front quickly rode their horses to report, “The hobbits did not respond in the slightest, but they continued to move forward, full of hostility.”

The knight who was scouting behind also came to report, “The bear cavalry had spread out to form a semi-encirclement and are approaching!”

The sound of the heavy footsteps in front became clearer and clearer as if they were stepping on the hearts of everyone. On the other side, the sound of the animal roar vaguely sounded behind. The knights were all distressed, but Chen Rui’s expression didn’t change. Zola cuddled lightly on his shoulder as if she hadn’t heard these sounds. Master Dodo’s morale was high – Finally, it is my turn to show my abilities. These soft persimmons are just giving Master Truly Handsome… What is it called in that magic game? Oh yeah, merit points!

The elite large shield warriors of the hobbit appeared in the vision of the knights. They were all heavy infantry in heavy armor, armed with steel shields and battle axes or war hammers. Although they were generally short in stature, it put a lot of pressure on humans.

The knights at the rear were even more nervous because the horses had been frightened to varying degrees, which meant that the hobbit’s war bears were approaching. Although these knights were the elites of the Dragon Scale Legion, the Dragon Scale Legion was not the strongest Dragon Claw Knight Legion after all. Facing the natural nemesis of war bears, even the well-trained war horses could not restrain the panic.

“We can only fight to the death! Your Highness, I’m sorry for not being able to escort you to your destination.” Proyo drew his long sword, and his eyes were full of fighting spirit.

“Don’t move without my order.” Chen Rui walked up slowly. He took out a device that seemed to be a magic amplifier, and he started shouting, “Hobbits, why do you want to point your warhammer at your friends? I’m Grand Master Rick’s friend!”

The hobbit force seemed to have received some order and stopped.

A seemingly black bearded hobbit commander stepped out of the line, “Despicable cunning human! The hobbit won’t trust you anymore!”

“I think you have misunderstood something. You’re Tecklin, right? I heard Rick talk about you before. You’re a wine lover. Once, you almost burned your beard while drinking wine.”

“How do you know?” The black bearded hobbit was taken aback. Seeing the strange gazes from the hobbit warriors behind him, he quickly corrected, “Nonsense, my beard was obviously burned when I was forging the iron…”

Chen Rui actually learned the story of Tecklin’s beard from the last time Ina broke the news in the Thick Soil Castle of the hobbit. This time, the black bearded hobbit was caught off guard, and the depressed atmosphere was relieved a bit.

Chen Rui took the opportunity and said, “My hobbit friend, my destination is the Garden City, but I was ambushed by assassins here just now. You can see the roadblocks and corpses that have not been completely cleaned up here. I am not afraid of war, but I’m not willing to be the scapegoat! I hope my hobbit friends can open their eyes and see who is the friend and who is the enemy!”

Tecklin hesitated for a while, and another furious voice sounded in the sky, “Don’t believe his sophistry! This dragon clearly has terrifying poison, so they must be the ones who poisoned us! Kill all those humans first, then go to the Thick Soil Castle and tell Sterklin to come and capture the poison dragon with me!”

Poisoned? Hearing this word, Chen Rui immediately understood the possible changes in the Thick Soil Castle. The Thick Soil Castle was poisoned, the team was ambushed, the hobbit’s attack… These things are all connected in series to become a part of the whole event. Even if the poison dragon’s poison is just an accident, every part of the event is definitely not accidental. This is a well-planned assassination!

The hobbit in the distant sky changed suddenly, becoming a huge… hobbit, that is, the whole body became much larger, but the proportion of the body did not change. It was still short arms and short legs. The hammer in the hobbit’s hand turned into a pure flame, almost as dazzling as the sun. His power skyrocketed.

Not to be outdone, Paglio turned into a huge poison dragon wearing a heavy armor. The battle between the 2 sides became more and more fierce.

The strength of the hobbit was on the same level as Paglio. By right, Paglio was a dragon, and had the power of star conferring and [Star-level Enhancement], plus the quasi-artifact equipment such as Overlord Armor, it should be a steady victory. However, the hobbits had a very special gift of doubling the combat power against giant creatures. That was to say, the bigger the creature, the stronger their combat power. With this talent, the hobbit was actually in a stalemate with Paglio.

As soon as the hobbit powerhouse’s words came out, Tecklin didn’t hesitate any longer. He immediately retreated to the team and gave the order to attack. The large shield warriors in front began to charge, and the bear cavalry quickly surrounded Bedell. At the same time, several special breaths firmly locked Bedell and Cardo, the 2 Saint guardians. It was obviously the Saint powerhouse of the hobbits.

There was no doubt that this was a dead end. The palms of the knights of the Dragon Scale Legion holding their swords were sweating. The only exceptions were Chen Rui and the slime.

“Dodo, don’t move.” Chen Rui stopped the slime, who was eager to get ‘merit points’, and said to Zola, “My most beautiful and alluring guardian, please take action. I don’t want to see casualties, Uh … including those 2 delayers in the air.”

“ Oh .” Ms. Fairy Dragon glanced at him with a smile, obviously satisfied with his adjective, then she slowly stood up straight under the surprised gaze of the knights.

TL: No casualties? Can Zola control so well?

chapters.title: Chapter 958: The Power Of Zola
chapters.body:
Chapter 958: The Power Of Zola

Facing the army of hobbits surrounding the front and back, Zola stretched out her index finger and drew 2 circles. There was no special power, but all the hobbits suddenly stopped. The 2 teams at the front and back also stopped at the same time.

It was not just as simple as just stopping. Under the moonlight, it could be clearly seen that their bodies had gradually shrunk. Even those bear cavalry were no exception; they had sunk into the ground.

The raging shouts of the hobbits and the roars of the war bears sounded everywhere. Although they only sank halfway, the weight of the body suddenly increased several times, so they could not move even a muscle.

For a time, all the hobbit troops ‘stood still’ in place. Even those powerhouses that launched the Saint breath were no exception.

The people near the carriage were also stunned. This mysterious beauty with a veil just stretched out a finger, and the entire hobbit army…

With such a powerful aoe attack, the people on our side have no effect or feeling at all?

Bedell was especially shocked. He graduated from Starlight College and became famous as a teenager. He had the strongest affinity and sense of earth elements, and he was known as an earth element magic genius.

Compared with ordinary trainers, he sensed more things and was more surprised – This is clearly the fluctuation of earth elements, [Gravity]? [Ground Sink]? [Swamp]? No… Even though it is earth element power, it is not any form of earth element magic that I understand.

The power produced by the combination and change of the earth element was so powerful that Bedell was shivering and felt strange… Is it the strongest element origin power mentioned by the old dean and teacher Carlisle of Starlight College?

The origin of elements was no longer restricted to any form of magic, and it could invoke the purest and most powerful element power with just a few gestures. However, this state was almost unattainable even for a super powerhouse; only the legendary Elemental King could have it.

Bedell had no doubt that if this magic was an attack like [Death Flower], then the hobbit army, including the hobbit’s Saint powerhouse, would all be killed in an instant.

No wonder the third prince is so calm. It turns out that this seemingly weak and powerless veiled beauty actually has such terrifying strength!

The shocking thing was yet to come. Zola didn’t even look at the hobbits, but she just spread her right hand at the sunlike hobbits and the roaring giant dragon in the distant sky.

Everyone felt dazzled, and the battlefield in the distance had already magnified in the blink of an eye, appearing in the sky. They were all startled, but they soon discovered that the surrounding space seemed to be wrapped by something, so the impact of the battle between the 2 super powerhouses did not actually leak out.

The 2 who were engrossed in the fierce battle did not notice this abnormality. Suddenly, the silver bearded hobbit powerhouse shuddered, feeling a bone-piercing cold from the burning warhammer in his hand. When he subconsciously glanced at the warhammer in his hand, he found that the warhammer was actually frozen into ice together with the raging flame. It looked like a solidified red torch from a distance.

The hobbit was utterly shocked. This ‘Flickering Fire’ warhammer is a powerful rune weapon, equivalent to a quasi-artifact level. It is infused with my strongest kingdom power, and it is actually frozen!

Water elementals and fire elements are mutually restraining and opposing elements. It may not be difficult to extinguish the fire, but freezing the fire is 10 times more difficult than freezing other elements. Moreover, it is an instant suppressive freezing!

This cold had spread in an instant, and the fiery kingdom power began to cool down rapidly. Even his soul seemed to be freezing slightly. The silver bearded hobbit was a battle-hardened man. He immediately gave up the Flickering Fire warhammer decisively.

On the opposite side, Paglio was overjoyed when he sensed that the most threatening warhammer suddenly lost its power. He was about to knock down the opponent with one blow, but his body suddenly twisted strangely. He had inexplicably left the battlefield and returned to the top of the carriage.

“Zola!” The familiar space transfer power made the poison dragon shout out – I was fighting happily, then I was actually ‘teleported back’ at the critical moment when I was about to take down the enemy!

“What?” Ms. Fairy Dragon glanced at Paglio as if she didn’t hear it clearly. When Master Poison Dragon looked at the gaze, he suddenly felt dejected.

Alright, I am a gentleman. A good dragon does not suffer immediate losses.

The hobbit also noticed the disappearance of his opponent. He set his eyes on the mysterious woman wearing glasses and a veil, roaring and shifting toward this side: This woman must have activated a shameless sneak attack trick. As long as she is defeated, the Flickering Fire can be restored to its original state!

However, the hobbit shifted several times in a row, but he only flashed on the spot, unable to escape from the space at all. In the midst of shock, Zola’s upturned palm slowly turned down. The hobbit suddenly felt dizzy, and the whole world spun around. Before he could stabilize his body, the sky seemed to collapse and he fell involuntarily.

“ Boom !” The huge body of the silver bearded hobbit fell to the ground, leaving a huge pothole full of cracks on the ground. The hobbit turned over and was about to jump up, but the intangible pressure above was as heavy as a mountain. He actually couldn’t even stand up.

When the silver bearded hobbit let out a loud roar, the runes on the armor lit up with strong rays of light. His full strength burst out. Finally, he could barely stand up.

A few strands of purple hair on Zola’s forehead fluttered slightly, and she moved her fingers downward.

The silver bearded hobbit felt that the pressure suddenly increased several times. His body trembled, and his knees could no longer support him. He fell to the ground again with a ‘bang’ .

The enlarged body began to shrink to its original shape, and even the black armor on his body began to twist and deform. The shining runes distinguished one by one, showing the horror of the pressure. The hobbit struggled unwillingly, and he could only half support his body. He could no longer stand up.

This scene made the hobbits almost petrified. The super powerhouse Hodheck, who had been regarded as the strongest amongst the hobbits, was so easily defeated!

Master Poison Dragon couldn’t help but feel a little dejected while gloating at the misfortune. Comparing among dragons will only make me frustrated. The madwoman’s strength is more advanced now. If this goes on, it’s only a matter of time before she breaks through to Demi-God – I absorbed the law fragments given by the human and worked hard to just reach the intermediate stage of Kingdom level. I’m afraid it’s hopeless to make a comeback in front of this madwoman in this life, let alone that monstrous human.

The humans and knights around the carriage looked at Zola with extreme awe. It turns out that this is the most powerful guardian beside His Highness Arthur!

“Okay, Zola.” Chen Rui’s voice sounded. If it went on like this, perhaps the silver bearded hobbit would be severely injured. The forest hobbit Bernd was his friend, and he had some friendship with the mountain hobbit back then. The purpose of asking Zola to take action to suppress the scene was to unravel the misunderstanding, not to deepen the misunderstanding.

Ms. Fairy Dragon put down her hand according to the words. The silver bearded hobbit only felt the pressure relieved, and he fell to the ground, panting heavily. The position of the hobbit army gradually rose. They had returned to the flat ground from the sunk soil. The previous heavy feeling also disappeared.

The hobbits finally know the strength of the enemy now. They all clenched their weapons, but no one escaped.

“The heroes of the hobbit, if my guardian wants to kill you, it will be easy.” Chen Rui’s amplified voice sounded in time, “However, I will not kill my friends like this, even if I’m misunderstood by my friends. I just want to get to the Thick Soil Castle as soon as possible and see what’s wrong with my hobbit friends and help them as much as possible.”

The silver bearded hobbit got up and stared at Chen Rui from a distance for a while, “What’s your name? Human.”

“Arthur. Roland. The third prince of the Dragon Bright Empire.”

The hobbits looked at each other, almost invariably showing expressions of surprise. The silver bearded Hodheck blurted out, “Mechanic grand master!”

For the hobbit who regarded forging skills as life, no prince could match the weight of these 3 words.

Weapons were dropped one after another.

A few hours later.

The Dragon Scale Legion elite squad arrived with the hobbits at the Thick Soil Castle in Black Rock Mountain.

Along the way, Chen Rui learned from Hodheck that a year or so after he left the Thick Soil Castle last time, the hobbit’s power had undergone major changes.

The hobbit was divided into 3 types: the mountain hobbit, the cave hobbit, and the forest hobbit according to their living habits. They live in the Thick Soil Castle in the Black Rock Mountain, the Golden Bright Underground Palace in the Red Rock Mountain Range, and the Stone Fist Village respectively.

The 3 types of the hobbit came from the same source, and each had its own strengths. The mountain hobbit was best at forging skills; the cave hobbit was proficient in mining and refining of minerals; the forest hobbit was closely related to elf and specialized in rune craftsmanship.

At that time, there was a big earthquake in the Red Rock Mountain Range, which caused the cave hobbit’s residence, the Golden Bright Underground Palace, to collapse, leading to heavy casualties. At the invitation of the Hobbit King Ovge on the hill, the Cave Hobbit King Yinke led the cave hobbits to leave the Red Rock Mountain Range, migrating to Black Rock Mountain, so the 2 forces of the hobbits merged into 1.

After the merging, the hobbits were stronger. With the addition of the cave hobbit, the rich mineral resources of the Black Rock Mountain had been further developed. However, due to the increase in the number of people, the demand for various materials, especially food and wine, had greatly increased. This allowed the hobbits to relax restrictions on dealing with humans.

Just a few days ago, a group of humans came to the Thick Soil Castle and offered to exchange food and wheat wine for equipment. They also paid half of the food and wine water as a deposit beforehand. This kind of big money was rare in the hobbit’s transactions with humans. The hobbits got a large amount of much-needed food and wine. Today was the delivery day, and the other party brought the remaining half of the food and wine as promised. The hobbits were convinced and held a banquet with grand etiquette.

However, at the last moment of picking up the goods, those people suddenly attacked without warning. They killed the hobbit elders and the hobbit warriors who accompanied them and stole a large amount of equipment. At the same time, a large number of hobbits were found to be poisoned, including the Hobbit King Ovge and Inke. It turned out that a batch of highly poisoned wine was mixed up in the remaining part of the food and wine delivered today.

This incident alarmed the 2 super powerhouses of the hobbit family. Sterklin stayed behind the Thick Soil Castle to protect and try to cure the poisoned hobbits. Meanwhile, Hodheck led the large shield warriors and the knight to hunt down the enemy. They followed the trail all the way to this place and mistakened Chen Rui and the others as murderers, which led to a battle.

Chen Rui had fully understood the whole story. The reason why those assassins poisoned the hobbit was not because of coveting any equipment. According to Zola, the assassins who had ambushed the carriage earlier escaped with a one-time [Teleportation Array]. It seemed that the 2 groups had the same purpose, which was to lead the hobbit here and reap the benefits while they were fighting.

This showed that the assassins had mastered the protective power around him a long time ago. This kind of ‘power’ was by no means the Proyo group, but the ‘guardian of the ancient alchemy civilization’. The most obvious was Paglio who made a move at the conference hall of the palace.

The hobbit super powerhouse was supposed to be aimed at Paglio, but the enemy didn’t expect that Chen Rui had a more powerful ‘guardian’ like Zola by his side. As a result, he calmed the situation and easily smashed the opponent’s conspiracy.

On the other hand, if it weren’t for Zola’s super strength, perhaps Chen Rui and the others had already become the scapegoat under the hobbit’s axe, then the cause of ‘Arthur”s death would be pushed to the hobbits.

This is a careful plan, the ambushers are no ordinary assassins, so who is the manipulator behind the scenes? Elder brother? Younger brother? The Black Death Follower? Or… someone else?

chapters.title: Chapter 959: Detoxification And Strangeness
chapters.body:
Chapter 959: Detoxification And Strangeness

After entering the Thick Soil Castle, Chen Rui followed Hodheck to the plaza, and saw a large number of hobbits lying on the ground. Most of them were groaning in pain, and some were in a coma or even died.

The hobbit originally had considerable resistance to magic and poison, but this poison seemed to be specially developed for the hobbit. The poison was very violent. The poisoned hobbits had foam at the mouth, and the skin glowed a strange dark silver. The herbs and detox runes of the hobbit healers did nothing.

“Paglio, do you have a way to dispel these poisons?”

“No problem.” Paglio sniffed, showing a look of disapproval, “This poison is too low-level. If it was me, these hobbits would have turned into smoke and disappeared long ago.”

When Hodheck and Paglio were fighting previously, he noticed that the poison dragon possessed a powerful poison, and immediately preconceived that the other party had poisoned them. The poison dragon was obviously holding a grudge when he deliberately mentioned this.

When the silver bearded hobbit heard this, his face flushed, but he didn’t roar out. Although the hobbits were a little grumpy, they were not fools. Not to mention that the woman’s strength was enough to destroy the entire Thick Soil Castle, the dragons’ ability to detoxify was enough to make them humble.

“Don’t be so calculative, sir guardian.” Chen Rui laughed and patted Master Poison Dragon’s shoulder, “Hurry up and help the hobbit friend detoxify.”

Hodheck glanced at Chen Rui gratefully and bowed his body to express his gratitude. Although the silver bearded hobbit was a Kingdom level powerhouse, this prince also had the status of a mechanical grand master. What was more valuable was that he disregarded the past and came to help the hobbit, so he was totally worthy of this bow.

Paglio’s ‘detoxification’ method was very special. In fact, he used his own poison to assimilate the poison on the hobbit before absorbing it. Although it was more labor-intensive, it was of great benefit to the supplement and enhancement of the poison. The poison dragon just walked a few laps among the poisoned hobbits, and the symptoms of the hobbits were greatly relieved. Although they were still in a coma, they were out of danger. After about 10 minutes, most of the poisoned hobbits had been treated.

Paglio wiped the sweat from his forehead and shook his head, “It’s a shame. I’m used to using poison to kill others, but today I am a lifesaver.”

“Don’t be arrogant.” Chen Rui glanced at the guy with the word ‘proud’ clearly written on his face with contempt, “I know you are very capable, sir guardian.”

“Thank you! Dragons’ powerhouse! It was a misunderstanding before. I, Hodheck, apologize to you!” The hobbit was straightforward in his speech. The poison dragon saved so many people, so Hodheck only felt guilt and gratitude in his heart. Another early stage of the Kingdom level, the hobbit powerhouse Sterklin, also said thanks.

“Forget it, the fight with you was quite enjoyable.” Master Poison Dragon grinned, then he frowned again, “However, the poison of those guys seems to be mutated in some way, so I can’t do anything about it.”

Hodheck was taken aback when he saw that Paglio was referring to the unconscious Hobbit King Ovge and Inke as well as several elders, including Elder Askari, whom Chen Rui had dealt with last time, “Please find a way to rescue them!”

“It’s not that I don’t want to help. The poison of these people is very special. It may be due to their strength. The poison they inflicted is different from that of the ordinary hobbit. If I use my method to forcefully detox, their lives can be saved, but their consciousness may be completely lost. Whether or not to treat them depends on your decision.”

Sterklin almost tore off his beard, “How can this be done?! Ovge and Inke are the leaders of the hobbits. They are also the strongest and most courageous warriors. If they lose consciousness completely, it will be worse than death!”

Paglio shook his head, pointed to the faint golden texture on Ovge’s skin and said, “Look, his poison has penetrated deep into his soul. Once this texture spreads all over his body, he will definitely die. Uh , right, that Inke may be better. He should have some kind of anti-poison talent. Saving his life should not be a problem, but the possibility of losing consciousness is still very high. We really don’t have the best of both worlds, so the decision is up to you.”

Hodheck and Sterklin were anxious. Chen Rui, who had been watching those poisoned hobbits, said, “Move them to a separate room. Let me try it.”

Both the hobbit super powerhouses knew that the prince was the grand master of alchemy, so maybe there was a way to do it. They immediately ordered someone to move Ovge and others into a room.

“Sir Hodheck, Sir Sterklin, these hobbit friends are dying, so I have to activate a life secret technique. However, this secret technique has a greater risk and cannot be interfered by any power. I wonder if you can avoid for a while.”

Life secret technique? Hodheck and Sterklin looked at each other, and they were obviously puzzled, Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Can you trust me?”

“The hobbits outside are all living because of Your Highness. You’re our benefactor. How can we not trust Your Highness? Your Highness, please go ahead with the treatment.” The core leaders of the hobbits such as Ovge were indeed at stake. Anyway, there was no good way, so they might as well let the grandmaster give it a try.

After Hodheck and Sterklin left the room, Chen Rui asked Dodo to guard the door. He cautiously took out the item and set up a shielded space enchantment.

Then, the Crown of Thorns appeared on Chen Rui’s head, radiating a divine breath.

[Divine Blessing]—Drawing holy strength, dispelling all evil forces, purifying and transforming physique, can be activated once an hour. (Can choose purification or conversion mode；, can lock multi-targers)

The Crown of Thorns could restrain and dispel all evil power. In fact, powers were not really good and evil. The so-called ‘evil’ was just an opposite statement. For poison alone, the Crown of Thorns was indeed a nemesis.

After Chen Rui chose the purification mode of [Divine Blessing], a pure and holy brilliance shone on Ovge and others. The dark golden ‘texture’ on Ovge’s body was like a living thing. When it encountered the holy power, it quickly shrank back.

The power of [Divine Blessing] was extremely powerful, especially with Chen Rui’s [Body of Light Glory] as the medium. Soon, the holy light covered Ovge’s whole body. The ‘texture’ had nowhere to hide, and it buzzed as if screaming tragically. In the end, it disappeared into smoke under the brilliance.

After the texture completely dissipated, Chen Rui clearly sensed that the extremely weak life force of several people including Ovge was gradually recovering, and the almost interrupted breathing began to become even. They were obviously out of danger.

There was only 1 exception, and that was the king of the cave hobbit, Inke.

When the golden texture on Inke’s body was shone by the power of [Divine Blessing], although there were some signs of evaporation, they were more converged, solidifying from dark gold into a special blood color. At the same time, a terrifying destructive breath was about to come out.

Chen Rui seemed to have expected this. In fact, this was his real intention for this separate room.

He discovered Inke’s anomaly long ago. The [Analytical Eyes] showed as.

Race: Hobbit (soul variant)

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S+(S++)

Physique: S+( S++), strength: S+( S++), spirit: S(S++), speed: S(S++).

[Analysis]: [Berserk], mutated poison, Blood Sacrifice Soul.

Danger level: Low.

Inke actually hid a part of his strength which was only 1 step away from the kingdom. The most important thing was not this, but ‘soul variant’ and ‘Blood Sacrifice Soul’! Chen Rui had only seen these 2 attributes in 1 person, that was Veronica!

The highest king of the cave hobbit actually possesses the abyss power!

From this point of view, the destruction of the Golden Bright Underground Palace, where the cave hobbit lives, may have another mystery. Not only that, Inke with the ‘mutated poison’ power is likely to be the real murderer behind the scenes of the poisoning at the Thick Soil Castle and even the entire assassination incident!

Chen Rui had a mask on his face, the God-Eating Mask.

He wanted to control Inke, understand the whole conspiracy as well as the mystery of the soul variant and the Blood Sacrifice Soul in order to save Veronica.

The yellow light flashed on the God-Eating Mask, and the power of the puppet had been activated.

Inke’s body that had been ‘in a coma’ and motionless trembled. His eyes suddenly opened, and his pupils showed a strange light like blood.

The yellow light and the blood light were entangled in one place. It was a stalemate for a while.

The God-Eating Mask could convert an object whose strength was lower than himself into a puppet of his own accord. Chen Rui had used it multiple times without any problem. Now, facing Inke whose strength was lower than himself, this was the first time he had encountered such strong resistance.

The power of the Crown of Thorns seemed to have a strong restraint on Inke, and the God-Eating Mask quickly prevailed while the blood light gradually became weak. Chen Rui clearly felt that the blood light had merged with Inke’s soul. Once completely removed, Inke’s life would also dissipate.

This is the power of Blood Sacrifice Soul? So stubborn! Chen Rui’s mood was a little heavy, and he put away the puppet power of the God-Eating Mask.

As soon as that powerful control power disappeared, Inke couldn’t care about being in ‘coma’ anymore. His eyes were full of blood as he leaped with a low roar, rushing toward Chen Rui.

Chen Rui waved his hand, and a red light flashed. 2 strange smoke-like chains appeared beside Inke’s body, emitting a breath of flame. Before Inke could get close, he was already fastened by the chains in the shape of a cross. The 2 chains looked ethereal, but they possessed a powerful restraint force. Inke froze in the air for a moment.

Inke was unwilling to be bound. The dark golden texture on his body turned blood red. His body doubled in size, and his palms became the claws of beasts, revealing a faint poisonous smell. His strength increased several times, but he was still unable to break free from the shackles.

This was exactly the Shackles of True Flame law absorbed by Chen Rui. The power of the shackles would be triggered to devour flesh and blood when the bound person struggled. But Inke didn’t seem to feel the terrifying devour power, and he still struggled desperately with his [Berserk] talent.

Chen Rui pointed to Inke, and there were 2 silver-white translucent chains beside the red ‘smoke’. The ‘Chain of Mind’ given by Raphael was a powerful artifact that could imprison the soul and spirit power.

These days, Chen Rui had already done all the analysis of the Chain of Mind, so he could use it with ease. However, it would take a considerable amount of time to absorb the law in order to merge with the Shackles of True Flame into the ‘Seal of Fire and Wind’.

As soon as the Chain of Mind was used, Inke made a terrifying roar, and the struggle suddenly became less. It was obvious that the soul imprisonment had stronger restraint for Inke.

Chen Rui’s thoughts moved, and the Crown of Thorns continued to maintain the oppressive [Divine Blessing] shining. He activated the puppet power of the God-Eating Mask again, and the [Analytical Eyes] sent out a soul communication, “If you want to live, give up your resistance! Become my subordinate!”

With his current strength, it would be effortless to destroy Inke. What he wanted to do was to control.

“ Haha !” Inke laughed disdainfully, “My lord Sosbach is the greatest existence who controls fear, second only to the Hatred Lord. I have already accepted the great will of my lord, how could I possibly succumb to a lowly ant like you?!”

chapters.title: Chapter 960: Underground
chapters.body:
Chapter 960: Underground

“Fear Lord Sosbach?” Chen Rui snorted coldly, “Even if Hatred Lord Quilliana is here in person, I will make her kneel and submit to me!”

Inke didn’t expect that the other party knew the name of the supreme Hatred Lord, and he even dared to speak so rudely. His expression became more and more hideous as he kept roaring.

Chen Rui didn’t say much; he increased the coercion force of the power of [Divine Blessing] shining on Inke’s body.

Controlled by the Shackles of True Flame and Chain of Mind, Inke was unable to struggle or dodge. He screamed sharply and tragically.

There was a sudden fierceness in the eyes of the king of the hobbit, and a human-shaped blood mist transpired from his body surface. The blood mist had 2 obvious silver marks, then they burst open, and the blood mist disappeared without a trace.

After the blood mist dissipated, Hobbit King Inke’s pupils returned to the normal black again, looking extremely tired. His skin also turned into a state similar to coagulation due to the disappearance of the blood pattern.

“Your Highness Inke, are you okay?” Chen Rui asked quickly.

Inke’s hoarse voice sounded weak, “Thank you for helping me out of my most terrifying nightmare, human friend.”

After saying this, there was a sudden ‘click’ , and a crack appeared on Inke’s face. Then, cracks appeared all over his body which burst open into scattered gravel, then it disappeared into the air.

Chen Rui was shocked. After the abyss consciousness that controlled Inke was eliminated, Inke was actually annihilated together. Even if a resurrection potion was useless for this kind of complete annihilation.

“Tell me, what’s up with the Blood Sacrifice Soul and soul variant?”

“Underground altar… Destroy… Golden Bright Underground Palace…” Inke said the last few words with all his strength, and his voice was extremely weak. If it weren’t for Chen Rui’s excellent hearing, he couldn’t hear the answer to that question at all.

Before he could think about it, Inke’s body and soul had completely dissipated.

Chen Rui turned his head in a sense, and he saw Hobbit King Ovge was watching this scene with wide eyes. He immediately put away the God-Eating Mask and other things before speaking up, “Your Highness Ovge… “

“You don’t need to explain, human friend. When I was awake, I happened to see you fighting that evil power. I only understand now why Inke poisoned me. Thank you so much for helping Inke and freeing his soul to return to the embrace of Mother Earth.”

Chen Rui nodded. It seems that Inke is really the person who poisoned Ovge and the elders. He immediately smiled, “Let me boast my contribution. I’m helping not only Inke, but all the poisoned hobbits, including Your Highness. I only have 1 condition, some scenes of what Your Highness just saw… Please forget about it.”

Shortly after.

Under the anxious gazes of Hodheck and Sterklin, the door to the room opened.

The first one to come out was Ovge. Although the king of the mountain hobbit looked rather sluggish, the 2 Kingdom level hobbit powerhouses could see that the poison on Ovge’s body had been completely cleared, so they couldn’t help but be overjoyed as they hurried up to meet him.

After whispering with Ovge for a while, the 2 powerhouses showed shocking expressions at the same time. Then, their expressions changed rapidly as they looked at Chen Rui from time to time.

The 3 of them all communicated secretly by forcing their voices into subtle voices, but Chen Rui could guess it even if he didn’t deliberately snoop.

The purpose of Inke’s poisoning this time was to use this poisoning incident to get rid of Ovge, become the only king of the hobbit, occupy the nest, control the mountain hobbit in his hands, and then drag the entire hobbit into the fallen abyss.

Chen Rui had dealt with Ovge, the young king of the hobbit, and he knew that he was a typical mountain hobbit. He was straightforward and credible, especially when he swore an oath in the name of the previous king, so he was not worried about him revealing some secrets. What Chen Rui showed was only the power of the item, and he didn’t show much of his own strength.

As soon as the truth that Inke was controlled by the evil force was revealed, Ovge and the 2 hobbit super powerhouses thought of many abnormal movements after the migration of the cave hobbits, especially the inexplicable disappearance of some of the hobbits. They couldn’t help being frightened.

How many of the cave hobbits, including the mountain hobbits, are also controlled by this strange force? This involves the life and death of all the hobbits in the Thick Soil Castle!

Ovge had witnessed Chen Rui use divine power to remove the ’evil’, so he asked for Chen Rui’s help again.

The abyss power seemed to restrain each other with the [Divine Blessing] of the Crown of Thorns. Under the purifying power of [Divine Blessing], those eroded by the abyss power couldn’t hide. However, the [Divine Blessing] had just been activated, so it had a 1 hour cooldown.

After an urgent discussion, several people decided to first screen out an army that was not ‘infected’ by the evil power, then use this army as the basis to clean up all the hobbits.

After everything was prepared, the hobbits entered the heavily guarded castle hall in batches for ‘poisoning investigation’. They stayed for a period of time and then walked out. This continued until the early morning, when all the ‘investigations’ were completed.

Proyo and others did not know about these actions. Under Chen Rui’s instruction, they were isolated by the hobbit. Just in case, the poison dragon was left to monitor, while Zola and Dodo were assistants to Chen Rui who could act on his behalf when necessary.

There were thousands of the hobbits who had been identified as having problems by the power of [Divine Blessing] purification. 90% of the hobbits were the cave hobbits. Unlike Inke, whose soul was completely merged by the abyss, most of the hobbits were eroded by the power of the abyss for a short time. They gradually returned to normal under the power of purification, but some of them, whose souls had been completely affected, could not be cured, so they were temporarily imprisoned.

After dealing with the hidden dangers of the Thick Soil Castle, Ovge immediately shifted his focus to the underground mines of the Thick Soil Castle.

When Inke was dying, Ovge could only hear the words ‘underground altar’, but those 2 words alone were enough to make him extremely vigilant.

After the merge of the mountain hobbit and the cave hobbit, under the suggestion of Inke, the cave hobbit, who was proficient in mining and refining, was responsible for the mining of resources. The original underground mine of the mountain hobbit had also been greatly expanded, and the cave hobbit was responsible for it.

When Ovge was ‘cleaning up’ the hobbit, a group of elite large shield warriors had already been dispatched to block the entrance to the mine and strictly prohibited anyone from entering or leaving.

Due to Ovge’s newly healed wounds and a night of hard work, he was unable to support it even if the hobbit’s body was tough. He was now recuperating in the palace. Under the strong request of Chen Rui, he entered the mine with the 2 hobbit super powerhouses accompanied by Zola and Dodo.

The cave hobbit was worthy of being the most powerful miner. Compared with the time of the mountain hobbit, the size of the mine had doubled, and it was much larger than the main pit of Mount Xilang’s mine in the Dark Moon.

The entire mine was like a magnificent underground city. The cable car, magic locator, and lowering rope were well equipped. The layout was also quite elegant, and there was almost no potential safety hazard.

Chen Rui and others took the cable car to descend all the way. They felt that the ventilation and lighting conditions of the mine were very good, and they could not see anything unusual along the way. However, unexpectedly, the cave hobbits were not seen in the huge mine. It seemed like a dead silence.

At this point, even Hodheck and Sterklin were surprised. The cave hobbits start working in the middle of the night. It should be the peak hour now. How could it be empty? There must be something fishy.

After about half an hour, the cable car descended to the bottom of the mine. The bottom was round like a wide plaza. There was a huge hobbit statue carrying a crossbow on his shoulders, holding minerals in his hand. It was the cave hobbit’s landmark.

Hodheck spoke up, “Your Highness Arthur, please wait here with the 2 guardians. Sterklin and I will go check it out.”

Chen Rui nodded. Hodheck and Sterklin were familiar with the terrain of the mine, and the super powerhouses were extremely fast. Even if the mine was huge, it wouldn’t take much time to search.

Before long, Hodheck and Sterklin returned to their original places with their brows furrowed a little. The 2 of them circled all the passages and burrows, but they found nothing.

“Your Highness, there is no discovery here. Let’s go back to the castle.”

“Wait a minute.” Chen Rui was measuring and scribbling something on the ground. Zola, who was next to him, skillfully poured and positioned with element power while the slime skillfully encouraged the master.

“Your Highness…” Hodheck and Sterklin, both experienced veteran powerhouses, immediately recognized that marks drawn, “Ancient runes magic circle?”

It turns out that the prince of the alchemy grand master is also a great expert in magic circles and ancient runes! The 2 hobbits couldn’t help but express their amazement.

“Your Highness, could it be this statue…” Sterklin saw that the runes portrayed by Chen Rui revolved around the statue of the cave hobbit, and he could immediately guess something.

“If I guess correctly, the space we see in front of us, that is, this mine, has been replaced by a very special power. What I want to do is to restore the dislocated space.” Chen Rui took a deep breath, “2 sirs, please be careful, I’m going to activate the ‘reversion’ power.”

After finishing speaking, Chen Rui nodded to Zola. Zola snapped her finger, and countless star-like golden luminous spots lit up on the ground. The luminous spots were connected in a special order. In an instant, the scene in front of them changed drastically.

The ground, which was originally brightly lit and empty except for the statue, suddenly turned into… hell.

The air was filled with a bloody smell that made one want to vomit, and the ground was full of dead bones as well as corpses. Some of them were hobbits, and some were humans. The original location of the hobbit statue became a blood-red altar.

“Damn it!” Hodheck and Sterklin looked at everything in front of them with furious eyes.

Chen Rui’s facial expression became solemn. He had seen similar altars in 2 places: 1 was the Demon Realm’s White Feather Estate, where Sicali slaughtered the entire Town Massimo for life sacrifice; the other was in the Nightmare Volcano of Nightmare Wilderness where the Orc Great Wizard Longmetil sacrificed countless humans, orcs and half-orcs.

This altar was much larger than the White Feather Estate, but slightly inferior to the Nightmare Volcano’s altar, and it didn’t have the blood-stained abyss texts of the volcanic altar. Or rather, the ‘building’ of this altar hadn’t gotten to that step yet.

The bloody atmosphere became more and more intense. Gradually, it became a turbulent blood river. The space also began to change, and a new space enveloped everyone’s position.

The area of the blood river became wider and wider. In the blink of an eye, the central altar rose into the air. Under their feet were all endless bloody sea, which looked strange and terrifying with destructive breath surging out.

chapters.title: Chapter 961: The Projection Of The Lord
chapters.body:
Chapter 961: The Projection Of The Lord

The changes in front of everyone made their expressions more vigilant, and they all flew up to avoid contact with the blood sea under their feet. Due to the inconvenience of showing the strength, Chen Rui was ‘brought up’ by Dodo and suspended in the air.

The blood river became more and more turbulent. The air was filled with suffocating bloody smell and heat. It felt like being in a lava; even their vision was distorted.

In the blood sea, there was a little bit of crystal light. These were some red flowers. The petals were like clear crystals which looked charming and weird. They exuded a powerful vitality. They bloomed in the high temperature blood river, but they were not affected by the temperature at all. It looked coquettish and strange.

“Flower of Abyss!” Chen Rui shouted out in a deep voice. This flower could cause further mutation of the abyss creatures. Although there was a time limit, the effect was extremely terrifying.

Zola communicated with his mind, and clusters of purple lightnings flew over. Blood splashed, and the Flower of Abyss turned into bits of crystal light and shattered. However, in the tumbling of the blood river, the scattered crystal light reassembled into the shape of a flower.

It seemed that the Flower of Abyss could be continuously reborn in the blood sea, which was simply an undead existence.

When Zola frowned, the lightning disappeared. Her purple hair began to rise without wind, and waves of blue ripples spread out around her. The hot and suffocating air quickly began to cool.

This was a bone-chilling cold. Although the hobbit had a natural flaw in the perception of magical elements, both Hodheck and Sterklin could clearly feel the extremely refined and powerful element power lingering around Zola. Once this energy burst out, even if the 2 of them joined forces, they would definitely not be able to stop this blow.

Under the effect of this powerful cold force, the flow of the blood sea slowed down, the rolling waves also subsided, and the water surface gradually solidified. Before long, the entire blood sea actually condensed into a blue ice surface, while the suffocating heat and destructive breath were sealed by Zola’s kingdom power.

The power of the [6 Elements Kingdom] was no doubt extraordinary, especially the offensive and defensive methods of the magic. It was not only powerful, but also changeable and unpredictable. Chen Rui secretly thought if he did not activate the [Pole Star Transformation], he would absolutely not do as well as Zola right now.

When Hodheck thought of the scene where he was easily suppressed by Zola when he fought the poison dragon previously, his expression of awe couldn’t help but increase. It seemed that the lady didn’t use her real power at that time, otherwise she could kill him easily.

At this moment, the altar in the sky exuded wisps of blood-red mist which condensed into a huge head. The specific facial features could not be seen clearly, but the hideous appearance could be sensed from consciousness, especially the pair of dark green eyes with murderous intent which made people feel a fear involuntarily – Master Dodo, who had always bullied the weak and feared the strong, shivered with fear.

“Who are you!” Hodheck suppressed the surprise in his heart and shouted, “How dare you ignore the Demi-God contract to control and harm my hobbit tribe!”

The Demi-God contract was initiated by the Holy Light Mountain’s 3 archangels. It was a contract recognized by all races in the human world, restricting Demi-God (here refers to all levels of super powerhouses) from intervening in the affairs of the ordinary world.

When Isyorul forcibly descended on the Jade Forest Sea that day, the elf tribe questioned Isyorul on the grounds of Demi-God contract, and Isyorul specially explained it.

“ Hmph! ” The head let out a contemptuous sneer when it heard the Demi-God contract. A force that penetrated the soul surged out, and the blood sea condensed into ice suddenly had large areas of cracks. The sea began to boil up again.

Zola made a muffled sound. Her kingdom was obviously hit by a violent recoil force. Ms. Fairy Dragon’s eyes showed a rare solemnity, and there was a short-handled wand in her hand, which was the quasi-artifact, the ‘Secret Shadow’ made by Chen Rui himself.

Secret Shadow (wand type) – Doubles the power of all magic, doubles the casting speed, and is immune to soul attacks. Supplementary skill: [Limit Break Territory]. There is a chance to ignore the opponent’s magic defense or immunity. It was limited to being activated once per hour. It will repair the damage automatically.

Before Zola could activate it, several blood springs suddenly appeared in the blood sea, and the blood springs wrapped countless bewitching Flower of Abyss, falling on the floating ice. It condensed into figures, which quickly became clear.

These creatures were tall and burly, fierce in appearance, and their muscles showed strange armor-like patterns. They had a pair of bone wings behind them. Steaming flames were all over their bodies. They were holding super large greatswords in their hands.

“Abyss lord!” Chen Rui couldn’t help but blurt out after seeing the familiar figure. When he was still Demon Overlord, he had personally faced this kind of terrifying enemy in the White Feather Estate. In contrast, the abyss lords in front of them released a deep ‘fear’ power.

The abyss lord was already at the top of the ordinary pyramid of the abyss creatures. Chen Rui looked up at the huge head, and he thought of the previous conversation with ‘Inke’. He could vaguely guess the head… More precisely, the name of the projection.

The fear breath and powerful strength emanating from the abyss lords made Hodheck and Sterklin felt a huge threat, and they clenched their weapons in unison.

In Hodheck’s hands was the ‘Flickering Fire’ warhammer while Sterklin’s weapons were a buckler and a double-edged battle axe. In the blink of an eye, the 2 of them had turned into fire and silver light, and rushed toward the abyss lords wielding the greatsword.

Among the abyss creatures known to Chen Rui (excluding the lord level), there was no special intellectual power of territory or kingdom, only the most primitive and instinctive attacks. However, this kind of attack was also the most terrifying. In the illusion of the ancient alchemy civilization that Chen Rui experienced, the abyss lord could easily kill the giant crystal beast of the Demon Overlord level. That was even the lowest level abyss lord.

Then, in the image that Chen Rui saw in the ‘Sky Wheel’ of the Storm Island, the abyss lord ruled by Quilliana was even able to kill the Demi-God level powerhouse of the ancient alchemy civilization. This must be related to some kind of power buff of Quilliana itself, similar to the [Star-level Enhancement] and star conferring buff of the Super System.

In the same way, the abyss lords summoned by the giant head was not an ordinary character, and it was more powerful than the one Chen Rui encountered in the White Feather Estate last time.

Hodheck’s flaming battle axe was engraved with powerful fire runes, which could launch powerful flame attacks, but the physique of the abyss creatures was very special. Not only did it not play a restraint role, but it instead boosted the opponent’s fierce flame. Sterklin’s axe and shield didn’t have that flaw, but he was less powerful than Hodheck. Under the encirclement of the abyss lords, the 2 of them had already been slashed several times in the blink of an eye. Blood splattered out from the cracks in their armors cut by the greatsword’s sword qi.

The hobbits were brave by nature, so did not panic because of it. Instead, their fighting spirit was high, and more powerful forces erupted. However, because their strength was inferior after all, so they were clearly at a disadvantage.

The other abyss lords rushed toward Zola and Chen Rui. There were still 2 that stood in the distance and launched sword qi that brought the stormy waves of the bloody sea to attack Chen Rui.

Dodo on Chen Rui’s shoulders felt the deepest ‘fear’ breath on the abyss lord, so Master Slime didn’t care about the image of being truly handsome. He just stuck to the Master’s shoulders and didn’t dare to move.

Fortunately, Madam Zola did not disappoint the slime. the fairy dragon used the ‘Secret Shadow’ to draw a circle, and a translucent dome appeared around him and Chen Rui. When the sword qi and the abyss lords hit the dome, they were all reflected back.

Zola’s shield was not a simple defensive function. When the abyss lords were bounced off, fluorescent light spots were attached to the repelled figures and sword qi. The enemies’ actions were captured and locked in an instant. Immediately afterward, a dazzling purple light flashed, and a fierce lightning flashed past all the nearby abyss lords in the blink of an eye, linking them together like a chain of ropes.

The abyss lords stood still in unison as if they were demented. Being hit by the stormy waves of the blood sea, the abyss lords shattered into countless crystal fragments which were the kind of Flower of Abyss fragments.

After Zola cleared the enemies, she glanced at the abyss lords besieging the hobbits. Her left hand which were not holding the ‘Secret Shadow’ waved quickly. Those abyss lords were like puppets manipulated by silk threads. Their movements became involuntary, and their attacks suddenly slowed down. While the 2 hobbits were in crisis, they suddenly felt that the pressure from the enemies was greatly reduced. They immediately seized the opportunity to fully launch the axe and hammer. Several abyss lords were cut in half and smashed… quickly scattering into shards.

The entire battle only lasted a few minutes, and Zola only made a few moves for less than a minute. Those moves seemed simple, but they contained a profound and mysterious use of element power.

When the giant head witnessed this scene, his indifferent eyes did not waver at all. The scattered crystals began to slowly condense again, apparently wanting to ‘create’ the abyss lords again.

Zola immediately waved the Secret Shadow wand, and the power of the [6 Elements Kingdom] skyrocketed. Countless golden lightning appeared from the sky and condensed into a thick lightning that struck the huge head.

“#￥※!” The huge head said something. His voice was ghastly as if carrying boundless fear, making people shudder.

Everyone didn’t understand what it meant. Chen Rui only understood it clearly after activating the [Analytical Eyes]. The word was: ‘Ant’.

The language of the abyss!

As soon as this word came out, the golden lightning was instantly crushed by the ‘sound’. Just a simple shout broke Zola’s strongest blow!

Not only that, but under this shout, the entire blood sea boiled. The evaporating blood mist quickly lifted into the sky, condensed into a blood cloud under the sky altar, and poured down.

Everyone below felt the mammoth power contained in this rain of blood. They did not dare to neglect. They all activated the means of defense.

Hodheck held up the ‘Flickering Fire’ warhammer, and it burned with the flames combined with the kingdom power. He became a dazzling flame man. The nearby blood sea evaporated at this temperature.

Sterklin’s double-edged battle axe rubbed a bunch of silver electric sparks on the edge of the raised shield. The runes on the shield were activated by the silver electric spark, and the whole body of the hobbit was immediately coated with a layer of silver mirror light which seemed indestructible.

A 6-color rainbow was suspended above Zola’s head, covering Chen Rui and herself.

In the blink of an eye, the blood rain had poured down, and the fire on Hodheck’s body suddenly dimmed as a green mist continued to emerge. The terrifying blood rain actually penetrated the kingdom power fused with ‘Flickering Fire’ without any hindrance. The rune armor on Hodheck’s body was badly damaged in the battle with Zola, so now it was harder to resist the blood rain. It began to corrode rapidly. In the blink of an eye, the hobbit’s face showed bone-seeing scars, which was extremely terrifying. Although he gritted his teeth without saying a word, he finally was unable to resist. After holding on for a moment, he fainted.

The second one who fainted was Sterklin. His silver mirror defense was also very fragile in the face of the blood rain. In an instant, there were large cracks, but that shield supported him longer than Hodheck, who was stronger than himself. However, it was also unable to resist the terrifying power of the blood rain.

Just when the hobbit was about to be annihilated by the blood rain, the 6-color rainbow quickly extended, blocking the death; it was the rescue from Zola. Zola’s rainbow condensed with 6 element origin power, so the defense was far better than the ordinary kingdom. The blood rain was all blocked.

Although it blocked the blood, Ms. Fairy Dragon was also under tremendous pressure, especially after stretching the range to protect the 2 hobbits. A lot of fragrant sweat had already seeped on her forehead, and the Secret Shadow in her hand was shaking a bit—— The strength of the enemy was too strong, except for Auglas of the Demon Realm’s Dragon Emperor, this was the first time she had faced such a powerful enemy.

In the critical moment, Chen Rui’s figure instantly appeared in the sky, and he shouted from the [Analytical Eyes] under the blood rain.

“Sosbach!”

When the huge head heard that it was the unique language of the abyss, and his name was exposed, he couldn’t help but be stunned slightly. The power of the blood rain also reduced slightly.

At this time, a light appeared.

A strong and dazzling light bloomed from the white jade-like crown like the sun.

[Divine Blessing]!

Using the [Body of Light Glory] as the medium, the [Divine Blessing] released maximum ‘power’.

When the light shone on the blood rain, the blood rain vaporized. Even the eyes of the huge head squinted because of the glare of the light.

The image of the altar gradually dimmed, and the huge head and the entire blood sea space were dimmed at the same time.

After the blood sea dissipated, everyone returned to the environment at the bottom of the Thick Soil Castle mine. The ground was still covered with corpses, and the original altar had been torn apart.

Chen Rui landed from the air and wiped the cold sweat from his forehead.

It wasn’t that he really repelled the strong enemy just now, but because of the limited power of this altar, the opponent could no longer maintain the projection under the purifying power of [Divine Blessing] – The projection of 1 of the abyss 3 leaders, Fear Lord Sosbach!

chapters.title: Chapter 962: Decision
chapters.body:
Chapter 962: Decision

The power of the blood rain was very domineering, and it contained some kind of ‘fear’ erosive power. The 2 hobbit powerhouses were seriously injured. Fortunately, there was the Crown of Thorns [Divine Blessing] and [Divine Healing]. With Chen Rui’s full rescue, Hodheck and Sterklin’s injuries were quickly brought under control, and the erosive power was removed.

However, if they wanted to recover, they must rest for a long time. Before they fully recovered, the 2 couldn’t channel their strength, which was almost equivalent to losing their fighting ability.

After the altar at the bottom of the mine was completely destroyed, those corpses were also cleaned up by the hobbits. So far, the crisis of the mountain hobbit had finally been completely resolved. Hodheck, Sterklin and the Hobbit King Ovge expressed their most sincere wishes to Chen Rui and others.

First of all, if Chen Rui hadn’t rescued Ovge in time, he would have died. Once Inke took over the power, it was very likely that the entire Thick Soil Castle would become the second Golden Bright Underground Palace, and even the entire Black Rock Mountain would become the second Nightmare Wilderness controlled by the Abyss, which had unimaginable consequences.

Then, in the underground pit, it was Chen Rui who unlocked the camouflage of the altar. In the next treacherous fight, thanks to his ‘guardian’ Zola, he fought off that terrifying and evil unknown powerhouse (Chen Rui attributed the defeat of Sosbach back on Zola).
