In addition to the poisoned hobbits, 2 more hobbit super powerhouses were rescued. They were great saviors of the hobbit family.

In fact, the abyss crisis lurking in the Thick Soil Castle resolved by Chen Rui this time was likely to be the last link in the entire ambush plan. Even if ‘Arthur’ was able to resolve the misunderstanding with the hobbit before, facing the Abyss-ized Hobbit King Inke, he would probably die in the ‘poisoning crisis’ that broke out among the hobbits.

This was indeed a terrifying killing scheme. Unfortunately, the planners did not expect that Chen Rui’s guardian and even himself would have such a powerful strength. Not only did the killing scheme fail, but the long-term conspiracy against the hobbits also failed.

Then Chen Rui learned from Ovge something that could not be ignored – Hodheck and Sterklin were super-level guardians of the mountain hobbits, and the cave hobbit also had 2 super-level guardians. According to the original Inke, after the underground palace collapsed , the 2 guardians went to the Jade Forest Sea to find the forest hobbit adjacent to the elf tribe to discuss the reconstruction of the underground palace.

Later, when the ‘super-level guardian’ who contacted the forest hobbit received the news from Inke that the cave hobbit and the mountain hobbit had merged, they did not return immediately. Instead, they were trying to excavate some treasures buried in the underground palace. Afterward, they would go back to Black Rock Mountain.

Now it seems that there must be something wrong with what Inke said. Those 2 powerhouses should have either died or fallen, and the ‘earthquake disaster’ of the Red Rock Mountain Range is most likely not a natural disaster but a hobbit-made disaster!

I’m afraid there are still tricks in the collapsed Golden Bright Underground Palace… But after seeing the enemy’s terror, plus Hodheck and Sterklin are seriously injured, we don’t have the combat power to go to the Golden Bright Underground Palace to explore.

One thing that could be described as a top priority was to go to the Stone Fist Village, the residence of the forest hobbit in the Jade Forest Sea. No matter whether the 2 guardians of the cave hobbit really went to the Stone Fist Village, they must tell the forest hobbit what happened at the Red Rock Mountain Range and Black Rock Mountain. One was to avoid repeating the same mistakes, and the other was to unite the power of the forest hobbit and go to the Golden Bright Underground Palace in the future to eliminate the evil power that poisoned the hobbits.

“I’m going to the Blue Glory Empire this time to also visit the 2 grand masters, Finoia and Bernd, in the Jade Forest Sea. If you trust me, leave this mission to me.” Chen Rui was also a little worried about the situation at Bernd’s side. On the other hand, if the 2 cave hobbit guardians of the Golden Bright Underground Palace really went to the Jade Forest Sea as Inke said, then what they brought to the forest hobbit would be a terrifying disaster.

Chen Rui must not allow this to happen. Even without Finoia’s invitation, this trip to the Jade Forest Sea was imperative.

“Certainly, you are the hobbit’s utterly trusted partner,” The Hobbit King Ovge said sincerely, “Your Highness Arthur. Roland, the hobbits will always remember your friendship and kindness.”

Chen Rui blinked, “What if there was no ‘Roland’ or ‘Your Highness’?”

Ovge was stunned for a moment, and he did not get it at the moment.

At this time, Askari, the teacher of the king of the hobbit and the elder sage in the hobbit, stepped forward and whispered a few words. Ovge woke up like a dream, “No matter what your identity is, you are the friend and savior of the hobbit forever.”

“Since it’s a friend, then the redundant title of ‘savior’ can be omitted, my hobbit friend.” Chen Rui smiled, “I have a request, please keep our friendship a secret… In fact, I have some other secrets which is why I’m intentionally isolating myself from those guards, so I won’t explain it for now. Just to say, in my heart, the hobbit is an indispensable true friend, whether the forest hobbit, the cave hobbit or the mountain hobbit.”

Ovge’s temperament was very forthright, he nodded without questioning as he stepped forward and hugged Chen Rui tight.

After a short rest, Chen Rui saw Proyo and others who had been isolated for a while. Seeing that Prince ‘Arthur’ was safe and sound, Proyo breathed a sigh of relief, “Your Highness, did the hobbits make it difficult for you?”

“Why would they?” Chen Rui shook his head confidently, “I successfully completed a deal with the hobbits. I cured the poisoned hobbits and got a batch of valuable equipment and minerals. I’m very impressed by your bravery and loyalty. As a reward, I will pick a suit of armor and weapons for each of you later.”

Although the forging skills of the hobbits couldn’t be compared with that of the mechanic grand master of ‘Arthur’, they were also world-renowned for their superb skills. To get a set of superb equipment produced by the hobbit was also a very valuable asset even for the elite knight of these legions.

Everyone was overjoyed and bowed, “Thank you Your Highness!”

The top-notch equipment and minerals were actually what Ovge insisted on giving. As a reward, Chen Rui gave Ovge a batch of top-quality aromatic millet wine and highly refined forging materials. That kind of superb aromatic millet wine made the hobbits smile, and the 100% refined ‘pure’ minerals were also good things that were hard to buy. They had been sold for staggering sky-high prices at auctions. According to the market price, Chen Rui’s gift far exceeded Ovge’s gift.

The equipment from the hobbits also did a good job of disguising what Chen Rui did last night, as the ‘prince’ himself said to Proyo and the others, it was just a deal- Royal Highness ‘Arthur’ was a mechanic grand master who was also a businessman. Otherwise, how could the Golden Estate become the commercial focus of the entire world, so the deal to save the hobbits was completely reasonable.

Proyo spoke up, “Since the misunderstanding with the hobbit has been resolved, let’s hurry to the Garden City as soon as possible, Your Highness.”

Chen Rui didn’t order to leave immediately, but his tone changed, “You should have seen the assassination I encountered earlier, the layout of the enemy is quite terrifying. First ambush and then use the means of poisoning the hobbit in order to induce the hobbit to kill us… If it weren’t for the strong strength of my guardian, everyone would have died in the hands of the hobbit. It can be seen that the enemy we are facing is extremely cruel and cunning. We are likely to encounter more and more terrifying assassinations on the road. I want to ask everyone, are you determined to fight to protect me?”

“Yes!” Proyo and the knight shouted together, and the 2 powerful Saints also nodded.

“Thank you for your loyalty and courage.” Chen Rui showed a knowing smile, “Then I will announce a decision: I will be separated from everyone on the following trip.”

Separate? Everyone was surprised, Proyo’s facial expression changed slightly, “Your Highness, what do you mean? Although our strength is not comparable to several sir guardians, our loyalty is definitely not below them. We can protect Your Highness by dedicating our life at any time.”

“You’re wrong.” Chen Rui shook his head, “You are not a burden. On the contrary, you are the necessary strength for me to reach my destination safely this time. My plan is that you pretend to protect ‘me’ and go directly to the Blue Glory Empire, while the real me will disguise, hide my identity, and choose a safer path.”

Proyo reacted the fastest and showed a realization expression. Chen Rui looked solemn and pointed to Dodo on his shoulder and said, “My guardian has the talent to change and can become my appearance to go on the road with you. In order to further confuse the enemy and to keep you safe, I’ll let the mighty dragons join the team. And Ms. Zola… will just protect me. We’ll find a rendezvous point before we officially enter the Blue Glory Capital.”

“Your Highness wants us to attract the attention of the enemy.” Proyo explained to the crowd, “Decoy tactic is indeed a pretty good battle plan, but the safety of Your Highness…”

Decoy tactic? It’s obviously advance secretly by an unknown path, okay… Chen Rui smiled and glanced at Ms. Fairy Dragon, “You think Ms. Zola can’t keep me safe?”

“Your Highness has misunderstood! If even Madam Zola can’t protect Your Highness, then we are only a real burden there.” Proyo smiled bitterly when he noticed the unkind look in Ms. Fairy Dragon’s eyes, “In that case, just follow as Your Highness says.”

“For you, this mission is not easy. You are likely to encounter more dangers.” Chen Rui patted Proyo’s shoulder, and glanced at the 2 Saints and the knights, “I order you all, whatever situation you encounter, the first choice is to save your life.”

Everyone showed a moving expression, “Yes!”

Master Poison Dragon, who had already got the instructions earlier, took a sip of wine in dissatisfaction – Go on and act, the guy who prefers lovers to friends! It’s too inauthentic, throwing Dodo and I as targets while you young couple go and have fun yourselves…

Dodo looked at the master with a pitiful look like an abandoned pet. After Chen Rui’s hands showed 2 sparkling, crystal-clear red gems, Master Slime immediately regained his spirit and stretched out 5 ‘fingers’. Thinking about it, it was not enough. 1 ‘palm’ suddenly changed to 10 fingers. He actually began to bargain.

In the end, Master Truly Handsome successfully sold himself for 10 Fire Crystals.

(Unscrupulous master note: Fire crystal is one of the cheapest magic materials in the human world)

TL: Decided to capitalize the ‘Abyss’ word, also the lord of the Abyss lord and Hatred Lord is different, one is more like a castle lord and one is more like a god (lord)

chapters.title: Chapter 963: Ghost Town Ruins
chapters.body:
Chapter 963: Ghost Town Ruins

Turin Kingdom, the Cloud City.

The sunset glow in the sky was soft and beautiful, showing the world its appearance today.

A man and a woman were walking hand in hand on the street of Cloud City intimately. The man and woman were very ordinary in appearance and temperament, and they seemed inconspicuous in the crowd. No one could have imagined that the unremarkable man was the Dragon Bright Empire’s Third Prince ‘Arthur’, who was now famous all over the world.

Chen Rui’s [Camouflage] could turn him into anyone’s appearance, and even Pseudo-God couldn’t see the clue, Zola’s transformation technique was equally brilliant. Even if an assassin walked by face to face at this time, they would not know that the 2 were assassination targets.

Paglio and Dodo had already passed the Garden City to the Clear Mirror City of Loya Empire with the ‘Bride Escort Team’. The team will reach Starlight Empire through the teleportation portal of the Clear Mirror City before they went directly to the Blue Glory Empire from Starlight Empire. This was the fastest ground route.

Chen Rui took Ms. Fairy Dragon to act solo. His first destination was not the Blue Glory Empire, but the Jade Forest Sea. So this time he chose the fastest route to the Jade Forest Sea, from the Evening Shadow City of the Yang Shao Empire to the Turin Kingdom, the White Ride Kingdom, and so on, and then to the Jade Forest Sea by water.

After dealing with the hobbit and the elf tribe, Chen Rui would enter the Blue Glory Empire through the Jade Forest Sea. Anyway, after Paglio and the others reached the Blue Glory Empire, they would slow down and wait for the real protagonist, ‘Arthur’, to come before they go on to the Blue Glory Capital for the wedding together.

Chen Rui and Zola crossed the border of the Evening Shadow City all the way, and it took 2 days to reach the Cloud City of the Turin Kingdom. It was already late, and it was still far from the border of the White Ride Kingdom, the Silver Shuttle City, so the two decided to temporarily stay in Cloud City for 1 night.

The Turin Kingdom was a small country. Although Cloud City had a nice name, it was far less prosperous than those cities in the Yang Shao Empire, and even less than the Dragon Bright Empire. It could only be regarded as a barren small town. The only commendable thing was the handicrafts here, which were quite exquisite.

“Zola, do you like this earring?”

“ En .”

“This necklace suits you very well.”

“ En .”

“This skirt…”

“ En .”

“Zola?”

“ En ?”

“What’s wrong?”

“I like them all.” (I like them very much ) Although the answer was very simple, Ms. Fairy Dragon’s heart was as sweet as honey. As long as Chen Rui chose it, it would be affirmed without exception.

Chen Rui looked at Zola’s grinning expression. All of a sudden, he felt a connection. She liked not only these gifts, but also this kind of life and this kind of feeling.

He liked it too.

Love couldn’t be stormy seas and life-and-death excitement all the time, but it consisted of more ordinary and mutual warmth.

He had gone through life-and-death situations several times, and he was exhausted. Finally, he ended the war in the Demon Realm, and released the magic game against the Abyss in the 2 worlds. It was not for any great ambition, but just to protect his cherished people and happiness.

To this end, he would look directly at the unknown dangers ahead and continue to move forward.

“Boss.” Zola’s eyes lit up and picked up an item, “I want this.”

“Wrap it together.” Chen Rui spoke up.

Zola shook her head, “I’ll pay for this one. I bought it for Duoduo.”

Chen Rui looked at the delicate little toy. His heart was warm when he thought of the cute little phoenix daughter who left saliva marks on his face every day. He couldn’t help holding Zola’s hand tightly.

“Thinking of Duoduo?” Zola’s tacit understanding with Chen Rui was getting deeper and deeper, “And Athena and the others?”

Chen Rui nodded, and Zola leaned lightly on his shoulder, “Bring Athena and the others out next time.”

“ En .” Chen Rui knew it was actually difficult. Shea, Catherine, and Athena all held important positions. It was almost impossible to leave their posts for a long time, especially the 2 Royal Majesty Empresses. Maybe one day, they would be able to completely unload their important tasks, then they could really relax.

“Guests, these are the items you picked.” The owner of the boutique was a smiling old man, looking at the couple with a smile, “Sir, yours is 4 black crystal coins and 12 white crystal coins. The little toy that Madam bought is 3 purple crystal coins and 7 white crystal coins. I’ll remove the fractions; that will be a total of 4 black crystal coins and 3 purple crystal coins, thank you.”

Chen Rui and Zola paid the money, and the boss kindly added, “You 2 should be from out of town. It’s getting dark now, so hurry up and find a hotel to check in. Don’t go out at night. I’ll also close the shop soon.”

Chen Rui was taken aback and asked, “Is there a curfew at night? Even if it is a curfew, it’s still early.”

“It’s not a curfew… There’s a bit of a situation during this time, even the guards don’t dare to come out easily at night.”

Zola carefully discovered the abnormality of the street outside. It was quite lively when entering Cloud City before. After visiting a few stores, the pedestrians had actually become very few. Most of them seemed to be in a hurry as if they wanted to hurry back. 2/3 of the shop was also closed.

Chen Rui asked curiously, “What’s going on here?”

“Since you’ve come to Cloud City, you haven’t even heard of this? This is a famous ghost town!” The boss looked around and said carefully, “Every night, the area around Cloud City is shrouded in a mysterious power which is terrifying and can absorb the soul as well as vitality of human beings. Even if you walk outside, your power will be devoured. It is said that some kind of terrifying spirit is at work. People who go out will be sucked out of their flesh and soul. There are also legends that it is a curse. The darkness behind the light of the curse… This situation has existed for many, many years, but I don’t know the exact time. There have been many daring adventurers who deliberately went out at night to check it out. They had turned into a pool of dead bones when they were discovered the next day. After such incidents happened in a row, no one dared to try again. Even the church members advised everyone not to go out at night. The Glorious Knights of Light have come to investigate several times, but they found nothing. You’re here at the wrong time. Every year, this week is the time when the strange curse is the strongest. You should find a hotel to stay or it will be dangerous if you are late.”

“A curse that has plagued the city for many years?” After leaving the store, Ms. Fairy Dragon’s eyes flickered a bit. Chen Rui could see that the boss’ kind reminder not only did not make Zola vigilant, but sparked her interest.

To the scientist Ms. Fairy Dragon, the resentment was just an undead with stronger spirit power, and curse was just another form of magic and elemental attack. Such a rare research object, how could she miss it?

As for resentful souls and curse, Chen Rui did not take it to heart. He had the Super System and many abilities while Zola had the [6 Elements Kingdom], so their strength had already reached the peak stage of the Kingdom level. Even if there was a resentful soul or curse, there was nothing to be afraid of.

“Let’s find a place to rest first and have a drink,” Chen Rui’s words made Zola stunned for a while, then the guy kissed the back of her hand, “Then when it gets dark, let’s go see the so-called resentful soul, Madam Valley Master?”

The last title reminded Zola of the time when Chen Rui first entered the Rainbow Valley as an ‘assistant’. Her eyes were gentle, and she made a soft “ oh “, leaning her body closer to him.

Late at night.

Not a single pedestrian could be seen in Cloud City, and even the guards guarding the city gate were nestled in the castle and dared not come out. In fact, no one dared to enter or leave the city or make trouble in the whole ‘ghost town’ at night… except for the 2 new ‘tourists’ who came to the city.

“It’s really a strong resentment breath which was similar to undead. No wonder it is considered a resentful soul.” Zola carefully sensed the strong dark element power in the city, “However, it doesn’t feel like a pure undead breath.”

Chen Rui added, “This kind of breath has a certain erosive effect on the soul, and it is easy to cause some illusion, but it does not cause much substantial damage. This should be the reason that it is considered a ‘curse’.”

Zola nodded and closed her eyes as she activated her sensing power with all her strength, “It’s a very strong and strange power, and it also interferes a lot with sensing power, but the dazzling direction of the dark elements tells me that the source should be outside the city.”

“Then let’s solve the mystery.”

The 2 of them didn’t need to shift; they just kept a certain speed and flew hand in hand. With Zola’s senses, they approached the source of the different power step by step. There were ruins scattered in the woods.

The location of this ruin was obviously the outskirts of Cloud City, which was quite far away, but the strange force it emitted actually enveloped the entire city.

Chen Rui frowned, “The scale of this ruin is very large. It looks like some kind of old, dilapidated ruin with a lifeless vibe. I can’t feel the breath of any living creatures at all. There is a special kind of power breath, as if…”

“It’s ancient runes! The breath is still quite hidden… I think I’ve found a hub.” Zola answered and waved her hand. A huge broken column buried in the rock slowly stood up. Zola’s movements were very careful. Under the moonlight, Chen Rui faintly saw a special circular symbol on the broken column.

After the broken column stood up, Chen Rui’s spirit power clearly sensed the surrounding changed as if a certain switch was turned on. Of course, not everyone had a sensing power like Zola and him, especially the comprehension of ancient runes. It was even more impossible to immediately find this hub in the rubble.

“This is a game of finding patterns in arrangements.” Despite the change in appearance, the light in Ms. Fairy Dragon’s purple eyes were familiar to Chen Rui. It was as if a child had found some interesting toy, “I know. It’s just like your big 9-square grid (Sudoku) game last time. We have to calculate the appropriate numbers and open them one by one. Let me see…”

This kind of problem-solving thinking was a kind of enjoyment for Zola. Chen Rui did not disturb her. Hehe just looked at the surrounding situation. The forest was very large, but it could not completely cover the scope of the ruins. Chen Rui had been to the ruins of Trevante in the Breeze Shadow Empire in the Fallen Angel Empire, but it was far less compared to the size of the ruins here.

“35 meters to the west, this… then 12 meters to the north…” Zola quickly calculated the order and location of the pivots. While waving his hands, objects were erected.

These ‘hubs’ had strict sequence requirements and appeared to be very complicated, but Chen Rui and Zola were both proficient in ancient runes. With the grand master level of the magic circle, this level of difficulty was not difficult for them.

Chen Rui noticed that there were traces of movement around these hubs. It seems that Zola is not the first person to turn on the hub. The circular symbol can be seen in several places in the ruins, like a cloud…the Cloud City?

The sound of rumbling sounded, interrupting Chen Rui’s thoughts. It turned out that Zola had successfully activated all the hubs, and the erected objects began to glow. They connected to each other, interweaving into a bizarre figure, and the light disappeared in an instant. The landscape below began to change rapidly.

A surge of intense spirit power surged out, mixed with resentment that eroded the soul. It was vast, just like the batch of resentful souls that Chen Rui encountered at the bottom of the Demon Realm’s Dead Sea.

The scene below gradually became clear. It was originally a shielding power of space, but now Zola had deactivated it. They could see an avenue leading to a place similar to a plaza in front. The plaza faintly glowed.

“ Swoosh! Swoosh! Swoosh …” Countless cold lights flew toward Zola in the air, and the speed was extremely fast. A black figure flashed below – Someone was here!

chapters.title: Chapter 964: Mysteries
chapters.body:
Chapter 964: Mysteries

Although the cold lights were coming fast, Chen Rui was even faster. He appeared in the air like lightning as he drew a circle with his hand. The power rippled out like water ripples, and the cold lights were dispersed immediately.

Chen Rui was now using the disguised face. Although he was only Warrior’s strength on the surface, he could activate his power at will.

Zola glanced at the ground, and the flickering black figures felt that their weight suddenly doubled, and their speed suddenly slowed down. In an instant, they lost their mobility in a powerful gravity.

The strength of those black figures were all at the Demon Overlord levels, and they were considered the top ‘Saint’ in ordinary empires, but unfortunately they had no resistance in front of Zola. The rich and huge spirit power here made Ms. Fairy Dragon interested, so she intended to keep them alive.

The people in the plaza in the distance were obviously also alarmed, and several people rushed toward this side. Before they even saw the opponents’ figure, they were suppressed by [Gravity] and couldn’t move – Chen Rui and Zola had already shifted to the sky above the plaza.

In the center of the plaza was a circular structure similar to an altar, and it was also the source of countless resentment. A figure who looked like a leader was wearing a large black robe, standing in the center of the structure and performing a sacrifice-like ritual.

There were no other people around; no more than 10 people in this secret realm.

The black-robed leader suddenly looked up and saw the 2 people suspended in the air. Chen Rui and Zola also saw the white mask on the black-robed person’s face which only faintly exposed the eyes.

A horrified expression flashed across the black-robed leader’s eyes. He had noticed that someone had broken in before, but he still did not stop the ritual. Unexpectedly, the enemies broke through here so quickly. When the black-robed leader immediately pointed to the ground, the ground near the altar quickly assembled like bumpy building blocks, and columnar objects like cannon towers rose rapidly.

The ‘cannon towers’ radiated countless rays of light intertwined with flames, lightning, and ice of various colors and brilliance, shrouding Zola and Chen Rui in the blink of an eye.

Zola drew a circle with his fingers, and a translucent circular shield appeared around her and Chen Rui,

When the flame hit the light shield, it seemed to have encountered something that was slippery on the water and slid away one after another. This was not a simple defense. As the attack continued, the color of the sliding flames began to change. They were instead controlled by Zola and launched back at the ‘cannon towers’. The ground trembled, and the ‘cannon towers’ were turned into powder.

The black-robed leader was taken aback. These magic columns of elements contained the enormous power of the runes formation in the center of the ruins. Even the super powerhouse would not dare to stand up to it, but they are completely destroyed by the opponent using this incredible method!

This was the 6 elements’ kingdom power; this was Zola.

Chen Rui was amazed at the side. Zola’s ‘retaliating with one’s own skill’ was different from Shura’s strange power. It completely used the understanding of the power of elements’ origin, which was truly a ‘qualitative’ comprehension. In this aspect, Zola had surpassed Chen Rui who controlled the Super System.

The [6 Elements Kingdom] also had many mysteries and ultimate moves, which were not something that could be manifested in ordinary practice. If Chen Rui only used the same level of strength to fight for his life, he might not necessarily be able to beat Zola. Of course, this would never happen.

Zola’s movements were quick. After finishing off the ‘cannon towers’, she blinked. The temperature beside the black-robed leader suddenly dropped, and circles of floating ice crystals appeared as his body began to solidify rapidly.

The black-robed leader’s body suddenly became void, actually ignoring Zola’s freezing power. He instantly escaped from the range of ice crystals. Zola was slightly surprised, and the ice crystal instantly turned into a purple lightning arc which swept toward the black-robed leader.

The black-robed leader shook his robe, and the surrounding space suddenly turned blood red. The purple lightning arc seemed to be stuck in the mud, unable to exert its force, and it gradually dimmed.

Zola flicked a finger, and the dimmed lightning arc turned bright red and exploded.

The entire blood-red space shattered to pieces under the power of the explosion, but the scattered blood-color reassembled into the figure of the black-robed leader. Zola did not expect that the opponent was still unscathed after the explosion. She snorted, and turned 5 fingers lightly. 6 colors of light condensed, and the surrounding air seemed to be completely solidified under the huge element power. This blow must be an earth-shattering killing move.

“Wait a minute.” As Chen Rui’s voice sounded, Zola’s power suddenly stopped. The black-robed leader took the opportunity to turn into a bloody light and fled into the distance like lightning.

“Stop chasing.”

Zola glanced back at Chen Rui, and she returned to his side in a flash. At this moment, the figure of the black-robed leader had disappeared without a trace.

“Why? Do you know that person?” Ms. Fairy Dragon asked curiously. The battle just lasted less than a minute. She could be said to have the absolute upper hand, but the black-robed person’s methods were strange and unpredictable. The person was obviously weaker than her, but she could not defeat him no matter what techniques she used.

“I’ll explain it to you in detail later.” There was a reason why Chen Rui didn’t let Zola kill the person. Although it was impossible to estimate the specific strength of the person just now based on his perception, the [Analytical Eyes] had already listed the data of the other party.

Race: Human (soul variant)

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: (D) SS

Physique: SS-(D-), strength: SS-(D-), spirit: SS+(D), speed: SS(D).

[Analysis]: Becloud Eyes, Concealed Body, Blood Sacrifice Soul, Hatred Heart.

This detailed data is exactly the same as someone… the woman in the Shion Palace!

If it was her, why would she be here? Chen Rui couldn’t help but have doubts in his mind.

All of a sudden, a muffled sound appeared from all directions, and those black figures fell to the ground one after another, dissipating into light smoke. They obviously used some kind of suicide method. When these people saw the leader fleeing away, and they could not contend with the enemy, they ended their lives without hesitation, not even leaving their bodies behind.

Black Death Follower? Chen Rui frowned as he slowly descended to the ground, looking at the huge altar. The center of the altar was actually the circular symbol of the cloud. It was dark red, looking very depressed.

This altar was different from what Chen Rui saw in Nightmare Volcano or the Thick Soil Castle underground. It didn’t have that kind of destruction or bloody feeling, but more of the spirit power of ‘resentment’, which seemed to have accumulated over the years and was incomparably vast.

Could it be that this was an ancient battlefield or burial place where many people died? But looking at the ruins, it looks more like a palace?

The ceremony just now was a bit like a real sacrifice.

While thinking about it, Zola suddenly looked around, and Chen Rui also felt that a large number of people were rushing over.

“It’s time to catch a captive.” Chen Rui and Zola looked at each other and saw through each other’s thoughts.

More and more people rushed over. There were actually hundreds of people,

One after another dazzling rays of light lifted into the sky, illuminating the entire plaza as if it were daytime. The momentum of these people was so huge.

In the blink of an eye, Chen Rui and Zola were surrounded by people pouring out from all directions. They were armed with the magic crossbows and carried various weapons on their backs. They had simple and quick movements, which seemed well-trained.

A gray-robed man was particularly outstanding. This man had short black hair, a slender body and a few scars on his cheeks, making his expression even more grim. He held a sword in his left hand and a magic staff in his right.

“It seems that today’s luck is really good. There is such a big harvest as soon as we arrive.” The man pointed at Chen Rui and the 2. “Descendants of sin! You finally showed your vicious figure! 1 minute! Surrender, this is your only way of life. Otherwise, I will represent the light and make a final judgment on you!”

Even without the [Analytical Eyes], Chen Rui could still feel that this man’s strength was only 1 step away from kingdomization, that was, S++. His gaze was fierce with a faint murderous aura. He was obviously experienced in battles.

This kind of strength was nothing to him at all, but in the [Analytical Eyes], there was a data that caught Chen Rui’s attention – [Body of Light Blessing].

Chen Rui found that he seemed to have misunderstood something. At the same time, he was also misunderstood by the other party, so he asked tentatively, “Are you from… the Holy Church?”

“Why bother asking such an obvious fact!” The man sneered, “You should have heard of my Seus’s means, I will never leave you any luck! You still have 40 seconds!”

“Chief Judge Seus!” Chen Rui thought of a familiar name. In the last incident of the Snow Dallet, he had fought against many high-level officials of the Holy Church, but he had never seen this Chief Judge.

Seus was obviously a real combat type. In other words, the butcher knife of the church. He would do anything to eliminate dissidents. The combat power of the judges was far greater from that of the civilian staffs and the ordinary knights. Even the Glorious Swordmaster Parsali was far inferior to Seus in terms of ruthlessness and unscrupulousness toward the enemy.

However, Seus’ strength was only insignificant to Chen Rui. Chen Rui changed his mind and spoke up, “Sir Seus, this is a misunderstanding.”

“30 seconds.” Seus showed a cold and stern smile. He slowly raised his hand, and the surrounding judges all put their fingers on the trigger of the magic crossbows.

Chen Rui sighed and bowed gracefully to Zola, “The most beautiful lady guardian, it seems that I need your help to calm these passionate judges down.”

When Zola blinked, everyone around shuddered in unison. Then, they felt that their hands and feet were stiff as if they were frozen; even Chief Judge Seus was no exception.

Seus was a practitioner of magic and martial arts. He immediately felt the terrifying element power. He was shocked and activated a mark on his wand without hesitation. The mark emitted a strong radiance and turned into a light beam that shone into the sky.

In an instant, another figure appeared in the light beam. It was a man with blond hair and blue robes. His body was glowing in white light, and there were actually 6 pairs of white wings behind him.

Race: Human

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SSS-

Physique: SSS-, Strength: SSS-, Spirit: SSS, Speed: SSS-.

[Analysis]: Light attribute, water attribute, healing power, sand of time.

Danger level: High.

Unlike Raphael and Camael who were real angels, the person who came should be a human who got the title of angel. Chen Rui gave this kind of person a scientific name, pseudo-angel.

As soon as this pseudo-angel appeared, the cold force experienced by Seus and the others reduced, and their eyes flashed.

The pseudo-angel’s brows furrowed. The cold air that Seus and others received was water element power, and the intensity was obviously only Kingdom level, but he couldn’t completely cancel the effect of the cold air with his own power, which showed that the enemy’s control of the water element was even better than him, a Demi-God specializing in water element!

The pseudo-angel’s eyes immediately looked at Zola. Chen Rui’s ‘Warrior’ ‘ant’ was not given a second glance, but the pseudo-angel didn’t know that this ‘ant’ had the power to destroy all of them.

chapters.title: Chapter 965: Secret! The Former Holy Empire
chapters.body:
Chapter 965: Secret! The Former Holy Empire

Chen Rui bowed to the pseudo-angel and spoke up, “It turns out to be the sir angel of the church! It’s all just a misunderstanding. We just passed by here occasionally.”

“Sir Kuhler! Don’t listen to their sophistry!” Chief Judge Seus’s voice sounded, “When we arrived here, the ruins were just opened, and only this couple were here. There is no doubt that they are the descendants of sin!”

Descendants of sin? This word repeatedly emphasized by Seus caught Chen Rui’s attention – In this case, the ‘black-robed leader’ is the so-called ‘descendants of sin’. What do these 3 words represent?

The pseudo-angel Kuhler’s eyes were filled with murderous aura, and an enormous amount of kingdom power had been condensed in an instant. Zola showed a dignified look when she sensed the opponent’s strength, and the 6 element kingdom power also began to surge rapidly.

At this moment, 2 silver lights lit up from Chen Rui’s hands. These were 2 silver-white chains that seemed half-translucent, but even the strong light around Kuhler couldn’t cover up the brilliance of these 2 silver-white chains.

When Kuhler saw the 2 chains, he blurted out in shock, “Chain of Mind!”

The appearance of these 2 chains made the pseudo-angel’s attention completely turn to Chen Rui.

“Sir, I said it was just a misunderstanding.”

“Sir Kuhler!” Seus didn’t understand the meaning of the 2 chains. Feeling that Kuhler’s murderous aura was rapidly diminishing, he asked quickly.

Kuhler ignored Seus and just stared at Chen Rui with burning eyes as he asked, “You… should have 1 more thing right?”

Chen Rui didn’t answer immediately and just looked around, “Sir, don’t you think there are too many people here?”

“Seus.” Kuhler said immediately, “Ask everyone to evacuate.”

Seus was taken aback, and he didn’t dare to ask more. He immediately issued an order, and all the judges quickly left the site.

Chen Rui already had a badge in his hand which was a round ring badge. This time, even Seus recognized it and exclaimed, “Holy Ring Badge!”

This badge was not an ordinary thing, it represented the Archangels Raphael. According to Seus’ knowledge, only the archbishop and Holy Lady Eudora of the Holy Blessing Hall have 1. I can’t believe that this ‘descendant of sin’ actually has one!

“No doubt it’s you!” Kuhler had completely restrained his breath, “Why are you here?”

Chen Rui smiled wryly, “I told Sir Seus earlier that I was just passing by. This is a complete misunderstanding.”

Seus asked cautiously in surprise, “Sir Kuhler, this sir is…”

“You should call him… Your Holiness.” Kuhler smiled, “Although the official sealing ceremony hasn’t happened yet.”

“So he is…” Seus finally understood. He no longer had any doubts and immediately gave Chen Rui a salute, “Your Holiness Arthur!”

Seus was a high-level church leader, so he naturally knew that the new owner of the Crown of Thorns, Prince Arthur, was inspired and canonized by Raphael. He was about to become the Holy Child of the church and the next successor of the pope.

The Tribunal was a direct force under the pope, so Seus showed considerable respect to the future church controller and his immediate superior.

“It’s too much of an honor! I haven’t been officially promoted yet, so just call me by my name.” Chen Rui seemed to have thought of something and said to Zola, “Help me cancel the disguise technique first.”

Zola pretended to wave her hand, and Chen Rui changed back to his original appearance of ‘Arthur’. He saluted back to Seus and said, “I was going to the Blue Glory Empire this time, but I was assassinated in the Yang Shao Empire. I fell into the trap set by the other party and was almost killed by the hobbits, so I made a plan to divide the troops, find someone to pretend to be me and the escort team to move on while I go on a different route.”

“I see.” Kuhler nodded approvingly, “No doubt you are resourceful and worthy of being a talent that Sir Raphael values.”

“Sir Kuhler has overpraised.” Chen Rui said modestly and changed back the subject, “I arrived at the Cloud City in the afternoon, and I heard that there is something weird here at night, so I was accompanied by the guardian to find out what happened. Unexpectedly, we ran into Sir Seus just in time, causing a misunderstanding.”

“Your guardian… has considerable strength.” Kuhler glanced at Zola and showed his appreciation. The guardian of the ancient civilization was no doubt extraordinary, but since it was the guardian of the ‘Holy Child’, it was equivalent to the power of the church, of course. Therefore, the stronger the better.

Zola nodded her head slightly to Kuhler in respect. Although Ms. Fairy Dragon was quite close to Demi-God, approaching Demi-God and reaching Demi-God were completely different. If they really were to fight in a 1-on-1 battle, Zola was by no means Kuhler’s opponent; it would be lucky if she was able to escape.

But then again, if the 2 sides really were to fight, Chen Rui could destroy everyone including Kuhler with [Red Pole Star Transformation]. The reason why he chose to show his identity as the ‘Holy Child’ was because of his own considerations.

“In fact, before Sir Seus arrived, we had fought against several black-robed men. One of the black-robed leaders was defeated by my guardian and escaped, while the rest of the black-robed men committed suicide, leaving no survivors. They were quite decisive… What is the origin of these people?”

“This is supposed to be a church secret.” Seus thought for a moment, then he glanced at Kuhler again before he replied, “But for Your Holiness Arthur… Uhm , Your Highness, sooner or later, you have to get hold of this information, so I don’t have to hide it. Does Your Highness know about the Cloud Rider Empire?”

“Cloud Rider Empire?” Chen Rui moved in his mind and nodded, “Sir Gralin once told me about the Cloud Rider Empire.”

There were 3 Holy Empires coexisting in the human world, namely the Dragon Bright Empire, the Blue Glory Empire and the Cloud Rider Empire. The Crown of Thorns, currently owned by Chen Rui, was the holy relic of the Cloud Rider Empire. However, the fate of the Cloud Rider Empire was very tragic, and they were completely controlled by the Black Death Followers. All the people in 30 cities and towns in the country were blood sacrificed in an inhumane manner. After this incident was disclosed by the escaped survivors, this shocked the entire human world. Under the call of the church, with the Dragon Bright Empire and the Blue Glory Empire as the leaders, almost all empires united to eliminate the Cloud Rider Empire to resolve this terrifying disaster.

“Since this is the case, I won’t go into details. The Cloud City is the site of the Cloud Rider Capital. It used to be the sacrifice center of the cultists, gathering the resentment power of countless blood sacrificers. The dark ritual has caused these grievances to not dissipate for countless years. Up to now, the area of the Cloud City is still full of terrifying spirit power. Every night, it will spread out and affect all living creatures. Originally after reconstruction, this was a prosperous city, but due to this reason, it has gradually fallen into disrepair. The Cloud City of the Turin Kingdom is already in a state of despair. Every year this week, the power of grievance will continue to deepen. According to the latest survey results, this was man-made. Because this time period was the day when the Cloud Rider Empire fell, that is to say, the remnants of the Cloud Rider Empire, which had been completely eroded by darkness… is very likely that the descendants of the royal family were deliberately carrying out some kind of evil ritual, so I specially invited Sir Kuhler to lead the Tribunal elites here to set up an ambush, but we unexpectedly came across Your Highness.”

Ritual, royal descendant of the Cloud Rider Empire, black-robed leader…

Hatred, blood sacrifice…

In his memory, the words seemed to echo in his ears again, “This is all destiny, my destiny is doomed from birth”.

Suddenly, Chen Rui understood something.

“Unfortunately, I didn’t catch the leader. I’ll try to cancel the grievances here.” Chen Rui’s mind turned fast, the Crown of Thorns appeared on his head as the sacred breath was gradually released. The surrounding intense resentment immediately started to drop sharply.

“[Divine Blessing]!” Seus’s eyes lit up, and Kuhler nodded slightly. As expected of the owner recognized by the Crown of Thorns and the owner of the [Body of Light Glory]. Although he is only at the Warrior level, he can unleash such a powerful [Divine Blessing] power.

However, when the [Divine Blessing] power of the Crown of Thorns disappeared, the resentment began to return to its original concentration. There was no sign of abating.

“Arthur, don’t waste your efforts.” Kuhler shook his head, “Although the power of [Divine Blessing] can restrain the resentment here, the ‘volume’ of resentment is too great. What’s more, the past ritual left a lot of unknown hidden danger, so the Crown of Thorns alone cannot remove these evil forces.”

Chen Rui expressed his regret and asked, “Sir Kuhler, when I activated the Crown of Thorns just now, I got some strange feedback. It seems that there are words like ‘soul variant’, ‘Blood Sacrifice Soul’, ‘Abyss Lord’ and so on. I wonder what the meaning is?”

This question was Chen Rui’s true intention to ‘befriend’ the people in the church and reveal the Crown of Thorns.

“There is actually such a thing?” Kuhler was shocked, showing a horrified expression, “What is the specific feedback?”

“I don’t know either. The information seems to be fragmented. I think we must first understand the meaning of those words.”

Kuhler looked at Seus, and Seus immediately understood, “I’m going to organize the judges first to clean up the traps and altar-related things in this area.”

After Seus left, Kuhler set his eyes on Zola again. Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Sir, this Ms. Zola is the highest guardian of the civilization that I inherited, and also my wife. She will never betray me, so there is no need to dismiss her.”

Kuhler pondered for a moment and finally said, “There’s some real ancient mysteries involved, so I have to be careful… You’ve heard Gralin talk about the Cloud Rider Empire, so you should know about the Black Death Follower. The Black Death Followers worship evil creatures that destroy everything. These creatures are called the ‘Abyss’, which can be interpreted as ‘forbidden’ in the old saying.”

Chen Rui nodded. When he asked Tetenis about the ‘Abyss’, the old man who inherited 1,000 years of knowledge thought for a long time, and the answer was only the word ‘forbidden’.

“The faith of these cultists is extremely terrifying, especially firm believers. The level of madness is terrifying. The Cloud Rider Empire once had a terrifying blood sacrifice that shocked the world. Countless living people were slaughtered, blood flowed into rivers, and life sacrifices were given to the Abyss creatures. The Abyss creatures are not in our world, but sealed somewhere. The purpose of the Black Death Follower is to let these creatures break the seal, enter this world, and destroy all things.”

Chen Rui had a deep understanding of this. The ancient alchemy civilization he inherited was destroyed by the Abyss creatures. Thinking of a new term he had seen in the Sky Wheel, he immediately asked, “By the way, sir, there is another term, what is the ‘main plane’?”

“You should know that in addition to the human world we are in, there is the Demon Realm in this world. It is said that these 2 worlds were originally 1. The gods had descended there many times. The life force there was the most powerful, collectively referred to as the ‘main plane’. However, in addition to the ‘main plane’, there are many ‘sub-worlds’ in different spaces, and some worlds have intelligent life races similar to ours, but basically no miracles can be seen. The Abyss is sealed in one of the sub-worlds.”

Chen Rui understood it immediately. He already had a rough structure diagram of the universe as the plane in his mind. The gods descended on the main plane, the rest were sub-worlds, and the Abyss creatures, now in sub-worlds, tried to use various methods to return to the main plane.

Kuhler continued to explain, “The supreme ruler of the Abyss is the lord who can drive the army of the Abyss. There are 3 lords in total, named after hatred, fear and despair. Some of the strength or physique of the Black Death Follower can be carrying the will of the Dark Lord, then a certain mutation occurs, which is called the ‘soul variant’. The soul variant has high and low levels. The lower one is affected by the will of the lord, and the highest level soul variant can be converted to terrifying creatures of half Abyss or full Abyss. They can even be separated from the altar or other facilities and directly project part of the lord’s power. As for the blood-sacrifice soul… It can be understood as the existence of the Dark Lord passing soul power and strengthening the will control through the main altar. That is to say, the higher the power of the main altar sacrifices, the stronger the will that the lord transmits to the soul variant, and the stronger the power it exerts.”

“Main altar?” Chen Rui noticed 1 of the key words.

“The main altar is the altar that is directly sacrificed to the Dark Lord. It contains special rules and the strongest power. It can automatically absorb the sacrifices of all the secret Abyss altars. In theory, each Dark Lord corresponds to only 1 main altar.”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up, “So, as long as we destroy the main altar, we can cut off the lord’s control over the Black Death Followers… especially the soul variant?”

“At least, it can be greatly weakened.” Kuhler sighed, “But it’s easier said than done. The main altar has always been the biggest secret of the Black Death Followers. For so many years, we have been trying to find and destroy the main altar, but there is no sign of it… The information you get from the Crown of Thorns may be quite important. If you continue to have corresponding prompts in the future, be sure to pay attention. In fact, I know very little about the Abyss. If you have more doubts, you can ask Sir Raphael in the future.”

Chen Rui nodded with a strange look in his eyes – At least, he knew what was Shura’s biggest mission in that mysterious cult now.

chapters.title: Chapter 1 - How Are You Going To Take Responsibility For Me?
chapters.body:
Chapter 1 - How Are You Going To Take Responsibility For Me?

…

"Miss Xiang Yi, how are you going to take responsibility for me?"

In the dark room, Xiang Yi awoke to the sound of a low and mischievous male voice.

Her brain was still spinning as she squinted, taking in her surroundings.

It seemed to be a hotel suite. She was curled up on the bed, while the voice came from a man sitting on the nearby sofa. Xiang Yi could only make out his silhouette.

He was young, wearing his black shirt slightly unbuttoned and sitting cross legged. Clasped between his long fingers was a cigarette; its scarlet flame flickered just enough to illuminate half of his clavicle and a distinct throat.

She just couldn't see his face.

Xiang Yi immediately calmed down and began to speak in a calm and polite tone. "Send me your bank account, thanks."

"Cheh." The man's chuckle contained a hint of ridicule. "Hush money? Wouldn't it be possible to make a fortune just by sleeping with you a few times?"

"Thump thump thump!" The banging sound on the door was accompanied by a sharp female voice. "It's here! I saw with my own eyes, that little whore Xiang Yi entered Gege's* room!"

When she heard the familiar but distant voice, Xiang Yi was in a momentary trance. She rolled off the bed and approached the man.

"Bank account," she calmly said.

The man tsk-ed in an inexplicable way, his thin lips curving into a playful smile.

How can a person completely change their personality in just the span of a few minutes?

Xiang Yi didn't waste more time with him. She then rattled off a string of numbers. "If you want to discuss terms, you can call this number." Her voice was originally gentle, but now it has been stained with a touch of hoarseness, unintentionally making one feel soft in their bones. "Excuse me."

She pulled the curtains aside, and the man, who did not have time to move sideways, became enveloped by the curtain's fabric.

"…."

There were no swords flying about or interstellar spacecraft. This was an ordinary, realistic world, and the world that Xiang Yi had lived in for twenty years.

She was back.

A sense of sorrow tugged at her heart, but in an instant, it had been replaced by the feeling of stability and steadiness.

Although the world was different, her skills were still applicable. The fair-skinned girl pushed against the balcony railing, then nimbly disappeared into the darkness.

When the man got up and saw this scene, his eyebrows began twitching fiercely.

If he remembered correctly, this was… the sixth floor?

Meanwhile, the door was opened with a universal keycard, and a hoard of people took over the room. Leading them was a slightly chubby girl.

She had received news just now that Xiang Yi was trying to seduce her favorite idol!

She turned on the main light source and fiercely said, "Take it! Take the damn photos! Xiang Yi, did you lose your mind thirsting for fame? I will personally send you right onto tomorrow's headline! Gege, please cover your face so I don't film you too…"

Everyone saw the slender figure idling in the room.

"!!!"

"Shi… Shi Yingdi**?"

The man standing in front of the window did not turn his head. He put out his cigarette and spoke in a soft and cool voice. "It seems like I will make the newspaper headlines tomorrow?"

"No no no, it was my mistake, I'll delete all the photos uwuuuu…" The slightly chubby girl began to cry with just a word from him.

Xiang Yi had deduced from the landmark on the ground floor that they were in a hot spring villa.

As she was about to leave, a man with rainbow-colored hair screamed out as he tossed his umbrella and ran towards her. "My good dear, did you really ruin that little idol?!"

'The little idol? The guy whose face she couldn't make out just now was an entertainer?'

"…" Xiang Yi paused for a moment, then gave an objective evaluation. "I might have succeeded, might have failed."

"Oh right, hello, who are you?"

The manager's eyes turned even darker.

—Author's notes—

This novel is based in a modern era, where all settings and contexts are made up by the author.

In pursuit of dramatic conflict and contradiction, the face-slapping/dumbass/god-tier operation plots are for entertainment purposes only. It's just for a good laugh! Do not believe it, or try to imitate it, or try to one-up it!

If you are a student, you should work hard on your studies and do not get addicted to online novels. The novel won't have changed after you finish your homework and write your exams.

In addition, please do not mention Ah Nuan's works, character names, plots of the book, etc. Our community is naturally adorable; see you guys in the reviews column~

— Translator's notes—

* Gege, in this case, is an endearing term used to reference a male idol rather than a direct older brother, kind of like oppa in Korean.

chapters.title: Chapter 2 - One Billion
chapters.body:
Chapter 2 - One Billion

…

Half an hour later…

Xiang Yi finally realized who this feather duster—oh no, this man with colorful hair—was. Turns out, it was her manager, Ah Nan.

A year ago, she had been in a car accident. When she woke up, she was bound to a system just like the ones mentioned in various web novels, and thus began her fast time-traveling career.

Today was the day she concluded her missions, and the day she returned to earth.

But contrary to Xiang Yi's expectations, her body had been not in a vegetative state or in a state of coma… Instead, it had been inhabited by someone else for a year.

Standing in front of the full-length mirror, the girl in front of her appeared to be overly skinny, dressed in a sweet girl group style crop top and a red checkered skirt, revealing a pair of pin-straight legs and a fair, slender waist.

Her hair was tied up into pigtails and adorned with numerous tacky bows, hair clips, and barrettes that were currently trendy on the internet.

The countless time-traveling experiences through different worlds made it easy for Xiang Yi to quickly adapt, but facing this person with a head full of hair clips, she showed a dazed expression, a very rare occurrence in her lifetime.

"Uwuuu…" Ah Nan was still clutching a tissue box as he cried. "My sweet dear, you've lost your memory! What are we going to do?"

Xiang Yi pointed at her hair clip and said, "Help me take these out, thanks."

Ah Nan followed the order. His hands were nimble, and his actions were swift and light.

He didn't realize how much of a bully Xiang Yi had previously been, bullying the weak and fearing the strong. In front of her bosses, she was a coward; but in front of her driver and her maid, she was beyond arrogant.

Before, he would only listen to her out of habit; but now, he couldn't help but truly surrender.

Xiang Yi asked, "How much will it cost to cancel the contract I signed?"

Ah Nan continued to cry as he took out the hair clips; he was a multitasking master. "My sweet girl, if you end the contract, you'll owe them one billion dollars! My poor, poor girl waahh…"

Xiang Yi: ???

'Was the person who had inhabited her body an idiot? How could she sign such an unfair contract?'

'Where was your brain? Haven't you used one before?!'

Ah Nan, who was taking out the elastics and hair clips from her hair and even helped in combing out her frizzy hair, advised:

"Sweetie, the company's terms for you are considerably good, except for the termination clause. If our dear works hard every month, she can buy her favorite purse! Let's not think about cancelling the contract, okay? Where else are you going to get this much money?"

Xiang Yi calculated how much she had in liquid capital, other finances, and real estate. She sighed. "Yeah. Still missing a bit."

She only had ninety million or so.

Ah Nan did not take her words into consideration. Even if he were drunk on fake wine, he wouldn't believe that Xiang Yi had the means to pull out a billion dollars.

"Sweetheart, I'll run the hot water and you go take a lovely little bath. Remember to post a few selfies afterwards to signal your business…" Ah Nan continued to rattle on as he headed into the bathroom. Just then, the doorbell rang. He suspiciously looked through the fish-eye lens. Realizing it was Xiang Yi's boyfriend, he then let him in.

"Mr. Xiao, you came to check on our sweetheart…" Ah Nan forced a smile, but when he saw a meek-looking girl hiding behind Xiao Yang, his expression changed.

Xiao Yang was holding her hand, whispering in reassurance, "Don't be scared, your husband will break up with that stupid woman right now!"

"Mhmm, Ah Yang gege is the best!"

Ah Nan exploded. "Xiao Yang, you are shameless! My sweetheart is so good to you, and you dare to cheat on her!"

"You sissy, what right do you have to speak to me?" Xiao Yang rudely said to him as he rolled his eyes. He then arrogantly said, "Hey, I'm here to break…"

He suddenly choked up.

The meek girl looked toward his gaze and couldn't help but freeze as well.

The stupid woman with the last name Xiang… Has she always been this pretty?!

chapters.title: Chapter 3 - Can You Both Please Get Lost?
chapters.body:
Chapter 3 - Can You Both Please Get Lost?

Under the warm light, the girl was so fair she seemed to be glowing. Her long hair hung loose around her shoulders, and she was wearing a baggy apricot sweater, absent-mindedly browsing her phone.

Hearing the commotion, she raised her head to look over.

Someone like Xiao Yang, whose language grades were garbage, could still think of two adjectives to describe the scene:

'Bright eyes, shining like white teeth.'

The prideful yet calm temperament emanating from her figure was simply too attractive in particular…

"Ah Yang-gege…" A glimpse of anxiety passed through the meek-looking girl's heart as she grabbed onto Xiao Yang's arm.

Xiao Yang snapped back into reality and thought of how Xiang Yi had clung to him like an eager dog wanting to go out. Every time he would mention breaking up, she would cry and scream and would even buy him various expensive gifts to please him. Suddenly, he felt confident.

He didn't really like Xiang Yi, but men were inherently drawn to trouble, and he did enjoy the feeling of Xiang Yi clinging on to him.

"Uhm, Xiang Yi, I'm sorry, I love Ruo Ruo now. I know you're a kind person, so you will wish us well, right?" His tone was bold and confident.

"You are?"

"Sweetheart, this is your boyfriend," Ah Nan explained. He then glared at Xiao Yang. "Our sweetheart lost her memory, she doesn't remember you!"

Xiao Yang didn't believe him. He sneered, "Xiang Yi, what are you playing at now? You think I'll believe you? Amnesia? Why not just say that you time traveled!"

Ruo Ruo pulled at his shirtsleeves. "Ah Yang-gege, don't say such things. Sister Xiang Yi is in the entertainment industry, all artists are romantics at heart."

"Her? An artist? She's nothing but a variety show personality. Before, she could make it onto some TV shows, but now she only does online shows…" Xiao Yang said in disdain.

Xiang Yi interrupted him. "Are you here to ask me for a breakup fee?"

Xiao Yang: ???

Ruo Ruo: ???

"Is one million enough?" Xiang Yi politely asked. She didn't feel anything toward being cheated on. After all, these were the feelings of the one who had been occupying her body, not hers.

Like the faceless man from the hotel, this meant one thing to her: trouble.

If something can be resolved with money, then it couldn't get any better.

Xiao Yang faced her calm eyes, which were as tranquil as a still lake. He began to panic and started to get angry. "What do you mean? Who are you trying to insult? Can our relationship be measured by money?"

"Okay, I understand," Xiang Yi nodded, expressionless. "Not enough? Two million then."

Ah Nan's mouth was in the shape of an O. 'Dear god, has the little dear been triggered?'

But… this felt freaking great!

It was his first time to see this sc.u.mbag's face turn green with anger!

Being a variety star sounded quite embarrassing, but Xiang Yi's income was still much higher than that of an ordinary person.

Hence, Ah Nan believed that although two million was a hefty sum, it was still worth the price just to see the sc.u.mbag riled up!

Xiang Yi found Xiao Yang's account number on her phone and casually entered a number.

"Ding—!"

"Your XX account has received 2 million RMB—"

Xiao Yang was from an affluent background and didn't lack money. He had always been the one to throw money at other people. This was his first time on the receiving end, and that made him feel stunned!

"Xiang Yi, you're trying to humiliate me!"

The fair-skinned girl lazily leaned on the sofa and said in an incomprehensible tone, "Humiliate you? Wasn't it only a matter of time? You smoke, you drink, you cheat, yet you're still a decent guy?"

Xiao Yang almost choked.

"Get lost." Xiang Yi's temperament was gentle, but she would not show any extra formalities toward this kind of sc.u.m.

Xiao Yang's eyes widened, but he was too shocked to speak.

Ruo Ruo, who was standing next to him, took this opportunity to fan the flame. "Ah Yang-gege, why is Xiang Yi like this? She has no manners at all…"

Xiang Yi cupped her cheek with one hand as if deep in thought. After pondering for a while, she said, "Then… can you both please get lost?"

Xiao Yang: "…"

Ruo Ruo: "…"

chapters.title: Chapter 4 - It'S All Over!
chapters.body:
Chapter 4 - It'S All Over!

"Then, can you both please get lost?"

Xiao Yang: "…"

Ruo Ruo: "…"

"Take your time, I won't be sending you off." Xiang Yi's tone remained casual, as if she did not consider this sc.u.mbag and his little edelweiss* to be worthy of her attention.

Xiao Yang's throat tightened. He didn't think Xiang Yi would treat him with this kind of attitude.

The girl lowered her eyebrows, her gaze falling on her screen. Despite having a seemingly serious and focused expression, it was hard to tell what she was looking at. Her jawline was delicate, and her hair hung softly around her. It seemed like she had an attitude spawning from the d.e.s.i.r.e to spend her years in quietness, asking nothing from the world.

She was a different person from the girl who had once badgered him with her crying, screaming, and tantrums.

"Good, very good. Xiang Yi, you better not regret this!" He harshly told her off and angrily left with his beloved edelweiss on his arm.

Ah Nan naturally did not harbor any fondness for them and slammed the door shut.

Xiao Yang: …!

'Xiang Yi is crazy, this sissy boy is also crazy! How dare they treat me this way!'

Ah Nan was overjoyed. "Sweetheart, you told him off so well! Why would you give him so much money though? You worked hard to earn your money…"

He knew the Xiang family was quite well off, but in the last few years Xiang Yi had cut all her connections with her family one by one. At this point, she was basically on her own.

Xiang Yi: "It's fine to spend money to eliminate disasters."

Ah Nan was curious. "What have you been looking at for so long…"

"Seeing how people are going to criticize me."

Ah Nan anxiously stepped over to take her phone. "Sweetheart, didn't you promise me you wouldn't read this stuff?! Oh right, you have amnesia… It's okay, it's all just nonsense from netizens…" He inadvertently glanced at the screen and took a deep, cold breath, his voice trembling. "Dear, dear, dear, dear… Don't tell me you entered THAT little idol's room?!"

Xiang Yi innocently looked at him. "I dunno."

Amnesia was a good excuse that could be used.

Ah Nan's voice was hoarse as he shouted, "Shi Yingdi! You entered Shi Yingdi's room!"

Xiang Yi calmly asked, "Who's that?"

"Shi Yingdi! Shi Sui!"

In the next few minutes, Ah Nan's voice was cracking as he tried to explain to Xiang Yi the science behind how badass this Shi Sui was.

He was a top scorer in his city's college entrance exam and got accepted to the top domestic university, Peking University, but he had dropped out for some reason.

After being tagged as a pitiful young master, he entered the entertainment circle and began his career.

He was the youngest person in history to achieve the Grand Slam titles in the film industry. He could run off to act in any TV series and still become the "TV Emperor" too. He was evidently pursuing the route of a talent-based celebrity, but he had gained countless loyal fans along the way.

To summarize in one sentence: he had good looks, money, and intelligence.

After Ah Nan finished summarizing, he began to circle Xiang Yi, heartbroken. "You you you—do you know how many people's daydreams you've ruined?"

Xiang Yi: "…" She was quite curious to know what had happened in the last year.

However, if a term like "ruined" could be used on her, the person occupying her body must have had a worrisome reputation.

"Sweetie, you're trending…"

"Your Weibo homepage has been bathed in blood by Shi Yingdi's fans…"

"The internet variety shows we signed on for are no longer available as well." Ah Nan began pulling tissues again. "Sweetie, what will you do now? We're all going to starve! Waaah…"

Xiang Yi was silent for a while, then stiffly patted his shoulder. She wasn't used to interacting with other human bodies.

"Don't worry, I own some land, so I can go farm. Besides, I could always go back and inherit my family business…"

Ah Nan cried even harder when he heard this.

Not only had his sweetheart lost her memory, her brain had gone from being dumb to being straight up single celled.

It's! All! Over!

*Translator's note: Edelweiss, or 'small white flower' being the direct translation, is usually used to ironically describe a female character that uses the qualities of being pure, kind, oblivious and delicate to satisfy their own self interests

chapters.title: Chapter 5 - Bye, I Have To Slaughter My Pig
chapters.body:
Chapter 5 - Bye, I Have To Slaughter My Pig

A week later.

The public's opinion about Xiang Yi and Shi Sui gradually ceased, but Xiang Yi's Weibo remained in a state of ruin and the subject of ridicule for many netizens.

Ah Nan carefully dialed Xiang Yi's phone number.

Buzz.

She answered.

"My sweet dear, are you awake?"

"Mhmm, what's up?" Through the receiver, there was a noise that sounded like she was exercising.

Ah Nan felt like a relieved old father. After experiencing amnesia, this little sweetheart had really grown up. She was exercising to keep in shape even without any jobs on hand!

"My sweet, no worries, the netizens are tired from talking so much smack for several days. This time, you got a blessing in disguise: your popularity has shot up! A very popular variety show has requested for you and even wants you to fly in as a VIP. I'll accept it for you?"

"It's fine, I'm busy."

Ah Nan was confused. "Huh? What are you busy with? The spa? Or are you in a hot spring?"

Xiang Yi calmly responded, "Feeding the pigs."

Ah Nan was in a momentary trance. Thankfully, he had fast reflexes. Recently, pets like small ducks and mini pigs have been trending online, and Xiang Yi probably just has one of those adorable little…piglets. Right?

He painstakingly tried to persuade her once again. "It'll only take two days to film. If we behave, won't it be great to make a couple hundred grand?"

"But my pig is quite appetizing, too."

"What? Pets are so cute, how could you eat them?""

"It's not a pet pig," Xiang Yi seriously explained. "They are omnivorous mammals. The quality of meat is tender, its color bright red, and it's plump and juicy. It can be used for braised pork, boiled pork slices, and sweet and sour pork ribs."

"…" It took Ah Nan ten seconds to recover from the shock.

"Gotta go, I need to go slaughter my pig."

Ah Nan: ???

He took another couple of seconds to reassure himself. Xiang Yi was probably at one of those tourist farmhouses to experience farm life… Right…

At Xing Chen Entertainment.

The CEO's office.

Xiang Feng was sitting sloppily on a swivel chair. With his legs shaking, the CEO did not look very domineering at all.

"Did you dismiss them? What an ungrateful fiend! You've treated him well these last few years. If you hadn't paid for his mother's medical expenses…" Xiang Feng continued to complain to a man in front of the full span window.

From his perspective, he could just make out a man with a deep and handsome profile. His features were even more three dimensional than it was on the big screen. He had wide shoulders and long legs of perfect proportions. He was dressed casually, with his white shirt sleeves folded up twice revealing smooth muscular forearms. He had a cigarette cinched between his knotted fingertips, but he wasn't smoking; it was as if he were toying with it.

Shi Sui lazily responded, "No need to mention people we'll never meet again."

Xiang Feng curled his lips. "Alright, whatever you say goes, you're the top selling product of our company… Hey hey, I was just kidding. Don't look at me like that, it's scary."

A week ago, the assistant who had followed Shi Sui for several years had betrayed him and secretly released a pile of dirt to the paparazzi.

Most of them were fabricated groundless accusations. But when the real and fake were mixed, and due to the special status of his assistant, it had set off a large wave.

Thinking of his amnesiac little niece, Xiang Feng could feel a headache approaching. "Xiang Yi is beyond saving, she actually dared to enter your room… I'm furious! If I bother with her again, I'm truly no better than a dog!"

As soon as his words fell, the phone rang.

Caller ID: Little Xiang Yi.

*Translator's Note: Jin is the Chinese unit of measurement; 1 jin is exactly 1/2 a kilogram.

chapters.title: Chapter 6 - Fragrant 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 6 - Fragrant 1

Xiang Feng: "…"

He paced back and forth between answering and not answering, wavering frantically.

If he didn't answer… What if she was in danger? Xiang Yi was his niece after all…

But if he answered, wouldn't he be admitting that he was a dog in front of Shi Sui?

'I am the CEO of Xing Chen Entertainment, would I do this kind of shameful thing to myself?!'

The next moment—

Xiang Feng answered the phone with an expressionless face. "Hello, state your business, or else please don't disturb."

From the receiver, he heard a gentle and obedient voice. "Uncle, are you working late? Can I bring you some food?"

Xiang Feng recalled that he had just posted on his WeChat Moments that he was working late as a facade.

He almost agreed, thinking this was only Xiang Yi trying to please him. Who knew what kind of trouble she would stir up next?

In the past year, using her amnesia as an excuse, she had angered her grandfather until he was hospitalized and had caused her grandmother to pass out several times. She was also on bad terms with all of her older brothers.

Xiang Feng was technically her senior, but he wasn't that much older than Xiang Yi. Hence, she was spoiled by him since she was a child. In the beginning, he cleaned up after her messes, but after he was hurt so many times, he had decided to ignore her issues.

"No need, we have overtime food at the office." Xiang Feng's attitude was cold.

He was already prepared for Xiang Yi's fit of rage, but after several seconds, Xiang Yi didn't turn into a demon. Instead—

"I made it myself." Xiang Yi's voice was slow and steady, sounding like it came from someone with a well tempered, gentle personality. "Minced pork rice, with sweet and sour ribs, freshly steamed vegetables, and pumpkin congee."

"Heh?" Xiang Feng stared blankly.

Xiang Yi was a good chef growing up and loved to tinker with all kinds of cuisines. A year ago, she had lost her memory and claimed that she had lost her culinary abilities as well. In the past year, he hadn't even seen her boil water, let alone make dishes.

"Oh, sorry, I forgot to tell you. Uncle, I got my memory back."

The girl's voice on the other end was familiar and soft.

But in the past year, Xiang Feng had become so disappointed in her that there was more skepticism and doubt in his voice than there was trust.

"Come if you want. Your legs are attached to you, I can't stop you."

He hung up.

Xiang Feng rubbed the goosebumps on his arm. "Little brother Shi Sui, do you think my little niece is bipolar? Just like that mentally insane role you won Best Actor with…"

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows. "Huh? What did you just call me?"

Xiang Feng: …!

He was really aloof. He even dared call Shi Sui by his nickname!

"Hey hey, you're younger than me anyway… Calling you little brother is natural."

Shi Sui coldly smiled. "I'm not small."

Xiang Feng: …?

F*ck. The car tire print was basically on his face!

He sheepishly picked at his fingers. "I just think my little niece feels like a different person. She even said she got her memory back… I don't know if I should believe her or not."

Click.

Shi Sui put his fingers together and lit a cigarette. The scarlet flames amid the smoke flickered like stars. Casually, he said, "Perhaps she was two people to begin with."

But his voice was too light and didn't make it to Xiang Feng's ears.

Half an hour later…

Xiang Yi entered the CEO's office with a thermos container.

Xiang Feng saw her approach and cautiously stared at her.

"Uncle," Xiang Yi softly greeted him. She noticed someone else in the room as well, sitting on the sofa playing with a lighter and facing away from her.

"Did you really make this? You didn't just call take out, did you?" Xiang Feng continued to complain. He thought to himself, he would just open the container to look but wouldn't touch the food. There was no way he'd forgive Xiang Yi!

As soon as he opened the container, a rich fragrance immediately filled the entire office.

chapters.title: Chapter 7 - Fragrant 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 7 - Fragrant 2

The first layer of the bento box was the sweet and sour ribs. The ribs were glistening with oil and had a rosy hue, sprinkled with white sesame seeds.

The second layer was steamed green vegetables. The tender and vibrant greens were laid out delicately, topped with ginger, minced garlic, soy sauce, and oyster sauce.

The third layer was the highlight—braised pork rice.

She had chosen both fat and lean pork belly, boiled it, and then minced it into smaller pieces. In a clay pot, it was then simmered on low heat until the fat was bubbling with sound, and the gelatin in the pig skin perfectly melted into soup.

The marinated egg was cut in two, with a crispy egg yolk served alongside a variety of carefully pickled vegetables.

The pumpkin congee was contained in a separate small bowl. Steaming the pumpkin in advance so it could be mashed into a puree, she had also boiled white rock sugar and lilies into the porridge while it was still steaming hot.

Xiang Feng recalled the delicious meals his niece used to make. The deliciousness from his memory merged with the aroma in the room, and he began to swallow.

"I…I'll try one bite! Let's see if you really made this, or if it's takeout!" Xiang Feng found an excuse for himself and picked up a pork rib with his chopsticks.

Uh oh. It was delicious! And his favorite level of sweetness!

Xiang Feng had an undisclosed little secret, and it was that he loved sweets. For dishes like sweet and sour pork and sweet and sour fish, he preferred them a bit sweeter than normal.

After skillfully slurping the meat off the bones, Xiang Feng picked up some vegetables to relieve the greasiness. Suddenly, his eyes widened.

Heh? How can the texture of these vegetables feel so good?

He completely forgot about the 'just one bite' statement he had made just now. His chopsticks moved with lightning speed as he stuffed his face full.

Xiang Yi didn't speak as she sat across from him, smiling as she watched him.

Xiang Feng coughed awkwardly, but he had already finished eating. There was no point in stopping. He was just about to pick up his chopsticks to start on the minced pork rice when Xiang Yi handed him a spoon. "Hey, take this."

At that moment, Xiang Feng felt as if his old niece had returned.

It was as if his little niece had been possessed by some strange being this past year.

However, his brain was not advanced enough to process such a notion. He scooped a spoonful of braised pork rice and stuffed it in his mouth.

The fatty meat melted in his mouth, while the lean meat was soft and al dente. The rich soup had been poured over the distinct rice grains, like soaked in brown sugar. It was fragrant, but not greasy, and suitably sweet and salty.

Oh!

Oh oh oh!

Had it not been for years of family etiquette, Xiang Feng would have wanted to smack the bento box with his spoon!

How could it taste so good?

'Is this heaven? Why does such delicious food exist ah!'

Xiang Feng buried his face in the food and scarfed it down. Xiang Yi felt that he resembled the piglet she had raised.

Yes, once her piglets grow up, she will kill them all to make minced pork rice for her uncle!

Xiang Yi had made enough portions for two, but in ten minutes, Xiang Feng had cleaned out the box like a tornado.

Only then did he begin to choke up.

Xiang Yi happily handed him the pumpkin congee.

Xiang Feng only wanted to take a sip to clear his throat, but it was too delicious. He couldn't refrain from gulping down the entire bowl.

Ah! What a delicious meal!

"Burp." Xiang Feng rubbed his belly, flopping back into his chair like a lazy, satiated salted fish. "Little Xiang Yi, your uncle forgives you!"

Xiang Yi blinked. "Uncle, then do you believe that I've recovered my memory?"

Xiang Feng slapped the arm rest. "You're my niece by blood! If I don't trust you, who else would I trust?"

"Cheh." It was a chuckle that sounded as if it was grasping the apex of a person's heart, deep and teasing.

Xiang Feng suddenly felt awake. Shi Sui was still here!

He remained silent for a few seconds and then introduced him to Xiang Yi. "This… This is the man that you've ruined."

Xiang Yi: "…."

'Perfect, it was this 'ruined' word again.'

She looked sideways, her eyes suddenly gazing into an abyss in her line of sight.

After a long pause, Xiang Yi finally regained her consciousness. The outer corners of her eyes grew moist.

chapters.title: Chapter 8 - I Can Do It
chapters.body:
Chapter 8 - I Can Do It
