It had been a year in the real world, but the flow of time across worlds was different. Xiang Yi was unfamiliar with the concept of time yet.

But when she saw Shi Sui's face, Xiang Yi remembered a point in time.

It was her sixteenth birthday banquet, just a glimpse from her wondrous years.

On that day, she had secretly fallen in love with someone. Perhaps 'secret love' in one's younger years was not a vigorous feeling, but looking back from a distant world, there was a touch of spoiled sweetness in her heart.

He was her white moonlight.*

Shi Sui noticed her strange demeanor and raised an eyebrow.

Xiang Yi hurriedly arranged her emotions and generously greeted him. "Hello, I'm Xiang Yi."

The Xiang family's politeness and etiquette were carved into their bones, but their personalities were different.

Xiang Feng was always bluffing and was easily on edge, but Xiang Yi was…

Gentle.

This was the involuntary evaluation that came to Shi Sui's mind.

The woman who had broken into his room that night had been pretentious, fake, and had the disgusting manner of someone trying to get in bed with him.

After fainting, she had become calm and sober.

'Of course, they were two different beings,' he thought.

"Hello, I'm Shi Sui." The man's voice was languid and low, and he had a tendency to slightly drag out his tones. Inexplicably, his voice was likable and attractive.

Xiang Yi: "About last time… I'm sorry. To be honest, when I regained my past memory, I then lost my memories from last year."

She had a calm expression and was a genius at shifting blame.

Don't ask; if you do, the answer will always be amnesia.

Xiang Feng was shocked. "What? Why do you keep gaining and losing your memory? Xiang Yi, does your head not hurt?! No no, I must take you to find Xiang Li for a check up…"

"I'm fine, I've already done a physical examination." Not only did Xiang Yi learn of what happened in the past year, but she had also been on a medicated diet to treat herself. Her body was evidently malnourished. The previous inhabitant probably wanted to pursue a figure by dieting. "Plus, my second brother probably doesn't want to see me right now."

Xiang Feng: "…That's true."

Xiang Li was a medical doctor. Although he leaned more toward the theoretical side, both his hands were still extremely priceless. He had performed countless precise experiments, but he had hurt the nerves on his right wrist because of Xiang Yi's stubbornness.

If the medical and scientific field were to discover this, it was possible for tens of thousands of people to write blood oaths for Xiang Yi to commit suicide and repent.

Xiang Yi felt that she might need to consult her second brother for a medicated diet, as well as his medical skills to heal her body. But she was in no rush. In order to restore her relations with her family, she had to do it one by one.

Her youngest uncle was the closest to her, and he had a carefree personality. He was the person she was most sure of convincing, so she came to him first.

She didn't deliberately explain anything as she kept her head down and quietly packed up the bento box.

Xiang Feng looked at her and flushed red.

The bento box looked as if it had been licked clean—bright and sparkling.

He then feigned a no-nonsense business tone. "Ah, Shi Sui, do you have any thoughts on your work arrangements?"

Shi Sui responded indifferently, "I'm going to take a break and find a place to plant flowers and raise fish."

Xiang Feng: "Alright, it's good you are resting. If there are any suitable jobs, I'll recall them for you. However, you need to find another assistant.

You reek from head to toe of entitled prince issues and habits. You probably wouldn't even help someone if a bottle fell over. There are only two outcomes from living alone: either you get food poisoned from take-outs, or you starve to death. You should probably find someone who can cook."

Xiang Yi suddenly lifted her head. "I can do it."

Shi Sui looked at her with a plastic smile.

If both of them were on a 5G network, then Xiang Feng was on a solid 2G network. He was dazed. "What do you mean, you can do it?"

* Translator's Note: White Moonlight is a term taken from Eileen Chang's novel, "Red roses and White Roses". It is used in this case to refer to a subject who was immensely desirable, yet unattainable.

chapters.title: Chapter 9 - Snowflake Nougat
chapters.body:
Chapter 9 - Snowflake Nougat

Xiang Yi gently explained, "I can be his assistant. I'm pretty decent at cooking and that sort of thing."

Shi Sui was her 'white moonlight'. The feelings she harbored for him went beyond just wanting to be his girlfriend and was similar to… An aunty fan*?

She just wanted to be good to him.

Plus, she had been bound to a nanny System* when she had time travelled. In short, her role was to assist her teammates in defeating their opponents.

Most of the skills she had mastered belonged to a support player's toolkit. It wasn't lethal, but it was suitable enough for an assistant.

Xiang Feng heard this and lost it. "No way! How can a girl from the Xiang family cook for another man? Is he worthy? He doesn't…" He felt his backside turn cold. Xiang Feng then abruptly changed his wording. "Of course, he's worthy, but I am worried you will be tired! Besides, you're a public figure. How crazy it is for you to be an assistant to another public figure!"

Xiang Yi: "I have plans to leave the entertainment industry."

"Heh?" Xiang Feng was stunned. Did he hear her right?

Xiang Yi repeated once more. "I want to leave the entertainment industry. It's just… After recovering my memory, I discovered my initial intentions and realized the true meaning of life, that is, to return to the fields of the countryside and care for the natural landscape."

The second half of her statement was nonsense. The actual truth was:

The max level boss wants to retire in Buddhist style**. 🙂

Xiang Feng was in a trance. If one must know, a year ago his little niece had threatened him with her life trying to enter the entertainment industry. She had cried, screamed, and just about destroyed the Xiang family with her antics.

The Xiang family's little princess could have asked for the stars in the sky, and they would have bought her a meteorite. Why would she enter the entertainment industry to endure that kind of suffering?

Unable to stand her crying, her young uncle Xiang Feng caved and decided to sign her onto his own company so he could spoonfeed her resources himself.

But in the end, Xiang Yi had listened to some girlfriend's gossip and signed an unfair contract with a notoriously sc.u.mmy smaller company. After Xiang Feng found out, he had been half dead from anger. Yet, she had somehow justified her decision, and even blamed him for not understanding the kindness of her girlfriends.

Xiang Feng was truly hurt from that time.

Being an assistant still seemed wild to him. What was she after? How much money could she really make…

Suddenly, the lightbulb lit up in Xiang Feng's mind, and he finally realized.

Ah! Of course, she's not after money!

His niece was obviously after Shi Sui! She wanted his body!

When he thought of their encounters at that level, Xiang Feng resolutely refused. "No way! If you want to exit the industry, I can help you. But being an assistant is out of the question."

Xiang Yi had only mentioned it casually, and seeing Xiang Feng refuse, she didn't say anything more.

Of course. Someone like Shi Sui could find any assistant he wanted. She was thinking too much about it.

"Uncle, Mr. Shi, I'll be leaving now," Xiang Yi politely greeted them. After walking a few steps, she suddenly remembered something and took out a small bag containing snowflake pastries from her purse and stuffed it in Xiang Feng's hands. "Try it, and see if you like it. If so, let me know on WeChat and I'll bring you some more next time."

This was how the Xiang family got along with each other. If they encounter a good thing, they would always think of their family first. Xiang Feng spoiled his little niece, and Xiang Yi wanted to treat him well too.

Shi Sui's deep gaze inexplicably fell on the objects in Xiang Feng's hands.

Peanuts, biscuits, almonds, and dried cranberries had been chipped up and mixed with marshmallows and milk powder. Each piece was exquisite and small, exuding a sweet and light aroma.

Xiang Feng smiled like a landlord's silly son. "You don't like sweets, right? Then I won't be sharing with you."

He opened his mouth to its max limit and stuffed a few pieces of snowflake pastry into his mouth in one breath.

Shi Sui: "…"

*Translator's Note: Aunty fan (or direct translation, "mother fan") refers to fans who treat idols like their own sons/daughters out of genuine love for said celebrity, usually seeing the individual as a child that never grows old.

**Buddhist style, or 'Fo Xi' is a recently trending internet term used to describe a certain kind of culture. Usually, Buddhist youth (boy or girl) describes an individual who doesn't want anything extraneous, doesn't have any qualms with society, and generally leads a lifestyle that seeks both internal and external peace.

Lastly, I wish I could upload pictures on this platform so you guys can see how delectable some of these dishes look!

chapters.title: Chapter 10 - Stream 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 10 - Stream 1

The next day. ..

At around 10:00 a.m. the next morning, Xiang Yi received a call from her manager, Ah Nan.

He anxiously asked, "My dear, are you awake?"

The previous Xiang Yi had a severe case of morning moods; she wasn't a morning person. If he had accidentally disrupted her, he would receive a bloody scolding.

Xiang Yi turned on her speaker and placed her phone on the plant rack. She then picked up her garden scissors and continued to trim the wilted petals from her daisies.

"Huh? What's wrong?" Her biological clock was quite accurate. No matter where she was, she would wake up at 7:00 a.m. sharp, unless it was raining or snowing.

Ah Nan breathed a sigh of relief, trying to flatter her, "My dear, do you want to think about that reality show from last time? After all, you don't have any jobs, so you're idle anyway…"

Xiang Yi thought for a moment. "Why don't you come to my house and we'll discuss it in person. I'll send you the address."

After she hung up, Ah Nan couldn't understand. Was Xiang Yi living at her company's condo? Did she move?

An hour later…

Ah Nan gazed at the magnificent black wrought-iron gate, and his eyes widened.

In front of the European style villa was a Roman fountain. The garden—oh no, it should be called a manor—was fully planted with flowers. During the end of spring at this time, roses bloomed most vibrantly. At glance, there were at least a dozen species of flowers, shrubs, and vines.

Behind it, extending endlessly was… the vegetable field.

From afar, it looked like a farm.

The door opened automatically. Not far away, Xiang Yi was wearing a white cotton skirt and a light-colored straw hat. She waved at him, holding a hand-woven rattan basket with freshly picked fruits and vegetables.

Ah Nan anxiously jogged to Xiang Yi's side and stared at her. "My dear, did you get kidnapped to come here? Like in the novel where the overbearing CEO shuts you in and won't let you leave? You have to stay and be his pet canary…"

Xiang Yi didn't know whether to laugh or cry. "Don't worry, our country has reliable criminal law. This is the house my mother left me. No one is restricting my freedom."

Ah Nan breathed a sigh of relief, then curiously asked, "Why do you have so many vegetable plots? The soil texture here doesn't seem fit for farming."

He knew little of Xiang Yi's family background, but was aware that she came from wealth, so he wasn't that surprised.

"Oh, it used to be a golf course, but it was renovated."

Ah Nan: ???

He was in a daze. 'Are all rich people's lives this simple, down to earth, and unpretentious…'

"It's time to eat. There's some leftover rice from yesterday. How about egg fried rice?" Xiang Yi turned to ask.

Ah Nan: "Huh? Do you have a maid? I don't know how to cook…"

In his subconscious, he knew that Xiang Yi didn't know how to either.

"I do."

"…My dear, you're amazing! Truly amazing!" Ah Nan boasted without conscience. As a manager who prided himself in kissing a.s.s, it had become his professional accomplishment to applaud his own idols.

"Hey, my dear, you haven't shown your face in a long time. How about live-streaming your cooking process?"

So what if it was bound to be 'black stir-fry'*? Views were views.

Ah Nan comforted himself in an optimistic spirit. No matter how disgusting Xiang Yi's cooking was, he would brace himself for death and take a bite.

*Translator's Note: 'Black stir-fry' refers to a term from the Japanese manga 'Chuka Ichiban' and has become adapted into internet slang to describe foods from mysterious origins often bought at road stalls. It's also used to describe food produced by amateurs, or food that is unconventional and not accepted by general standards.

chapters.title: Chapter 11 - Stream 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 11 - Stream 2

…

Ah Nan posted a stream announcement on Xiang Yi's Weibo account. Once it was time, the fans flooded the channel in an instant.

In the past year, Xiang Yi had been a prime example of someone who couldn't do anything in the entertainment industry, but she was first place when it came to crying. When she acted, she'd count 1234, stare widely, and pout; when she sang, her voice would be out of tune. One song could anger a dozen sound editors.

'Vase fairy'* was the nickname she was gifted by the public.

But even so, Xiang Yi still had a group of diehard fans who liked her appearance.

—[Ah ah ah where is she where is she!]

—[Sissy Yi, I've missed you SO much! ]

—[Obediently squatting here waiting for my beautiful girl]

—[Ah Nan's floral shirt looks good today, please send a link chu chu chu]

"Today, our dear sweetheart will stream her cooking for everyone! Are you taken by surprise? Is this unexpected? I think everyone must feel the same way I do, anticipating what dishes our sweetheart will cook for us…"

Ah Nan greeted everyone. He often streamed alongside Xiang Yi, so her fans were very friendly toward him.

He turned to approach Xiang Yi, "Sweetie, say hi to everyone."

Xiang Yi naturally responded, "Good afternoon, have you all eaten? I'm going to make egg fried rice."

She saw a row of text flashing in the bottom left corner of the screen and curiously looked down to see what the comments were.

In the perspective of the fans—

There was a fair-skinned girl whose cheeks were a little rounder than they had been during her last appearance. Her skin was delicate and smooth with a cream-like texture, and her beauty was striking if one were to look closely!

For a while, the barrage of live comments** were all saying "Ahhhh I'm dead", "Sister's beautiful face has slayed me", and "I'm full on her beauty".

Xiang Yi looked at them for a while longer and realized that netizens were an interesting bunch no matter what planet she was on.

She stepped back a distance and smiled slightly. "Egg fried rice is easy to make. Aside from the necessary rice and eggs, you can also adjust the ingredients according to your own preference. Today, I've prepared green beans, carrots, mushrooms, shrimp, and ham."

She had already washed the ingredients, which were neatly placed inside an azure porcelain bowl that looked pleasing to the eye.

One live comment says: [Let me ask you meekly, is that porcelain bowl part of the celadon 'Mist Rain' series that was produced by Xizhou Porcelain?]

—[Lmao, do you know how much the 'Mist Rain' series cost? That is a goddamn collectible, who's going to use it as tableware?!]

Soon, these two comments got drowned in the comments…

Ah Nan was thinking to himself that perhaps his sweet dear had watched a mukbang stream… Her actions seemed quite professional…

He almost believed she could cook.

"Click—" Xiang Yi turned on the gas stove. Once the oil was hot, she sprinkled the chopped green onions in.

The peculiar fragrance of scallion oil rushed into his nose. He didn't know if it was because of the freshness of the ingredients, but Ah Nan felt that it smelled particularly good. It didn't contain the greasy smell of regular cooking oil at all.

Translator's Notes:

* A "vase" is a term often used to describe people who were young and attractive, usually women, but were dumb, talentless, and useless.

** Chinese Live comments are similar to Twitch chat or YouTube live chat, except the comments float across the video in real time while the user is streaming instead of in a sidebar.

chapters.title: Chapter 12 - Stream 3
chapters.body:
Chapter 12 - Stream 3

Next, she poured the rice, eggs, and other ingredients in. This was a homely dish, and it was relatively easy to make. Xiang Yi had been casual in her technique too, refraining from tossing the wok, and yet, it gave an inexplicable feeling of…

Hunger.

Nowadays, in Huaguo's advanced streaming industry, food-themed blogs and streams contained several top chefs and famous figures. The dishes they cooked up were high-end and exquisite. Their knife skills, heat control, seasoning and so on could make people send out 666* from start to finish.

But something always seemed missing.

Many netizens watching in front of their screens began to drool involuntarily.

—[F*ck, looking at this makes me so hungry]

—[Ahhhh it must taste so good! I love all the ingredients in it!]

—[QQ why does our girl look so pretty when she cooks!]

Ah Nan had been paying close attention to the comments and was still immersed in happiness until the leader of the anti-fans, Shan Shan, showed up late to the party.

—[It's just fried rice, what are you guys going on about?]

—[Your beauty filters are on level 10, aren't they? How can a kitchen be that clean in reality?]

—[This jumpy maggot is starting to pursue fame again! You 18th tier** actor, have some self-awareness, OK? Our Shi Yingdi isn't someone you can climb over.]

—[Let me tell everyone how to boycott this vase fairy: report all the products and brands she endorses. Don't ask why; anything endorsed by garbage is naturally garbage itself. Let her pay the breach of contract fee and lose all her money!]

Ah Nan's face was turning more and more sour.

He wasn't a capable agent who could obtain any top-tier resources he wanted, but he had carefully received and selected every endors.e.m.e.nt and commercial Xiang Yi had ever been a part of. The quality, reputation, and cost effectiveness of these brands were guaranteed.

Seeing his own idol being grilled like this, he almost had the urge to clutch the keyboard and scold them for three days and three nights.

When his anger had been ignited to a peak, a gentle voice came to him clearly like spring water from the mountains. "Wash your hands, it's time to eat."

She's done? Already?

Ah Nan paused for a moment and looked over.

The girl was serving rice with a natural wood ladle that made her slender fingers appear white as milk. The rice was soft and golden, with red shrimps, green beans and orange carrots peeking through… The bright and warm colors mixed with the fragrant rice was a dish that couldn't be more homely, yet, it was extremely impactful.

"Gulp…" Ah Nan swallowed.

"You eat first, I'm going to make some seaweed soup," Xiang Yi said, then she went back to work.

Ah Nan wanted to wait for her to eat too, but his stomach suddenly began to rumble nonstop. He reassured himself that it wasn't him being greedy, it was the rice seducing him!

He leaned the phone on a nearby shelf so it could capture both him and Xiang Yi.

Ah Nan was not mindful and began to eat inside the kitchen.

The moment the rice entered his mouth—

The netizens suddenly noticed that the screen… had frozen?

Heh? Did the internet freeze?

They tapped on the screen only to find that everything was normal.

For more than ten seconds, Ah Nan had remained still. When he snapped back to reality, his voice had become a cry: "F*CK! What kind of heavenly delicacy is this ahhh!"

Translator's Notes:

* 666 is synonymous with 'smooth' (Liu) in Chinese, so it's used as an abbreviation to compliment people on streams or games when they do something impressive

** Original text uses '18th tier' (in comparison to tier 1, tier 2 and tier 3 actors)

chapters.title: Chapter 13 - Stream 4
chapters.body:
Chapter 13 - Stream 4

Ah Nan never would have thought that such a simple bowl of egg fried rice could taste so good.

He had seen Xiang Yi's entire cooking process. She didn't add any seasonings such as MSG or chicken stock, yet the flavor was fresh beyond compare.

The rice was loose, soft, and quite chewy. He scooped a big spoonful into his mouth and tasted the layers of deliciousness from the richness of ingredients, filling him with happiness.

After Ah Nan's outburst, he no longer bothered to interact with the netizens. He buried his head in his food like a ruthless consumption machine.

He was eating with more relish than a mukbang host, and it was during mealtime, too. Several netizens couldn't help but open their food apps and search for restaurants with fried rice…

—[QQ I'm hungry from just watching ]

—[I miss my grandma's egg fried rice, she always puts in so much shrimp for me]

—[Heh, let's be honest. It's all a fake act for the camera, how good could fried rice taste?]

—[This manager is so fake, I hate sissy men the most. You're crying because it's so good? Do you need to be so extra? How gross!]

—[A certain vase fairy isn't popular enough and is not trying to be a gourmet food blogger? Ha! She doesn't even know how to toss a wok or flip a spoon. If her stream doesn't fail, I'll eat sh** on stream]

The eggdrop seaweed soup was done quickly, so Xiang Yi scooped a bowl for Ah Nan.

Ah Nan was embarrassed. This soup was meant to be served with the rice, but his rice bowl had bottomed out…

Xiang Yi did not usually eat much, but she had been purposefully eating more lately to gain back some weight. At 165 cm, the previous person inhabiting her body had managed to whittle her down to under 80 jin. Sure, she was beautiful on camera, but in reality, she looked deformed and malnourished. In addition, her body was thin and weak and would even tire out from tossing the wok.

She graciously gave Ah Nan a large portion of her rice, which made Ah Nan tear up. Full of prepubescent emotion, he said, "My dear, I'm going to be your manager for the rest of your life! I'll accompany you through the thorns, help you take over the mountain and seas, and climb with you to the top of the mountains!"

Xiang Yi: "…"'There was no need for that,' she thought. She just wanted to grow some crops and take naps.

At the same time…

Muyao TV Headquarters.

"The variety show "Heartbeat" had already been prepared by me, why should I find someone else to come? I'm not convinced!"

Li Jianyu was a director and screenwriter for the reality show department. He was very capable in his profession, and the shows he had previously worked on were highly rated and received. But with the passage of time, they were gradually replaced by other new shows, to the point where they have all been suspended by now.

"Heartbeat" was an idea that he finally came up with. It was based on the theme of love/lifestyle, where the male and female guests would live under the same roof and create sparks of love in their daily interactions.

But when he submitted the script, he had received a cold notice: The network was planning to hand his show to a Director Chen.

Li Jianyu fought with them for a long time, but the boss with the receding hairline in front of him continued to dodge the issue. With a stomach full of anger, he felt like he was punching a ball of cotton. He couldn't hold it anymore.

"Xiao Li, let me tell you about this show; it's the same no matter who films it. Besides, you have no connections or resources right now. I heard you even tried to invite that big vase, Xiang Yi. This kind of 18th tier entertainer can be found anywhere on the streets. You should collect yourself. One day, I can arrange for you to work for Director Chen as his assistant."

Trying to suppress him on one hand, while trying to show kindness on the other— he made it seem like there was a choice when he had already made the decision.

He was sure that Li Jianyu wouldn't leave Muyao TV.

However, he had forgotten that all humans had a bottom line.

"Bam!"

Under the horrified gaze of his boss, Li Jianyu handed in his resignation on the spot.

He left the TV station and took a deep breath. He then called the number of an old friend.

"Brother Shi, no, Mr. Shi, can you send urgent help in a pugilist* world?"

Translator's Note: * "Urgent need in the pugilist world" means there is an urgent need for help in the current social environment he is in.

chapters.title: Chapter 14 - Variety Show 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 14 - Variety Show 1

Ah Nan didn't think the live stream he had suggested would cause a splash on the well-known gossip forum, Melon.

[I want to know what is the skill level of the fried rice that female actress surnamed X made today]

The responses were colorful to say the least.

—[Her culinary skills are average, but watching her did make me hungry]

—[Surname X? Aren't you referring to that vase, Xiang Yi? What, did she throw a crying fit again?]

—[On a separate note, her face is really pretty. Even if she likes to cry, I still like her face]

—[Leeching fame from Shi Yingdi wasn't enough for her, she's even fishing for likes now in the comments. She must really love to promote things]

—[F***, why did I have itchy hands and search up a rebroadcast. I was on a diet and skipping dinner, but I just ordered fried rice for take out and happily ate it while watching the stream…]

At this time, Ah Nan was lying on a rocking chair, clutching a clear salad bowl. Inside were the frozen watermelon chunks Xiang Yi had scooped out. He didn't know what species of watermelon this was, but it not only tasted sweet, but it had very little seeds too. Ah Nan was too lazy to spit the seeds out anyway as he continued to stuff his mouth, unable to stop.

Next to him sat Xiang Yi, reading a book under a woolen blanket. Her delicate eyebrows were drooping, and the hair that she had dyed back to black at some point was tied up in a bun with several loose strands spilling out along her side burns. It looked more youthful and girly than the deliberate pigtails she used to wear.

Ah Nan's stomach was churning by the time he remembered why he came by today.

"Hehe, my dear, you've been resting for a week already. How about we perk up and work hard and take some jobs for a few days?"

In terms of ability, Ah Nan was definitely not the most outstanding manager. However, he had a patient temperament and was willing to coax people. Several young idols wanted him as their manager.

Xiang Yi flipped the pages of the book in her hands and softly said, "I've already prepared a lawyer and a breach of contract payment."

When her uncle heard that she wanted to leave the entertainment circle, he had quickly sent her the contact information of the Xiang Family's private lawyer.

The contract she had signed could be considered a one-sided contract. If she had a good lawyer, the liquidated damages wouldn't cost an absurd 100 million, and her own money would be enough to cover it.

However, her uncle had sent her some money, regardless. She approximated that he probably sent her all his private savings.

Ah Nan was stunned. "You…You really want to leave the industry? You almost cut ties with your family trying to get into the entertainment industry… Isn't becoming an idol your dream?"

Xiang Yi shook her head.

Perhaps it had been the dream of the one occupying her body, but to her, she had just basked in the attention and popularity received from being an entertainer but hadn't been diligent toward the actual conducts of the business. Otherwise, she wouldn't have made such a joke of herself and degenerated into a variety show personality.

As he spoke, Ah Nan's phone rang. After picking up and listening for a bit, he looked toward Xiang Yi. "It's Director Li. He says he wants to speak to you."

Ah Nan turned on the speaker and heard Director Li's voice, high on adrenaline.

"MISS XIANG YI, I WANT TO INVITE YOU TO PARTNER WITH SHI YINGDI AND ATTEND THE FILMING OF MY VARIETY SHOW!"

chapters.title: Chapter 15 - Variety Show 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 15 - Variety Show 2

Xiang Yi raised his eyebrows. "Shi Sui?"

"That's right, him!" Li Jianyu's voice was relaxed, as if a weight had been lifted from him. "Let me tell you the specifics. It's a similar style to the previous variety show, but this time it's more lifestyle oriented. The main content is that you and Shi Yingdi would live under the same room and plant some flowers and raise some fish."

"Every episode, we will fly in some invited guests to visit your house. The most important thing is that this variety show will be fully streamed live! This is a first for the industry!"

"Sounds pretty good, but isn't it a little plain in terms of format?" Xiang Yi voiced what was on her mind.

Li Jianyu began to chat with her enthusiastically.

On the other side, Ah Nan was dumbfounded.

Variety show? Shi Yingdi?

Did I eat too much and am hallucinating?

"…So in fact, the netizens are very tolerant of this subject matter. Some people like to watch drama ensue where people rip at each other's throats and pull at each other's hair, but others just like to watch a quiet lifestyle. Some people think they are two different groups of audiences, but I don't think so. In fact, I believe viewer groups often overlap." Li Jianyu continued to talk until a sudden 'hey' broke his thoughts. "I just sent the rebroadcast of your egg fried rice cooking stream to Mr. Shi… Heh no, he's Shi Yingdi now. He liked the post on your Weibo! I didn't know you two had such a good relationship. To be honest, he recommended you to me…"

Ah Nan: …!!

He liked her Weibo post? And recommended her for a reality show?!

He could already predict the chaotic bloodbath ensuing on Weibo right now.

He was a person who never attended TV shows. Plus, it was the streamed type, which meant it wouldn't receive that much attention.

Could it be that after being ruined, Shi Yingdi started to like Xiang Yi?

Actually, Xiang Yi was thinking—Shi Sui probably liked her cooking.

Xiang Yi, who had wanted to terminate her contract, suddenly felt that she could tough it out for another while.

She could take this chance to stuff her 'white moonlight' into a plump and round fatty.

"There aren't any issues on my end. Please communicate with my agent about specific collaboration guidelines," Xiang Yi politely responded.

"Okay!" Li Jianyu happily hung up the phone.

He had begged Shi Sui to help him introduce a celebrity, but he didn't think Shi Sui would suggest participating, and even agreeing to the live stream format.

There really was a silver lining to everything.

Refreshing the Weibo post of egg fried rice that Shi Sui had liked, he saw that the comments had exceeded 10,000. Li Jianyu exclaimed, "Mr. Shi is Mr. Shi, his popularity is even fiercer than the elites…"

On Weibo.

Even the nosy netizens were stunned, and Shi Sui's fans even more so.

—[His hand slipped, right…?]

—[Ahhh I don't believe it, I don't believe it, someone must have hacked his account!]

—[I'm crying, please wake up, you're Shi Yingdi! Why would you like a post from that 18th-tier female idol? Do you have a heart??]

Two days later, a variety show called "Two Under One Roof" announced their guestlist and caused an instant sensation.

chapters.title: Chapter 16 - Variety Show 3
chapters.body:
Chapter 16 - Variety Show 3

Two Under One Roof V: The nation's first lifestyle live-stream variety show, "Two Under One Roof", is scheduled for release on May 1. He is a powerful talent-based actor @ShiSuiV, and she is a new-generation singer full of youthful vitality @XiangYi. Return to your true aspirations and aim for beauty. This summer, be there or be square on @XingchenAPP!

After the official announcement was released, Shi Sui's studio was the first to forward it. They also added the text: "This is Shi Yingdi's first variety show. Shisui sisters, don't miss out~!"

Shisui* sisters was the nickname of Shi Sui's fans, taken from a homophony of his name.

Once his studio stamped the approval, the fans who had been bickering suddenly became overjoyed like children on New Year's Eve.

—[Ahhhhhhhhhhhh he's finally open for business!]

—[It's Shisui's first time filming a variety show! I'm going crazy, you can hear my goose cackle from five hundred meters away]

—[A live stream! It's going to be streamed! Does that mean I can see my Shi Yingdi 24 hours a day?! It's just an app right? I'll download it okay!! ]

The reaction of a passers-by:

—[Oh, I've heard of Shi Sui; he's the film king. Who is this Xiang Yi, though? Is there someone in the entertainment industry with this name?]

—[It must be hard to be a social media manager. In order to give this vase the title of a "New Generation Singer", he must have gone bald in the process]

—[A singer? This vase fairy has released music?!]

—[Haha yes, she has. Let me direct you to this crummy stream platform's ghost genre. I heard that she pissed off a dozen autotune editors recording that one song]

—[Anyone calling her a singer is sugarcoating it. She's just an 18th-tier variety show figure. She has no entertainment value at all and is awkward as hell. Plus, she's always crying, I'm so annoyed by her already. Every time she appears, I always put my video on 2X speed. Every time I see her, I feel physically unwell]

Suddenly, the popularity of "Two Under One Roof" began to rise before the show had even started. There were even several search entries about it.

#ShiSuiVarietyShow#

#ShiYingDiOpenForBusiness#

#WhatTheHellIsAVaseFairy#

At the Xiang family.

Xiang Yi received the WeChat message from Ah Nan telling her to repost the official announcement.

Without changing her expression, she took a sip of her medicine and opened the app.

She didn't use Weibo often and wasn't familiar with how to operate it. It took her awhile to figure it out.

[Xiang Yi V]: Be there or be square.

Several people were eyeing her activity. Seeing her post on Weibo, they immediately began to stir.

—[??? That's all??]

—[Does she have to be so cold, not even sending an emoji? Is trying to seem cool? ]

-—[Heh? She wants to 'be there or be square' with our gege? Are you worthy??]

—[Carrying my Shisui away from her. Our Shisui is only in a cooperative business relationship with her, don't cue him]

—[To some people, beware! There's a guideline for creating publicity stunts: if you want to leech our Ying Di's popularity, you can kneel and say goodbye now!]

—[After an in-depth analysis of the 'be there or be square' comment used by the vase fairy: 1. Declare sovereignty, as you bunch must be deathly jealous that I get to film with him; 2. Recalling on past events and reminding everyone of the scandal she had caused by entering Shi Sui's room; 3. Showing her love from a distance, pretending to be cold and indifferent to attract Shi Sui's attention! Bleh! I really think she's one of those really schemy and manipulative girls]

Xiang Yi read a few comments at random before nonchalantly tossing her phone aside.

She'd always been someone who didn't care about the opinions of others.

She wasn't going to take to heart any of the mockery and words that people had used on the person who had inhabited her body this past year.

Live your life for yourself, not for others to see.

Just when the netizens were scrutinizing Xiang Yi, the fans noticed Shi Sui's Following count had changed from 0 to 1.

Eh? Who was the first person that Shisui cutie followed?

Countless people clicked it open excitedly only to be blinded by the words "Xiang Yi"!

* Translator's Notes: This homophony of Shi Sui's name (Shisui) means 'ten years old', so they are actually called 'ten-year old sisters'. The direct translation didn't feel appropriate in context, so I've decided to maintain the original Shisui.

Shi Sui = Regular name

Shisui = fan name

chapters.title: Chapter 17 - Unfollow?
chapters.body:
Chapter 17 - Unfollow?

Huh?

Xiang Yi?

The Vase Fairy?

The fans who couldn't believe it closed the webpage and reopened it.

"…" God!

Shi Yingdi had really followed Xiang Yi!

After joining Weibo, Shi Sui rarely interacted with his fans. He barely even made any advertis.e.m.e.nts, except for promotions when his films were released. His Weibo was as barren as a desert.

For a man like this to choose an 18th-tier female idol like Xiang Yi as his first follow on Weibo…

—[Hello? Gege, did someone hack your account??]

—[I don't believe it. His hand probably slipped when he liked her post, so it must have slipped again this time!]

—[To be honest, Shisuisui isn't the type to pursue an idol's path, and he's not young anymore. His mom fans all hope for him to find a good family and settle, but at least it should be with someone who's on his level]

—[I'm crying from anger. Xiang Yi didn't even follow our Shi Yingdi back!]

—[Ahhh why is it her, why? Who is she to leave our Gege on read!]

The fans' response was intense, yet the marketing department was laughing behind the scenes.

They had been fretting over this month's KPI not being met when Shi Yingdi had sent himself onto their doorstep!

They really wanted to send him a banner for this month's most exemplary and helpful worker.

Xing Chen Entertainment.

"F*ck, why did you follow my little niece? All the netizens are out of their minds, thinking you like her." Xiang Feng's scathing voice rang throughout the office.

Shi Sui sat on the sofa, his black shirt rolled up twice at the sleeves, revealing forearms with smooth muscles, clear wrist bones, and slender fingers. His smoking posture was sluggish, showing a devastating mix of his unique yet charming temperament.

"My hand slipped." Shi Sui lazily responded. Throat full of smoke, he added, "Should I unfollow her then?"

Xiang Feng was worked up. "You better not! If you really unfollowed her, little Xiang Yi will be ripped apart by the netizens. Then again, didn't you want to plant flowers? Why does it feel like you're more like a carrot, planted in my office…"

Shi Sui had a generous degree of freedom in his contract with the company, including having his own studio. Simply put, he could act anytime he wanted in any film he wanted, and if he didn't want to, he could rest for half a year.

But to Xiang Feng, Shi Sui was still a model worker. He didn't care about status. As long as the script was good enough, he would take on TV shows as well. He also didn't care about the role, or who he would work with. He would even help the management company promote and look after newcomers as well. Xiang Feng felt truly blessed in his past life to have signed him.

Before, it was frequent enough that they saw each other once a month. But recently, he didn't know what had changed that they were meeting every day.

Shi Sui: "It's quiet here."

"That's true…" Xiang Feng was still suspicious when his phone vibrated. He looked at his screen, chuckling. "Hehe, little Xiang Yi is bringing me lunch! She said today's menu is spicy chicken, honey glazed chicken wings, and shrimp custard!"

Shi Sui steadily put out his cigarette.

He then heard Xiang Feng say candidly, "Okay then, I won't be seeing you off. You can go eat at the company cafeteria!"

Shi Sui: ???

chapters.title: Chapter 18 - Accounts Between Brothers Should Still Remain Clear
chapters.body:
Chapter 18 - Accounts Between Brothers Should Still Remain Clear

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows. "Did you say something? Say that again."

Xiang Feng was feeling bold and righteous. "Xiang Yi is my little niece, so her lunch delivery is obviously meant for me! Accounts should be settled clearly even between brothers—and that includes food. Don't even dream of taking a grain of rice from me!"

Before, in the Xiang family, he would always fight for little Xiang Yi's cooking with that group of guys with a sister complex. If his movement faltered slightly, he couldn't even lick the plate clean!

Now that he finally had the opportunity to eat alone… Xiang Feng wasn't stupid. Of course he would not share with Shi Sui.

Just as he was talking, the secretary knocked and entered, then placed an insulated bento on his desk. She respectfully said, "Mr. Xiang, this came from the Xiang family's driver."

Xiang Feng joyfully opened it. The bento consisted of three home cooked dishes, a portion of multi-grain purple rice, and a small pack of white and creamy pudding. Poking it with a spoon, the milky pudding bounced with elasticity.

I, Xiang Feng, am the happiest man on earth!

"Mr. Shi, this is for you."

Xiang Feng noticed just then that the secretary was carrying an insulated bento twice the size of his as she placed it in front of Shi Sui.

"Eh?" Did his little niece bring food for Shi Sui??

Shi Sui lazily thanked her. When the secretary was leaving, her ears were bright red.

…This man's every gesture was smooth* beyond belief.

After opening the bento, a smile formed on Shi Sui's face.

The handsome gentleman at this moment was like a child showing off his toy, slowly removing his lunch from the bento.

Aside from the spicy chicken, honey glazed wings, and shrimp custard that Xiang Feng had, there was also an additional sauerkraut fish and mushroom soup.

Even his portion was more than Xiang Feng's. There were a total of four puddings! Four!

Xiang Feng's heart at that moment shattered into a million pieces.

"Ahhh why! Why do you get more food than me…"

Xiang Feng continued to cry out from being wronged, while Shi Sui glanced over each of his dishes in turn.

Sour, sweet, spicy, and fresh delicacies were all available. Also attached to each dish were sticky notes, indicating the ingredients and seasoning used and also asking him to read carefully in case of allergies.

Her handwriting was clear, concise, and well contained, but it revealed an effortless sense of softness.

Shi Sui's thin lips formed an upward arc as he picked up the chopsticks for a taste.

At this moment, Xiang Feng came to witness how a certain famous actor, who usually had impeccable table manners, ended up reaching with his chopsticks faster and faster…

Although he wasn't to the point of wolfing down food, it was evident from his eating speed and demeanor that he was very satisfied.

Xiang Feng hurriedly finished his meal and tiptoed over, ready to steal a pudding…

"Whoosh!"

Shi Sui took away the small cat-shaped box containing the pudding with lightning speed.

Xiang Feng wailed. "You have four! Four! You can't finish it anyway, why can't you share one with me? Are we even bros?!"

Shi Sui's expression did not change. He retorted the words that Xiang Feng had said just now: "Accounts should be settled clearly, even between brothers."

Xiang Feng: "…"

"I'm going to put it in the fridge for next meal." Shi Sui paused for a moment and smiled. "After all, I have four puddings, and you only have one."

Xiang Feng: "… …"

'A thousand arrows pierced through his heart, as all his thoughts turned to dust.' That about sums it up.

* Translator's note: The Chinese term used here is "Su", which is an online term coined to describe men whose every action was smooth and beautiful, very charismatic, just like the main character in a Mary Sue novel.

chapters.title: Chapter 19 - Begging Is More Like It
chapters.body:
Chapter 19 - Begging Is More Like It

At Muyao TV, the head TV director's angry voice was coming from the conference room.

"What the hell are you guys doing? Why did a talented genius like Li Jianyu resign?! Why is there a new director on the variety show HE submitted?!"

The others looked at each other in dismay, clueless on what to say.

Everyone was clear on what had happened. It was nothing more than a faction dispute. Everyone else had picked sides, but only Li Jianyu refused to choose a side. Hence, he had been rectified and had his variety show given to Director Chen.

But who would have guessed that Li Jianyu would be so cunning that he could actually convince Shi Sui to participate in a variety show!

The head TV director had not bothered to acknowledge Li Jianyu before at all, but all of a sudden, he's now a 'talented genius' in his eyes.

"Ah, head director, this matter has already been resolved. Instead of being entangled in this, we should think about how to bring the spotlight back onto our new variety show." The bald guy from upper management who had forced Li Jianyu to leave said this with a smile.

The head director frowned. "Speak, what are you planning to do?"

"Li Jianyu made this "Two Under One Roof" variety show with Shi Sui and Xiang Yi being the only resident guests. Although Shi Sui is popular, this Xiang Yi is nothing but an eighteenth-tier idol. In addition, I've investigated and found that all the fly-in guests they have scheduled are all B-tier and C-tier artists as well as some washed out people from the industry…"

"Get to the point."

"Okay, okay." The man wiped the sweat from his forehead and began to speak in an accelerated tone. "Our show, "Heartbeat", is totally capable of targeting their new variety show. Isn't it just a livestream variety show? We can do it, too! And we can release before them as well!"

"Besides, our resources are far more abundant compared to them. We could invite some trending idols or artists with lots of discussion topics."

"This way, our "Heartbeat" will be impressive throughout, while there is nothing else to look forward to in "Two Under One Roof" except for Shi Sui. Over time, our viewers will go up while theirs decline; we'll fight fire with fire. In the end, the superior popularity and TV ratings will be ours!"

Director Chen echoed him, "Yes, yes; their small scale web variety show? How can it compare to our network's prowess in variety shows? We can adopt their mode of livestream, edit the material into a feature film in a later stage, and then play it on the weekend during prime time. We'll ride the trending wave of livestream variety shows, take advantage of its exposure, and reap benefits!"

The deputy head was a career-oriented woman, dressed in an exquisite functional suit. She frowned at this. "This is not quite appropriate. After all, the livestream variety show format was proposed by them first."

The bald man retorted. "So what? If they discovered food first, does that mean the rest of us can't ask to eat?"

The deputy head chuckled coldly. "Begging is more like it."

"Hey, that's going overboard, you're making a personal attack!"

Seeing the two parties erupt into a quarrel, the head director said in a deep steady voice. "That's enough. We'll do as you said. The network will give you the green light. You better get the variety show, "Heartbeat", running as soon as possible!"

The Muyao TV network was notoriously rich and powerful with incredible efficiency. In less than three days, the announcement was posted to Weibo.

[Heartbeat V]: The moment your heart beats, that smile is just for you. The new livestreamed romance variety show, "Heartbeat", will set sail on Muyao TV this April 30th! Welcome the all-around idol @JiangChen, shining lead singer @QinWanYan, emerging youth actor @FuJiaYan, and gymnast @YuMiaoMiao into our house full of sweetness! A pair of mystery guests will ascend every episode. Share this Weibo post to participate in a lottery for a chance to visit the full house in person!

chapters.title: Chapter 20 - Stream Ahead Of Schedule 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 20 - Stream Ahead Of Schedule 1

Muyao TV had a professional marketing department with rich experience in media operation. They had even launched an interactive lottery.

The four public figures that had been announced consisted of the most popular, desirable and trending idols, who were also subjects of the hottest gossip in the circle. Minutes after it was announced, the comment section had blown up.

—[Ahhhhhh I'm hoarse from screaming! Jiang Chen, Jiang Chen. Jiang Chen! Hubby hubby hubby!]

—[Beautiful goddess, sister Qin, everyone! Her featured work includes "Summer Stars" and "Heart". She is beautiful and sweet, do not miss out! ]

—[T________T Fu Jiayan! His Royal Highness, the Prince, is still on my mind. Didi must take care of himself on the variety show!]

—[QQQQQQ The star of the gymnast world, Yu Miaomiao, and national little sister Yu Miaomiao! Adorable lively girl Yu Miaomiao! Everyone please lock in on 4/30 for "Heartbeat"! ]

The fanbases of all four idols had been uniformly dispatched. They took over comment sections, forums, tags, reposting, and propagating, while Muyao TV fanned the flames. Soon, the search term was trending.

At the Xiang family.

"Phew…" Ah Nan wiped the sweat on his forehead and continued to clean the pigpen.

Ever since he tasted Xiang Yi's egg fried rice, Ah Nan had been frequently visiting the Xiang family. Every day, he would come for the purpose of discussing work; but in reality he was willing to do anything for a bite of food.

He had initially refused Xiang Yi's request for him to clean the pigpen, but she had told him that pork chops taste extra delicious when it was fresh…

"Hehehe…" Ah Nan sweetly grinned at the round and plump piglets in the pen.

After solving the hygiene issue of the piglets, Ah Nan returned to his phone and logged onto Weibo. Immediately, he was drowned in the overwhelming propaganda for "Heartbeat".

"F*ck… Why are they so shameless?"

Not far away, Xiang Yi was tending to a newly planted row of strawberry seedlings, with its lush green leaves and white spots poking out. She was focused on rearranging the leaves, as if she didn't have a care in the world. It seems like no matter what happened, she would still maintain her calm composure.

Hearing Ah Nan cursing, she looked up, puzzled. "What's wrong?"

Ah Nan described the operations of Muyao TV in a few words, his colorful hair sticking up on its ends from his anger. "Fine, if they want to do a livestream variety, go ahead. But they're even going to release it the day before ours! Are they deliberately trying to bring us down?!"

Moreover, the audience wouldn't think about it so much, but they will already have a preconceived impression of this variety format. When the time comes, they might even believe that "Two Under One Roof" was the one trying to start trouble.

Xiang Yi nodded, then asked, "Are you hungry? Want me to make you something?"

"I am a little hungry…" Ah Nan subconsciously blurted out. After he snapped back into reality, he began stomping his feet in urgency. "My dear, this is not the time, how can you still think about food!"

Xiang Yi had an innocent expression. "But mealtime has always been important." She smiled. "Do you want ribs? It'll taste delicious in soup."

Ah Nan swallowed and couldn't resist agreeing. His phone then began to vibrate. He looked down then began to shudder. "My dear, we're done for! We're really done for this time!"

On Weibo, some marketing account had broken the news that the film location for "Two Under One Roof" had been exposed in advance. A large number of Shi Sui fans had already gathered nearby, which has begun to affect regular filming.

In other words, the variety show wouldn't be able to proceed as planned.

With this, "Two Under One Roof" might not even be able to air before "Heartbeat" does—it might not be able to even air on time.

Just as the hair on Li Jianyu's head was anxiously getting sparse, Xiang Yi's manager Ah Nan called him on video.

He picked up.

—Immediately, the first sound that entered Li Jianyu's ears was a loud and clear sound of a slurp splash. and finally swallowing.

Then a hearty, satisfied burp.

Li Jianyu: "….IS IT HUMAN TO BE STREAMING A MUKBANG FOR A DIRECTOR WHO'S ABOUT TO GO BALD?!"

chapters.title: Chapter 21 - Stream Ahead Of Schedule 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 21 - Stream Ahead Of Schedule 2

"Director Li, Director Li!" Ah Nan's voice was gleeful. "Come drink some pork ribs… pork rib soup that doesn't have ribs! It's waiting for you!"

Li Jianyu was helpless. "I don't have time, Mr. Ah Nan. Please do not bother me."

'This feather duster has no sense of boundaries; they don't even have a venue for the variety show anymore, yet he still had the heart to eat at such an imminent moment.'

On the screen, half of a girl's delicate and fair face appeared as she spoke with a soft and calm tone. "Director Li, you don't look so good, have you eaten lunch?"

"…"'Both the artist and her manager only care about food?!'

However, he knew that the two had good intentions. He tiresomely rubbed his brows. "I'm just gonna buy some take out or instant noodles in a bit. I have to find a way to fix the venue and find a suitable location in the countryside…"

Xiang Yi: "'Two Under One Roof' is based on a lifestyle theme, right?"

"That's right." Li Jianyu didn't understand. "What's going on?"

Xiang Yi continued, "It needs enough land to grow flowers and vegetables, as well as space to raise fish and to cook, right?"

Li Jianyu: "That's right. Those kinds of rural plots are very popular right now. Young people in the rural areas might not even have farmed before, let alone young a.d.u.l.ts in the city. Anyway, are you asking about this?"

Xiang Yi: "Who says you have to go to the countryside to farm?"

"Huh?"

Xiang Yi pointed to the direction behind her house. In the softest voice, she managed the tone of a rich woman.

"My house has land, a pond, and a farm. Come film here."

Li Jianyu stared at the endless vegetable fields and shaded farmland. At this moment, he truly realized what it meant for life to turn around—at the brink of life and death, to come back against the wind!

In a few days, "Heartbeat" had become popular even before its broadcast, and the level of discussion regarding it had far exceeded that of "Two Under One Roof".

Muyao TV was overjoyed at the recent ups and downs. They were starting the broadcast tomorrow, but everyone seemed to have already locked in their quarterly bonus in advance.

Director Chen, who was in charge of filming, was flushed with success: everyday he walked into the headquarters as if he was walking on clouds.

"Morning, Director Chen."

"Good morning, Director Chen."

"Director Chen, you look very dashing today!"

As Director Chen enjoyed the compliments from the passers-by in the elevator, he couldn't help but feel smug and complacent.

Ding—

The elevator doors opened, and he headed into his office.

The compliments had disappeared and were instead replaced by strange looks.

He noticed something was off. Pausing, he turned to an employee near his office. "What happened?"

"D-Director Chen…"Two Under One Roof" sent out a Weibo announcement a few minutes ago saying they're going to go live at 9:30 a.m…."

"What? There's no way!"

"It should be true… When I saw the post, Shi Yingdi had already shared it."

Director Chen snatched the phone from his hands, the screen still paused on the Weibo post.

[Shi Sui V]: shared Weibo @[Two Under One Roof V]: "Two Under One Roof" will go live today at 9:30 a.m. for the first time! Don't miss it! Beep! Put on your seatbelts, we'll be taking off with @ShiSui Shi Yingdi!

Today was Saturday. As soon as the promotional account released the broadcast link, the viewer count had broken 10,000.

Director Chen's expression was sour. He looked at the time. It was April 29th today, 9:27 a.m.

No…

"Heartbeat" hasn't started streaming yet, so why is "Two Under One Roof" going live ahead of time?!

How dare they? How could they?!

chapters.title: Chapter 22 - Polish The Hearts Of Scoundrels
chapters.body:
Chapter 22 - Polish The Hearts Of Scoundrels

The office was so silent you could hear a pin drop.

Director Chen took a few deep breaths and steadied his emotions, pretending to be calm. "Since they started the stream, let's see what kind of tricks they can come up with."

Immediately, people got back to work. Using professional equipment, they projected the stream onto an LCD screen that occupied an entire wall.

Director Chen found a swivel chair to sit on, his expression heavy like a sinking ship.

'So what, isn't it just ahead of schedule? What are they going to compete with if they don't have a good venue and cast?'

This time, Muyao TV had put in their blood and tears. They managed to successfully attain a small mountain village south of the city, next to a bamboo forest. The scenery and privacy of the setting were first-class.

As for the lineup, Jiang Chen was the hot teen idol with first-rate traffic in the entertainment industry for the past two years. Qin Wanyan was the lead singer of the girl group 'SHINY'. Since the formation of the group, the member turnover rate has been skyhigh, making it a consistent hot topic of discussion.

As for the other pair, Fu Jiayan and Yu Miaomiao, both were highly gossiped individuals. A while back, the two were filmed by the paparazzi wearing matching watches. Now, the netizens were all anticipating for them to disclose their relationship on "Heartbeat".

These four couldn't compete with Shi Sui on their own, but now that it was four versus two, it was a different story.

Not only did Xiang Yi have negative reviews online, but she had also lost her character's reputation in real life. When she first debuted, her popularity was considerably above average. However, she would be late and throw her status around,her professional capability was worrying, and she didn't have the slightest clue on how to respect people.

To Director Chen, Xiang Yi was Shi Sui's ball and chain. With her personality, she could bring down the entire variety show single-handedly.

So… All he had to do was sit and wait for the clownfest to start.

Director Chen comforted himself.

The minute hand hit 9:30.

In the livestream, the screen turned from black to bright.

The first thing that caught everyone's eyes was the bright and airy living room.

With a cool color themed interior, a few ornamental decorations quickly highlighted the taste of the owner. Aside from this, there was no extra clutter, and it was exquisite like a showroom.

It was beautiful for sure, but it lacked a breath of life.

A light was on in the room, but it was dark nonetheless. Vaguely, conversations from the staff could be heard in the background. It was immediately followed by a deep magnetic voice that was clearly transmitted to everyone's ears through the radio equipment.

"Are we live?"

The staff hadn't turned off the live comments, and in the blink of an eye, the entire screen had been flooded with comments from netizens.

—[So smooth, so smooth! My god, my ears are pregnant ahhh! ]

—[Mr. Cameraman, show us his face right now! I'll buy you drumsticks for dinner!!]

—[Shi Sui! Sisters, it's Shi Sui! I'm screaming like a groundhog in spring!]

Director Chen felt his heart drop. He had underestimated Shi Sui's popularity.

The staff hurriedly tried to close the live comments, but Director Chen stopped them. "Leave them on. Let's see the authentic reactions of the netizens."

"Okay, okay."

The live comments were adjusted so that they would not interfere with the broadcast.

At the same time.

"Whoosh—" The curtains of the full-length window were pulled open. Light poured in, exposing the lens for a moment until it gradually and clearly focused on Shi Sui's hand.

The joints of his fingers became distinct, his hands glowing cool white under the sun, faintly revealing his pale blue blood vessels and the impeccable outline of his structure.

He turned around, wearing a simple white shirt buttoned to the top. A pair of gold-rimmed glasses was perched on the bridge of his nose, and his thin lips were raised toward the camera.

"Good morning."

With a mere smile, he could polish the hearts of scoundrels and invert the nature of all sentient beings.

chapters.title: Chapter 23 - Ambition
chapters.body:
Chapter 23 - Ambition

The netizens watching the stream were going crazy.

—[Sisters, I'm actually done!]

—[This man is so damned attractive!!!]

—[This is too immersive. I've already found a fertility clinic. Hubby, when are you going to marry me?]

At Muyao Headquarters.

Director Chen snorted. "That Li Jianyu is showing off again."

Nobody dared respond to him.

They were all colleagues, and they were familiar with how Li Jianyu worked. He excelled at shooting beautiful scenes and could make ordinary chores look like an idol drama. He had an artistic way of transitioning his shots, and they had all felt that he was the most suitable director to film "Heartbeat".

Too bad…

On the other side.

The Xiang family's living room.

The streaming schedule for this morning was to begin at Shi Sui's home, and then film the entire journey to the Xiang family. Then, they would display the Xiang family's manor and vegetable fields, leaving Xiang Yi to make the last appearance.

At this time, Ah Nan was happily watching the livestream with Xiang Yi.

"My goodness, no wonder he is called Shi Yingdi… That smile just now actually made my heart skip a beat. He's too good!" Ah Nan expressed. After waiting a few seconds and getting no response, he turned to look. Of course, Xiang Yi hadn't been watching at all but was slowly removing the cores of hawthorns with great focus.

Ah Nan's lips twitched. "My dear, can you have some professional ambition?"

Xiang Yi: "Huh? What do you think professional ambition looks like?"

"Like… like, dress up properly! Look at you, it's already past nine and you haven't done your hair and makeup yet. And your attire—do you plan to wear this on the stream? Go go go, I'll help you pick out a cute dress!"

"Let me finish up."

"…" Ah Nan was bewildered. Where did the beauty loving sweetie—who cared so much about her appearance that even her heels needed maintenance—go?

The stream continued.

Shi Sui's business vehicle was spacious, but it still felt crowded after being stuffed with film equipment and two cameramen.

The camera jutted out, almost hitting Shi Sui in the face. Regardless, he cooperated fully and chatted about his daily life for a bit before answering netizens questions.

"Do I have any intentions of doing new films? Not at the moment. I want to rest for a while."

"Why did I take this variety show? Hm. Because the concept of this show fits exactly with my plans."

"My regular routine…" Shi Sui raised his eyebrows. "Curious about my life, are we?"

The live comments filled with "I'm dead".

Shi Sui smiled. "This is my daily routine now."

Li Jianyu chimed in. "Our variety show doesn't have a script, ah! We just want to show you the realest of lifestyles, the most natural of days… Additionally, our show has a large number of vacancies for advertis.e.m.e.nt endors.e.m.e.nts, so we welcome any sponsorship daddies to join us! Come come come… Daddy Shi—eh, Shi Sui, come make a statement."

—[Whoa, this director is too cute]

—[Director Li is as comedic as always, I'm in love, in love!]

Shi Sui looked helpless, but he still gently compromised: "Two Under One Roof—three meals a day through four seasons is the lifestyle I've always thought about. Your sponsorship is my honor, so please feel free to contact the production crew, thank you."

Muyao Headquarters.

Director Chen asked, "Did you find it? What sponsorsh.i.p.s do they have?"

"One car brand, a wristwatch brand… Shi Yingdi is the spokesperson for both of these brands. Aside from these, the only other sponsorship is the Xingchen app that Director Li has collaborated on."

Director Chen smiled coldly. "Just as I thought."

These days, if there were no sponsors, there was no money. "Two Under One Roof" could only take the small expenditure route. He deduced that their shooting venue later was going to be shabby and rundown.

chapters.title: Chapter 24 - Heavenly Location
chapters.body:
Chapter 24 - Heavenly Location

Half an hour later.

The black van pulled up at the Xiang manor's entrance.

The staff members were all in position as they transferred the stream footage from that of the car door into the Xiang family gate.

The black wrought-iron gate that was covered in roses and vines slowly opened, urging the early summer breeze to brush the petals down. It was breathtakingly beautiful on camera.

As they headed forward, they entered a garden akin to Alice's Wonderland, full of lush greenery and flowers. The sound of a flowing fountain could be heard from afar as white pigeons flew by. With the villa as a backdrop, the scene formed a perfect composition.

The netizens were startled. [This… What idol drama was this scene from?]

Did the crew find a mansion to film at?

The audience was startled once again. They didn't care much though; even if they had never eaten pork, they had seen a pig run. Don't all standard male protagonists in dramas come with a mansion, a pool, and a fountain?

In the next instant—

The camera switched its focus toward an endless vegetable field.

—[Huh???]

—[I'm going blind? Are those vegetables??]

—[I think I see wheat and r.a.p.eseed??]

—[Is that a farm? There are cows and wild boar, too??]

—[There's a pond, too! And a greenhouse! And a glass observatory! Oh! My! God!]

All the netizens who'd thought the location was just a villa were beyond shocked!

Land, vegetables, fish, and poultry—this satisfied the pastoral and cottage core dreams of countless people!

A manor, a garden, and a fountain… This also satisfied the luxurious dreams of countless people!

Yet at this moment, both of these were magically combined into one!

The stream had only been live for half an hour, but everyone was already looking forward to the content that would follow.

Isn't it amazing to pick some fruits from the fields?

Even if they did nothing and just lied on the floor, it would feel amazing!

—[Thank you, production crew, for letting me experience the lifestyle of the rich]

—[Does this count as me living in a luxurious mansion even if it's online? I can only say one thing…"Two Under One Roof" has my respect; Director Li has my respect!]

—[I'm on my knees omg, how did the production crew find such a heavenly film location?! How will the other variety shows compete 2333*]

At the Muyao Headquarters.

Director Chen's expression could no longer be described by the word 'ugly'.

His pupils were dilated as he begrudgingly looked at the screen.

How could it be…

A place like this existed south of the city? How has he never heard of it? And why did Li Jianyu find it and not him?!

He suddenly realized that with "Two Under One Roof" as a standard, the supposed 'bamboo sea' on tomorrow's live broadcast for "Heartbeat" would seem like a joke!

Li Jianyu understood the netizen's psyche very well, so he allowed Shi Sui to walk around the manor under the guise of 'getting to know the environment'. Everyone in the comments was hooked.

"It's almost time to go back." Shi Sui slightly nudged his gold-rimmed glasses, speaking in a s.e.xy, gentle voice. "Miss Xiang Yi is still waiting for us."

The comment section immediately became visibly hostile to the n.a.k.e.d eye.

—[So annoying, nobody wants to see her, okay?]

—[What is there to see but a vase fairy? I'd rather look at the garden. Please, I am begging on my knees for Shi Yingdi to make another trip around the garden!]

—[Gege, this woman is not worthy to be filming a show with you, please wake up!]

—[The female with the surname X is really badass, who knows how much money she had paid to be on this show with Shi Sui]

—[Bleh, there's no way it's her own money anyway. She probably slept with some rich daddies and got everything she needed]

—[Director-san, if you dare to turn the lens on Xiang Yi for one second, I will leave the stream and never watch your show again!!]

Translator's Note:

* 2333 is the emoji number from a Chinese stream platform, usually to mean the English equivalent of (233) lol, or in this case (2333) looooooool

chapters.title: Chapter 25 - Wash Your Hands, Lunchapter Is Ready
chapters.body:
Chapter 25 - Wash Your Hands, Lunchapter Is Ready

Shi Sui couldn't see the comments as they were recording, but Li Jianyu did. He gestured toward Shi Sui, expressing his concern.

Shi Sui slightly moved his jaw to indicate he knew.

Li Jianyu had thought about adjusting the broadcast schedule and waiting until the guests arrived in the afternoon before letting Xiang Yi appear on screen.

It wasn't that he didn't want to give Xiang Yi screentime, but he was just worried that Xiang Yi would break down from the negative comments on the first day…

How would they proceed with filming then?

Unexpectedly, Shi Sui calmly approached the villa with his long strides.

Li Jianyu: …!!

'Daddy Shi! You can't walk this fast just because your legs are long!'

The comment section became more and more unsightly, so much that the administrators of the Xingchen app had to start banning accounts. They didn't think the netizens would be so resistant.

—[The marketing department has left, she really is the vase fairy]

—[I don't want to look at her for one second, she's probably going to cry in a bit, as if it was her own mother's funeral]

—[I don't understand. How can someone who can't act, can't sing, and has no entertainment value make so much money in the entertainment industry? As a STEM major, it really hurts to see]

Shi Sui being popular was within his speculations.

The incredible location, however, was not. But it was within reason; Shi Sui probably had connections.

But if these were all positive factors, then the biggest negative influence was about to come!

She would take at least half the credit in destroying this variety show!

Director Chen had high hopes for Xiang Yi. He almost wanted to turn into a cameraman himself and shove a camera in Xiang Yi's face to use the whimsical woman to convince the audience!

Shi Sui's legs were long and his strides were wide. Soon, he had entered the mansion.

The decor contrasted with the cool interior of Shi Sui's house. Inside the mansion, the colors were warm and inviting, all the furniture made from reworked wood. It was exquisite, yet not luxurious. It was designed in good taste but didn't go overboard.

Everywhere you looked there were signs of life. For example, the crooked moon-shaped pillows on the couch, or the chubby succulents on the windowsill, and the string of cartoon-themed windchimes hanging above them.

It was a warm, lively, yet soft place that could truly be called home.

It's just that Xiang Yi was missing from the scene.

Shi Sui looked toward Ah Nan under the staircase.

The camera also turned toward him.

Ah Nan tugged at his rainbow-colored hair, looking disheartened. "Wait a moment, she'll be here soon!"

The comments continued to spiral downwards.

—[The vase fairy knows she can only live off her face, so she's probably crazily doing her makeup and hair right now]

—[Is she joking? Shi Yingdi is her senior, how could she make her senior and the other staff wait on her? This wins the most confusing behavior of the year]

—[ She doesn't lead a princess's life, yet she has a princess syndrome? I want to ask this vase fairy, do you think you're worthy of acting like a big shot? Who do you think you are?]

Amid the scathing comments, a clear and warm female voice resounded faintly from the direction of the kitchen, like water from a mountain spring.

"You're here? Wash your hands, lunch is ready."

chapters.title: Chapter 26 - Claypot Seafood Congee
chapters.body:
Chapter 26 - Claypot Seafood Congee

It was not only the netizens who felt dumbfounded but all of the staff members as well.

Li Jianyu was the first to react, gesturing to the cameramen to face the lens toward Xiang Yi.

Inside the kitchen, a slender and delicate girl had a bowl in one arm and a wooden spoon in the other, wearing a simple white T-shirt and wide-legged jeans. The top was cropped, revealing milky white skin underneath.

Her hair was in a messy bun and had two daisy shaped barrettes in it, seeming playful and cute.

However, her demeanor was calm and steady, radiating an aura of comfort and gentleness.

The live comments immediately changed:

—[Ahhh! Pretty lady, oh yes!!]

—[Those hair clips are adorable, and her outfit is so pretty, please post links!]

—[F*ck, I can't roast her, how could you not forgive such a pretty face!!]

After sneaking a glimpse at the live comments, Li Jianyu breathed a sigh of relief.

He couldn't help but admit that Xiang Yi's appearance was admirable. And everyone who had seen her good looks all felt obliged to be more accepting of her.

Xiang Yi noticed that nobody had moved, then, feeling puzzled, she asked "No one's eating? My food should taste okay."

It was not until after everyone had calmed down did they begin to notice the fragrant aroma coming from the kitchen.

"Gulp."

People began to swallow down their saliva.

In preparation for the livestream, most of the staff had casually grabbed a few bites of breakfast. They didn't notice their hunger amid the tight work schedule, but now, the fragrance had induced their hunger all at once.

"What did you make that smells so good?" Shi Sui asked. He had a strong aura and it instantly brought the show's rhythm back on track.

As if they'd awakened from a dream, the group swarmed the kitchen.

The kitchen appliances were exquisitely organized, completely subverting everyone's impression of a traditional Chinese kitchen.

Occupying all three stoves in the kitchen were clay pots on low heat, releasing dense steam.

"Claypot seafood congee. Want some?" Xiang Yi opened the lid and the aroma dominated everyone's senses, several times more powerful than before.

Once the steam dissipated, the cameramen stepped forward with their HD lens and broadcasted the scene in front of them to the netizens in real time.

The rice had been boiled to a soft and sticky state, the whites of the grains crystal clear. The substance was decorated with shiitake mushrooms, scallops, crab meat, shrimp, peas, and corn kernels. The fire was still blazing as the porridge gurgled with small bubbles. The fragrant aroma of rice could almost be smelled through the screen.

—[She's back she's back, she's back again to hype up her 'foodie' persona]

—[Obviously, a chef had prepped it and she's just posing, how could an idol know how to cook]

—[Let's look at the facts, I'm really hungry… This congee looks too appetizing!]

Xiang Yi filled up a bowl and naturally handed it in a particular direction—

The live comments became livid with hate once again.

—[Trying to make gossip with Shi Yingdi again? At least check your status before you even try!]

The next second…

The camera zoomed out to capture the whole scene.

Xiang Yi handed the porridge toward… her own manager.

The netizens: What's going on? Shouldn't the first bowl of congee go to my Shi Sui-gege?!

The next, next second…

Xiang Yi filled up a second and a third bowl and handed them over to Li Jianyu behind the camera and the cameraman.

The netizens: What the hell? She won't even give the second or third bowl to our Shi Sui-gege?!

This woman, you have successfully piqued our interest!!!

The next, next, next second.

A young, renowned gentleman of an actor in a white shirt acted on his own accord and filled a bowl of congee for himself. Without changing his expression, he said to the camera:

"It smells great. You guys can't taste it, so I'll try it for you."

Netizens: ???????

chapters.title: Chapter 27 - Welcome, Senior Shi
chapters.body:
Chapter 27 - Welcome, Senior Shi

For the longest time, Shi Sui had always given the impression of a low-key and restrained figure, consistent with the conditionings of a god-tier actor.

Aside from appearing at movie premieres, he was in a state of seclusion for the majority of his life. Even the most powerful paparazzi couldn't find any dirt on him.

But at this moment, the man standing in front of the camera was slowly sipping at his congee. The cyan porcelain bowl in his hand outlined his knuckle joints like jade bamboo, showing his natural and elegant gestures.

His pale lips slightly opened as he tasted the porridge. His eyebrows stretched, thin lips slightly raised. "Not bad."

—[Ahhh he's so handsome, so handsome!]

—[He makes a bowl of seafood congee seem like it's Michelin-restaurant quality…]

—[Yes yes yes, Shi Yingdi is one of those people who can make his surroundings seem lavish wherever he goes!]

—[Seeing Shi Sui eat makes me so hungry too. QQ I can't take it, I'm going to call some take out before lunch!]

Unlike the elegance of Shi Sui's light and breezy manners, Li Jianyu and the cameraman, Lao Zhang, had a taste and their eyes widened like copper bells.

'This is congee?'

'Is this really congee?!'

'How could such delicious congee exist on this planet!'

The congee that had just left the pot was still piping hot. The two of them were gasping from the heat, yet they could not stop themselves from taking one more spoonful after another.

Li Jianyu even ended up ditching his spoon, clutching the bowl as he inhaled the porridge with a 'glug glug glug'.

And yet, they heard the girl say: "All three pots contain seafood congee. I've counted, and it should be enough. The tableware is over there, I'll have to trouble you guys to divide it among yourselves. Thank you, and sorry for the inconvenience. "

The staff: …!!!

There was actually food for them?!

The unexpected ecstasy stunned everyone, then they quickly sent out a few representatives to bring the pot aside for sharing.

At this moment, the netizens in the live comment section were confused.

—[Huh? What f*ckery is this?? The Vase Fairy knows how to say thank you?]

—[Do you guys remember when she hired five assistants to take care of her? …She even needed someone to wipe her nose for her…]

—[My god, it's like the Vase Fairy is a completely different person, do you think she's faking it? Purposefully trying to be gentle in front of Shi Sui?]

However, the netizens would have never guessed that despite it being the same body, the soul inside had changed.

Li Jianyu gestured for Shi Sui and Xiang Yi to enter the living room.

The two sat down on the couch.

Shi Sui sat upright in his seat. As an actor, his posture and mannerisms have always been impeccable.

Meanwhile, Xiang Yi leaned on the sofa, putting a pillow over her waist and politely said, "Senior Shi, welcome."

Shi Sui nodded and responded in a gentle manner. "No need to be so formal, Shi Sui is fine."

Xiang Yi, who had suddenly become aware of the cameras, cleared her throat. "You* are my senior, and I am your junior, so it's appropriate to call you senior."

To be honest, she had wanted to call him baby Sui just like his aunty fans, but Ah Nan had stated it was more appropriate to address him as a senior.

As everyone thought, Ah Nan, fearing that she would call out "hubby" or "my dear" or something else, felt relieved as he watched from the sidelines.

Their conversation was casual and warm, yet the netizens in the live comment section exploded.

—[She's way too relaxed, isn't she? Does she really think this is her house?]

—[My god, she is so uncultured. Is this how you use the term welcome? Please, it's only welcome if they visit YOUR house, okay!]

—[My god, the idol with surname X is really ambitious and has skin thicker than an elephant!]

Translator's Note:

* Xiang Yi uses the formal 'you' here that is usually used for people of older age, professional seniority, or of a higher status.
