chapters.title: Chapter 28 - She Rejected Shi Yingdi
chapters.body:
Chapter 28 - She Rejected Shi Yingdi

—[I used to think she was lacking a brain, but now I'm thinking she's lacking multiple organs…]

—[If it weren't for Shi Sui or Director Li could she even come on this show? And live in such a nice house? Please turn off her mic. As a vase, her face is not bad, but once she speaks the feeling disappears~]

Ah Nan, who had made a brief appearance in the beginning, was now consciously avoiding the camera, brushing through the comments in a corner.

He had been madly posting a dozen or so long sentences of ass-kissing comments at first before he realized how many people were flaming Xiang Yi online. He was so furious he began to report them.

Angrily, he roared on the live comments: [THIS IS XIANG YI'S HOME TO BEGIN WITH!!!]

However, among tens and thousands of comments, his sentence was drowned out like a drop of water in the tide, submerged in the blink of an eye.

After exchanging a few more greetings, Xiang Yi asked, "Senior, do you drink tea?"

"Mhmm."

The girl took out a tea set and began to decoct the water, wash the wares, and brew the tea… The spring tea looked extra refined in the transparent glass cups with floral decor like jade dew. Her soft and pale fingertips moved skillfully yet elegantly. Just her gestures alone were immensely pleasing to the eye.

At this moment, the live comments, which had showed no sign of defending Xiang Yi a moment ago, suddenly burst with: [So what if I was wrong? Of course I choose to forgive her!]

Ah Nan: ???

'Sure enough, I am not the only shallow person on this planet.'

Xiang Yi finished brewing the tea, but before Shi Sui could take a sip, they heard Li Jianyu announce, "Uhm… The guests have arrived early. Would the two of you like to greet them?"

Guests?

Xiang Yi remembered Ah Nan mentioning it. The first fly-in guests, or artists and entertainers who would only be on one episode of the show, was going to be a father-and-son duo: the famous director, Yan Zhenhua, and his son, Yan Nai.

Shi Sui stood up. "I'll go."

Xiang Yi remembered the information she'd looked up yesterday and picked up a small basket. "I heard the director likes cherries, I'll go pick some."

Truthfully, the only person who wanted Xiang Yi to leave the lens far more than the netizens did was Xiang Yi herself.

She had traveled through countless universes, had even reached the brightest pinnacle at the stars, and had also fallen in the dirtiest mud. She had long gotten over people's love and distaste for her.

At the end of the mission, she could have selected to go toward a higher route, or remain in any world that she had traveled through.

Xiang Yi, however, had chosen to return. To her, the most important thing was her family.

She was just about to leave, but she was stopped by Shi Sui.

"Miss Xiang Yi, this manor is so large; for convenience of communication, can I add you on WeChat?" Shi Sui had a pair of peachy eyes. When he smiled toward someone, there was always an illusion that he was being affectionate.

The netizens on stream: !!!

—[Ahhh no way no way! I won't allow it!! Gege, you can't add her!!!]

Then they heard Xiang Yi's indifferent response. "I don't use my phone much. If you need me, just shout."

The netizens: ???

—[What… What the f*ck?!]

—[I just sat up from my bed! Is the Vase Fairy crazy?!]

—[I don't know if she's crazy or not, but Shi Sui's fans are about to go crazy! She dared to reject Shi Yingdi???]

Translator's Note:

* "It is always said that swift horses are common, but there are not enough 'Pak Lok' in the world" – The person who has good judgment to spot 'Long Distance Running Horse'. It could also mean that "talents are everywhere, but seldom are they recognized."

chapters.title: Chapter 29 - Gege, Not Uncle
chapters.body:
Chapter 29 - Gege, Not Uncle

In the stream, question marks from the netizens followed one after another.

The fans, in particular, had realized that while they didn't want to see Xiang Yi trying to cling to Shi Sui, they were more reluctant for her to ignore Shi Sui!

This was a huge slap in the face to Shi Yingdi and, by proxy, their faces as well!

Li Jianyu didn't know whether to smile or laugh as he tried to redirect. "Uhm… Xiang Yi, the manor is so huge, you might not hear him if he shouts for you."

"I have this." Xiang Yi rummaged through the rattan basket near the door.

The on-site staff and the audience in the broadcast watched as she took out a…

Loudspeaker 🙂

It was one of those loudspeakers used by roadside stalls, the one used to broadcast "The Jiang Nan tannery has shut down"…That kind of speaker.

The staff: ???

The netizens: ???

Silence. A strange silence.

The audience couldn't picture the elegant and gentle Shi Yingdi using this thing.

Against everyone's expectations, Shi Sui actually showed interest in the large object and even consulted Xiang Yi on how to use it.

Li Jianyu looked at this harmonious 'teaching' scene with a trace of trance in his expression. He already had a hunch that the users in the psychological category on the stream site will cut out scenes of Shi Sui holding the loudspeaker and edit it with soundtracks like "wallets that were originally $100, $200, or $300 are now all $20"* and turn it into memes…

Xiang Yi only had to go over it once for Shi Sui to understand.

Feeling very satisfied with baby Sui's learning ability, Xiang Yi cut off a daisy from nearby and handed it to him. "Excellent."

Shi Sui pinched the stem and slightly curved his peach blossom eyes. "Does this count as… a little red flower**?"

Xiang Yi c.o.c.ked her head and thought that her white moonlight needed some pampering. Hence, she promised him: "If you collect five, you can place an order."

Shi Sui's eyes lit up.

This scene had been shot by Li Jianyu himself. The lighting engineer had softened the light, turning the scene warm and beautiful. Through their own drama filter, the spectators in the broadcast room were satisfied, but the fans had gone crazy.

—[I told you this woman is a scheming b*tch! Her trap is too deep!]

—[QQ our Shisui is too pure, don't be fooled by that evil lady's little flowers!]

—[This vase is too good at acting! First, she plays the f*cking gentle personal chef, then rejects his WeChat add, then comes to exchange flowers for dishes. Who can stand this!!]

At Muyao network.

Director Chen's expression was dark and gloomy as he lowered his head, hurriedly recording something.

Shi Sui approached the main entrance just in time to greet the car carrying the two guests.

Yan Zhenhua had a square face and looked very serious and fierce when he wasn't smiling. But when he did, his appearance had the innocent naivety of a child. He was middle-aged and inevitably a bit out of shape, with flabby arms and a beer belly.

Yan Nai, standing next to him, had attractive facial features but still had some baby fat around his cheeks. He was dressed in a sporty and casual attire, radiating youthful energy.

"Long time no see, Director Yan." Shi Sui took the initiative and greeted him.

Yan Zhenhua smiled heartily and patted him on the shoulder. They exchanged a few greetings before he asked Yan Nai to say hello.

Yan Nai hadn't officially debuted yet and seemed particularly shy in front of the camera. "Hello, Uncle Shi."

"Doesn't that make you sound old? Maybe just call him big brother." Yan Zhenhua teased.

Shi Sui gently responded, "It's up to him. Children are straightforward like that, and I've already reached an uncle's age anyway."

The live comments:

—[Didi*** is too cute! Debut right now!!]

—[I want to be called a child by Shi Yingdi as well ahhhh!!!!! ]

—[You're only 27! Not old at all. You're a gege, not an uncle!!]

Translator's Notes:

* This is a continuous joke from the "Jiang Nan Tannery factory has shut down". It was originally a loudspeaker broadcast for a roadside store closing down that began trending on the internet due to the staff's intolerance of the owner, and later turned into several remixes. If interested, I believe the original clip is still on YouTube.

** 'Little red flower' is an award usually given to elementary/kindergarten students for performing/completing a task well

*** Didi means little brother, but it was used in an endearing way in this case; usually used by older fans of younger idols

chapters.title: Chapter 30 - End Of Test Stream
chapters.body:
Chapter 30 - End Of Test Stream

Since they knew each other from before, and they were friends as well, the atmosphere of their meeting was very harmonious.

Upon entering the manor, the Yan father and son couldn't help but feel surprised despite having experienced the best of the best.

"This place is wonderful… Aiyoo, Ah Nai, our backyard is too small. Otherwise, I would have had a veggie garden too." Yan Zhenhua exclaimed.

Yan Nai nodded, a hint of jealousy in his eyes.

He wasn't interested in vegetables, but he did want to plant some flowers.

…This agricultural gene was probably common in most Chinese people.

The father and son voiced the thoughts of the netizens. After all, their lives were so fast-paced, who wouldn't thirst for such a wonderful cottage lifestyle?

When the three entered the room, Xiang Yi had returned with the cherries.

The girl took off her straw hat and politely greeted Yan Zhenhua. "Hello Director Yan, you must be tired from traveling so far."

Director Yan didn't browse the internet much and didn't understand much of Xiang Yi's "dark history". He only felt that the girl was quite pretty and very polite, overall leaving a good impression.

"Yan Nai's eyebrows look like yours, and he looks much more handsome in real life." Xiang Yi's courteous remark complimented both the father and son.

Shi Sui, who was standing to the side, couldn't help but raise his eyebrows.

'He's but a child, how can you distinguish if he's handsome or not…'

Most parents were fond of having others praise their children so long as it wasn't exaggerated or vulgar. The corners of Director Yan's eyes wrinkled as he smiled. "Ah Nai, say hello to big sister."

Yan Nai stared at Xiang Yi for a few seconds. The young man didn't know how to conceal his emotions and somewhat reluctantly said, "Hello, big sister."

Xiang Yi could tell he was a bit reluctant, but she was too lazy to investigate further. She had always been more patient toward girls and toddlers rather than boys.

"I just picked some cherries from my home garden, I'll rinse it with salt water."

As she spoke, everyone's eyes fell on the small basket she was holding.

The wicker basket was delicate and small, and it was packed full of cherries.

This time of year was peak season for harvesting cherries, and Xiang Yi had selected the ripest ones. Each fruit was plump and round, such a dark shade of red it was almost purple; it could easily make people drool.

Xiang Yi's movements were crisp as she quickly washed them and brought the plate over.

Director Yan loved cherries and immediately began to stuff his mouth. They tasted juicy and fleshy, with an impeccable sweetness. He exclaimed, "The cherries grown in the homeland are the sweetest!"

Yan Nan was vacillating and recalled the messages he saw on WeChat. He was conflicted whether he should eat this woman's cherries or not…

The live comments continued in their lively manner.

—[This cherry lover is so envious, we don't produce cherries in my town and have to buy them from outside provinces every time. When can I experience this kind of fresh picked life!]

—[??? My home garden?? I want to ask, is it really not required for idols to have brains? Your home? You get to live there??]

—[Aiyah, it's just a variety show, don't be so picky. During filming, this technically is her home]

—[Get out of here, you shallow dog, do you have manners? Can she do whatever she likes just because she's pretty?]

Just as they were arguing, Li Jianyu's voice sounded from the stream. "OK, the trial stream for this morning concludes here. We're going to adjust the equipment and continue in the afternoon."

Netizens: ???

The screen went black. Countless people still had unfinished thoughts as they flocked to the promotional account for "Two Under One Roof" to set reminders.

Muyao Network.

The staff sat in distress as they watched the live broadcast go on for more than an hour. Their necks were a little sore as they looked toward Director Chen.

Director Chen's eyes were shady. "Spread the word, meeting now. Tell the person in charge of the PR department to come see me."

So what if there was no dirt on Shi Sui.

No problem, that dumb*ss Xiang Yi was a ready-made living target!

chapters.title: Chapter 31 - Yan Nai
chapters.body:
Chapter 31 - Yan Nai

Once the stream was paused, Li Jianyu gave a basic summary and announced the numbers from the morning.

"Our highest viewer count reached six million or so and had been the number one streamed show during its time. Everyone, thank you for your hard work!"

The staff on-site enthusiastically clapped.

"But…" Li Jianyu's tone changed. "Today is Saturday after all, and daddy Shi—uh, Mr. Shi brings about his own traffic. If we want to rely on our content to bring in viewers, it might be difficult to maintain the quality while sporting the gimmicky title of a 'variety show'."

Although Yan Zhenhua was only a fly-in guest, he still provided suggestions nonetheless. "The location you've selected is very good. I think the production team can distribute some tasks so guests can attain rewards while completing certain tasks. For example, picking a basket of cherries could net them their choice of one dish for lunch."

"Thank you, Director Yan, we will consider your suggestion."

Then Li Jianyu went off to discuss with the producers and planners.

Xiang Yi suddenly wondered out loud, "Senior Shi, Director Yan, what would you guys like for lunch?"

Yan Zhenhua had expected the crew to order takeout and blurted out, "I hear the crawfish south of the city is famous, how about we have crawfish?"

Xiang Yi looked toward Shi Sui. The young actor's jaw parted slightly, then said gently, "I'm good with anything."

'What an easy child to feed.'

As for Yan Nai, Xiang Yi straight up ignored him.

Toward people who disliked her, Xiang Yi didn't waste her time and effort.

Yan Nai, who had just wanted to express his opinion: "…"

He felt like he was being targeted.

The phone in his sweatpants began to vibrate. Yan Nai hesitated for a moment, then found an empty corner before taking out his phone. The messages were all from one person.

[Sister Wanyan]: Ah Nai did you guys arrive yet

[Sister Wanyan]: Wow I'm watching your stream, you look dashing today!

[Sister Wanyan]: Actually I'm not here to talk to you about this, but that Xiang Yi is so… mmm I'm not trying to instigate conflict since we used to be like sisters before, but just because I advised her to not seduce Shi Yingdi and go on a crooked path, she…

A few screenshots followed.

It showed that Qin Wanyan had used WeChat, SMS, and other methods to reach Xiang Yi, but Xiang Yi didn't respond.

Yan Nai pursed his lips. Since childhood, his father had always been busy and his mother strict. Qin Wanyan had appeared in his life like a gentle and considerate big sister. He was very dependent on Qin Wanyan and almost thought of her as his own sister.

In the past year, Qin Wanyan and Xiang Yi had become like sisters and the bestest of friends. He had met Xiang Yi a couple times before, but he had no good impression of her.

She was vain, ostentatious, loved to dress up, and had a bad attitude toward the service staff. More importantly, she had once treated him…

Thinking back, Yan Nai's face turned pale as a feeling of nausea swelled in his stomach.

But with his s.e.n.s.i.t.i.v.e nature and inferiority complex, he dared not say anything cruel to Xiang Yi. After thinking about it, Yan Nai responded with the most cruel sentence he could think of—

[WukeNAIhe]: Sis, don't worry. I won't eat anything she touches!

chapters.title: Chapter 32 - Spicy Crayfish 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 32 - Spicy Crayfish 1

From the other end of the conversation, Qin Wanyan: "…"

The corners of her mouth twitched on her delicately made up face.

Was this Yan Nai an idiot? She had said so much, hinting for him to deal with Xiang Yi, or maybe at least even start a conflict with her. That way, the netizens would scold her to death.

But all he could muster was to not eat anything she touched. What kind of threat was this?!

At the Xiang family.

Seeing Xiang Yi begin to process the crayfish, Yan Zhenhua was taken aback. "Little girl, you know how to cook, too?"

"Just a bit." Xiang Yi casually responded.

She had prepared the crayfish for Xiang Feng anyway. She had soaked them in clear water in advance with salt and white vinegar.

Xiang Yi had scrubbed out most of the dirt and sand by now, using a special brush to scrub the shell and claws one by one. She then cut off the gills and heads and then removed the thread. Each crayfish had been cleanly processed with no room for error.

Looking at her skillful movements, Yan Zhenhua knew that her cooking was not going to be unpleasant and praised her, "Not bad, little girl; there are too many young kids nowadays who don't know how to cook."

Yan Nai clenched his fist in secret. Although he loved to eat crayfish, he would never eat anything made by Xiang Yi! Not even a bite!

Xiang Yi's actions were meticulous yet nimble, and it didn't take her long to process all the crayfish. She then asked, "Director Yan, Senior Shi, can you guys handle spicy food?"

Yan Zhenhua rubbed his belly and looked toward Xiang Yi with a kind gaze. "Me and Ah Nai both can handle spicy food, but Shi Sui, that child, cannot. At most, he could tolerate mild."

In the whole entertainment industry, he was probably the only one who dared to call Shi Sui a 'child'.

Xiang Yi nodded. "Okay, then I'll make two flavors. One numbing spicy, and one minced garlic. I'll start now. Shall we eat mixed noodles later?"

"Yes yes, that would be great!" Crayfish soup was the soul of the dish, and it could not be more perfect mixed with noodles.

Li Jianyu's meeting with the others had just concluded when he discovered that Xiang Yi had already finished processing the ingredients.

Old Zhang, the cameraman, smacked his lips just now, still reminiscing about the bowl of seafood congee. Seeing that the ingredients had already been properly processed, he couldn't help but whisper, "Director Li, maybe Xiang Yi does know how to cook? It actually looks pretty decent."

Li Jianyu was also befuddled. He didn't hear from anyone that Xiang Yi knew how to cook.

"Click—" The switch on the gas stove was turned on, and a faint blue flame appeared. Xiang Yi calmly heated the oil, then added the onion, ginger, and garlic until it was fragrant. After the oil was heated, she threw in a piece of homemade beef oil hotpot base that emitted a domineering and brutal scent that quickly filled everyone's nasal cavities.

One word: fragrant!

Old Zhang and Li Jianyu looked at the girl with thin limbs with a dumbfounded expression as she flayed and stirred a large wok full of crayfish. She even tossed the wok a few times!

"Everyone, get ready to film! Song, hurry and get the lighting in place! Fei Fei, check the stream equipment! Old Zhang, Jing Ge, Xiao Sen—"

Before he could finish speaking, Lao Zhang and the other three cameramen had skillfully found their positions behind their equipment already!

chapters.title: Chapter 33 - Spicy Crayfish 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 33 - Spicy Crayfish 2

All three cameras captured three different perspectives.

The netizens, who were persistently urging for an update in the official blog, suddenly received a reminder from the Xingchen app.

[The stream you are following "Two Under One Roof" is live now! Click to join the live broadcast room~~]

The audience: Holy cow, it finally started?!

They could finally see Shi Yingdi! And the cute Yan Nai-didi!

But when they clicked into the stream channel, a very impactful scene appeared…

Old Zhang had resigned from Muyao TV alongside Li Jianyu. He had many years of cinematography experience, often taking part in food doc.u.mentaries, that's why he had chosen to film the food from a closer angle.

Xiang Yi tossed a handful of scallions in, increasing the fragrant aroma by several degrees. She then poured in shrimp paste to boil out the oil. Once the hot pot base melted, she added in the crayfish which had been slightly fried.

"Sizzle—!"

On the opposite side of the screen, the delectable aroma could be felt.

—[What am I watching? Is the vase cooking??]

—[AI head-replacing technologies are really advanced now… They could replace a chef's head with the Vase Fairy??]

—[What do you mean head swap! This is the Vase Fairy herself!]

—[??? She knows how to toss a wok? Really?! This wok must weigh at least a dozen pounds right?!!]

—[Holy f*ck, she really really really really really knows how to cook!!]

—[Ah ah ah ah the crayfish is turning red!! I'm drooling]

As Xiang Yi turned the heat to high, the tails on the crayfish quickly curled up, turning a bright red color. She added some clear water and sprinkled in a handful of green peppercorn and dried red pepper before covering the pot to simmer.

She then turned on another stove. Seeing Xiang Yi remaining silent, Li Jianyu quickly cued, "What are you planning to make next?"

"Garlic crayfish." Xiang Yi calmly answered. She didn't care about the camera, shifting her gaze back to her pot after just a glance.

Yet, the number of viewers in the stream began increasing rapidly…

The viewers consisted of netizens who had slept in until noon, or those social animals who didn't have time this weekend to watch the first stream. It was their first meal of the day, and it's a weekend too, a primetime for high viewer traffic.

What kind of streams do people watch while they eat?

Of course it had to be an appetizing one!

The girl in the stream was fair and beautiful even without makeup. Her slender wrists appeared to be powerless, but she was easily tossing a large iron pot while operating two stoves at once. This, in itself, was enough to captivate audiences.

But most importantly…

The crayfish she was frying looked way too appetizing!

The environment in the live stream chat had achieved an astonishing harmony.

—[How come I can't roast her anymore…]

—[Slurp. My tears are uncontrollably flowing from my mouth…]

—[QQQQ Sister Yi, I want to eat crayfish at your house! I don't eat much, I just need a bucket!]

The camera cut to the living room to broadcast the interaction between Shi Sui and the Yan father and son. The comment section was still very active, but it was far less active than during Xiang Yi's cooking scenes.

There was a large number of netizens strongly demanding that the livestream screen be redirected back to the kitchen.

Li Jianyu: ???

'I thought this was a lifestyle variety show? How did it become a livestreamed gourmet food show?'

…Good food, after all, was a part of life. He then calmly aimed the camera toward Xiang Yi.

At this time, the steaming crayfish was being taken out of the two pots, one after the other.

chapters.title: Chapter 34 - Delicious
chapters.body:
Chapter 34 - Delicious

Xiang Yi didn't just pour the crayfish onto the plate; she had her head bowed as she carefully decorated the plate.

Her soft and fair hands seemed to be playing tricks as she placed the two big pots of crayfish into the shape of flower petals.

She took out a clear glass bottle then shook her wrist, dotting the dish with white sesame seeds.

Two cold dishes were included: crispy cold smashed cuc.u.mber and sour and spicy lemon radish, which were both decorated with carved carrots.

Inside the stream channel.

—[Holy sh*t, why does it look even more appetizing after it's plated!]

—[This is next level holy sh*t, she immediately plated it to be outside of my paygrade]

—[I just ordered some crayfish takeout, but it's arriving in 40 minutes, I'm going to cry]

—[Oh my god, she actually prepared two cold dishes and a vegetable dish, what kind of logical coordination skills is this!]

—[Did you get air inside your head? It's just cooking, go find a chef from any culinary school. Who wouldn't be better than her?]

—[Oh my god, she actually prepared two cold dishes and a vegetable dish, what kind of logical coordination skills is this!]

—[???? Are you insane? Just because your own life is rough, you won't allow others to live a fine lifelive refined?]

The live comments suddenly became bustling, but the content in reality was very warming.

Yan Zhenhua gestured toward Yan Nai to help carry the dishes. His hands itched to cook some scrambled eggs and tomatoes. He happily brought it out, placing it next to the crayfish. "Come come come, let me add some dishes for you kids!"

"Thank you, Director Yan."

The dining location was in the pavilion in the garden, surrounded by a sea of flowers and birds flying in from time to time. It looked like a scene from an anime.

Yan Zhenhua felt greedy from the moment he smelled it. He didn't even care about wearing the disposable gloves as he dived into the spicy crayfish.

The ruddy and shiny crayfish were processed to be extremely clean, and it didn't contain a hint of odor or dirt. The moment it entered his mouth, the spicy soup splashed between the lips and the teeth. The smooth and tender shrimp left a numbing aftertaste when swallowed, but its fragrant aroma had left an even richer and lingering aftertaste.

"Little girl, your cooking skills are great!" Yan Zhenhua genuinely complimented her before immediately peeling off another one. "It's spicy enough! Great!"

Chefs are very happy when their food is recognized, and Xiang Yi was no exception. Happily, she pushed the pot of boiled edamame toward Yan Zhenhua and said, "This was cooked in a light salted brine which might relieve the spice."

Yan Zhenhua's eyes lit up. "Crayfish and edamame is a pair made in heaven! Young girl, you're a cultured one!"

Shi Sui really couldn't eat spicy food and ended up eating the garlic flavored one.

The young and handsome man slowly put on his gloves first and very politely peeled the shrimp without haste as if he was cutting steak in a four-star Michelin restaurant.

After placing the shrimp in his mouth, the taste of garlic bloomed on his tongue, but it wasn't overwhelming. Instead, it blended with the aroma of the various seasonings. The spiciness of the green pepper was neutralized by the sugar, making it easy for someone to accept the sweet and spicy garlic taste.

Shi Sui's actions were elegant, but his eyebrows were raised. He slightly bent his long legs and sunk into a relaxed gesture.

The only person suffering was Yan Nai…

The two different scents of the crayfish wafted into his nose. He was full from breakfast, yet his stomach felt so empty he could faint.

The youth's slightly raised Adam's apple kept undulating, frantically struggling if he should eat it or not.

He looked at Xiang Yi with glimmering eyes.

She didn't know if it was because of the smoke fumes in the kitchen, but she didn't have an appetite. After eating two bites, she began to quietly peel the shrimp.

Her movements were nimble, and in no time, she had peeled enough to fill up a small bowl.

If… If she was peeling it for me personally, then I cannot refuse such kindness, or act disrespectfully; in this case, obedience was probably better than deference.

chapters.title: Chapter 35 - Delicious 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 35 - Delicious 2

Just… just one bite. The youth clenched his fists as he waited in nervous anticipation.

Unexpectedly—

Xiang Yi placed the bowl of peeled crayfish in front of Yan Zhenhua without saying a word and went off to peel the garlic ones.

Yan Nai: "…"

So it wasn't for him after all.

A hint of disappointment uncontrollably flashed in his beautiful and clear pupils.

The cynicism began to pile up in the live comments.

—[Aiyooo, I had overestimated the Vase Fairy based on her cooking skills for a minute there. I guess dogs cannot change the habit of eating sh*t, she's already s.u.c.k.i.n.g up to Director Yan?]

—[I guess you have to cater to your audience. Director Yan is one of the top figures in the film industry, she probably wants a role from him. Why doesn't she see how blinding her acting skills are first?]

—[Still peeling?? Don't tell me the second bowl is for Shi Yingdi? This woman is disgusting; can you live for one second without trying to seduce a man?!]

—[I do have to say, it feels like her food doesn't taste that good. Director Yan and Shi Yingdi are only eating it out of respect, didn't you guys see that Yan Nai-didi is only eating the scrambled eggs and tomatoes?]

Soon, Xiang Yi had a second bowl of crayfish peeled.

—[I'll bet you fifty cents this bowl is for Shi Sui!]

—[No no no, I think this deceptive woman will give it to Yan Nai-didi!]

—[Don't kill me, your didi hasn't debuted yet, why would she be good to him? It must be for Shi Yingdi]

—[Some Shi Sui fans must have forgotten, your landlord got rejected from just asking for her WeChat info]

Once there was a disagreement, they began to take sides and targeted one another. This was a must-have skill for a contemporary netizen.

The audience locked their gazes on the bowl of crayfish Xiang Yi was peeling on the screen.

Was it for Shi Sui? Or Yan Nai?

Was it for the handsome and charming actor? Or the cute and shy didi?

Under the anticipating eyes of the audience, the young girl took off her gloves calmly and picked up the bowl and… left?!

Li Jianyu called after her, "Xiang Yi, where are you going?"

Xiang Yi turned around with an innocent expression. "To make noodles, then bring some crayfish for Ah Nan."

The audience: …?

—[I was wrong. What's going on? Who is Ah Nan??]

—[If I recall correctly, he must be…the Vase Fairy's manager?]

—[Sister Yi's manager is really cute! There were rumors before that sister Yi was not good to him. Is the relationship between them so good?]

Not so far away, Ah Nan was so flabbergasted his fatherly heart trembled.

After getting amnesia, he had been terribly concerned about the little dear. He was afraid she'd say something wrong and do something wrong.

He felt that the previous meals had been acquired because of his thick skin, until a bowl of garlic-flavored crawfish was stuffed into his hands. It was then that Ah Nan realized—

She'd become so nice!

As far as Yan Nai was concerned, he felt as if he'd just been struck by lightning.

'Wh-What?'

Out of all the crayfish, not a single one had been peeled for him??

chapters.title: Chapter 36 - Casual Tenderness
chapters.body:
Chapter 36 - Casual Tenderness

Next to him, Shi Sui raised his eyebrows as his crayfish peeling movements slowed down.

After adjusting the equipment in the afternoon, the stream had been divided into several broadcast rooms.

The main livestream room was equivalent to a usual variety show, where the camera constantly switched focus between everyone present.

But each guest also has their own personal stream, where a cameraman would follow them and shoot their entire process.

At the moment, Shi Sui's broadcast room had the largest number of viewers, followed by the program's main stream, followed by Yan Nai and Yan Zhenhua, and last was Xiang Yi.

The comments in Shi Sui's broadcast room were getting lively.

—[His eyebrow raise is so handsome! It reminds me of gege's role as the paranoid pervert in "Rainy Night"!]

—[Heh, why does Shisui look displeased? Like a kindergartener who had his toys stolen…]

—[I'm so angry. This Xiang Yi must be poisonous. She even peeled crayfish for her manager but not our Shisui?]

—[I'm already angry at the Vase Fairy for seducing our Shi Yingdi, but I'm even more angry seeing the Vase Fairy ignore our Shi Yingdi QAQ]

Xiang Yi's dedicated cameraman was Old Zhang. His style was very similar to Li Jianyu, and he loved to film beautiful scenery. Hence, he stood a little further away to find a suitable perspective of Xiang Yi.

However, Xiang Yi was not very aware of the camera and had assumed that the main camera was still on Shi Sui and the others, so she began to chat with Ah Nan.

"Is it good?"

"Mhmm!" Ah Nan's head bobbed up and down as he fiercely shoved crayfish into his mouth. The food made him less vigilant as he failed to notice Old Zhang in the distance. "I thought you were going to give it to Shi Sui."

Xiang Yi didn't understand. "Why would I peel it for him? Didn't you tell me to avoid suspicion?"

If the cameras hadn't been present, Xiang Yi would have definitely peeled some for Shi Sui.

Shi Sui's figure was naturally tall and lanky, but to Xiang Yi, he looked way too thin in real life. It was like he would topple over from a light breeze.

It was like a grandma looking at her grandson, wishing to shove all the delicious food in the house into his mouth.

But Ah Nan had stated she had too many anti fans. To avoid trouble, she was advised to keep her distance from Shi Sui.

To summarize in one sentence: Minimize interactions, minimize conversation; even better, don't even look at each other.

This way, the anti fans cannot take advantage of anything.

Ah Nan vaguely mentioned, "Why didn't you give some to Yan Nai? The little brother has been looking at you with puppy eyes for a long time now."

"If he wants to eat, he can peel it for himself. And it seems to me like he doesn't like crayfish." There was another thought that Xiang Yi didn't directly mention. Yan Nai's dislike might not be toward the food but toward her, rather.

"Eh? Then why did you peel some for Director Yan?"

"I was looking through the info yesterday and Director Yan's hands suffers from an old illness." To her, it was just the act of simply peeling crawfish and was not a hindrance at all. Besides, Director Yan was a senior, and Xiang Yi's family teachings were excellent. Juniors should always have deep respect in their bones for their elders.

Their conversation was faint, but it reached the stream.

—Time—

—[Huh? Our Yi Mei was only peeling crayfish for Director Yan because he had surgery done previously on his hands?]

—[…This must be scripted. I don't believe that the Vase Fairy would be this kind, but whatever, she can keep up her act as long as her face is pretty to look at]

—[But wait, does the pretty lady just want to look good on her own? She even said she wants to avoid suspicion with Shi Yingdi?]

—[To be honest, I think little sister* has a good personality. After peeling the crayfish, she didn't try to claim credit in front of the director or anything, but just handed it over with a casual and tender demeanor. It makes people very comfortable~]

Most people in Xiang Yi's broadcast room were there because of her face. They didn't harbor any anti-fan sentiment towards her to begin with, and, at this time, they could feel their affection for her increasing.

Translator's Note:

* Little sister or xiao jiejie is a term netizens use to call girls, mostly pretty girls, and generally out of a position of respect. (Sister, in this case, uses the term for older sister "jie jie" rather than younger sister, "mei mei")

chapters.title: Chapter 37 - Osmanthus Sour Plum Soup
chapters.body:
Chapter 37 - Osmanthus Sour Plum Soup

After feeding Ah Nan, Xiang Yi went back to the kitchen to cook.

The noodles she selected were handmade soba noodles. Soba was rich in protein, vitamins and more, and was not easily converted into fat for the body.

After the soba was cooked, she soaked it in cold water for a while so the taste was more defined.

At the same time, Xiang Yi pulled out the sour plum soup* she'd prepared earlier that morning and poured it into a transparent juice container before taking everything out at the same time.

In the pavilion, Yan Zhenhua had been gasping non stop because the more he ate, the spicier the food tasted. But the spicier it was, the more he wanted to eat. His throat was about to burn up, but his hands couldn't stop.

Seeing the sour plum soup in Xiang Yi's hands, Yan Zhenhua's eyes lit up. "Miss, you didn't make that yourself, did you?"

XIang Yi poured a glass out for him and sprinkled some osmanthus petals on it. Gently, she responded, "Mhmm. It's made from ebony plum, hawthorn berry, tangerine peel, licorice, and some rock sugar. It's a bit cold, so drink it slowly."

Yan Zhenhua couldn't wait to taste it. The iced sour plum soup was sour and sweet, while the scent of osmanthus lingered inside his mouth. His smoking throat felt more at ease just after a few sips.

At this time, Xiang Yi used the serving chopsticks to stir the soba noodles into the crayfish soup, then scooped bowls for them accordingly: a bowl for Yan Zhenhua, then another one for Shi Sui from the non-spicy pot.

Yan Nai had been eating the scrambled eggs and tomatoes for a while now, and although his mouth was numb, he was still hungry. This was the age when boys would eat the most. Even after eating most of the tomatoes and eggs, his stomach was still rumbling with hunger.

He gazed at Xiang Yi warily, eagerly hoping for her to serve him a bowl of noodles and persuade him enthusiastically. Then he would… reluctantly eat one bowl! Just one bowl!

This was just him recognizing her cooking skills and definitely not him meaning to forgive her!

He didn't actually expect Xiang Yi to pass the third bowl to him. She then put down the serving chopsticks and looked at Yan Nai lightly. "This is soba noodles, I don't know if you will like it, so you can scoop some for yourself if you'd like to try."

Her attitude wasn't cold, but Yan Nai immediately felt cowardly. "I…I'm not hungry."

"Oh." Xiang Yi lowered her head to eat.

The weak, pitiful, and helpless Yan Nai: "…"

He felt that Xiang Yi was writing eight words on his head: Eat if you want, screw it if not.

If anyone else were present, they would have been concerned about Yan Nai.

But Yan Zhenhua had a fat heart and only worried about his own food. Shi Sui was gentle, but didn't have any sense for getting along with others. Moreover, he wasn't the type to worry about other people's business.

Hence, Yan Nai was in just as much pain and hunger as Yan Zhenhua was in delight and full from the food…

"Belch~…" Yan Zhenhua, who had been satisfied from his meal, burped loudly.

Shi Sui had also paused his chopsticks.

Xiang Yi quietly began to clean off the table, making Yan Zhenhua feel a bit embarrassed. "Ah Nai, help your sister clean up."

Xiang Yi had made a lot to begin with, and Yan Nai didn't even get a bite. Shi Sui also didn't eat spicy food, so there was still some spicy crayfish left.

Yan Nai nodded as he began to clean up, then uttered something like a young master who's never seen the real world. "Are these…going to be thrown out?" He was asking Xiang Yi, but he couldn't bring himself to call her 'sister'.

In his heart, the only person worthy of being called sister was the gentle and understanding Qin Wanyan. Xiang Yi… She wasn't worthy.

—[I'm dead! The little puppy is too soft and cute!]

—[QQQQ I want to squeeze didi's cheeks, it still has baby fat, how cute]

—[Don't dump it! Give me an address, I'll take a cab over to clean it off!]

"Ahem…" Li Jianyu cleared his throat from behind the camera and shamelessly said, "Yan Nai-didi, the crew is willing to collect the leftovers."

"Huh?" Yan Nai paused. "That's not good, is it…"

After all, it was leftovers. Would anyone want to eat that?

Translator's note:

* Although called a soup, this is usually treated as a juice and paired with spicy foods (foods with high heat levels like hotpot) because of its cooling properties.

chapters.title: Chapter 38 - Change Of Tide 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 38 - Change Of Tide 1

The next second—

All the staff present unanimously nodded their heads in agreement.

Yan Nai: "…"

Everyone knew that the seafood congee from earlier was just an appetizer. After they smelled the aroma of the crawfish, the staff would have turned into hungry wolves to fight over the food if it weren't for their professional ethics.

Xiang Yi: "There's still some sour plum soup in the fridge. Want some?"

The girl's voice was soft and polite, sounding heaven sent to the staff members.

Li Jianyu didn't hesitate. "Yes yes yes!"

"Then I'll go grab it."

"No no no, Mentor Xiang Yi, please sit, we can do it ourselves!"

The audience in the stream: ???

In the morning they had been calling her Xiang Yi; now, she was Mentor Xiang Yi.

This must be the least ethical crew in the history of TV crews!

"Wait—" A drawling voice reached everyone's ears. Shi Sui's thin lips were slightly hooked as he lazily slouched in his seat. "How will you calculate the recycling fee?"

Huh?!

Yan Zhenhua reacted fast and chided in as well. "Yeah, you even get scissors from recycling old cell phones and home appliances!"

The crew: "…"

Of course, how could they forget these two old foxes.

After some negotiations, Shi Sui put forth a clause that could be considered as 'surrendering something under humiliating terms': the crew would help clean up, including but not limited to cleaning dishes, wiping tables, and collecting tableware.

The netizens in the live broadcast room felt that the crew wasn't going to agree, but when the camera panned—

More than a dozen staff members had gathered around the small clump of crayfish. The ones who were nimble managed to snatch two, while the slower ones only got one. They were reluctant to eat it all at once as they chewed it slowly, holding it in their hands as if they were tasting a sublime delicacy that was delicious and expensive.

The noodles were also a hit. Each person got what they could with one chopstick trip. By then, nobody minded about cleanliness or hygiene as they carefully soaked their noodles in the same batch of crayfish soup before inhaling it like treasure.

The expressions of satisfaction on the faces of the staff was too real, making the audience suddenly realize Xiang Yi's cooking was really delicious after all!

—[I'm hungry from watching, I've opened the mysterious yellow app* again…]

—[Hahaha good thing I ordered my takeout early so I can watch while I eat. If you spend money earlier, you can reap the benefits sooner]

—[lmao all the other variety shows have guests being oppressed by the crew, but I didn't expect Two Under One Roof to have it reversed haha. This is the first time I've seen the crew help the guests clean up!]

Yan Zhenhua and Shi Sui chatted for a while, talking about their arduous experience of filming in the mountains.

"…That night was a night scene, and it was raining. As the young folk like to say, the rain was bigger than the night Yi Ping went off to ask her dad for money*. Shi Sui was also filming a fight scene, rolling around in the mud. Even his eyelashes were covered in mud." Although Yan Zhenhua was old, he was still very humorous. When he spoke, it was like a stand up comedy show. "But when that day ended, our crew had earthen pot farmhouse chicken casserole for lunch. It was so delicious…"

Xiang Yi didn't interrupt, but listened intently. From time to time, Shi Sui would respond with a slight nod or a faint smile. In a light manner, he spoke. "There's an earthen pot furnace in the small kitchen, why don't we make some earthen pot chicken casserole for dinner?"

Yan Zhenhua excitedly slapped his t.h.i.g.h. "Yes yes yes! It needs to burn wood, right? I will go cut some!!"

…The well-known director completely forgot he had come on the show to relax and chat with Shi Sui.

Xiang Yi: "Your hand has previously been injured, let me."

Yan Zhenhua was shocked for a few seconds, then he smiled. "The little miss is quite considerate, ah. Did you peel the crayfish for me because of my previous injury as well?"

An earthquake rocked the livestream channel in an instant.

Translator's note:

*The direct translation for this is actually 'teacher Xiang Yi' or professor. In Chinese customs, it's appropriate to address those with higher seniority 'teacher' even if teaching is not their profession.

*Yellow app is probably referring to a famous chinese takeout service, Mei Tuan

*A famous scene from the 2001 Chinese drama "Romance in the Rain"

chapters.title: Chapter 39 - Change Of Tide 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 39 - Change Of Tide 2

—[Nani? The Vase Fairy peeled the crayfish for Director Yan because of this?]

—[Suddenly, I feel like the Vase Fairy isn't that annoying… it's like she's a different person]

—[Oh my god, I really changed my view of Xiang Yi. Her culinary skills are amazing, and she's so considerate of others as well]

—[It's true, it's true! I just heard her talking to her manager in the pretty lady's exclusive broadcast room. She even mentioned avoiding suspicion with Shi Yingdi!]

—[She's just trying to stir up rumors. A dog can't change its habit of eating sh*t, how can a Vase Fairy change their attraction to popularity]

—[It's nothing but a script. There are so many dumb people these days who really think celebrities on reality shows are being real]

There was a spirited discussion happening in the comments. Some people changed their views on Xiang Yi, while others spared no effort in shaming her.

However, everyone was now of the same opinion: Xiang Yi was just faking in front of Yan Zhenhua.

They didn't expect the girl to smile lightly and say, "I'll go cut some wood."

Huh?

Just like that??

She didn't ask for credit, didn't try to show off, or show off her meticulous, cunning nature. Just like that, she remembered such a trivial detail about Director Yan like the wounds on his hand???

Yan Zhenhua was even more satisfied with Xiang Yi. "Come, Shi Sui, let's go see."

Shu Sui pushed his gold-framed glasses up his nose bridge and followed after.

Yan Nai had also been dragged along by his dad.

The small kitchen was a traditional Chinese style building with an earthen pot furnace and stove as well as Xiang Yi's cooking ingredients.

Dry firewood was available all year round, but it hadn't been chopped yet.

Yan Zhenhua wanted to prove that he wasn't old and picked up the ax to chop the wood several times. The wood, however, would either fall from the stump or just get stuck on the axe.

In the end, old age really took over as Yan Zhenhua became exhausted and began gasping for breath after a few attempts.

However, he believed that his technique was okay and that the only reason it didn't work was because he wasn't strong enough. Thumping Yan Nai on the shoulder, he said, "Ah Nai, you try."

Yan Nai was hesitant. "I… I can't."

"What do you mean, be a man!" Yan Zhenhua exclaimed with a grin. "Listen to me, exert your force from this angle…"

He even made gestures as he eloquently explained to Yan Nai as if he were lecturing someone on set.

Yan Nai tried a few times but failed as well.

Yan Zhenhua was slightly unhappy. "Where did all the food you just ate go? You can't even do such a little task??"

Suddenly, the live comments began to scold him.

—[Didi is skinny in the first place, and he's never done this kind of work before. Isn't it normal for him to mess up?]

—[What kind of a father is that? Yan Nai only ate tomatoes and eggs just now, he didn't even drink any water. So what if you don't care about your son, at least don't be so mean. The poor puppy]

—[Toward these middle-aged greasy men like Yan Zhenhua, who is a good-for-nothing teacher, I am physically and psychologically uncomfortable. It's making me think of my stupid boss going through menopause]

—[Heh, isn't this the traditional parenting technique of our country? In addition to suppressing children, they also accuse them and never consider their feelings]

Yan Nai was s.e.n.s.i.t.i.v.e to begin with, and after being ridiculed in public, he was a little dazed. He stood there blankly, unable to come up with an explanation.

Li Jianyu cleared his throat, fearing that the atmosphere would get tense. Suddenly, a man's deep chuckle sounded next to him.

"Mentor Xiang Yi, can you please teach us?"

The netizens: …!

'Gege, you are too flirtatious, who can even stand it!'

Xiang Yi nodded and demonstrated.

The young girl's hands lifted the axe and then dropped it, splitting the wood into two.

Her actions were clean and swift, as if she was cutting a cake.

Immediately—

The netizens in the stream: …!

The pretty, little girl… No no no—the pretty sister is too manly!!!

chapters.title: Chapter 40 - I Can'T Chop Wood But I Can Kill Chickens
chapters.body:
Chapter 40 - I Can'T Chop Wood But I Can Kill Chickens

Xiang Yi's actions shocked countless people in front of the screen.

Even the staff members on site were startled.

They thought Xiang Yi was just boasting, but they didn't think she actually knew how to chop wood!

Yan Nai's gaze widened with shock.

She really… did it…

Suddenly, a soft and quiet voice was heard. "It's not that you're not strong enough, the issue lies in the technique used. Try this."

"Heh?" Yan Nai paused for a moment before realizing Xiang Yi was addressing him.

She slowed down as her voice became patient, explaining the process in a very logical way. Yan Nai actually managed to split a smaller piece of wood after listening to her and trying it!

Yan Zhenhua was happy to see this, but he was a typical male chauvinist character as he snorted. "Hmph, you've only chopped one piece. What's there to be happy about."

He didn't think it was anything. After all, Yan Nai's grandfather, or his father, had taught him in the same way.

Yan Nai's eyes that had just lit up gradually dimmed.

The live comments: [Is Yan Zhenhua poisonous? How hard is it to praise your son? Why do you have to attack him like that??]

The "thump thump" of a clap sounded off from Xiang Yi as she cheered him on. "Great job."

Yan Nai squeezed the wooden handle of the axe sheepishly. "It's… It's nothing, really…"

He had obviously hated this woman before, but after getting praised, he felt…

Happy.

The corner of Shi Sui's mouth turned up slightly as he cooperated. "Mhmm. Ah Nai is a quick learner and has strong hands-on skills."

The young boy was overjoyed. If he had a tail, it would probably be wagging fiercely.

Xiang Yi looked toward Yan Zhenhua and deftly smiled. "Director Yan, shouldn't you praise Yan Nai?"

Yan Zhenhua waved his hands. "Aiyah, how could I say these things."

He could praise actors, but to praise his son… That would be too embarrassing.

"I think children should be praised more." Xiang Yi picked up another axe and began to chop wood without delay. "When I was a kid, I really liked it when the elders praised me. Whenever they did, I felt more motivated."

Her words resonated with many people.

—[That's me, the more the teacher praises me, the more motivated I get]

—[I really like flattering and boosting my sisters, and I really like when they find creative ways to lie to me too hahahahaha]

—[Yi mei* is so diligent. She is nimble, but she is sassy and gentle as well. QQQQ I've been converted!]

Hence, it didn't matter that much to him. He did not need his father's validation.

Unexpectedly—

Yan Zhenhua cleared his throat. "Uh, Uhm… It's pretty good, keep going."

Yan Nai jerked his head up, staring at his father in disbelief.

Yan Zhenhua rubbed his belly and walked away, feeling embarrassed after he said those words. "I'm gonna go check on the chickens. I can't cut firewood, but I can kill chickens!"

Translator's Note:

* Yi mei means little sister Xiang Yi; probably an endearing name coined by fans

chapters.title: Chapter 41 - Matchapter Made In Heaven
chapters.body:
Chapter 41 - Matchapter Made In Heaven

The live comments:

—[Heh? Is Director Yan showing tsundere attributes?]

—[I feel like Director Yan is pretty cute…]

—[The chicken: ??? Don't come near me. I'm going to scream]

As Director Li Jianyu followed the comments throughout the process, he let out a sigh of relief upon seeing the change in tide in the live comments.

Looking back, he discovered something… Did Shi Sui and Xiang Yi inadvertently cooperate with each other just now?

And their collaboration had been perfect?

Before Li Jianyu could think about it, he became distracted by the comments praising Xiang Yi.

He had also noticed that the number of viewers in Xiang Yi's broadcast room was growing.

Although it wasn't a large difference, it reflected that more and more viewers were taking an interest in her.

Maybe… Daddy Shi had other intentions behind recommending Xiang Yi for this show?

Yan Zhenhua ran over to the chicken coop to take a look. There were ten chickens in total, and there was even a clutch of newly hatched chicks covered in pale yellow fluff.

The coop was very tidy, and there was a thick layer of dried alfalfa on the floor with no strange scents.

Shi Sui approached as well and had been handed a small basket by Xiang Yi to go pick up some eggs.

Due to the gory scene of killing the chicken, the cameraman paused his shooting.

Yan Zhenhua scanned the chicken coop with his sharp eyes, planning to choose the fattest one. Chatting casually, he said, "Shi Sui, what do you think of that little Miss Xiang Yi?"

"Hmm?" Shi Sui slowly picked up an egg.

The female staff on the side couldn't help but frequently gaze toward him.

His long and slender fingers were distinct in the light, looking like the kind of hands that did not do this kind of task. But when he was doing it, it was still extremely elegant and pleasing to the eye.

Yan Zhenhua smiled. "If you ask me, the girl is pretty and has a good temperament, and she's quite compatible with my Ah Nai!"

Shi Sui's actions wavered a bit and responded, "Director Yan, Ah Nai is still a child."

Yan Nai was seventeen this year and not yet of legal age.

"I've already asked, the girl is only three years older than our Ah Nai. The old saying goes well, a woman three years older holds gold bricks. Look here, look here—fate can't be stopped. This is a match made in heaven!"

The more Yan Zhenhua thought about it, the more he felt it was reasonable. Slapping his t.h.i.g.h, he said, "If this really happens, I'll have to send you a big red envelope! Soon, the girl won't be calling you senior, but she'll be calling you uncle along with Yan Nai. Then we'll really be a lovely family!"

Shi Sui was normally very gentle and polite, but today he felt uncommunicative for some reason.

Unfortunately, such a straightforward man like Yan Zhenhua had already immersed himself in the scene of his baby grandson in the arms of Xiang Yi and Yan Nai, calling him grandpa…

On the other side.

Xiang Yi's productivity did not falter as she found a Tupperware container and prepared to pick up some fruits for Xiang Feng's driver to deliver to Xiang Feng.

Yan Nai didn't know where he found the courage to stop her. "Xiang- Xiang Yi… Wait, I have something to tell you."

Xiang Yi turned around, looking at him lightly. "What's wrong?"

Meeting her eyes with his, Yan Nai suddenly began to stutter. "I… I…"

"If it's nothing, then I'll be off."

Yan Nai panicked and blurted, "Why don't you acknowledge sister Wanyan? She wants the best for you, why don't you understand her at all?"

Xiang Yi was puzzled. "Who?"

Yan Nai felt wronged and resentful. "If you want to pretend to not know me, FINE. But are you going to pretend that you don't know sister Wanyan as well? Xiang Yi, you're heartless!"

A question mark slowly rose from atop Xiang Yi's head.

chapters.title: Chapter 42 - She Two-Timed Him So He Two-Timed Her
chapters.body:
Chapter 42 - She Two-Timed Him So He Two-Timed Her

What's known—

Condition A: The kid knows me.

Condition B: The sister Wanyan the kid speaks of knows me.

Condition C: I don't know either of them.

It could then be understood that this was the work of the 'one who had occupied her body'.

After clearing it up, she said in a good-natured manner, "Sorry, I have amnesia. I've forgotten most of my memories from last year."

There was no way Yan Nai was going to believe her. The boy was trembling with anger. "You… You're lying again! You used to lie all the time, telling us that you got amnesia and tricking sister Wanyan to be good to you…"

He lowered his eyes, looking aggrieved. "You… Why do you have to pretend that you don't know me? You were the one who confessed to me, and you were the one who t-touched my hand…"

Xiang Yi: "…"

A light flickered in her mind as Xiang Yi remembered something.

No wonder Ah Nan and Xiang Feng would always use the term "ruined".

Got it; the dots finally connected.

Could the one who dared to occupy her body be… a Sea King?*

Recalling the sc.u.mbag who had dumped her with his edelweiss in tow, Xiang Yi felt slight pity for him…

He two-timed her, she two-timed him, then she two-timed him, and he two-timed her.

This was a spectacle—like a magic frog eating a magic bugle entering Mickey's magical house. A spectacle!

The young boy's eyes were red, and his eyelashes were stained with water droplets. Furthermore, his bad attitude toward her was not without reason. It was inevitable that Xiang Yi felt more protective—just like a mother bear—toward this cute little brother.

"Yan Nai, look at me. Look into my eyes, okay?" The girl's voice was soft, as if trying to coax a child.

Xiang Yi patiently explained. "Have you ever heard of bipolar disorder or something like that? You may not believe this, but in the past year, the Xiang Yi you knew and the Xiang Yi now… Do you really think we are the same person?"

Yan Nai was stunned.

Indeed… They weren't.

The other Xiang Yi's eyes were frivolous, vain, and flamboyant… when she had t-touched his hand, it made him feel disgusted.

But the girl in front of him now was gentle, her eyes clear; and, like a star in the sky, her whole person seemed to be bright and yet soft.

It really was like two different people.

"You know the answer deep down, right?" Xiang Yi gently said. "I apologize for what happened before, but I really do not remember. If you want to take out those negative emotions on me, that's fine with me. But I hope you understand I'm not lying to you, and there's no need for me to lie to you as well."

There was a catch in Yan Nai's voice, making him sound nasal. "…You're lying."

"I'm not."

"You're lying."

'Alright, it seems polite talk won't cut it.'

XIang Yi looked around and picked up a sickle with a blank expression on her face. Casually, she asked: "Do you believe me now?"

Yan Nai: …!!

Two minutes later.

The youth promptly accepted the reality of Xiang Yi's amnesia, obediently holding the tTupperware as he followed after her with his tail tucked between his legs.

…If one would ignore the sickle in Xiang Yi's hands, the scene was quite harmonious.

There was a ladder next to the fruit tree, and Xiang Yi swiftly climbed the kumquat tree with ease. The fruit was not easy to pick, but she was able to reach it without trouble using the sickle.

Yan Nai meekly picked up the fruits that had fallen on the ground.

He filled up the container with kumquats, but because Yan Nai had been too nervous, he accidentally dropped the box, shattering it.

All of a sudden, a single word reverberated in Yan Nai's mind:

Danger!!!

The next second, he felt the girl lightly tapping his cheeks. Her voice was gentle, but it carried a hint of threat. The wind blew the scattered strands of her hair onto his brows as she inched deathly close to him.

"I only like well-behaved kids."

"If you try to cause trouble, you will be punished."

Whoosh—

The tip of Yan Nai's ears immediately flushed red.

Translator's note:

*'Sea King' usually refers to a sc.u.mbag who has many ambiguous relationsh.i.p.s with several people, often at once; kind of like a fisherman who catches many fish in the sea. The term "Central AC unit" is also used to describe this.

chapters.title: Chapter 43 - I Think Your Brain Is Not Well
chapters.body:
Chapter 43 - I Think Your Brain Is Not Well

How strange…

Her touch did not feel as despicable anymore.

And his heartbeat inexplicably increased.

"I… I didn't do it on purpose…" Yan Nai's voice faded into a whisper. He didn't dare meet Xiang Yi's gaze as he lowered his brows, the fragments of hair on his forehead blocking his translucent eyes.

Xiang Yi realized that the boy was scared.

Forget it, it was enough to scare him for a bit. The pretty little brother can have the privilege of being forgiven and loved.

"Are you hungry?" she asked.

"Nope."

Before he could finish speaking, Yan Nai's stomach grunted in an untimely fashion.

The handsome face with a bit of baby fat immediately turned bright red.

Xiang Yi's lips curled up. "What do you like to eat? After we have picked kumquats, I'll make an additional meal for you."

Yan Nai's eyes were glowing… Such amazing things exist?!

Half an hour later.

A hot steaming bowl of rice noodles was placed in front of Yan Nai.

The rice noodles had been made by Xiang Yi beforehand. They were smooth and white, the texture al dente. Taking into account Yan Nai's preference for spicy and sour foods, she had boiled some fragrant meat sauce to top it off and mixed it with refreshing side dishes of green vegetables, filling up a large bowl.

Yan Nai wolfed down the dish happily.

"It's okay if you can't finish," Xiang Yi said. Her biggest pet peeve as a child was that she couldn't leave leftovers when eating over at other people's homes since the elders liked to fill her bowl with various dishes. The feeling of eating even when you're full was a painful memory.

Putting herself in his shoes, why would she make it so difficult for the child?

Yan Nai raised his head from the bowl that was larger than his face, his mouth glistening with grease, and showed a shy smile.

…Leftovers? Impossible.

He actually wanted another bowl.

Bzzz—

The phone vibrated; it was a voice call from Qin Wanyan.

Yan Nai hesitated for a moment then answered the phone.

"Sister Wanyan."

Qin Wanyan's gentle and concerned voice came from the other end of the receiver. "Ah Nai, I heard that there was an accident with your stream, are you alright? Are you hungry? Want me to call you some takeout and have it delivered?"

There was an overload at a signal tower nearby, and the livestream had to be temporarily paused. The crew had already issued an apology on Weibo.

"Thank you, sister Wanyan, but there's no need." Yan Nai's heart was aflutter; Qin Wanyan's considerate attention toward him had always made him happy."

Qi Wanyan deliberated over his words. "Ah Nai, I saw you only eating tomato and eggs during lunch, but Xiang Yi didn't even try to persuade you… Hey, she did such awful things to you and left a shadow in your heart but can't even care for you in the slightest…"

Yan Nai responded sternly. "Sister Wanyan, sister Xiang Yi has lost her memory, and she can't remember anything from the past year. If that's the case, then let matters in the past pass."

"???" On the opposite end of the receiver, Qin Wan Yan had already prepared a set of lotus words, but Yan Nai's words had stunned her so thoroughly she couldn't utter a sentence.

Sister Xiang Yi?

Didn't he say he hated that woman?

The fact that Yan Nai had once been violated by Xiang Yi was Qin Wanyan's biggest trump card.

From time to time, she would use it to brainwash Yan Nai and make him recall the pain so that he would feel nauseous whenever he thought of it.

This was the first time her trump card had failed!

"Also, sister Wanyan, sister Xiang Yi is not deliberately ignoring you. Her eyesight is bad, and she has pseudo-myopia and a thin cornea, so she can't use electronic devices frequently. She hasn't even used her phone at all lately, so I think she's not doing it on purpose. Okay, I'm going to hang up now, I have to finish my rice noodles."

Qin Wanyan: ???

You really believe in this amnesia and bad eyesight nonsense?

'I think your f*cking brain is not well!!!'

chapters.title: Chapter 44 - Xiang Li
chapters.body:
Chapter 44 - Xiang Li

Qin Wanyan wanted to go off for another round, but she didn't know what had gotten into Yan Nai this time. He had hung up the phone in a hurry, as if he were under attack.

Just before hanging up, Qin Wanyan could hear the vague sounds of a satisfied burp…

At the same time.

Inside one of the country's research centers.

The research institute had gathered top talents from various disciplines who were bustling about with their own tasks. The only time their lives intersected was probably in the cafeteria.

Xiang Li very seldom went to the cafeteria, since the Xiang family would always have a chef deliver meals to the door.

But today, the new chef had accidentally made a dish he hated, so Xiang Li did not touch it and headed for the cafeteria instead.

He was notorious among his colleagues in the research institute for being indifferent and as someone who was not easy to get along with. The only person he had a good relationship with was the chubby guy from the laboratory next door.

"Brother Li, brother Li! Today, the braised pork and crab buns are delicious!" The chubby guy enthusiastically recommended the menu as soon as he saw him. As he ate, he was browsing the tablet on his desk. "I don't know what this mukbang streamer is called, but the crayfish she's making looks way too delicious…"

Xiang Li didn't have the habit of eating and playing with his phone, so he glanced over at random. His eyes stopped moving when he saw the screen.

It seemed to be an edited short video. The beautiful girl had tossed the wok a few times before placing the crayfish on a plate. The whole process took about ten minutes or so, but the chubby man had watched it several times on repeat already.

The soup was boiling hot, splashing a bit on the back of the girl's fair hands. If one were to look closely, one might discover that the skin had somewhat reddened.

Being scalded when cooking was a common occurrence.

However, the space between Xiang Li's eyebrows furrowed into a deep frown. .

He tapped the chubby man's shoulders. "Do you still have some of that special burn treatment ointment that your lab researched a while ago?"

"I do have some; but that ointment is very expensive, so I only kept one vial."

"Give it to me." Xiang Li's tone implied he wasn't taking no for an answer.

The chubby man was a bit reluctant. "Brother Li…"

"I'll supervise your experiments tonight." Xiang Li said without an expression.

"Ohohoho, it's settled then. Brother Li, I will go grab it now!"

The chubby man dropped his lunch and obediently ran off to grab the ointment. He then found Xiang Li as he was writing down an address on a sticky note.

The man was left handed, but right now he was using his right hand. His handwriting was nonetheless powerful and dynamic.

He saw that Xiang Li had written a string of text that seemed to be an address of a manor before crossing it out and replacing it with Xing Chen Entertainment's company headquarters.

The chubby man was curious. "Brother Li, who do you want to send this medicine to? Your family?"

Xiang Li responded in disgust. "An idiot." He paused, then added, "A big idiot giving to a little idiot."

The chubby man: ???

Yan Nai finished his rice noodles and compliantly went off to clean the dishes.

Xiang Yi had left a portion of fruit especially for him, as well as a freshly squeezed cup of strawberry yogurt.

The young boy suddenly seemed full of adrenaline. "Sister, I'll go cut wood right after this!"

Xiang Yi didn't care about the change in how he said her name and casually responded, "Then bring some gloves with you, don't hurt your hands."

She was about to contact her little uncle, Xiang Feng, when she heard a familiar voice, "Little Xiang Yi, your package has arrived. Come and sign for it!"

Yan Nai then discovered that Xiang Yi's calm expression had suddenly turned into a sweet smile as she opened up. "Little uncle!"

Xiang Feng arrived with several bags in haul, large and small. He pinched Xiang Yi's cheeks, which had recently gained some weight, and pulled out a thin kitten from his suit pocket.

"I just picked it up from the side of the road. He's a bit ugly, but he looks like Xiang Chen, so I want to take it back with me and raise it."

The kitten meowed excitedly as soon as it saw Xiang Yi, small paws waving frantically.

Xiang Yi was stunned and hesitantly called out a name. "Tong Tong?"

chapters.title: Chapter 45 - Call Me Gege
chapters.body:
Chapter 45 - Call Me Gege

The kitten: "Meow meow meow!"

'—It's me, it's me!'

Xiang Yi: "!"

The girl, who was usually very calm and unperturbed, became starry-eyed in surprise.

Xiang Feng: "What bucket*? Bucket bag? Which brand do you want? Uncle will buy it for you!"

"Uhm, uncle, I think he's hungry. I'll take him and make some goat milk powder."

Xiang Yi received the kitten from his hands, comfortably grabbing him by the nape of his neck.

Xiang Feng spat, "Hey, be careful! This cat has a temper, it almost scratched me…"

"Meow~"

The cat with the supposedly big temper nudged Xiang Yi with his head, as if he had been wronged.

Xiang Feng: "…"

Okay, it was not his first day to know that little Xiang Yi was loved by small animals.

As for him… He was probably the type that even dogs hated…

In the kitchen.

Xiang Yi's voice was soft. "Tong Tong, how did you turn into… a cat? Didn't you say you would turn into a tiger?"

When traversing through different worlds, Xiang Yi had a very cute and lovely System. Of course, Tong Tong refused to acknowledge the attributes of his* cuteness.

XIang Yi was its last host, and after completing the task, it would be able to obtain a body from a piece of data flow of information.

Because Xiang Yi was bored and had spoken to Tong Tong about Chinese mythology, Tong Tong became infatuated with the white tiger and was determined to become a powerful and fierce white tiger in the future.

But it didn't know where the accident happened. He had failed to be reborn as a little white tiger cub and ended up being a white cat instead!

"Meow meow meow!"

'—I'm furious, furious! System rebirth is way too hard.'

Xiang Yi petted his flat belly and quickly filled up a bowl with goat milk powder. "Be good. Drink some milk first, I'll go get you some cat food."

Tong Tong: "Ah meow meow!"

'—I'm no cat!'

Xiang Yi stifled her laughter as she softly coaxed him. "Okay okay okay, our Tong Tong is not a small kitty, you're a wittle tiger! I'll make you food fit for a wittle tiger."

Tong Tong: "Hmmph."

That sounds better.

It was not in vain to intentionally be reborn reborn into the world this woman was in.

Xiang Yi boiled some chicken b.r.e.a.s.t, egg yolks, and carrots before mincing them into easy to swallow pieces and placed them in a clean bowl.

Tong Tong was starved, and it immediately buried its head in the food, eating wildly. Even when Xiang Yi ruffled him up, he was indifferent.

"Senior Shi." Xiang Yi politely greeted him. "Sorry for the trouble."

Shi Sui gently responded, "Do the eggs go in the fridge?"

"Mhmm, the refrigerated section."

Shi Sui placed the eggs and found that Xiang Yi's gaze was focused on the cat; she didn't even spare him a glance.

He licked his teeth, feeling a sudden discomfort.

"Is this the cat that Xiang Feng picked up?" Xiang Feng had mentioned it to him in the living room. "Are you planning to take care of it?"

Xiang Yi lifted her head, an innocent expression on her face. "Senior… Is that not okay?"

She was worried that Shi Sui would be allergic to cat fur or something, so only Xiang Feng could take care of him during this time.

Shi Sui's fingertips itched to reach for his cigarettes, but he resisted the urge.

"Of course you can…" He paused for a moment, his voice heavy and hoarse. "But I have one condition."

A bright flash of light coursed through the girl's eyes before she returned to a sullen state.

"What's the condition?"

Tong Tong—or the wittle tiger who had its face stuffed full—lifted its face, staring suspiciously at Shi Sui.

He felt a familiar but dangerous aura from him.

But…

Food was more important!

He opened his mouth and buried his face in the bowl again.

With a smile, Shi Sui looked at the girl sitting cross-legged on the floor. "Call me gege, yeah?"

"Huh?" Xiang Yi was dumbfounded.

"Or do you want to be like Yan Nai, and call me uncle?"

*Translator's note: Tong Tong in Chinese is synonymous with the word for bucket

* The Chinese version of Tong Tong is actually gender neutral, using the neutral "Ta" or it/they

chapters.title: Chapter 46 - Old Uncle Or Eldest Uncle?
chapters.body:
Chapter 46 - Old Uncle Or Eldest Uncle?

It was evening already, and the sunset outside the window was radiant as ever. Clouds layered on top of each other, rolling out in a gorgeous shade of reddish orange. The afterglow from the setting sun reflected on Shi Sui's face through the speckled shadows of the window, dotting it in layers of light.

It revealed an unexpected tenderness.

Xiang Yi inexplicably remembered the first time she saw Shi Sui.

On the banquet of her sixteenth birthday, he had entered from outside alongside Xiang Feng. His suit jacket was slung across his arms, and at his arrival, the noisy family living room had gone silent for an instant. The crowd seemed bewitched as they unconsciously followed his movements with their eyes.

At that time, it was the youngest and most frivolous point of his life. At the age of twenty-three, he had won the titles of film emperor and TV emperor at the same time. One look from him was enough to stun all living beings.

The reason he had become her white moonlight was a shallow one as well.

When she was walking upstairs in her dress, Shi Sui had promptly put his suit jacket on her without a sound.

Xiang Yi still remembered the only phrase she had said to him:

"Thank you, big brother."

Before Shi Sui had any time to react, he was interrupted by Xiang Feng. "Little Xiang Yi, you've messed up your formalities! You should call him uncle!"

The memory came to an abrupt halt.

Xiang Yi's cherry lips trembled, but she couldn't spit out the two simple syllables anymore.

She was no longer the naive little girl from back then, and her feelings for Shi Sui weren't like those belonging to men and women.

She coughed. "Senior Shi, perhaps… you've heard of aunty fans?"

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows, suddenly feeling something bad was about to come.

"To be honest, I see you as…" Xiang Yi couldn't utter the words 'baby' and switched to another euphemism. She lifted her wittle tiger and said, "Like a kitty."

The little white cat, whose meal had been interrupted, had a cute but fierce expression.

'I've already said Tong Tong is not a cat meow!'

Shi Sui chuckled lightly, leaning over to rub the head on the little cat. "Kitty? Sounds pretty cute to me."

Right at this moment, Xiang Feng had carelessly barged in and whimpered, "Little Xiang Yi, is there any food? I'm so hungry… Heh? Shi Sui, why are you still here?"

Shi Sui: "I want to see the cat."

"What's there to see? It's just a cat… So ugly too…" Xiang Feng muttered to himself.

Xiang Yi covered Tong Tong's soft cat ears and spoke seriously, "Can't hear you, can't hear you, our wittle tiger can't hear anything!"

"You gave him a name?"

"Mhmm. I want to raise it." Xiang Yi suddenly remembered something and turned her gaze toward Shi Sui. "Senior, I'm going to raise him, okay?"

Xiang Feng: "Aiyah, why call him senior? Call him uncle! He's the same generation as me!"

For the first time in his life, Shi Sui had the intense d.e.s.i.r.e to make someone shut up.

Xiang Feng: "Wait no, he's older than me. You should call him bobo, or maybe even eldest uncle?"

Shi Sui: "…"

A certain film emperor was expressionless as he violently crossed off Xiang Feng's name on the notebook in his heart.

// Xiang family, Feng Feng: Expert in ruining atmosphere + a stumbling block… in the path to romance between a male and female lead?

chapters.title: Chapter 47 - Viewers Going Up
chapters.body:
Chapter 47 - Viewers Going Up

On Weibo…

Being the first streamed variety show of its kind, as well as Shi Sui's first variety appearance, it made sense that the discussion forums regarding "Two Under One Roof" continued to remain active.

There were several related search terms trending already.

#ShiSuiVariety#

#ShiSuiWhiteShirt#

#YanNaiSweetandCutey#

#OverflowInCrayfishTakeout#

In addition to pressuring the official Weibo account for updates, they also called for the stream to continue.

The netizens, who had been bored and idle, began to pick up their styling and cooking recipes. Even the tableware in the kitchen from the show 'Two Under One Roof' became a coveted 'same style' item.

—[No wonder Shi Yingdi was an actor worthy of being loved by such high-end luxury brands. The clothes and shoes he wore on the show were all the latest models from his brand sponsors, and even the watch he wore were all private, high-end customized models from a certain brand! It was the only one like it in the world!!!]

—[What, your hand speed is too fast? The sports bag that didi was carrying is already sold out??]

—[Holy f*ck, who said the production team for "Two Under One Roof" was poor? Let's not talk about how much that dreamlike location costs, but do you know what kind of tableware is being used in that kitchen? It's the Misty Rain series of Xizhou porcelain!! Just one set of plates cost several thousand dollars!!!]

—[I am a postgraduate student in Museum Curatorial Studies, and I'd like to express my weak opinion… The hanging paintings and the vases in the living room seem to be antiques…]

Suddenly, the internet went crazy.

The crew for Two Under One Roof was this strong?!

However, an overwhelming number of marketing accounts began adding to the rhythm.

[The woman with the last name X is so uncultured and so uneducated it's worrying]

[Is the vase delusional? The most comprehensive analysis is as follows…]

[One bastard can ruin an entire family; one Xiang Yi can ruin an entire show ]

There were so many microblogs like this, and some experienced people could even tell that Xiang Yi had been targeted.

After reading this blog, the passers-by felt even more negativity toward Xiang Yi.

—[The crayfish takeout was actually able to fool fans and blow them away by making it seem like she was good at cooking at home. I'm about to die of laughter]

—[Wouldn't it be amazing if this variety show didn't have the Vase Fairy? I would be satisfied just watching Shi Yingdi for 24 hours a day]

—[The Vase Fairy's "welcome to my home" is enough laughing content for the rest of the year. Please, that is just the mansion being used by the stream. If the set were in a castle, would the castle be your home?]

—[If the entertainment industry came out with an award for someone with no brain, I think the girl with surname Xiang will win it for sure]

—[Not watching anymore, let's just wait to watch "Heartbeat" tomorrow]

—[Yeah yeah, "Heartbeat" has three pairs of handsome men and pretty girls falling in love; isn't that great? Who wants to watch this kind of retirement home-style show like "Two Under One Roof"]

Muyao Network.

The public relations department had summarized the latest public opinion that were trending on the internet and sent them in real time to the director of "Heartbeat", Director Chen.

When he saw netizens express that they would rather watch "Heartbeat" instead of "Two Under One Roof", Director Chen smiled with satisfaction.
