When our program group had been unable to do anything, it was mentor Xiang Yi who reached out and offered us her home for shooting, solving the urgent need of our crew."

Li Jianyu discussed the cause and effects of the incident, and then said in the tone of a confident big brother, "On behalf of the "Two Under One Roof" crew and producers, I would like to express our sincerest thanks to mentor Xiang Yi. Why did you choose to conceal the fact that this was your home?"

Xiang Yi glanced at the camera and lightly spoke. "It's really nothing worth mentioning."

Li Jianyu: "…" Alright, as long as you're happy!

The live comments: ????

—[I…I'm f*cking speechless, is this the peak of bullsh*tting? There's nothing to compare??]

—[Oh hey, why don't you anti-fans come out to dance now? You wanted to crush a soft persimmon and ended up kicking a cold, hard, Bai Fumei wall?]

—[Looking back now, the Vase Fairy had been very lowkey. She only said "my house". If I were in her place, I would be bragging and showing off from the get go. I would drag the guests around and talk their ears off for three days and three nights!]

—[The pretty sister is good at cooking and has a modest personality. She is so polite dealing with other people as well, my favor towards her is +100!]

chapters.title: Chapter 67 - Delicious...Wait No, That'S Cruel!
chapters.body:
Chapter 67 - Delicious...Wait No, That'S Cruel!

New fans came in at the speed of a tornado.

Xiang Yi's fans had turned from those who purely loved her looks into those who loved her looks + personality + cooking skills in the blink of an eye.

That's right. At this time, the most unexpected and biggest proportion of Xiang Yi's fans were… the elderly fans!

"Miss Yi, if you have time, feel free to visit the farm. The wild boars we've been keeping are getting fatter and fatter!" A look of anticipation appeared on Wang Shunli's dark face.

Xiang Yi responded in a well-mannered way. "I will go."

"Okay okay, I'll wait for you to come slaughter the pigs!"

The commentators were fascinated.

—[S…Slaughter pigs??]

—[I can't hear I can't hear, how can such a cute and pretty sister kill a pig!]

—[Freshly slaughtered pork tastes so good… slurp! I'm starving… Wait, no! That's so cruel!]

Mentor Xiang Yi was so slim that a gust of wind could knock her over. Her? Slaughter pigs?

Thank you for the good laugh.

Wang Shunli left a whole lot of 'luxury gifts', then directed the remote-controlled robots to leave.

Xiang Yi turned around and gently said, "I'm going to cook for Xiao Naofu. Ah Nai, can you go pick some chilies?"

Yan Nai formed a fist. "Yes, big sister!" After realizing he was speaking too aggressively, Yan Nai's lips went soft and his voice weakened. "Big sister, how many chilies should I pick?"

Xiang Yi heard this and knew that the young boy had never been in a kitchen, let alone the fields.

Smiling, she found two small baskets for measurement and said, "One basket of those red chilies over there, and another basket of the green chilies over there."

Yan Nai nodded seriously and solemnly, as if receiving an important task. He picked up the baskets, then headed to the fields.

"Wait," Xiang Yi called him back and handed him a pair of gloves. "Put these on, or your fingers might hurt."

"For…for me?" Yan Nai stuttered. "I…I'll wear them well."

"Ah Nai is a good boy."

Sh-sh-she-she praised me again!

The girl's smile was sweet and soft. Yan Nai, who had just experienced the awakening of his first love, was a just young boy who completely lacked resistance. Even if she was just coaxing him, he still was…

So happy.

Shiu shiu shiu—

Yan Nai's ears were crimson red as he hurriedly rushed toward the vegetable field, with the stance of someone determined to pick the entire field clean.

Meanwhile, in the stream.

—[A spark of love has appeared! Gentle pretty girl X milky puppy little brother, I ship it!!]

—[To the one above me, wake up! Didi is going to leave soon, what's the point of stanning a CP for only a day? Why not come stan Untimely CP with me!]

—[CP fans gtfo, our Shi Yingdi is famous for being cold to women. He wouldn't spare an extra glance at the Vase Fairy even if all the women in the world were dead!]

Yan Zhenhua coughed. "Then what should I do? Little Xiang Yi, give me some work to do, it's no fun sitting here just drinking coffee with Shi Sui!"

Shi Sui slowly typed out a question mark.

…It feels like… he was being given the cold shoulder.

Who was the one who wanted to come on a variety show to banter, relax, and drink tea??

Who would have guessed, a certain Director Yan had cleanly forgotten his initial intentions and became immersed in providing hard labor…

— Author's Mini Theatre —

Director Yan: I love to provide manual labor, manual labor makes me happy

Yan Nai: Big sister praised me, big sister coaxed me, therefore, big sister likes me

Shi Sui: Other people's children and other people's cats are all being coaxed, only I am not (feelingwronged.jpg)

chapters.title: Chapter 68 - The Green Tea Meow Is Back In The Game!
chapters.body:
Chapter 68 - The Green Tea Meow Is Back In The Game!

Xiang Yi's eyes curved into slight half-moons. "There are a few types of fruit wines in the cellar that I've brewed myself. Director Yan, would you like to try some?"

Director Yan's gaze shifted, but he remained courteous. "That… that would be too troublesome, we'll just take some chili oil on the way. You should keep the wine for guests, since you guys will be receiving more visitors."

Xiang Yi uttered the most magical and omnipotent four-word spells in Chinese history:

"You are already here."

"!" Director Yan slapped his t.h.i.g.h. "Well, if you put it like that, then alright, I'll take some! But I definitely won't take too much!"

Happily, Director Yan sauntered to the wine cellar.

Xiang Yi turned around to prepare food for Xiao Naofu.

The cat followed at her heels, tightly sticking to the pin-straight pair of legs. The cat's amber eyes shifted and reversed its direction—

Duang~

The fluffy kitten banged headfirst into a man's shin. Immediately, it turned around and fainted on the floor in a daze.

Shi Sui: "…"

This collision happened all of a sudden.

Xiang Yi hurriedly picked up Xiao Naofu and rubbed its small head. "It's nothing it's nothing, huuu huuu…"

Gently, she carefully blew on Xiao Naofu's forehead.

Xiao Naofu looked wronged. "Meow QQ~"

Shu Sui: "…"

He finally began to understand why girls hated 'green tea'* types.

The live comments were hysterical with laughter.

—[Shocked! The green tea cat has appeared again!]

—[Shi Yingdi has an expression of being helplessly indulgent, this man is too damned tempting!!]

—[Xiao Naofu: Sister, I am okay, as long as you and gege are happy together, I am okay. It doesn't matter if I eat or not]

The staff on site were working hard to contain their laughter.

In the living room.

Xiang Yi placed Xiao Naofu in a cat basket and squeezed its paws. "I'm going to make you food, be good."

"Oh no, little cats can't enter the kitchen." Although Xiao Naofu wasn't a normal cat, it will still shed hair. Xiang Yi wanted to discipline it into maintaining a healthy, hygienic habit.

"Meow meow meow!"

—This tiger is not a cat!

Xiang Yi changed her phrasing. "Okay okay, Xiao Naofu can't enter the kitchen."

After hearing this, Xiao Naofu finally conceded. Lazily, it laid down in its basket with a "meow".

For the sake of delicious food, it would listen to this stupid woman.

Suddenly, it felt a big warm hand on the back of its neck. Gently, the hand kneaded the nape of the cat's neck until its eyes narrowed in comfort. Suddenly, a deep voice reached its ear.

"I'll come help you out with the food? Hm?"

Xiao Naofu: !!!

What surprised it even more was that Xiang Yi actually nodded in agreement. "Okay, thank you, senior."

Xiao Naofu: ???

'How come you can enter, but this tiger cannot?!'

It angrily waved its little paws, scratching Shi Sui at the back of his hand.

Unsure if he had actually felt it since the man did not only dodge but had also tightened his grip instead.

The young and handsome actor drooped his eyelids slightly, a 'tsk' sound escaping from his pale lips. This shifted the focus of the viewers onto his hand.

The man's hands were very pleasing to look at, naturally fair and slender with distinct bone structure. On the back of his cold and pale hand, a few stripes of red had appeared; it had a coquettish and abstinent beauty about it.

"Senior!" Xiang Yi was fl.u.s.tered. "Hold on, I'll go grab the alcohol wipes."

"No need." Shi Sui nonchalantly retracted his hands then smiled nonchalantly in a helpless manner. "It's just a small injury. Xiao Naofu didn't do it on purpose. Right?"

He then lowered his deep gaze, meeting the cat's eyes. A dark presence flashed through Shi Sui's eyes.

"Awoo!" Xiao Naofu felt the tips of its hairs were about to explode.

You were f*cking playing me!!!

*Translator's Note: The term Green Tea (more directly also read as 'green tea b*tch') is an internet slang used to describe a woman (or cat, in this case) who likes to dress and act in a certain fashion in order to portray themselves as pure and innocent — i.e. like green tea, but are actually attention seekers and obsessed with their self image. The term first emerged around 2013 on the internet in Mainland China when a group of female actors and models was exposed for working as paid escorts for high-powered figures.

chapters.title: Chapter 69 - Green Tea Artist
chapters.body:
Chapter 69 - Green Tea Artist

It was at this moment that Xiao Naofu, who boasted of its mastery of the green tea skill, realized it was still too naïve!

This man was the real green tea artist!

Xiao Naofu was so angry it couldn't wait to run up and scratch Shi Sui a few more times. However, it was caught off-guard by Xiang Yi holding the nape of his neck, suspending him in the air like a piece of cloth hung to dry.

"Xiao Naofu, no scratching!" Xiang Yi strictly disciplined it. "If you don't behave, I'll shut you in again."

Xiao naofu: …!!

A hint of shock and heartache appeared in the cat's beautiful eyes.

You dare shut me in a dark room because of a stinky man!

Ah ah ah I'm fuming with anger!

A certain actor continued to calmly fan the flames. "Xiao Naofu is still young, it's normal to misbehave. I'm okay, it's fine to be scratched a few times. Don't scare it, it's not good to leave a psychological shadow on its heart."

Xiao Naofu: "…"

'Why is this man more proficient in green tea etiquette than I am?!'

Xiang Yi responded apologetically, "Sorry, senior; I will train it well."

Xiao Naofu did not cooperate as it struggled desperately, ready to give its all to fight Shi Sui.

Xiang Yi was helpless as she could only put Xiao Naofu in the bedroom and close the door.

Xiao Naofu gradually lost its rationality and began to bark like a dog through the door.

—[Shi Yingdi is way too good at entertainment]

—[Hahahahaha Xiao Naofu is a refined actor too, right?]

—[The Green Tea Meow must have been dumbfounded, does it think 'film emperor' is just a name?]

—[To have pissed off a cat to the point of barking like a dog… I'm laughing so hard the earth has collapsed, the mountains have shifted, and all the heroes have died]

Xiang Yi went to grab the alcohol and cotton swabs. "Senior, let me sterilize the wound, Xiao Naofu hasn't had time to get vaccinated yet."

Shi Sui received it and smiled lightly. "Okay."

"Then I'll get back to work."

"Hold on."

"Huh?" Xiang Yi turned her head and suddenly faced a pair of gold-framed glasses in front of her. The man's wrist bones were clearly outlined, slightly curving outwards. The scars on the back of his pale white hands looked like tangled red silk threads.

He slowly and carefully placed the glasses on Xiang Yi and sorted the flyaway hairs on the girl's head. Warmly, he said. "These are just glass frames. You must protect your eyes when making chili oil."

The warmth from his body still lingered on the frames. Xiang Yi froze for several seconds before she replied with a dull, "…Thank you."

'Zaizai is so nice. And so kind!' She thought to herself.

Inside the stream…

—[Shi Yingdi gave his glasses to the Vase Fairy???!!!]

—[Everyone, please do not overthink it. Our Shisui is just a kindhearted boy taking care of the younger generations]

—[I don't care, I don't care! This is sweet! So sweet!]

—[So annoying, why are we talking about shipping? I just want to watch someone make chili oil, OK?]

—[Hehe, whoever is saying our sister Yi is seducing Shi Yingdi, please open your eyes and take a closer look. WHO! IS! SEDUCING! WHOM!]

chapters.title: Chapter 70 - Bunbun
chapters.body:
Chapter 70 - Bunbun

…

The small act of putting on glasses was more than enough to make the few fans who supported the CP burst into a New Year-like carnival.

However, question marks emerged from the Shisui Sisters fanbase group chat.

—[…]

—[…..It's not like what I'm thinking, right?]

—[…..He just sees her like a sister, right?]

—[…..Shi Sui is just naturally gentle. Look how considerate he is toward Yan Nai]

A single lie is self-deception, while a group of people's lies will be taken as the truth.

The Shisui Sisters continued to brainwash each other. As they repeatedly washed and washed, they really began to believe Shi Sui was treating the Vase Fairy like his little sister!

Yes, that's it! That must be it!

Since she's Shi Sui's little sister, then she's our little sister, too!

What's the point in flaming one's own sister?

As a result, the comments hating on Xiang Yi were dramatically reduced.

Xiang Yi made a portion of tuna and pumpkin rice for Xiao Naofu and delivered it to the bedroom.

The cat was lying in its ingot-shaped bed, sticking its nose away when it saw her approaching, sulking in a very proud manner.

"Xiao Naofu, time to eat."

"There's tuna! The big tiger's favorite tuna."

Xiao Naofu's ears twitched.

"Sigh. If you won't eat it, then I'll have to toss it."

The cat's pupils suddenly shrank. How could this stupid woman be so wasteful?

Its heart was fiercely wavering, but it couldn't get past the lump in its c.h.e.s.t.

Does this tiger have no shame? You think I'll eat it just because you tell me?

Seeing the situation, Xiang Yi could only use her trump card. "Well, I wonder if Senior Shi likes tuna. If you don't like it, I will give it to him to taste."

Xiao Naofu suddenly jumped up, its chubby little paws pressing down on the bowl. Arrogantly, it lifted its chin; the meaning was self-evident:

This meal belongs to yours truly!

Xiang Yi lightly scratched its chin a few times. "Try it, just one bite, okay?"

"Meow."

Hmph. Then…I'll give this stupid woman some face.

One bite!

Xiao Naofu lowered its head and tasted the food.

The cat's amber pupils enlarged instantly.

The fresh tuna had been cooked and mixed with a soft and chewy pumpkin puree, sprinkled with a bit of egg yolk. It was delicious!

Hence, one mouthful gradually became many mouthfuls…

Xiang Yi let out a sigh of relief. She was finally able to coax this little deity.

As she was passing through the living room, she met the faint gaze of a certain actor…

"…" Xiang Yi picked up a few rabbit-shaped plushies and placed them beside Shi Sui.

"What do you want me to do with these?" The man intoned in a suave and low voice.

Xiang Yi bit the bullet. "You look lonely sitting here by yourself."

Shi Sui batted his peach blossom eyes and picked up a rabbit, pinching its ears with his beautiful and slender fingers.

"Bunbun, huh…" The man's voice was mild, but there was a teasing sparkle in his eyes. "Isn't that your nickname?"

Xiang Yi: "!"

How did he know!!

The girl's ears were visibly red as the crimson slowly spread to her graceful neck. She was stunned. "Senior…"

The live comments:

—[Aw, the nickname the pretty sister has given it is so cute!]

—[Sister Yi is so fitting of this name as well. When she was little, she must have been soft and fair and cute!]

The next second.

The Adam's apple on the man's throat moved as his deep and s.e.xy voice spread to every pair of ears in the room.

"I recall you named it Bunbun because you like to eat spicy rabbit head?"

His lips formed into a sultry smile. "I guess that's pretty cute."

chapters.title: Chapter 71 - Chili Oil
chapters.body:
Chapter 71 - Chili Oil

…

The pitter-patter of falling water continued to resound.

Xiang Yi had squeezed out liquid hand soap for the third time already, but her ears were still red.

She hadn't heard the name Bunbun in a long time. She strongly opposed the nickname, so the Xiang family very seldom used it.

…She didn't think she'd hear it again from Shi Sui.

The girl who rarely experienced turbulent emotions suddenly felt the feeling of shame after its long absence.

It was only until Yan Nai had returned with two full baskets of chilies that Xiang Yi suddenly recovered.

She washed the red and green chilies and drained them before mincing them and setting it aside for later use.

She then dug out the specialty chili powder she had made a few days ago. The transparent container was red and orange, and mixed into it were several other chillies and spices. When she unscrewed the wooden cap, a strong exotic scent assailed their nostrils.

Yan Nai had sniffed hard and instantly felt his nose itch. He quickly stepped back and sneezed several times into his sleeves.

"Sis, this chili powder smells spicy already."

Xiang Yi smiled. "This contains ghost peppers."

It's nothing but juice that has been diluted several times.

After the ingredients were prepared, Xiang Yi heated up a pot to warm the oil.

She was going to make chili oil, and the method was quite simple. Mix different kinds of chilies with sesame, ground peanuts, and salt, then pour the hot oil over twice. Stir well, let it cool, and then pour into a suitable container.

When the boiling oil was slowly poured over the surface of the chilies, the viewers could almost feel the spicy aroma and delicious taste through the screen.

—[This red and glistening chili oil is absolutely amazing!]

—[Ah ah ah with cold stir-fried veggies, with steamed buns, and with an egg pancake, I can think of infinite ways to pair it within minutes! ]

The number of viewers on the stream for "Two Under One Roof" was stable, but next door, the numbers for "Heartbeat" were like a roller coaster as the number of viewers plummeted.

There was no other reason: the interaction between the guests was… too awkward.

The four were not familiar with each other before. If they had been filming a variety show, it would be alright since the clips could be saved by editing in the post-production stage. However, everything will be magnified in a livestream format.

One's good aspects can be directly perceived, like Xiang Yi's cooking.

But the bad aspects will also stick out, for they did not have the natural demeanor of those in "Two Under One Roof".

Yu Miaomiao was keen on stealing the spotlight and couldn't wait to perform the splits live; Fu Jaiyan continued to kiss up to everyone, but each sentence tackier than the next; Qin Wanyan's goals were clear as she desperately searched for conversational topics with Jiang Chen, but Jiang Chen naturally didn't talk much, so their exchanges only came off as awkward.

Had it not been for the various tasks and games implemented by the program crew, the scene would have been a train wreck.

Director Chen didn't understand. They were clearly all high-trafficking celebrities, so why weren't the audience biting?

Annoyed, he smoked one cigarette after another. He couldn't even count the amount of times he had scolded the netizens for having poor taste.

"Director Chen!" His assistant ran over happily. "We've received the guest list for "Two Under One Roof" for this afternoon!"

Director Chen was furious. "What's there to be happy about? Did you have your brain kicked in by a donkey?"

"They invited Smog! The e-sports player with a bad temper. Xing Chen app has regulations, and anyone who swears or speaks profanities during the broadcast will have to shut down the stream!"

Smog was, indeed, an infamous figure.

But everyone knew him not for what he played or how skilled he was.

Instead, it was for how hard he flamed his opponents during league sponsored games.

His opponent had been killed by him a few dozen times in succession, and in the next second, his opponent had a meltdown and directly screamed: "F*CK/YOUR/SISTER"

At the time, the camera happened to be on Smog as his mouth was curved into a sneer. His typing speed was dazzling too, and his flaming seemed quite civil at first glance.

"Your parents have left this earth ahead of time."

The opposition's coach and boss almost died on the spot.

//Sister Yi's brother arrives!

//Goodnight

chapters.title: Chapter 72 - Where Is The Romance Channel I Was So Eager To Roast?
chapters.body:
Chapter 72 - Where Is The Romance Channel I Was So Eager To Roast?

In the end, both players were suspended from competing for a month.

The league also revised its regulations to prohibit players from both sides from communicating through ingame chat.

"Smog?" Director Chen sneered coldly. "It seems that Shi Sui was Li Jianyu's biggest trump card."

Smog's popularity was comparable to that of a high-traffic celebrity, but he was undoubtedly a time bomb.

The Xingchen live streaming app had strict restrictions regarding its hosts' words and actions. The first offence would warrant a warning from the stream, the second means your broadcast room will be restricted, and the third offense means that your channel will be banned.

The length of the ban depends on the severity of the situation.

Director Chen once again began making small calculations in his heart again. Without saying too much, Smog only had to utter a few profanities, and he could reckon that "Two Under One Roof" would be banned until tomorrow.

If the stream is banned, won't all the audience members flock to "Heartbeat"?

This included fruit wine, jam, chili oil… and various specialty produce from Little Rabbit Farm.

Reluctantly, Yan Zhenhua waved to Xiang Yi and Shi Sui.

Yan Nai pressed his lips together tightly as he played with his sleeves, secretly looking at Xiang Yi.

Accidently, he met Xiang Yi's gaze. He quickly looked away, pretending nothing happened, but the red flush of his ears betrayed him.

"Here, this is for you." A sweet and gentle female voice as clear as a mountain stream resounded.

Yan Nai blankly received the craft paper bag she handed to him.

"What's this?"

"Strawberry seeds. Didn't you want to plant stuff? This is pretty easy."

Yan Nai was startled. It was just something he brought up casually, yet she had remembered…

He knew his parents loved him very much, but they were often too busy to care about his s.e.n.s.i.t.i.v.e little thoughts.

A strange sensation strummed at his heartstrings, as if it had been brushed lightly by a feather. It felt itchy.

His heart was beating so fast he couldn't control it.

Yan Nai's lips moved slightly as he tried to call her sister, yet nothing could come out.

Bluntly, he managed the word "thanks". Forgetting to say goodbye to Shi Sui, the boy plunged into the car.

How could this trivial action of his own pup escape the eyes of this director? Yan Zhenhua chuckled as he smiled, shaking his head. "This silly boy…"

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows, not saying a word.

"Goodbye." Yan Zhenhua stepped inside the car and lowered the window. "Little Xiang Yi, don't forget to fatten up the ducks! I will be back!"

Xiang Yi's eyebrows curved as she smiled and nodded toward him.

The stream became active once again.

—[No way? Are they going the romance route? I'm begging you, Vase Fairy, don't bring trouble for our Shi Yingdi!]

—[I reject this CP! I reject this form of forced rumor-mongering! I reject this Vase Fairy coming within two meters of Shisui!]

—[What a garbage director with terrible planning. Giving this show such a scandalous name like "Two Under One Roof" and setting up such a scandalous segment. If the Vase Fairy does something to hurt our Shi Yingdi, who can afford the consequences??]

The netizens continued to argue, but what they were dreading did not happen.

On the contrary—

Xiang Yi calmly asked, "Senior, I plan to go kill some pigs. Are you going to stay home with Xiao Naofu, or go together?"

Shi Sui responded, "Together."

"Then can you help me catch the pig?"

The young, handsome, and gentle grand slam actor responded in a well-tempered manner. "Okay."

The fans: ???????

What the hell??

Where's the romance variety show that I was so eager to roast???

chapters.title: Chapter 73 - It'S Better To Get Trolled Together
chapters.body:
Chapter 73 - It'S Better To Get Trolled Together

The fans uniformly produced a question mark.

Even the passers-by and netizens were also confused.

Even if one didn't want to watch a romance stream, they were still quite interested!

The two of them were already there, both looking attractive. If they could hold hands and kiss a few times, wouldn't it be so delectable to watch it like an idol drama?

…But, it would seem like pork meat was more delectable.

Quickly, everyone adjusted their emotions and anticipated the braised pork, pork hock, sweet and sour tenderloin and pork ribs that were about to come…

Some audience members also felt that they had been scammed. But thinking it was better to be trolled as a collective rather than be trolled alone, several mysterious clickbait comments began to appear on social media—

[ HD, meaty, lonely man and woman. Come soon if you please.]

[ The most tumultuous, emotional, and sadistic variety show in history. If you don't watch, you're not a good sister!]

[That man, he was amazed at the time, and the years have been kind to him. When she met him, she understood the phrase: Some of us get dipped in flat, some in satin, some in gloss. But every once in a while you find someone who's iridescent, and when you do, nothing will ever compare*…]

Countless netizens who were idly surfing the webs were immediately captivated and happily entered the broadcast…

Five minutes later.

In the stream for "Two Under One Roof", Shi Sui and Xiang Yi arrived at Little Rabbit Farm.

The wild boars were raised freely, so whoever wanted pork had to catch them themselves.

Xiang Yi observed the terrain and then began to seriously discuss pig-catching tactics with Shi Sui: "Senior, wait for me to go over here, you outflank the other side…"

The newly duped online users were confused on the spot.

—[Got no f*cks to give /smile /smile]

—[F*ck… Omit the 50,000 cavern of swear words]

—[I came here for love and loneliness, but I'm out here f*cking watching them catch pigs?]

—[Meat = Wild boar meat?? Okay, I'm dirty, I was l.u.s.ting for their bodies…]

After watching with relish for a few seconds, those who had been trolled returned to social media to forward the message.

[ Very realistic and interesting ]

[ I support, I support! This variety show is amazing! ]

[ Strongly recommended! Sisters, stick together. If you're a sister, then watch this!]

Soon, more and more people were trolled into viewing the stream…

At the moment.

Xiang Yi tightened her shoelaces as a serious expression formed on her pale and small face. She light-footedly approached the little black pig they had chosen.

The pig was small, but it was round and plump. The quality of meat would certainly be delicious and savory.

As Xiang Yi approached, the little black pig turned his head to look at her in alert and immediately ran off on his plump little legs.

Now is the time!

"Senior!" Xiang Yi cried out.

Shi Sui twisted his body and dashed in from the side. Their cooperation was seamless.

The live comments:

—[I can't take it anymore, I'm laughing so hard I'm doing 360° flips on the spot with my right hand holding my left foot]

—[These two have such great variety show sense, they're so funny even in real life. How can catching a pig give off such a sense of passion!]

—[Wake up! Shi Yingdi and the Vase are going to have their images ruined!! You guys are acting like bumbling village idiots!]

—[Let's go! Once you catch the pig, lunch will be secured! The piggy is so cute, braised in soy sauce and sweet and sour sauce—it will be so delicious!!]

The young girl turned her head, her eyes shining like stars in the sky. Her smile appeared fresh and sweet.

"Senior, I caught it!"

Shi Sui quietly started in her direction and smiled softly as well.

*Translator's Note: Sisters Who Make Waves is a popular variety show from 2019 featuring famous women over the age of 30, formatted like a girl group selection show. It features many BTS discussions about the contestants' love life and career. Breaking thorns and overcoming obstacles is the parody mens version.

**A quote from the movie, Flipped

chapters.title: Chapter 74 - The Guests Arrive
chapters.body:
Chapter 74 - The Guests Arrive

The comments section exploded immediately.

—[Powerful sister Yi is like the wind ahahah! She's so A*!]

—[wtf?? Did the Vase Fairy just fly over just now??]

—[Shi Yingdi's smile is so endearing, he really doesn't have the consciousness and awkwardness of a grand slam title actor QQQQ]

—[I came here after being trolled on my WeChat moments. The interactions between these two are way too natural. They're able to drop their public images and run after the pig, and they seem happier than children when they managed to catch it. Meanwhile, "Heartbeat" next door made me feel so awkward I got goosebumps…]

Xiang Yi happily bounced off with the black pig toward the back kitchen to take it for processing. Because the stream did not permit gory scenes, the cameraman and Shi Sui returned to the villa.

As soon as they entered the living room, Shi Sui heard the sound of claws scratching on a door coming from Xiang Yi's bedroom.

It was probably a certain Xiao Naofu breaking down from the lack of attention.

His lips curved as he stepped forward and opened a sliver in Xiang Yi's door.

Xiao Naofu tentatively stuck out its little head. Seeing it was Shi Sui, the cat's pupils instantly inflated.

"Meow meow meow!"

—How come it's this smelly man!

Shi Sui's peach blossom eyes seemed to be feinting a smile, but his tone sounded lazy but teasing. "I'm here to save you, aren't you happy?"

Xiao Naofu: "…"

'You even dare to lie to Huhu*, does your conscience not hurt?'

"You wanna play with this?" The man conjured a fluffy ball of wool with the familiar movements of a professional actor.

Xiao Naofu: (ˉ▽￣～) Cheh. You think this Huhu hasn't seen the world before?

'How could I like this kind of idiotic toy!'

The next second—

Shi Sui tossed the ball away in a perfect arc.

…Sh*t, I fell for the trap!

This stinky man is so scheming!

"Isn't it fun?" Xiao Noafu didn't know when Shi Sui had squatted down beside it. His jawline was smooth and the outline of his throat was clear. There was an inexplicably sultry and s.e.xy appeal when he spoke.

Xiao Naofu turned around, ignoring him.

Shi Sui casually rubbed the back of its neck and gently said, "Let's behave in the future, hm?"

Xiao Naofu: Bleh. Not listening.

'This Huhu is not going to succ.u.mb to such a stinky… Ah! That feels so nice~~~'

The cat's amber glazed eyes squinted comfortably, a cute purr emitting from its body. The beard on its pinkish cheeks trembled slightly…

The peak of a tiger's life was merely like this.

—[It is better to be a cat than to be human…]

—[I want to be a cat in my next life too QAQ]

—[The Green Tea Meow actually transformed into a Sha Baitian* in Shi Yingdi's hands hahaha]

It was almost noon when Xiang Yi returned with the processed pork.

At this moment, the guests arrived.

This time, they came in two separate cars.

Alighting from the first car was a girl with a clean and beautiful face and a slender figure. Her temperament radiated of a delicacy that could crumble with a light push.

Seeing the pork in Xiang Yi's hands, a trace of contempt flickered from the depth of her gaze.

Soon after, in the second car —

A young man of about twenty years old got out of the car.

He was wearing a white tee with a black checker print shirt and canvas shoes and also carrying a sports bag. He was obviously dressed to appear obedient, but all he radiated was an air of stubbornness and defiance.

An obsidian stud in his left ear reflected the cold light from the sun.

Xiang Yi saw him and was startled at first but was eventually overcome with surprise.

It's her fourth brother!

She dropped the basket in her hands and approached to help him with the luggage, only to be dodged by the figure.

A cold and raspy voice sounded, each word seeming to be coated with frost.

"Don't touch my things."

*Translator's Note: In fanclubs, the term someone is being so "A" is a term for endearment, calling someone very handsome, cool, or manly. Could be used on both men and women to describe their coolness.

* Huhu is a cuter abbreviation for the Chinese term 'tiger' (pronounced Hu)

*Sha Baitian refers to a person who is respectively, dumb, fair, and sweet

chapters.title: Chapter 75 - White Lotus
chapters.body:
Chapter 75 - White Lotus

Xiang Yi froze for a few seconds and then batted her long and thick lashes. "Sorry," she whispered.

She stepped back slightly, maintaining her distance with her fourth brother, Xiang Yu—or Smog, the longtime sitting legend from the esports scene.

It was obviously the fault of that person who had been occupying her body last year, yet she had to bear the consequences.

She had already mentally prepared for this, but when she was face to face with her cold and uninviting brother, she still felt slightly wronged and dismayed.

Xiang Yu frowned slightly, glancing over at Xiang Yi quickly before retracting his gaze. The corners of his lips twitched mockingly.

Are you going to start acting like before?

He used to trust her so much, yet she….

Thinking of the things she had done, the short-tempered Xiang Yu felt even more irritable as he sped up his pace and headed into the villa.

From the beginning to end, he didn't spare another look at Xiang Yi.

The live comments began to gloat.

—[The Vase Fairy's trainwreck is here!]

—[I've discovered the Vase Fairy's appetite is quite big: a Shi Yingdi is not enough to satisfy her, she's trying to seduce Smog!]

—[Simao brother*, good job! The best kind of treatment for this kind of woman is to just ignore her!]

—[The one who called him Simao brother, are you a monster? How can you pronounce such a cultured name like Smog in such a tacky manner!]

—[Hahaha I can't my stomach hurts from laughing at the name "Simao Brother"]

"Xiang Yi, are you okay?" the soft voice came from Bai Ruoruo. She tucked her hair down and said, "Smog surely didn't mean to treat you that way. It's probably because the weather is too hot and he is in a bad mood."

Nancheng in May is not and probably will not ever get very hot.

Bai Ruoruo's words appeared to be of comfort, but when processed carefully there was evidently something wrong.

—[The moment she opened her mouth, you can tell she's a strange personality]

—[What a pretty lady, but I don't recognize her face]

—[I think she's a newly signed artist with Xing Chen entertainment. Probably one of the artists Shi Yingdi is helping to curate]

—[This voice is so obviously a White Lotus. Oh no, I'm starting to get excited, I really want to see the Vase Fairy be abused by the White Lotus!]

Xiang Yi politely greeted: "Hello, I'm Xiang Yi. This way please."

Bai Ruoruo carefully observed her expression only to find that Xiang Yi was truly not showing a hint of anger.

Seeing that Xiao Yang was also watching the stream, Bai Ruoruo wanted to irritate Xiang Yi and make her go mad like a shrew on stream. Inadvertently, she said, "Sister Xiang Yi, do you not remember me? We met last time."

Xiang Yi responded casually, "Really?"

Bai Ruoruo smiled gently and coyly, coming in with the final attack. "Brother Xiao Yang sends his regards."

Xiao Yang, who was watching the stream, immediately sat up straight.

He was watching the stream for two days now, and he genuinely felt that Xiang Yi was a changed person.

She was inexplicably… very attractive.

But at the same time, Xiao Yang was disappointed. She can cook so well, yet why had she never bothered to boil even a pot of water for him?

For the sake of her pretty face and cooking skills, it would be okay to play with her once in a while…

Xiao Yang continued to be immersed in his own fantasy until an unexpected basin of cold water was splashed in his face—

"Xiao Yang?" Xiang Yi was confused. "Who?"

Bai Ruoruo: …!!

Xiao Yang: …???

He stared at the screen in disbelief. Damn it, was this woman pretending not to know him?!

Bai Ruoruo felt that this woman was acting too high and mighty. This was so unusual; she had to get serious too!

*Translator's Note: Simao Ge (Simao Brother) is a very tacky and accented rendition of Xiang Yu's English IGN, Smog

chapters.title: Chapter 76 - Braised Pork 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 76 - Braised Pork 1

In the short walk from the gates to the villa, Bai Ruoruo had already finished acting out an entire palace drama in her mind.

But Xiang Yi…was distracted the entire way.

Based on the information she had obtained from Xiang Feng, the biggest conflict between the person occupying her body and fourth brother Xiang Yu was [Lies].

At first, Xiang Yi didn't believe that someone could screw up such a good hand of cards until she heard of the 'glorious deed' that this person had committed. It was then she understood a truth:

"Anything is possible, courting disaster does not have to be justified.

That person had told several lies to Xiang Yu that were outrageously absurd. The most excessive one was the time she had pretended to be terminally ill, forcing Xiang Yu to come see her 'one last time'.

At the time, Xiang Yu's plane was about to take off for a very important esports event.

Xiang Yu had torn up his plane ticket on the spot and hurried over. When he arrived at the hospital, he was so anxious he didn't even take the elevator, running up a dozen flights of stairs. The back of his T-shirt had been soaked through.

Only to learn: 'Xiang Yi' was just teasing him.

Xiang Yu had been angry for sure, but he was still grateful that she was safe and sound.

He was prepared to take the next flight to the competition, but his doc.u.ments had disappeared.

When he finally recollected all his identification doc.u.ments and rushed to the competition, he had missed it by two minutes. Based on the rules, he was no longer allowed to participate in the competition.

During that competition, the team he was a part of suffered a terrible defeat, and the name 'Smog' was bashed so hard it made it to the top of trending searches.

Later, when the servants were cleaning up, he found his doc.u.ments under "Xiang Yi's" pillow.

Xiang Yi angrily confronted her, but 'Xiang Yi' had acted daftly, as if she had no idea. She said she only wanted her brother to spend time with her, so why was he being so mean?

Xiang Yi paused her thoughts and furrowed her brows in distress.

She knew she had to coax people, but as for how to coax them…This was a problem.

In the living room, Shi Sui was chatting with Xiang Yu. The two had known each other from way back, and they were talking about games that were of interest to Xiang Yu so the atmosphere was very good.

Only as soon as Xiang Yi entered, Xiang Yu pulled a long face and coldly said, "I'm going to put away my luggage."

He entered a room with familiar ease. However, the netizens in the stream did not notice, thinking the film crew had arranged this in advance.

Bai Ruoruo stepped forward and warmly greeted Shi Sui. "Hello senior Shi, I'm Bai Ruoruo. I had just signed under Xing Chen Entertainment."

Upon hearing that Shi Sui always took care of the company's younger generations, she was unable to pass up such a great advantage.

—[QQQQ seeing Shisui zaizai speak is so enjoyable!]

—[A comparison is enough to show who's got the higher ground. A guest has already arrived and the Vase Fairy can't even manage a fart]

—[Are you guys blind? Do you not see sister Yi bustling away in the kitchen? If she doesn't make lunch, what are you guys gonna eat? The air?]

In the kitchen.

As soon as she touched the ingredients, Xiang Yi's mood instantly calmed down.

Fourth brother liked to eat rice, and they had fresh pork on hand too. She was planning to make braised pork that paired perfectly with rice.

Xiang Yi cleaned the three-layered pork belly and blanched the froth. She then cut them into evenly sized pieces.

The girl's knife skills were not fancy, but her hands were steady; watching her cut vegetables was a p.l.e.a.s.u.r.e in its own.

In cold oil, she stir-fried aniseed, cinnamon, bay leaves, star anise until an aroma could be sensed, and then added rock sugar, dark soy sauce, and light soy sauce.

—[Wait, we're cooking again? I haven't ordered my take-out yet]

—[I'm dieting! Stop right now! Don't you dare make braised pork! /Erkang hands crying]

—[What deeds could have caused one to not forgive such a pretty girl who is so good at cooking! Shi Yingdi and Simao Brother can share her—I just want a bite of this pork!!]

—[Agreed]

—[Agreed +1]

At this time, the netizens still haven't realized something about Xiang Yi's biggest fan base: the foodies and their numbers, acc.u.mulating at an alarming rate…

chapters.title: Chapter 77 - Braised Pork 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 77 - Braised Pork 2

Xiang Yi added hot water to the pot and then some sliced ginger and sliced red dates, and then let the pork belly boil slowly.

This dish will take a while to make, so Xiang Yi guarded the stove, thinking about what delicious food to make her brother.

Hmm… She wanted to make all delicious foods for her brother.

The red braised pork in the pot has an alluring color, and the girl's daydreaming stance was soft and cute. The foodies and the appearance-driven fans were all able to obtain great satisfaction…

Ah Nan hurriedly finished his business matters and rushed to the recording site. .

In the living room, Bai Ruoruo was radiant and glamorous, unsure how she could convince Shi Sui and Smog to play a game with her. The room echoed with her soft and meek laughter.

Meanwhile, Xiang Yi was sitting on a small kitchen stool with ash and dirt on her face. Her hair bun had been messed up when she was chasing the pig around, and flyaway hairs scattered around her ears.

Without comparison, there is no harm.

When Ah Nan saw his sweetie sitting there like Cinderella from the fairytale, he revealed an expression of an old father's heartache!

"Sweetheart, your hair is messed up! Come here, I'll help you fix your hair."

"Oh, okay."

Xiang Yi thought he would just tie it up casually again, but she didn't expect Ah Nan to take her into the bedroom.

The crew had agreed to not film inside the bedrooms, meaning these bedrooms were equivalent to a 'safe area' in video games.

As soon as they entered the room, Ah Nan shut off Xiang Yi's microphone and said in distress "Sweetheart, are you stupid? Look at that little White Lotus—Brother Smog here, Senior Shi there—pretending to be cute. Her schemes are endless! Now look at you. Our sweetheart is a darling goddess, why did they force you to be a kitchen maid? What kind of dumb show is this? Why are they making you cook every day!"

He was so furious that his colorful hair exploded, looking even more wronged than Xiang Yi.

Xiang Yi felt a warmth in her heart. During her transmigration journey throughout different worlds, she had seen all kinds of people whose hearts were constantly changing and unpredictable. Gradually, she grew tired of socializing with these people and appeared to be distant and cold.

However, she deeply valued the ones who were good to her.

Gently, she explained. "I wasn't forced, I really enjoy the process of cooking." The girl took the initiative and removed the rubber band. "Weren't you going to help fix my hair?"

Ah Nan sniffed. "You go take a shower first and blow-dry your hair. I want to dress you so beautifully and let that White Lotus know what it means to be a real flower of the rich earth!"

"My braised pork is still simmering…"

When faced with a glare from Ah Nan, Xiang Yi sighed. "OK, OK, OK. I'll listen to you."

In the living room.

The game had already been played for several rounds.

Her skills were awful, but Smog and Shi Sui did not seem to mind her.

Smog would guard her front side with a gun, jumping around from time to time, suddenly aiming in her direction once in a while.

Shi Sui would always find a small corner and in a low and magnetic voice, gently tell her to hide there.

The audience was well aware, and the live comments went something like this:

—[Hahaha Smog is so annoyed. I can tell so many times he wants to fire his gun at Bai Ruoruo]

—[As expected of Shi Yingdi's acting, who can boast even the most rotten of rice into the most fancy delicacies of humankind. Even his tone when talking to Bai Ruoruo is so calm, telling her to hide and stop dragging the team down]

—[Calm, my *ss. Can you guys please pay attention to his hand? He's touched the pockets of his trousers several times, probably because it's already triggered a smoking addiction]

—[Speaking of which, where did the Vase Fairy go? How long does it take to tie up your hair? Get back to cooking, the red braised pork is ready to be reduced]

As this comment floated past, the door to Xiang Yi's door swung open.

chapters.title: Chapter 78 - Braised Pork 3
chapters.body:
Chapter 78 - Braised Pork 3

Xiang Yu (Smog) had keen senses. Hearing the approaching footsteps, he turned his head. The hand pressing the buttons of his controller suddenly froze.

The sniper in the game became stuck in place, just like that.

Shi Sui followed his gaze and was equally stunned.

Xiang Yi still retained that calm and quiet appearance. The retro black velvet dress was made from a high-quality textile, its square collar surrounded by a circlet of white lace, outlining her slender figure.

The length of the skirt fell just above the knee, revealing a pair of slender and fair-skinned calves. Her ankles were delicate, like a girl who had just stepped out of a manga.

Her long hair appeared soft and fluffy with the ends curled. A low-key, orange and ochre color adorned her eyelids. Ah Nan had schemingly added some sparkles to her lids, giving them a subtle gleam that sparkled like the Milky Way.

Finally was the lipstick.

It was a perfect fusion of ruby red and strawberry red, giving off a crystal clear and watery appeal.

A breathtaking beauty.

After a few seconds of silence, the live comments plastered the screen.

—[What kind of heavenly being is this ahh!!]

—[I can definitely get behind this sister's looks! I really can!]

—[That's not a vase, she's obviously an escaped Disney princess okay!!]

Perceiving her older brother's gaze, Xiang Yi subconsciously revealed an obedient and soft smile.

Xiang Yu snapped back into reality and turned away with a stern face, only to find that his sniper in the game had been killed and sent back to the resurrection point. Immediately, his face went dark.

Even uglier than him was Bai Ruoruo's expression.

She was supposed to follow a fresh and natural route, with the draft contract published by her company finally giving her the once-in-a-century opportunity to dress in a young and fresh look.

Xiang Yi's natural complexion did not differentiate from her too much.

However, if Xiang Yi were to dress up just a little, Xiang Yi would destroy her to pieces in an instant!

Bai Ruoruo was full of resentment. Why can't Xiang Yi just go without makeup? Why does she have to wear makeup to show off?

Scheming b*tch!

"How pretty." Shi Sui pushed down his gold-framed glasses as his lips twitched slightly. "Little sister, your beauty has killed me? Is that how the saying goes?"

A large wave of live comments saying [Ahh AH AH AH AH AH Shisui, you can't compliment her] appeared.

Xiang Yi calmly accepted his compliments. "Thanks." She looked at her indifferent fourth brother and pressed her lips. "The braised pork belly is almost ready, is there anything else you guys wanted to eat?

Xiang Yu spoke coldly. "I'm not hungry."

Bai Ruoruo also said delicately. "I'm dieting right now. I have to control my calories, so I can't eat any carbs."

The atmosphere became temporarily stagnant.

"How about a fresh broiled shrimp? We can fix Xiao Naofu's lunch as well." Shi Sui stood up. "I'll help you."

His one sentence subtly helped Xiang Yi get out of the situation.

Xiang Yi: "Sorry to trouble you, Senior."

Shi Sui: "You're too polite."

Their conversation was like one between two old friends, familiar, and… worthy of envy. A strong air of hostility formed in Xiang Yu's eyes as Xiang Yi passed by him. Haughtily and inexplicably, he said, "This outfit is so ugly."

Xiang Yi stopped in her steps.

Her small and fair hands helplessly pulled at the hem of her skirt.

She didn't care what other people said.

She was looking at Xiang Yu, her eyes clear and gentle, as if she wouldn't be angered by anything he said.

After a few seconds of silence, the girl picked up Xiao Naofu from the side, who had been sprawled on the floor. "He's in a bad mood, can you coax him a little?" She whispered.

Xiao Naofu: ?

Suddenly, a soft, fluffy creamy kitten was shoved into the arms of a ruthless and indifferent esports god.

And so, man and cat faced each other.

Xiang Yu almost choked and held his breath.

… God*mmit, how can there be a cat this cute on this planet?!!!

chapters.title: Chapter 79 - Braised Pork 4
chapters.body:
Chapter 79 - Braised Pork 4

Seeing her brother's eyes light up despite the stiffness of his posture, Xiang Yi's lips curled up slightly.

Her brother had been a talented pretender since he was young, but he can only deceive others, not her.

He was an unwavering plush addict.

Before, Xiang Feng's favorite hobby was going to the claw machines and picking up plushies. When he returned with them, he would feign a cool demeanor and give them to Xiang Yi, as if he had grabbed them for his little sister and not because he liked them.

But now, a very much alive, real, and adorable fluffy kitten was in his hands. She didn't believe that Xiang Yu could resist such temptation!

In her heart, Xiang Yi silently exclaimed, 'Xiao Naofu, it's now up to you.'

Xiang Yi and Shi Sui went to the kitchen, leaving Xiang Yu and Bai Ruoruo in the living room.

Bai Ruoruo inched closer to Xiang Yu and pretentiously said,"This little kitty is so pretty."

The Xiao Naofu today was no longer the dirty kitten Xiang Feng had picked up from the streets.

Its white fur was fluffy and soft, and its eyes a beautiful shade of icy blue. A red bow had been tied around its neck (Xiang Yi had told it that this was a tiger's favorite thing) as it was staring at Xiang Yu with its head c.o.c.ked to the side.

'This is the stupid woman's older brother?'

'He doesn't seem very bright.'

For the sake of his luxurious seafood meal, he nudged Xiang Yu with his head, acting coy like a small baby.

The man seemed as if he had been electrocuted, retracting his hands as his pupils dilated.

From the outside, it seemed cruel and ruthless to the extreme, radiating the message of 'keep away' from head to toe.

The inner thoughts that others couldn't have seen, however, were—

'IT IT IT IT'S SO SOFT!!!'

Xiao Naofu had seen through him a long time ago as it approached him on stubby short legs. This time, it nudged his abdomen. The cat's ears rubbed against his white T-shirt, revealing the looming lines of his abdominal muscles. As if it had been wronged, it began to cry. "Meow wuuwuu~~"

Xiang Yu: …!!

'IT IT IT IT CAN MAKE SOUNDS!!!'

—[I'm about to be smitten to death by Xiao Naofu. Simao Brother, you better pet him! PET HIM!]

—[My goodness, in this day and age, even a green tea cat can snuggle up to abs. I'm salty, so salty]

—[Bai Ruoruo has an extremely marvelous expression. Her face is basically saying, "Am I really less attractive than this cat?" Hahahahha lmao this f*cking variety show is too funny]

Seeing Xiang Yu unmoved by the encounter, Xiao Naofu felt its fighting spirit ignite.

'Hmph. There isn't a human on this earth that this Huhu cannot handle!'

He squatted his small bum and rolled over on the spot, revealing a white, soft, and round belly. Its claws faced upwards in the air, revealing four small and pink paw pads. Its pure blue pupils stared pitifully at Xiang Yu as it flicked its fluffy tail to wrap around the man's finger…

Whoosh—

Something snapped in Xiang Yi's brain.

He nudged his fingertips and scratched the cat's chin tentatively.

"Meow~" Xiao Naofu purred softly, clinging onto Xiang Yu with its little paws.

Xiang Yu hesitated. Does the kitty…want a huggy?

"Meow meow meow!" The cat cried urgently, as if it were rushing him.

Xiang Yu's last string of reason finally broke, and he carefully picked up the cat. Xiao Naofu cleverly rubbed against his neck, choosing a comfortable position to lie down while still in his arms. He then revealed a very compassionate expression.

'Dumb human, you may start pampering this Huhu meow!'

Inside the kitchen.

The braised pork had been simmering for an hour to fully absorb the broth. Xiang Yi turned the heat to high, ready to stir and reduce the soup. Soon, the thick sauce coated every piece of pork belly. The delicious aroma of the sugary, thick, and red-colored sauce could be smelled through the screen.

chapters.title: Chapter 80 - Who Can Resist This!
chapters.body:
Chapter 80 - Who Can Resist This!

A wooden spatula scooped out distinct pieces of braised pork, highlighting the triple layered pork belly as it jiggled on the plate like jello.

Sprinkling on a handful of scallions, this rather time-consuming braised pork belly was finally complete.

On the other side, Shi Sui's fresh broiled shrimp was ready as well.

Xiang Yi gave him a big thumbs up in approval.

She had demonstrated how to thread shrimp only once, and Shi Sui had picked it up very quickly. Each individual shrimp had been cleanly processed and cooked to a beautiful shade of red.

He had also peeled a bowl of shrimp for Xiao Naofu during the process.

Xiang Yu sighed in her mind. 'Zaizai is both smart and diligent!'

Two meat dishes, one stir-fried seasonal veggie, and a pot of Shanghainese bean sprout soup had been prepared. They were all simple home-cooked dishes, but everything looked very appetizing.

Lunch was once again to commence in the pavilion.

Bai Ruoruo had just sat down when she smelled the fragrant scent. Quietly, she swallowed after dieting for so long.

How can Xiang Yi's cooking smell so good?

She could… just eat this one meal and lose weight later.

Bai Ruoruo picked up her chopsticks and was about to clamp a piece of meat when suddenly, a white china plate appeared before her.

A small piece of chicken b.r.e.a.s.t, two broiled shrimps, and a small plate of broccoli and tomato had been arranged neatly on the plate. But compared to the sumptuous meal of three meats and one soup, it seemed suddenly dull and tasteless.

Shi Sui smiled. "Weren't you dieting? Xiang Yi prepared this specially for you."

Bai Ruoruo now understood what it felt like to be bitter but unable to speak. She forced out a smile and said, "Thanks."

—[Hahaha how dumb, your fault for saying you wanted to lose weight]

—[The Vase Fairy is so cruel, making the White Lotus watch but not letting her eat]

—[Braised pork compared with plain boiled chicken b.r.e.a.s.t… That is actually 10,000 pts of damage]

Some netizens became supporters as well. [Xiang Yi is so considerate, she remembers everything other people say. I really love this kind of silent and gentle character!]

Xiang Yu's handsome face was stretched taut, his chopsticks not moving for a long time.

"Brother…" Xiang Yi changed her wording as soon as she uttered the syllable. "Smog, would you like to try some braised pork?"

She pushed the plate towards him.

This action contained the very cautious intention to please.

Xiang Yu's gaze was cold as he stared at her for a few seconds, as if he were piercing the girl's vain appearance.

"I don't like it," he said indifferently, picking up a shrimp and slowly began to peel it.

The fingers known as the 'Hands of God' had distinct knuckles, with nails trimmed flat. His wrists were empty too; it seems the red prayer bracelet she had gifted him had long since been lost.

Xiang Yi's eyes dropped as she instantly lost her appetite.

A barrage of jokes emerged in the live comments.

—[Welcome to the Vase Fairy's self-humiliation show]

—[Does she really think her cooking is unparalleled in this world? Why does everyone have to like your cooking?]

—[The scheme of locking down a man by locking down his stomach is really outdated. The Vase Fairy's abilities in seducing men is at the level of an elementary school student]

"Meow~" a milky cry from the kitten caught everyone's attention.

Xiao Naofu had jumped into Xiang Yi's arms at some point, rubbing against her pale little hands. There were several red burn marks on the back of her hands that looked to be quite painful.

Xiang Yu frowned. 'She's so stupid; how could she burn herself from cooking?!'

Xiao Naofu lightly leapt onto the dining table and headed in the direction of Xiang Yu. It stretched out its chubby paws and pushed the dish towards Xiang Yu. Tilting its head, it softly w.h.i.n.ed: "Meow wuu, meow wuu~"

Xiang Yu: "…."

F*ck, who can resist this!!!

chapters.title: Chapter 81 - Is This My Little Sister?
chapters.body:
Chapter 81 - Is This My Little Sister?

The live comments:

—[F*ck, is Xiao Naofu a god??]

—[Ah ah ah how can it be so cute! Little kitty, what color of burlap bag do you like?]

—[Smog you better eat two bowls of rice at least!!]

"Xiao Yu, Xiao Naofu is persuading you, too. Try a piece," Shi Sui warmly said.

Xiang Yu had a good relationship with him, and he respected Shi Sui as well. As long as Xiao Naofu's cuteness was there, he pursed his lips. He finally grabbed his chopsticks and picked up a piece of braised pork.

When the red and shiny meat touched the tip of his tongue, the exquisite taste grabbed his taste buds domineeringly. The sticky sauce was sweet, salty and perfectly delicious, enveloping the tender, triple-layered pork belly. First, he tasted the crispy skin, then the rich fat that was delicious but not greasy, then the lean meat that tasted sweet and al dente…

It was so delicious his hair almost exploded.

Xiang Yu looked toward Xiang Yi in shock. The girl's gaze was lowered, while her raven black eyelashes formed shadows that danced around her porcelain face. She'd had none of the meat dishes at all, with only two small pieces of vegetables in her bowl as she prodded at them.

'Is… is this his little sister?'

Xiang Yu wasn't sure, but he felt emotional.

He tightened his grasp on his chopsticks as he pinched a few stalks of green vegetables.

'Yes…This is the taste.'

Their uncle loved to eat sweets, so his little sister would always use oyster sauce and sugar to create a sweet taste when cooking vegetables. This taste was unique in the entire world only to her.

Xiang Yu's mind was uncontrollably flooded with how he had treated Xiang Yi when he entered the door…

The vein on his temple twitched as his hands trembled. The chopsticks fell to the ground.

Everyone at the table shifted their gaze toward him.

Xiang Yu squeezed out the words from between his teeth: "….I need to go to the bathroom."

He walked off with large strides, appearing to be fleeing from behind.

Xiang Yi reluctantly ate a few bites but couldn't eat anymore. She put down her chopsticks. "Senior, you guys continue. I don't feel well and want to rest for a while in my room."

Shi Sui carefully observed her expression. Without changing his expression, he calmly picked up Xiao Naofu, who was still stuffing its face with shrimp, and shoved it into the girl's arms.

"Give Xiao Naofu some milk, hm?"

"Okay."

XIao Naofu was dumbfounded. 'Stinky man! This Huhu is not done eating its shrimp!!'

Meanwhile, Xiang Yu was still in the bathroom, splashing his face with cold water for a long time before returning to the pavilion.

But Xiang Yi was already gone.

The broken strands of hair on his forehead were dripping with water, his amber eyes filling with confusion and anxiousness.

Did he piss his sister off…

What should he do now?

All three people in the pavilion seemed to be listless, and the morning broadcast time was almost up. Li Jianyu gestured to the audience and temporarily turned off the equipment.

"Seniors, can we restart the broadcast at three in the afternoon?" Li Jianyu asked.

"Two Under One Roof" had a relatively casual schedule since Li Jianyu didn't want the guests to be too confined. After all, it was supposed to be a relaxing, lifestyle type show, so there was no need to make it into a competitive format.

Bai Ruoruo initially wanted to target Smog, but seeing his ghostly and depressed demeanor, she decided to give up. Suddenly, she thought of something as her heart began to thump wildly as she looked toward Shi Sui—

Who was currently smoking under a lush green gardenia tree. He was tall, had a great head-to-shoulder ratio, and had a naturally lazy and casual temperament. His side profile was smooth and suave, and his emotions were delicately imprinted in the space between his brows. Yet, he always looked to be passionate and seductive because of his peach blossom eyes.

Bai Ruoruo gritted her teeth and approached him, revealing a pretentious and innocent smile.

"Senior, it's so hot, I feel like I'm going to have a heat stroke, my c.h.e.s.t is so tight…"

chapters.title: Chapter 82 - Garbage
chapters.body:
Chapter 82 - Garbage

Shi Sui's tone was lazy, with no intention of putting out his cigarette. Lazily, he said, "The medicine cabinet in the living room has Huoxiang Zhengqi water."

…That's it?

Bai Ruoruo's expression was slightly stiff.

He didn't even glance at the slim figure she was so proud of!

Obediently, she said, "Thanks, senior." She bit her lower lip and blinked innocently like a pure White Lotus. "Senior, can I call you Sui Gege?"

Through the lingering smoke, Shi Sui looked at her with narrow and deep eyes behind gold-framed glasses. He revealed a smile devoid of warmth.

Bai Ruoruo's heart trembled, not daring to meet his eyes. She evasively looked toward the gardenia tree and forced a smile. "Sorry if I overstepped. Senior, please forgive me and take care of me. I just think you look kind of like my brother…"

As for whether she really has an older brother or not… Isn't it all based on her word of mouth?

Shi Sui nonchalantly responded. "Really."

He continued to puff on his cigarette, but perhaps because there was no camera, Bai Ruoruo felt that his demeanor was much colder. He did not seem that easy to talk to all of a sudden.

However, she didn't want to give up such a precious opportunity. If she couldn't hang onto him, she would never have a chance to see Shi Sui again.

Thinking of this, Bai Ruoruo hardened her heart as she made up her mind to use the old trick of seducing Xiao yang.

She folded a gardenia flower and sniffed it, like an innocent girl who knew nothing of the world. "Senior, this flower smells so good, you try…"

The two were originally separated by a certain distance, but at this moment, Bai Ruoruo leaned forward, almost touching Shi Sui's sleeve.

From afar, it seemed like she was the one who had stepped into Shi Sui's embrace.

Seeing the distance between them getting smaller and smaller, and Shi Sui showing no signs of moving, Bai Ruoruo felt her heartbeat increase. Could he be hesitating with his inner self?

After all, she was very confident about the appearance of her face.

Her beauty wasn't as lethal as Xiang Yi's, but she had a face that men liked, and she was good at pleasing them too. Shi Sui wasn't interested in Xiang Yi, but with her, that might not be the case…

"Cheh." A chuckle sounded in her ear that was low and deep, and it was sultry enough to make one's ears itch.

Bai Ruoruo raised her head, looking at him with bright eyes, only to meet a pair of dark eyes as deep as an endless pool.

Shi Sui had inexplicably taken off his glasses. He was still handsome, but his temperament had changed.

Especially those peach blossom eyes, which had seemed so passionate when he smiled, and so unsympathetic when he didn't.

Indifferent, sharp, and dangerous.

Bai Ruoruo suddenly understood why he always wore glasses.

Without the obstruction of the lenses, only few people could handle the man's strong aura.

"Do you know whose flower you just plucked?"

Bai Ruoruo was stunned. She suppressed her heart palpitations and smiled dryly. "I hear this is Xiang Yi's house. It's just one flower, she probably won't mind…"

Shi Sui was still smiling, but his gaze was ice cold. "I mind."

The Little Bunny has watched her things very closely since she was a child. She didn't allow anyone who wasn't a close individual to even touch the plushies Xiang Yu had gifted her.

Bai Ruoruo didn't expect Shi Sui to confront her over a single flower, Her eyes quickly turned red. "Senior, do you hate me that much… I don't know when I offended Senior, or if Xiang Yi had said something to you… I only see you as an older brother, and I wanted to get closer to you, is all…"

"Closer?" The smoke enveloped the man's gaze as his indifferent voice rang out. "Who gave you the impression that I would touch any garbage that comes my way?"

chapters.title: Chapter 83 - Simao Brother'S Live Stream Face Slapping 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 83 - Simao Brother'S Live Stream Face Slapping 1

Li Jianyu came out looking for Shi Sui only to bump into a Bai Ruoruo who was crying and running away. Confused, he asked: "What happened, Daddy Shi? Why did you make the little girl cry?"

Shi Sui lowered his head and found his cigarette pack. He knocked out a cigarette and said in a lazy tone, "I don't know."

"…" Li Jianyu felt the corners of his mouth twitch. "Bad mood? You are being way too cruel aren't you…"

Shi Sui's cigarette addiction was well known to the industry. Apparently, it was because of a habit left from filming "Rainy Night". The tone of the movie was gloomy and wet, and it was filmed during the humid rainy season. The character he played smoked throughout the entire film.

Afterwards, it became too difficult to quit, plus Shi Sui didn't seem to have any plans to quit smoking either.

Shi Sui stuck the cigarette in his mouth, his eyes narrowing. "Something wrong?"

Li Jianyu was usually aloof, but when it came to discussing work, he was serious. "I have analyzed the live broadcast data over the last few days, and our momentum is really good. It seems Xiang Yi's cooking is very popular, and during mealtimes, we get lots of views and new fans from the foodies searching for a mukbang. I also have some ideas I wanted to discuss with you…"

The two talked for about ten minutes. Shi Sui didn't have much to say, but the advice he did give was sharp and straight to the point. Li Jianyu felt like he had suddenly been enlightened and was ready to go back to talk with the rest of the crew.

Only, he couldn't help but fuel the gossip before he left. "Daddy Shi, do you feel that mentor Xiang Yi treats Smog… Uhm you know, a bit special!"

Shi Sui looked at him with shifty eyes. "Are you out of work to do?"

"I'm being serious, does mentor Xiang Yi like this type of little brother? She took good care of Yan Nai as well." Li Jianyu scratched his head. "To be honest, it would be a good thing if she were to be in a relationship with a gege. I can be counted as half a matchmaker, but I think the netizens right now seem to be resistant to her behavior, saying she's trying too hard to please Smog…"

Shi Sui spat out a smoke ring. "You're overthinking. When you invited the guests, do you not bother to check their last names?"

"Smog was arranged to come here by Xing Chen streaming platform, so I didn't notice his real name…"

Li Jianyu pulled out his phone to do a quick search as he spoke. His eyes widened instantly. "Xiang Yu? Xiang Yi? These two… are relatives? Wait no, why does Smog have such a bad attitude toward Xiang Yi then…"

"Figure it out yourself."

"Hey, hey, daddy Shi, don't leave. F*ck, so what if your legs are long!"

In the bedroom.

With Xiao Naofu there to dispense cuteness and act coquettishly, Xiang Yi's depressed mood did not last long.

She took a siesta and saw Xiao Naofu sleeping on the pillow next to her when she woke up. The little buddy's feet were up in the air, and its tail curled around her wrist as it snored away.

Xiang Yi felt her heart turn into mush. For a system, it should have received a better place to go, yet it chose this world, mostly because of her.

"Tonight, I'll cook you something yummy," she whispered. She squeezed its chubby paws and said, "From now on, I'll make you yummy food everyday."

Different from the peaceful atmosphere where Xiang Yi was, Xiang Yu felt as if he were sitting on pins and needles as he paced back and forth outside of Xiang Yi's room.

In the last year, his sister's behavior had been so abnormal that even amnesia wasn't an excuse to explain it.

Xiang Yu soon had a vague guess—his sister's body had been occupied by someone else.

But he couldn't be sure, so he could only feign indifference.

Until today, Xiang Yu was finally able to confirm that his sister had returned!

But now she's angry…

Xiang Yu squatted outside her door, head and ears drooping like an abandoned puppy.

'Will my sister really ignore me forever…'

chapters.title: Chapter 84 - Simao Brother'S Live Stream Face Slapping 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 84 - Simao Brother'S Live Stream Face Slapping 2

After thinking over several possibilities, Xiang Yu finally mustered the courage to knock on Xiang Yi's door.

He was going to explain everything clearly to his sister!

"Creak—" The door was suddenly opened from the inside.

Xiang Yi was holding Xiao Naofu, looking at Xiang Yu with a puzzled expression.

Her brother's burden of maintaining his image still haunted him. Xiang Yu immediately retracted his hand with a calm expression on his face. With a feigned fierceness, he said, "Are you a pig? Why do you need to nap for so long?"

As soon as he said the words, he regretted it. He wanted to salvage the situation, but when he opened his mouth, his mind only acc.u.mulated an array of swears and not a single word used to coax people.

Xiang Yi took a deep breath and shoved Xiao Naofu into his arms before leaving.

Since her brother hated her so much, she… probably shouldn't show up around him for now.

Xiang Yu stood in place as he stared at her disappearing silhouette in a daze.

He sighed and raised Xiao Naofu to his face. "What do I do? I think I made her angry."

Xiao Naofu maintained a noble and cold composure. 'What a dumb human. Did you just realize how overboard you've been acting?'

"I didn't mean to…" Xiang Yu's voice was low, but it was evidently frustrated and very irritable. "I thought she wasn't my sister, so that's why I… But she's really my little sister, so how do I coax her…"

'Huh?'

'It seems like the stupid woman's brother is somewhat intelligent.'

Just like how Xiang Yi had taken care of Xiao Naofu, it also wanted Xiang Yi to be happy. The cat waved its small paws and tapped Xiang Yu's left c.h.e.s.t.

'Mhmm. The signal was obvious enough.'

When it came to family, each member should treat each other sincerely and trade heart for heart.

The next second—

Xiang Yu suddenly revealed a shocked expression as if he'd just made a life-changing discovery He took out a cardholder from his shirt pocket with one hand and excitedly declared, "Say, if I give my sister a set of max-level god equipment in this game alongside a max-level boss sword, will she be happy?"

Xiao Naofu: "…"

"No, no, how can one sword be enough? My little sister must have the best. I'll give her a complete set of equipment!" Xiang Yu said passionately.

Xiao Naofu: "…"

'So this kid has a bit of IQ, but how can his EQ be lower than that of a Huhu!!!'

Xiang Yi picked a handful of loquat fruits, washing them before peeling and pitting the fruits. She then put them in a clean glass bowl.

She has always been a patient person, whether it came to studying or performing trivial tasks, as she never got bored of it.

After peeling the fruits, she was subconsciously going to bring it to her brother, but thinking of his attitude toward her just now…

Perhaps he would rather eat the loquat pits than the fruits that she had peeled.

Xiang Yi laughed to herself. Through the full span window, she saw Shi Sui in the sunroom full of flowers. He was probably reading over a script, carefully contemplating the text with a serious expression on his face, seeming even more handsome and stunning.

'Zaizai is so hardworking.'

Xiang Yi made a pot of floral tea and brought it over with the loquat fruit.

Inside the flower-filled sunroom.

The more he smoked, the more he became addicted. Shi Sui ignited another cigarette as he skimmed through the lines on his page.

He had an excellent memory and could remember all the lines after reading them just once. Yet, he had an inexplicable feeling that he wouldn't be able to act it out.

Hearing the sound of footsteps, he raised his eyebrows. Seeing that the person approaching was Xiang Yi, his first reaction was to put out the cigarette.

The girl dressed in the vintage black velvet dress strode into the sea of gorgeous flowers like a nobleman's daughter in medieval Europe.

"Sorry to disturb you, Senior." Xiang Yi put down the tray, her clear eyes falling on Shi Sui's cigarette pack. Shi Sui felt an inexplicable guilt from her gaze and cleared his throat. "Actually, I don't smoke all that much…"

Only two packs a day occasionally….

Only two. ●ε●

chapters.title: Chapter 85 - Don'T Be Corrupted By Me
chapters.body:
Chapter 85 - Don'T Be Corrupted By Me

Xiang Yi smiled and said nothing. Aside from her family, she wasn't going to interfere too much with other people's lives. This was basic courtesy when it came to interacting with others.

Shi Sui had guessed her intentions and felt his heart drop.

She really didn't care that much about him.

The loquat fruit tasted very sweet. Unsure if it was a psychological effect, but he felt his throat was more moisturized after swallowing it.

Xiang Yi originally planned to leave after delivering the fruits, but a rebellious notion suddenly surfaced.

She pursed her lips and softly said, "Senior…"

"Hm?"

"Can I have a cigarette please?" Xiang Yi carefully asked.

Shi Sui frowned. "You're just a child, you have no business smoking."

Xiang Yi retorted, "I'm an a.d.u.l.t, I can take responsibility for my own actions."

The girl looked at him with round eyes as she put up a slim finger. "Just one, please?"

…Was she trying to be playfully affectionate?

Shi Sui's throat rolled as he threw the cigarette box at her.

Xiang Yi evidently had never smoked before and was purely acting out of curiosity. After holding it in her mouth for several seconds, she finally realized… Cigarettes don't spontaneously ignite 🙂

"Senior, do you… have a light…"—er.

Before she could finish, the man had leaned over quickly with pale fingers and distinct joints.

"Click."

The flames flickered and bloomed.

Xiang "rebellious girl" Yi was stunned.

'Zaizai is… lighting a cigarette for her???'

The man's handsome face was dangerously close. Below his sharp chin, the collar of his shirt had been rustled into a slight mess by his own hands, revealing clear his clavicle and a distinct Adam's apple.

He raised his brows. "You don't want it?"

Xiang Yi was fl.u.s.tered. "Of course I do, I do."

Although the dialogue was a bit strange, Xiang Yi did not think too much of it. After the cigarette was lit, she carefully tasted the flavor. Due to occupational habits, she began to comment: "It's a bit bitter and astringent. I'm not sure how it would taste if you were to add tobacco to soup…"

It would probably turn into black stir-fry.

Shi Sui leaned back in his chair and looked at her with a faint smile, like a young master indulging his own kid in an evil deed.

But not long after, he was unable to smile.

After taking only a few puffs, Xiang Yi was coughing up earth-shattering mouthfuls of smoke as her eyes filled with moisture. They were as red as vermillion cinnabar.

She refused to give up as she tried to continue, but the cigarette in her hand was snatched away by a man's hand.

"You can try it out, but no more smoking. After all, this thing's not great to smoke anyway."

The girl's expressions seemed suddenly conflicted, as if she were saying: Senior, you're in no position to be criticizing me…

A certain actor's internal tolerance level was very high as his expression and heart rate did not change. "Come, have some tea."

"Ok…"

Xiang Yi held onto her glass as she sipped on the scented floral tea when suddenly, she heard a "thump" in her ear. She turned her head to see Shi Sui tossing his cigarette pack in the garbage can.

His expression was still thin and weary as his throat moved slightly.

"I'm quitting smoking." Shi Sui sighed with a helpless but gentle expression, "So a child won't be corrupted by me. "

chapters.title: Chapter 86 - Building A Swing 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 86 - Building A Swing 1

Thump, thump.

Her heartbeat suddenly sped up double time.

What a strange feeling.

Xiang Yi batted her eyes. Just like how she did not persuade Shi Sui to stop smoking, she didn't comment on his ambition to quit either. She politely smiled and glanced over at the script on the table. The booklet was spotlessly clean, but the edges of the pages had been worn out from frequent use.

"Senior, are you in a film?"

"Debating if I should take it or not."

"Hm?" Xiang Yi was curious. "Is there a problem with the script?"

"The script is great, it's my problem. This role… I don't believe I can play it well."

Xiang Yi was surprised at this answer.

Zaizai had several best leading actor awards under his belt; how could there be a film where he can't perform?

Seeing her confused expression, Shi Sui's thin lips twitched slightly. "There are too many emotional scenes."

Don't mention having his first kiss on screen; he was a man who's never even had a first hug on screen, or a first hand-holding on screen.

"I see." Xiang Yi did not press on. She had her own safety zone when it came to socializing with others. If she didn't want others to pry into her life, she wouldn't inquire about their privacy either. "Oh right, I'm going to install a swing. When it's done, Senior can come and try it out!"

Shi Sui: "Okay, I'll cheer you on."

"I'm going back to change." Soon after she spoke, the girl left in a light and quick manner.

Shi Sui stared at her back as she disappeared out of sight, still unable to look away.

In his head, Director Yan's words played, persuading him: If you want to get good at emotional scenes, it's very simple. Fall in love a few times, and you'll get the hang of it.

Fall in love… Shi Sui rubbed his forehead, feeling a headache approaching.

…

Xiang Yi changed back into casual clothing with her hair tied up into two buns, then she happily walked toward the swing set with great interest.

Several fans were squatting in the stream. Seeing the screen change, the comment section became lively once again.

—[Sister Yi looks so cute in pigtail buns!]

—[They're installing a swing? That's so hardcore!]
