—[Wow! I see Smog entering the lens, he's looking really mean!]

—[Simao Brother is approaching the Vase Fairy. Even through the screen, I can feel his murderous intent!]

…

At the same time.

At the villa inside the Bamboo Forest, the "Heartbeat" stream was playing a game of Werewolf. As soon as the viewer count increased a bit, Director Chen received the report from his assistant: the viewer count for "Two Under One Roof' was rapidly rising.

"The number of viewers have dropped again…" After all, the audience for variety shows were mainly young people, and information can be disseminated and exchanged very quickly.

Whenever there is a stir in the air, they will rush to the front of the crowd to see what's happening.

Director Chen was about to vomit blood. He snatched the tablet and took a look. The camera suddenly panned to Smog as he ran toward Xiang Yi, snatching the planks from her hand. Grumply, he cursed, "Do you know what the hell you're doing!"

The girl was taken aback by the howling. Whispering, she said: "Building a swing."

"Why are you installing this sh*t!!"

Xiang Yi helplessly pulled at the corners of her shirt as if she had been wronged. "You said you wanted to build one…"

The comment section began saying all kinds of things.

—[Σ(°△°|||)︴ Goodness gracious, Smog really does have a hot temper…]

—[I'm about to throw up from the Vase Fairy's acting. How dare she act cute in front of Smog? Are you worthy?]

— [Fight, fight, fight! I love this kind of intense drama!!]

Director Chen's eyes lit up. Once Smog dropped a few more swear words, the stream of "Two Under One Roof" will be banned!

chapters.title: Chapter 87 - Building A Swing 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 87 - Building A Swing 2

Ban, ban, ban! Hurry up and ban them!

Once they're banned, "Heartbeat" will get all their traffic!

It's just that all he heard was the angry roar of a certain esports god through his Bluetooth headset. "Put it down! Are a girl's hands supposed to be used for such rough jobs?!"

The netizens in the stream: ???

Director Chen, who was waiting for him to explode: ???

Did he hear properly? What did Smog just say??

It wasn't just the netizens, but the employees on set as well.

Xiang Yi was confused as she held onto the rope, hesitating whether to put it down.

Xiang Yu reached out and grabbed the rope in her hand, a mean look on his face. "This kind of thing is a man's job! Leave it to me!"

The chat:

— [I suggest that everyone release their shock on the public screen]

— [Surprised! I didn't know Smog was so manly!]

— [He's… kind of suave? I feel like a domineering male classmate is in love with me]

— [Simao Brother, wake up! Your hands aren't meant for doing rough work like that!!!]

…

Xiang Yu had superior hands-on abilities as he picked up the saw and began to measure the pieces.

As a child, he had always loved making handicrafts; Xiang Yi believed that building a swing set would simply be child's play for him. Tentatively, she asked, "Th… Then let's build it together?"

Xiang Yu shifted his eyes at her. "I'll give you a task."

"Huh?" Xiang Yi's eyes lit up, full of anticipation.

Xiang Yu: "Do you see that little stool? Bring it over."

The girl happily trotted over to bring the stool until she heard Xiang Yu speak. "Okay, you can sit right there, next to me. Building a swing is easy, just wait. Wait, you're too close, sit farther, three meters… no, five meters away!"

Netizens: ???

Director Chen: ???

— [Wait, what? Can someone explain to me what's going on??]

— [Doesn't Simao Brother hate the Vase Fairy? Why is he helping her install a swing? This goes against logic!]

— [Gege, your hands are used for holding the sniper rifle in-game, not for holding a woodworking saw!]

The audience produced an array of question marks.

Xiang Yu picked up the saw and began to cut the planks.

Sitting on the stool, Xiang Yi's senses gradually recovered.

Her brother's attitude… seems to have changed.

She batted her eyes and tested the waters. With a smile, she handed him a pair of gloves. "Put these on. Otherwise, your hand will hurt if you get a splinter."

"Who wants to wear this thing? It makes it difficult to work." These words came out of his mouth, but Xiang Yu still put on the gloves with a mean and uninviting expression. However, a row of text rippled in his tender heart like a wave:

'My~sister~acknowledged~me~~~~'

Bai Ruoruo had been late as she was fixing her makeup. As a result, she found Smog already working away, while Xiang Yi was unexpectedly sitting next to him doing nothing.

She felt an unbearable disdain in her heart. This girl really was useless; Smog must hate this kind of lazy woman to death!

"Smog, I'll help you." Bai Ruoruo gently said, "It looks like you're having a hard time by yourself."

A chain of hahaha floated through the live comments. [White Lotus showtime is here]

Xiang Yu looked up, took a quick look at her, then coldly said, "Then you can climb the tree and tie this rope."

Bai Ruoruo: ???

"C… Climb the tree?" She looked horrified.

How could he make a girl do such a thing? Was he a hardcore iron man*?

"You can't even climb a tree?" The young esports god's face was veiled in disgust. "Nevermind, go away. You're blocking my way."

Bai Ruoruo: "…"

* Translator's Note: The direct translation for the term used would be "iron straight man". This usually refers to guys who are very direct, straightforward, ins.e.n.s.i.t.i.v.e, and headstrong; has bad taste and fashion and is sometimes associated with male chauvinism. Essentially, it refers to a guy who does not understand how to interact with women.

chapters.title: Chapter 88 - Are You Even A Human?!
chapters.body:
Chapter 88 - Are You Even A Human?!

Bai Ruoruo felt so wronged, as if she had suffered something unbearable and wasn't able to say it.

She was a girl! A GIRL!

Shouldn't normal people just ask her to bring a towel or some water or something?

Who would have thought that Smog would make her climb a tree?!

What kind of girl would know how to do that!!

Xiang Yi raised her small hands. "I can, I know how!"

Xiang Yu's face was expressionless. "You don't know how."

Xiang Yi was fl.u.s.tered. "I really can! I'm really, really fast at climbing too!"

Xiang Yu exclaimed fiercely: "No, you really can't!"

"…"

The netizens in the broadcast room were rolling with laughter.

—[Hahaha the double standards of an esports legend]

—[Simao Brother toward sister Yi: Sit and don't move. Simao Brother toward Bai Ruoruo: Go climb that tree.]

—[Smog, if you're going to be such a straight man, you're never going to find a girlfriend, you know!]

—[Bai Ruoruo's expression is killing me. When a white lotus meets an iron man, what else can happen!]

—[Does Smog like the Vase Fairy? His arrogant yet indulgent attitude is kind of cute]

…

Soon, Shi Sui also came over.

He really did not have the slightest care regarding his personal image as he sauntered down to help Xiang Yu assemble the swing.

Xiang Yu was amazingly fast at climbing the tree, and Shi Sui fell into a bewildered silence standing underneath him.

Climbing trees wasn't a godsend talent of the Xiang family, right…

In the past, Xiang Feng had climbed the jujube tree outside the company in his suit and tie because he wanted to eat the fruit…

Xiang Yi was eager to try it out. "Let me test it to see if it works."

Xiang Yu immediately turned her down. "No!"

"Why not…"

Xiang Yu coughed and turned away uncomfortably. "Why are you being mischievous? It's too dangerous."

Xiang Yi excitedly pinched the hollow of her palm.

Her brother's attitude had really changed!

The girl's clear eyes seemed to have been glossed over with shining stars as she slowly burst into a grin that was sweet and soft. It was completely different from the polite and courteous smile she gave to outsiders.

Shi Sui immediately fell into a trance.

A ridiculous thought had appeared in his mind: if she could smile so sweetly because of him, that would be great…

But—

When it came to seduction, she refused to believe that she would lose to Xiang Yi!

"How about I test it? I'm pretty light, so even if I fall it doesn't matter." Bai Ruoruo volunteered as she stepped forward, thinking that if she were to deliberately fall, Smog would definitely catch her!

When that happens, she would make a move while in his arms…'Iron men are still men', and she refused to believe she couldn't secure him!

Bai Ruoruo's eyes seemed like it was overflowing with a confident smile.

Xiang Yu nodded. "Then you test it out."

Bai Ruoruo gracefully perched on the swing, only to realize that Smog was looking at Shi Sui, and Shi Sui was looking back at him with an innocent expression.

"Brother Shi, you help her."

"Ah Xiao Yu, it should probably be you."

"I just climbed a tree; my hands feel powerless."

"My old bones can't compare to you young folk."

"…"

Bai Ruoruo helplessly watched as the two kept on rejecting and declining. None of them were willing to help her hold down the swing set!

The live comments: [kekeke Shi Yingdi and Smog really have a strong d.e.s.i.r.e to survive. They'll do anything to avoid suspicion]

In the end, it was Xiang Yi who had come over to help.

As she began to swing, Xiang Yu suddenly approached Bai Ruoruo's side. He turned off both of their microphones and threatened her in a low voice. "If you're going to fall, fall toward the ground. You better not hit her! Do you understand?"

Bai Ruoruo: ???

This was no longer a question of being an iron man or not. 'Are you even a human!'

She looked toward Shi Sui with tears in her eyes. The man had a faint smile on his face, but his eyes were as cold as ice.

Bai Ruoruo's expression turned black. She absolutely never thought her white lotus skills wouldn't even have a stage to be displayed!

chapters.title: Chapter 89 - Landlord'S Lunatic Son
chapters.body:
Chapter 89 - Landlord'S Lunatic Son

…

Shi Sui and Xiang Yu's handiwork had no issues. The swing was very sturdy, and Bai Ruoruo had no chance of falling off.

More importantly, she was very much sure that even if she really did fall, nobody was going to help her…

After confirming that the swing was safe, Xiang Yu allowed his sister to play with it. With an arrogant and cold expression, he helped her push the swing.

"Higher, higher!" With her older brother there, Xiang Yi became overwhelmingly courageous.

"Why do you need to go so high? Are you trying to go to heaven?" He berated in a murmur, but his arms increased their strength.

Shi Sui guarded her on the other side, a gentle expression between his brows. "Be careful not to fall."

Bai Ruoruo: "…"

She wanted to laugh, but nothing came out.

Complexmood.jpg

When she was swinging just now, they hadn't said a word!

Now with Xiang Yi, they were acting all considerate!

Could it be that… Xiang Yi had told them bad things about her?!

Thinking of this possibility, Bai Ruoruo gritted her teeth in hatred. While the cameramen weren't looking, she secretly took out her phone and sent several messages to Xiao Yang.

…

After accompanying his sister at the swing, Xiang Yu immediately went to chop firewood. Xiang Yi continued to circle around him like a bee, bringing tea, pouring water, and passing towels while fixing some flowers and plants nearby. From time to time, she would smile at her brother.

Xiang Yu's lips curled, even though he said somewhat disdainfully: "You're laughing like an idiot."

The live comments:

—[Why do I feel like this scene is so warm…]

—[Is this the legendary CP feel? If you look at their features closely, don't they look very compatible?]

—[Simao brother, you're obviously smiling from ear to ear. You're laughing like a landlord's lunatic son, okay!]

…

Bai Ruoruo recalled the information Xang Yang had given her before as she approached Xiang Yi's side. In a very contrived and pretentious manner, she exaggeratedly praised her flowers and shrubs before casually mentioning, "Big sister Xiang Yi, what did you study in university?"

Xiang Yi glanced at her and responded lightly. "Agriculture."

"Oh, really?" Bai Ruoruo covered her mouth in surprise. "No wonder you love planting flowers so much, turns out that you're a professional in this task!"

Xiang Yi replied in a nonchalant manner as she thought about what to cook for her brother for dinner.

Four dishes were too little, how about six? Would eight be more auspicious?

'Zaizai is so skinny, too; he needs to replenish his body by eating a good meal.'

The speaker had other intentions, and so did the listener.

As Bai Ruoruo expected, the rhythm of the live broadcast room was:

—[Agriculture? What did she learn? Farming??]

—[I can't be a fan. I suddenly feel like Xiang Yi is super tacky…]

—[Excuse me?? All the ladies and daughters of moguls study jewelry design or financial management or something, but the Vase Fairy actually studied agriculture? How lowly oh my god]

Bai Ruoruo intentionally left enough time for gossip to ferment before asking her with an innocent expression. "Sister Xiang Yi, you're only twenty, so you probably didn't finish college, right? Did you drop out?"

Xiang Yi, who had finished rounding out the topiary of a marguerite into a perfect sphere shape, responded casually: "I graduated."

Bai Ruoruo sneered in her heart. Xiang Yi entered the entertainment industry at the age of nineteen last year, so she could only be in sophomore year at most. How dare she be so callous as to say she had already graduated! Was she not afraid of getting roasted by netizens until she trended online?!

The comments were just as Bai Ruoruo had anticipated:

—[The Vase Fairy must have been urged by her university to withdraw and only has a high school level education]

—[As we all know, the grades required for agriculture school are surprisingly low. Most students can get in with their low scores, then they'd just transfer to the major they liked. I reckon that the Vase Fairy hasn't taken the college entrance examination.]

—[Tsk tsk, her family actually supports her wanting to be a farmer. She's obviously a nouveau riche with the mentality of peasants scared of not having food to eat. This is too funny]

…

chapters.title: Chapter 90 - Under 700
chapters.body:
Chapter 90 - Under 700

Bai Ruoruo had succeeded in setting the rhythm, the corners of her mouth curling slightly. Suddenly, a gloomy voice sounded behind her. "So thoughtful about other people. What school did you graduate from?"

Meeting Smog's squinting eyes, a look of panic flashed across Bai Ruoruo's face. "I… I…"

"What? You can't say?"

Bai Ruoruo stiffly said, "I got scouted by an agent to be a trainee when I was in high school…"

"Chieh." Xiang Yu laughed unceremoniously.

The live comments:

— [Eh? So Bai Ruoruo only has a high school education?]

— [Emm, we really shouldn't harbor any high expectations toward celebrities in the entertainment industry]

— [To be honest, Smog is kind of inconsiderate. With a question like that, Bai Ruoruo won't be able to respond]

— [To be fair, for celebrities that debut early, some of whom were child stars, it makes sense that they wouldn't be that well-educated. They can just rely on their faces to eat.]

— [In comparison, our Shi Yingdi is really badass! He's one of the few top students in the entertainment industry. He was the top scorer in his province during the entrance exams and was even admitted into Peking University. Unfortunately, he still ended up dropping out Q_Q]

…

Bai Ruoruo felt exposed in public, and she was so uncomfortable her heart was bleeding.

Now, everyone watching knew that she didn't even finish high school…

She tried to redirect the attention back to Xiang Yi, facing her with an expression of admiration and envy. "I'm so jealous of you, sister Xiang Yi. You debuted last year, right? Graduating college at the age of nineteen… How amazing!"

Xiang Yi: "…It's alright. I'm the oldest in our family to graduate from university."

Big brother, second brother, and third brother were just a few of the geniuses in the family, so to speak. Fourth brother, Xiang Yu, had finished college overseas at the age of seventeen before returning to compete in esports.

Even the most untalented one, Xiang Feng, had graduated with a business administration degree at the age of eighteen.

Growing up alongside these masters and gods, Xiang Yi's point of reference had been different from ordinary people, thinking that she was a very ordinary vessel.

Who knew that because of her one sentence, the audience in the stream began another round of mockery.

— [Don't act all high and mighty just because you have a degree in farming. How much nonsense can you spew? It's really true that the richer people are, the bolder they get]

— [The Vase Fairy's bullsh*tting skills are getting more natural. Her acting skills should be able to land her a grand slam acting title already. She's talking as if it really happened]

— [Heh. Ordinary people go to grade school at age 7 and graduate from high school at 18, so they should be in freshman year when they are 19. I have a bold thought… The Vase Fairy might have graduated from university and had changed her age before debuting in the entertainment industry!]

— [Holy f*ck, the person above me, what you just said makes a lot of sense. I'm guessing the Vase Fairy is in her mid-twenties but is still pretending to be tender and pure with her pigtails. How gross]

All kinds of cryptic thoughts began to appear in the livestream. Aside from those who hated Xiang Yi, there was also the navy that the "Heartbeat" program group had bought. The public opinion began trending in the direction of an obvious one-sidedness.

Bai Ruoruo was still not satisfied and added more fuel to the fire. "Senior Shi, you were the top-scoring student in the college entrance exam. I remember your final score was over 700! Sister Xiang Yi, can I ask how you scored in the exam?"

Xiang Yi: "Me? I think it was under 700." It's been too long, and she couldn't remember anything aside from the vague notion that it was nearly 700 points.

The live comments:

— [Hahaha the Vase Fairy is so good at bullsh*tting. The title Queen of Bullsh*tting is hers!]

— [I've learned something new. Last time, I scored 400-ish in my mock test; from now on, I'll just say it was under 700, too!]

— [Come, come, come! Let's place our bets. I bet fifty cents that the Vase Fairy never even placed above the second-tier line. I remember the standard in Nancheng for a tier two university was 300 points or so]

As the comment section's carnival was about to begin, Shi Sui's clear and gentle voice pierced the air. Clear and distinct, he conveyed through the microphone:

"If I recall correctly, you scored 699 points, right?"

This instantly shut down the lively comment section into deadly silence.

chapters.title: Chapter 91 - The Vase Fairy Is His Sister?
chapters.body:
Chapter 91 - The Vase Fairy Is His Sister?

Li Jianyu, the cameramen, and the staff were all taken aback.

Mentor Xiang Yi had scored 699 in the college entrance exam?!!

Xiang Yu, who was one second too late to speak out before Shi Sui: "…"

'Ah, ah, ah, I'm so angry!' He remembered his sister's score! This kind of face-slapping thing should have been done by him, the big brother!

He's obviously trying to steal my food! (╯‵□′)╯︵┻━┻

Bai Ruoruo's face had turned ghostly white as she dryly smiled. "Senior Shi, you're joking right…"

"What do you think?" Shi Sui lazily pushed his gold-framed glasses. His eyes were thin as he stared at her with a feigned smile.

A field of question marks once again surfaced in the live chat:

— [699 points? Wasn't 750 the perfect score??]

— [Is Shi Yingdi trying to protect the Vase Fairy?]

— [I'm speechless. Shi Sui is actually willing to lie for a woman like this]

…

Bai Ruoruo had been thoroughly fl.u.s.tered by Shi Sui's gaze and spoke with a little stutter. "Se…Senior, how do you know this?"

Shi Sui responded indifferently. "Our families are mutual benefactors, isn't it normal to know this? Besides, college examination scores cannot be faked. Unless, you think I'm lying?"

With a few words, he had rendered Bai Ruoruo speechless.

It was normal that he would know.

But quite unexpected that he would remember.

'It turns out Zaizai is not only smart and hardworking but very attentive, too!'

Xiang Yu anxiously scratched at his ears and face, almost blurting out, 'Brother Shi, please shut up. You have to give me a chance to behave!'

He had been so rude to his sister before; he had to compensate somehow.

Blessed by his soul, he dug out a cherished video from his phone, bragging as he flaunted it to Bai Ruoruo. "Look, my sister's interview video!"

It was an interview with the Nancheng TV station with an impressive caption: 15-year old girl prodigy scores 699 on entrance exams.

The interview had been compressed several times to fit mobile viewing, but the resolution was enough to recognize that Xiang Yi was indeed the one being interviewed.

At the time, the girl still had some baby fat on her cheeks and wore her hair in ponytails, looking ridiculously adorable.

The reporter: "Today is the score ranking day. We interviewed a 15-year old passer-by, but we didn't expect she scored an incredible 699 points on her exam! Your family must be very happy you scored so high, right?"

The girl's voice sounded nasal and slightly aggrieved. "My second brother says I am too dumb. When he was 15, he was almost finished writing his doctoral dissertation for medical school."

"…" The reporter went speechless for a few seconds but still maintained a good, professional air and continued asking, "Wow, it seems like your brother is very outstanding. You're a science student, so what kind of learning experiences do you want to share with everyone?"

"Read everything twice, and go through the questions, 'tis all."

The reporter: ???

"What if you don't understand after reading it twice?"

"Don't understand?" The little girl c.o.c.ked her head. Gently, she replied: "Then… read it one more time?"

The reporter: Fakesmile.jpg

She took a big mouthful of the milk tea she was holding and said with a depressing tone as she chewed on the tapioca pearls: "My brother only needs to read it once. When I read through my books twice, they all laugh at me."

The reporter: Continuousfakesmile.jpg

"Alright, thank you for sharing with us. Let us interview the next passer-by student!"

…

Bai Ruoruo's eyes widened. She only wanted to alter the rhythm to get Xiang Yi flamed for a while, but she didn't expect Xiang Yi to have such an outstanding score in the college entrance exam!

An earthquake was shaking up the entire chat room once again.

— [I'm dead. 15-year-old sister Yi is way! Too! Sweet!]

— [The reporter's expression is my expression right now. The world of a top student is really out of reach /smile]

— [Wait, did Smog just say my sister? The Vase Fairy is his little sister? How is this possible?!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 92 - A Man'S Pride Is Larger Than A Sky
chapters.body:
Chapter 92 - A Man'S Pride Is Larger Than A Sky

—[No way… It's probably just a nickname. Smog is a few months older than Xiang Yi; it makes sense to call her his sister]

—[F*ck! I just did a search. Guess what Simao brother's real name is? Xiang Yu! He's got the same last name as the Vase Fairy!]

—[Hahaha you guys keep calling her the Vase Fairy, I didn't even realize what her real name was]

…

On set, Bai Ruoruo didn't even think to relate Smog and Xiang Yi in the direction of siblings.

But she could feel that Shi Sui and Smog's protection of Xiang Yi was quite overwhelming, and she dared not meddle with them any longer. She would carefully finish the rest of filming.

Li Jianyu cued everyone on set. "Mentors, do you guys have any arrangements for the afternoon?"

The production crew often assigned tasks to other variety shows, but "Two Under One Roof" did not go in that direction and only had a general direction. As for the trivial tasks, the highest degree of freedom had been given.

Simply put: The guests could do whatever they wanted to do. And if they didn't want to work, they could lie down and chat through the day.

Bai Ruoruo had been thirsting after the flower greenhouse for a while now. She thought that if she was filmed there, the outcome would be particularly good.

In order to please Xiao Yang, she had specially attended an etiquette class.

If she could eat some cakes and have afternoon tea in the greenhouse, she would look very elegant.

Before she could say anything, Xiang Yu asked Xiang Yi: "Uhm… Where are we going now?"

His tone sounded a little uncomfortable. Just now, he had blurted out "my sister" on a whim, but now he couldn't call her sister anymore.

…After all, she hadn't called him big brother yet.

A man's pride is larger than the sky, whoever submits first loses!

Shi Sui looked toward Xiang Yi with a gentle expression. If Bai Ruouo hadn't seen the dangerous, no-nonsense version of him with his glasses off, she would have felt the same as the audience in thinking he was well tempered and easygoing.

Xiang Yi: "I'm planning to go to Little Rabbit Farm and help Uncle Wang spray some pesticides."

Xiang Yu blurted without thinking, "I'll go with you!"

Shi Sui smiled lightly. "Sounds interesting."

Bai Ruoruo was ready to gag blood. Spray pesticides?!

Just the sound of it was so dirty and tacky! It will be rejected by the netizens for sure!

But to stay in front of the camera, she couldn't stay put alone. She could only fake a happy expression. "I'm coming, I'm coming too!"

…

The cameramen followed the guests they were assigned to, finding a lot of different but vivid perspectives to broadcast to the audience.

The crop land was basically dominated by machinery, complete with mechanical planters, harvesters and so on. AI robots were used in the warehouses, which was particularly convenient for taking inventory, pick up, and delivery.

Wang Shunli approached to deliver the remote as Xiang Yi thanked him in a low voice.

Bai Ruoruo was cursing Xiang Yi endlessly in her heart. On such a hot day, she would get tanned!

She had signed up for a variety show, not for farm work!

Thinking of the scenes in TV shows where farmers carried a spray bottle on their back to distribute the pesticides, Bai Ruoruo was wholly upset. With a fake expression of submissiveness, she weakly said, "Sister Xiang Yi, where's the spray bottle?"

"…There's no need."

"What do you mean no need! I mean, the kind of bottle where you can spray pesticides out. How can you apply it otherwise!" Bai Ruoruo was delighted, thinking she had caught Xiang Yi in a rut. "Sister Xiang Yi, didn't you study agriculture? How could you not know this?"

Xiang Yi looked at her with a complex expression for a few seconds before pressing a button on the remote control.

Buzz buzz buzz—

Bai Ruoruo: "…"

chapters.title: Chapter 93 - The Source Of Happiness
chapters.body:
Chapter 93 - The Source Of Happiness

The netizens: ???

— [Holy f*ck, is this high-tech farming?!]

— [This is a Baifumei's pay-to-win game /vicissitudesoflife.jpg]

— [Mother of god, this drone costs around 30,000 RMB. Our family owns some farmland but have always been reluctant to spend so much… Jealous]

— [Hahaha Bai Ruoruo is my source of happiness today. It's so funny to see her acting up just to get shut down!]

The drone propelled itself to a suitable height under Xiang Yi's controls.

"You want to try?" Xiang Yi looked toward her brother.

Xiang Yu felt his hands itch for it and picked up another remote control.

Xiang Yi taught him how to use it in a low voice with their heads basically touching, revealing a sense of familiarity and intimacy.

Bai Ruoruo's eyes were red with jealousy as she pushed her way toward them. "Sister Xiang, I'm so ignorant and inexperienced, why don't you teach me too."

Xiang Yi had no feelings toward her, but she maintained a basic social etiquette as she patiently explained the basics of operation to Bai Ruoruo.

Shi Sui grabbed a cattail at random and nonchalantly began to tease Xiao Naofu.

"Meow meow meow!" Xiao Naofu leaped around. Each time it was about to reach it, the cat tail would rise a bit higher, angering the small cat to the point that its hairs were on end. The soft pink and white paws ended up 'tapping' on Shi Sui's calf.

The man chuckled and picked up the irritated cat into his arms and tossed the cat tail for it to play with.

Xiao Naofu grunted, turning its head to ignore him.

Shi Sui scratched its chin, warmly saying, "Be good, hmm?"

Xiao Naofu decided it would be the generous one and began to smack the cat tail around compassionately with its little paws.

— [The Vase Fairy is poisonous, she's neglecting my Shisui Zaizai again!]

— [Ahhhh why is this man so sultry even when playing with a cat!!]

— [Eeee~ This tsundere kitty has the best life. I also want to be hugged and coaxed by Shi Yingdi Q_Q]

— [Anyone want to team up and steal the cat? A milky and sweet cat that can bark like a dog; stealing it would be a win!!]

Soon, another drone populated the air.

Xiang Yu had been successful in his operations.

"Wow, that's amazing." Xiang Yi's eyebrows formed into curves.

""(ˉ▽￣～) Cheh~~ what's so difficult about it? This is way easier than playing video games." Yuyu of the Xiang family boasted in what he thought was a cold and pretentious manner.

But as everyone knew, he was just a stinky and imm.a.t.u.r.e boy.

The live comments: [Simao brother is such a child hahaha. He was obviously nervous just now, but as soon as the drone had taken off, his ego did too]

Bao Ruoruo saw that the two had easily completed the drone operations and assumed it was easy. She hadn't been listening to Xiang Yi very carefully just now as her drone remained in place, unmoving.

Suddenly, an idea came to her as she brushed up to Xiang Yu and meekly asked, "Smog, can you teach me?"

Although Xiang Yu had an explosive temper, he wasn't the type to be tipped off without reason. Out of politeness, he went over the instructions with Bai Ruoruo again.

But she still couldn't grasp it.

Her eyes welled up in tears. "Sorry, sorry! Smog, am I too dumb?"

It had become habitual for Bai Ruoruo to show her weakness. Before, when she displayed a pitiful and teary-eyed expression, people would comfort her with nice words no matter if they were a guy or a girl.

She didn't expect—

Xiang Yu nodded and spoke the most iron man-esque words in the cosmos:

"So you know you're dumb?? Not bad, very self aware."

Bai Ruoruo:???

'Are you complimenting me or roasting me??'

A unanimous chain of text bombarded the live comments: [Hahahahaha]

chapters.title: Chapter 94 - A Country Based In Agriculture 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 94 - A Country Based In Agriculture 1

—[I finally know what the ultimate nemesis for a White Lotus is: come everyone repeat after me: Iron, straight, men!]

—[Bai Ruoruo, ditch the acting route and become a comedian; I think you have great potential hahaha]

—[This tag is wrong, right? What do you mean lifestyle show, this is pure comedy!]

—[Agreed. Aside from comedy, they should also add a cuisine tag!]

—[My loves, did you forget about the romance, flesh, lonely man and woman tag? Dogeface.jpg]

The comment section was a sea of joy, but the Bai Ruoruo in reality wanted to cry.

She had it so hard. So, so hard.

She had simply wanted to chase some clout and step on Xiang Yi on autopilot, but she didn't think the game would suddenly change to hard mode!

Thinking carefully, the source of all her shame was Shi Sui and Smog turning her into a target.

Xiang Yi definitely did something to them!

Bai Ruoruo despised her to death in her heart, tears streaming down her face as she turned to Xiang Yi. "Sister Xiang Yi, there's something I don't know if I should say or not…"

Xiang Yu: "If it's nothing appropriate, maybe it's better if you don't say it."

Bai Ruoruo: "…"

Xiang Yi was focused on spraying pesticides and didn't catch what she was saying very clearly. She turned her small face: "Hm? What did you say?"

Bai Ruoruo organized her thoughts and weakly said, "Sister Xiang Yi, it's so cool for you to be using high-tech farming equipment like this… but you must know, farmers in real life don't have this kind of equipment."

"I don't mean anything else, I just… I just feel that this is too ungrounded, and there is no way to promote it. Instead of wasting financial, material, and human resources like this, it's better to just directly give funding to the farmers…"

Hearing this, Xiang Yu and Shi Sui glanced at each other.

Both of them saw a complicated and indescribable emotion in the other's eyes…

But several people watching the stream supported Bai Ruoruo's provocative remarks.

—[That's true, this is so wasteful]

—[How many farmers are still bent down in the fields with their backs to the sky, the Vase Fairy really is saying to let them eat cake!]

— [Either way, I hate the Vase Fairy's fake superiority complex. So what if you have money? Without money, what is she? Can she still farm without all that mechanized equipment?]

Of course, several people expressed confusion as well.

—[What the hell, guilt tripping already? Why don't you donate then]

— [Oh please, even if there's no method to promote this kind of agricultural method, Yi mei is spending her own money. Clubbing, bar hopping, and buying luxury items are acceptable hobbies, so why can't Yi mei spend her own money on high-tech farming as a hobby??]

Li Jianyu's heart was in his throat as he frantically gestured to Shi Sui to find a way to save the scene.

If it had been someone anyone else, there wouldn't be this much controversy.

But the impression that Xiang Yi had left until now was extremely ….emmm

If it were a regular person who had made a small mistake, most people would be tolerant and forgive them.

But it was different for the celebrities. Their every move and every action will be magnified. Xiang Yi, in particular, can be vilified by the entire internet community…. To exaggerate, even if she were only swallowing her saliva, it would be extremely unforgivable in the eyes of many people.

Shi Sui squeezed Xiao Naofu's cheeks, which angered the cat to the point of gnawing on his hands. His slender fingertips were covered in cat saliva, yet the man was not stirred at all. He was still elegant and graceful as he avoided the camera and mouthed to Li Jianyu:

"Trust her."

*Translator's Note: a way to describe someone being nosy

chapters.title: Chapter 95 - A Country Based In Agriculture 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 95 - A Country Based In Agriculture 2

Li Jianyu was going crazy.

'What kind of chicken soup for the soul are you brewing this time, Daddy Shi? Mentor Xiang Yi is a Shabaitian, how could she deal with a girl like Bai Ruoruo!'

If he had only known ahead of time, he wouldn't have agreed for Bai Ruoruo to attend the variety show.

At this time, Li Jianyu did not realize that his impression toward Xiang Yi had completely flipped in just a few days… He even started to feel slightly biased towards her.

Under the magnifying glass of everyone's attention, Xiang Yi remained calm as she batted her long, feathery eyelashes. "That does make sense."

Bai Ruoruo was delighted. 'Hahaha keep pretending!'

'You've face-planted anyway!'

But the next second, Xiang Yi could be heard slowly saying, "But you might have misunderstood something. The significance of Little Rabbit Farm, aside from harvesting and selling agricultural produce, is also its cooperation with the crop breeding research facility in Nancheng. Their purpose is to explore various environments, farming tools, and different production techniques to collect seed planting data."

Bai Ruoruo didn't understand a word of what she was saying as she continued to raise the bar: "But nowhere else has such good equipment, and they can't afford it either! Besides, how can ordinary people distinguish between excellent seeds? They don't understand this kind of luxurious thing…"

Bai Ruoruo trailed off as she felt something was wrong.

It was too quiet.

She went stiff as she realized that Shi Sui and Xiang Yu had no intention of participating in the conversation.

It was like…

Disdain.

An intangible panic swept through Bai Ruoruo's body.

Could it be that she was getting something wrong?

The girl's gentle and reassuring tone spread to her ears. "Little Rabbit Farm is only one part of the experimental data. Excellent crop harvest will be compared with data from the mountains, plains, deserts, and other places with different soil and climate conditions.

The country is one based in agriculture, so planting naturally comes first. Only by cultivating excellent seeds can it truly benefit farmers. High-quality seeds can be planted in large quantities before being put on the market, so even in harsh environments and without advanced tools, high yields and harvests can still be achieved."

—[Although I can barely understand what she's saying, I somehow feel that the Vase Fairy… No, the Little Vase is very charismatic…]

—[So they are collaborating with a research facility. Yi Mei's response is so good, QQQQ it's so reasonable, gentle, and appropriate]

— [I am shook… This is the power of knowledge. No wonder she scored 699 in her college entrance exams; her logic is really clear!]

— [As someone in a similar industry, the girl isn't playing around. In fact, mechanization and the application of drones is a big trend, but there's way too little experimental data available to reference inside China. Perhaps the research done at Little Rabbit Farm will be part of the butterfly effect in future agricultural practices in China!]

The trajectory of the comments changed rapidly as several people changed their perspective of Xiang Yi.

Too many people have stereotyped negative impressions of her, so many just followed the trend to hate her. The change was far from certain, but…

Everyone felt quite comfortable with the girl.

On set, Bai Ruoruo's expression was about to collapse as she forced a laugh. "So that's how it is… Sister Xiang Yi, you know so much. I must learn from you in the future."

After forcing a few more courteous words, she left the scene with the excuse of going to the bathroom.

"Bitch! Bitch!!!!" Bai Ruoruo opened the faucet and cursed in a low voice.

After venting her anger, she left the washroom to see Xiao Naofu chasing a butterfly nearby. Her eyes flashed with anger as she fiercely kicked the little cat!

Xiao Naofu, who had zero defense against humans, was kicked upright, falling several steps down the cobblestone steps with a 'duang'. The cat was deformed from the fall.

chapters.title: Chapter 96 - White Lotus Cat
chapters.body:
Chapter 96 - White Lotus Cat

The cat's icy blue eyes stared widely, looking dazed.

As a cute and new System, it was lucky enough to meet Xiang Yi as its host.

Xiang Yi was undoubtedly the perfect aid to efficiently transmigrate through the universe. They were able to get the highest scores and best rewards each time, which would also mean being able to upgrade after every mission.

It can be said that Xiao Naofu had not experienced many sinister sides of human nature and had the mental capacity of a kindergarten student of about two or three years old.

"Meow meow!" Even that stinky Shi Sui did not dare bully him like this!

It was furious.

Bai Ruoruo looked around to confirm there were no cameramen and coldly smiled. "Keep crying, it's no use even if you tear out your throat!"

Xiao Naofu furiously leapt over to scratch her.

Bai Ruoruo was not able to dodge in time, and claw marks appeared on her calf. She gritted her teeth. "How dare an ugly cat scratch me… You're just like your owner!"

Xiao Naofu: "Meow meow meow!"

How dare she, how dare she call such a handsome Huhu ugly!

But what was even more infuriating was that she dared curse Xiang Yi!

Only it could bully that stupid woman! Nobody else was allowed!

Thus…

Xiao Naofu showed her on the spot what a kung fu Huhu was. 🙂

Bai Ruoruo didn't expect this cat's combat power to be so fierce as she screamed, hurrying to a place where there were more people.

Seeing Xiang Yi and the others, Bai Ruoruo felt as if she had just escaped from the dead.

"Wuuwuuu…" Bai Ruoruo sobbed as she ran over, capturing the attention of everyone present.

Several cameras also pointed to her.

"Why are you crying? Did you get assaulted?" Xiang Yu said irritably. He had been spreading pesticides with his little sister, so he wasn't very happy to be disrupted by Bai Ruoruo.

Bai Ruoruo grabbed at the hems of her skirt as she timidly glanced at Xiang Yi before quickly shifting her gaze, trying to cover up but making it worse in the end.

Xiang Yi: "…What's wrong?"

Maybe it was because she had watched too much of Zaizai's award-winning acting skills, but looking at Bai Ruoruo now, her acting was almost getting awkward that she's already getting goosebumps.

Bai Ruoruo sniffed. "Sister Xiang Yi, your cat is bullying me! I didn't bother it at all, but it scratched me several times! I…I heard it's a feral cat…"

Her tears fell down like rain. With several evident claw marks on her legs, she was immediately able to arouse the sympathy of many netizens in the livestream.

— [You poor thing, to be scratched like that]

— [That's why you shouldn't take in strays! Who knows what kind of viruses and bacteria they carry]

— [To those who want to steal the cat, so what if it's cute? Can it make mistakes just because it's cute? Can it scratch people just because it's cute? Before Shi Yingdi also gets scratched, this kind of irascible stray cat should be sent to be euthanized immediately!]

Xiang Yi frowned. "Are you sure Xiao Naofu scratched you for absolutely no reason at all?"

Bai Ruoruo was in disbelief. "Are you doubting me?"

Xiang Yi: "I'll take you to treat the wound first. As for everything else, I'll need to check again."

She trusted Xiao Naofu wouldn't actively hurt others without reason.

At this moment, Xiao Naofu approached in an elegant catwalk, tilting its head and looking innocent.

Bai Ruoruo pointed at it. "That's it! It's him!"

Xiao Naofu looked frightened as it tip-tapped to hide behind Xiang Yi. Its milky white paws tapped at Xiang Yi, meowing all the while as if it'd been wronged. "Meow~~!"

As if it's saying: ╰(*°▽°*)╯That lady is so scawy! She scared this Huhu QQ~

Bai Ruoruo felt as if she'd been struck by lightning. She never would have imagined that this cat would be even better at pretending to be pitiful than her!

Is this a White Lotus Cat???!!!

chapters.title: Chapter 97 - Weak, Helpless, And Pitiful
chapters.body:
Chapter 97 - Weak, Helpless, And Pitiful

Bai Ruoruo bit her lips as her eyes flushed and filled with tears that were on the brink of falling down her face, looking truly pitiful. "It's okay… Sister Xiang Yi, it's just a cat, I won't bicker with it…"

Several comments brushed by saying things like [Ruoruo is so kind] and [Poor girl].

"That's enough!" A shout came from Xiang Yu as he picked up Xiao Naofu, softly rubbing its back. "I don't believe that Xiao Naofu would scratch you for no reason! Don't slander it!"

Bai Ruoruo: ???

Seeing someone supporting it, XIao Naofu began to cry out more and more: "Meow~meow meow~~!"

Xiang Yu felt very distressed for the cat's well being.

Look! The poor cat has already been so wronged!

"Little baby, don't be scared, you have me."

The netizens: ???

— [/Shocked/ Smog actually called a cat baby??]

— [Hahaha I'm laughing so hard all the lights within a 10-km radius are flashing for me]

— [Although I feel kind of bad for Bai Ruoruo, I really want to laugh ehehehe]

Bai Ruoruo's tears pitter-pattered down as she really began to cry.

"Why would I lie? Do these injuries not count as proof??"

Xiang Yu hesitated.

Bai Ruoruo's injuries were indeed scratch marks.

"Meowuu~Wuuwuu~~~" The cat whimpered in his arms, its pinkish white paws clawing at Xiang Yu's collar.

Xiang Yu lowered his head and his gaze met Xiao Naofu's watery pair of crystal blue pupils gazing back at him.

…F*ck!

What kind of mistreatment did the poor cat suffer to reveal such an aggrieved expression!

"Okay, since you mentioned evidence, then show me the evidence to prove that it was Xiao Naofu that scratched you."

Bai Ruoruo swallowed. "I was going to the bathroom, and there were no cameras or anyone present…"

"Then you have no proof." Xiang Yu's eyebrows furled in an unruly manner. "Maybe another cat scratched you; the possibilities are endless. Why are you set on blaming Xiao Naofu?"

Bai Ruoruo wanted to speak but was interrupted by Xiang Yu the Cat-keeper's eager counter, "Even if Xiao Naofu really scratched you, it was probably because you provoked it first, and it had no choice but to fight back. After all, it's so weak, helpless, and pitiful. How could it bully you? It seems more likely to me that you were bullying it."

The soft and creamy kitten rubbed its furry head against Xiang Yu's collar bone, nestling in the man's arms. It looked toward Bai Ruoruo with an innocent and naive expression.

As if it was saying: Sister, do you have a problem? Gege only has me in his heart~

Bai Ruoruo: …!!

She nearly threw up blood.

In the past, as long as she pretended to be pitiful, other people would always abide by her. How come everything was going the opposite way today?

Angered beyond reason, Bai Ruoruo was on the verge of breaking down. "It's faking it! It's faking it, can't you guys tell? That cat is a White Lotus, a green tea bitch! How is it pitiful? It's obviously vicious beyond belief!"

The next second —

Xiang Yu covered Xiao Naofu's ears and snapped, "If you have something to say, at least say it properly! What are you scolding it for!!!"

Bai Ruoruo looked as if she had just swallowed a fly.

At this moment, Xiang Yi's quiet and gentle voice rang out.

"There were no cameras, but the farm has surveillance cameras. I can go through it and see what really happened."

What?? Surveillance??

Bai Ruoruo was dumbfounded, wanting to faint on the spot.

chapters.title: Chapter 98 - You Really Don'T See Us As Outsiders, Huh!
chapters.body:
Chapter 98 - You Really Don'T See Us As Outsiders, Huh!

She had calculated that the cat couldn't talk, so she could do whatever she pleased.

But she didn't expect the cat to know how to fight and garner pity. It's actually an acting genius!

She also didn't expect for a dumb farm to have surveillance!

If the netizens were to find out she had been the first one to kick Xiao Naofu…

Bai Ruoruo shuddered as she began to feel afraid.

"Eh… Well, it's actually unnecessary. My injury isn't super serious…" Bai Ruoruo said stiffly.

Seeing her reaction, Xiang Yi could guess there was something strange. The girl's expression didn't change as she stared at her with bright eyes. "Of course we can't do that, this is my farm, and everyone is a guest. How can I let my guests be mistreated?"

Xiang Yu waddled as he held Xiao Naofu as if he was coaxing a baby to sleep and echoed: "Yes! Check the surveillance! Right now!"

Shi Sui lowered his eyelids, a small smile forming in the corner of his eyes.

'The little bunny is pretty smart, hitting the nail right on the head to find the point.'

Bai Ruoruo's face turned pale. How did it end up like this…

The comments in the stream:

— [My god, I can even feel Bai Ruoruo's awkwardness through the screen…]

— [Where are all those people who had pitied her just now? If she weren't guilty, would she react like this?]

— [Two Under One Roof's annual interaction contest between the White Lotus and Green Tea Meow has come to a perfect conclusion. The winner: Xiao Naofu! ]

At the critical moment, it was Li Jianyu who settled the matter. "Bai Ruoruo, are you suffering from a heat stroke? How about we take you back and get you some Huo Xiang Zhengqi water?"

Bai Ruoruo saw the escape route he'd paved out and weakly faced the camera. "My head does feel kind of dizzy…"

Li Jianyu immediately arranged for staff to bring her back.

After streaming the pesticide spraying, everyone else returned home as well.

Xiang Yi took out the cold brewed tea she had prepared earlier from the fridge. The preparation method was very simple: brew the oolong tea in mineral water, then let it chill inside the fridge.

Xiang Yu rapidly gulped down a glass before pouring himself another glass.

"Slow down." Xiang Yi cautioned lightly. "This is quite cold."

Whoosh—

Xiang Yu's ears twitched as he excitedly clenched his glass tighter.

'My sister is worried for me!!!'

However, he insisted on remaining calm and said indifferently: "Women are so naggy."

Xiang Yi: "…"

This childish streak, it was her naïve fourth brother, no doubt.

She checked to see it was almost time for dinner.

"How about boiled fish fillet for dinner?" Xiang Yi asked.

"Doesn't matter."

"And egg fried rice?"

"I already said it doesn't matter." Although that was what he said, , a flower had already bloomed in Xiang Yu's heart.

'Sis~is~so~good~to~me~~~'

"Oh right, how about you, senior Shi?" Xiang Yi was prepared to ask what her Zaizai wanted for dinner.

"Brother Shi? I think he went back to his room."

Xiang Yi didn't think too much of it as she knocked on his door. "Senior, what would you like for dinner?"

Creak —

The door immediately swung open.

Shi Sui must have just finished showering as he was only wearing a pair of black sweatpants. He was drying his hair with a towel in one hand, drops of water slipping down the outline of his throat toward his distinct abdominal muscles and down to the winding mermaid lines on his pelvis…

All at a glance.

Xiang Yi: …! !

The netizens in the stream went crazy.

[Ohoho! Gege, you really don't treat us as outsiders, huh!!!!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 99 - That Waist, Those Abs
chapters.body:
Chapter 99 - That Waist, Those Abs

"A-Ahem…" Xiang Yi coughed from shock as she turned around immediately to cover the camera for Shi Sui. "Uhm, you didn't catch anything, right…"

Li Jianyu couldn't contain his laughter. "We caught it."

"It was just a few seconds, the netizens couldn't have caught it, right?" The girl's eyes closed in despair, feeling distressed. She felt as if she had wronged her Zaizai.

Unknown to the public, the man had been putting on his shirt before opening the door. Hearing her voice, the corners of his lips twitched as he casually tossed the shirt aside.

The comments:

— [Sister Yi, we saw everything. Everything!]

— [Nice job, Little Vase! Keep working hard next time!]

— [I finally understand the charisma of a m.a.t.u.r.e man. Those h.i.p.s, those abs… Oh oh oh, this cannot be compared to any little fresh meat*!]

"Uhm, how about we turn off the stream for now and everyone can take a break." Li Jianyu could see the girl's ears were flushed a blood red and was worried that if they continued, the netizens would talk nonsense again.

Eheh. But daddy Shi's physique really is…

Criminally offensive 🙂

Amid the wailing complaints of the netizens, the stream was turned off.

All the staff went off to take a break as well.

"Senior, my apologies, I didn't do it on purpose…" Xiang Yi lightly explained, nervous to the point of not knowing where to place her hands. One second she was picking at her fingers, and the next second, she was pulling at her shirt. "I just came to ask you what you want to eat…"

"So it's like that." The man languidly drawled out his speech, as if he was laughing lightly. In a deeper tone, he asked, "I can ask for anything I want?"

Xiang Yi: "Mhmm…"

She wanted to compensate him, and upon hearing his request, she wanted to arrange the entire Manchu-han imperial feast for him.

"Then… Bunbun?"

"Eh?!"

Shi Sui smiled deeper as he rattled off a series of dishes. "Spicy rabbit heads? Numb and spicy? Rabbit stew? Can you do it?"

Xiang Yi: "I can make it, but… Senior, didn't you say you can't have spicy food?"

As if pricked by a word, Shi Sui raised his eyebrow. "I can."

"Oh… Then we can do numb and spicy rabbit. We can't eat that much anyway, so I'll make a mild one and a hot one." As she finished, Xiang Yi was eager to head for the kitchen when she felt a large hand hook onto her collar…

Subconsciously she was ready to body slam the person, but once her brain registered that it was Shi Sui, Xiang Yi retracted her hand and turned around in confusion.

Suddenly, she was faced with Shi Sui's mysterious eyes.

The man's hair had been brushed up, revealing a pair of profound eyebrows. He had beautiful peach blossom eyes that were curved inward and tilted outwards, with eyelashes even longer than those of a girl. When he smiled, it looked compassionate and attractive.

Xiang Yi avoided looking below his collarbone as much as possible, but their height difference was quite evident. She was forced to raise her small face upward, and she bit her lips instinctively.

"Your mic fell." Shi Sui's voice was gentle as it mingled in the air almost imperceptibly.

His slender fingertips rearranged Xiang Yi's microphone, carefully organizing the cables.

The distance between them shortened, so much that Xiang Yi could feel the moisture that perspired from his body.

She felt inexplicably stuffy.

She turned her gaze, trying to avoid his eyes. "….Thank you."

"No problem."

"Then I'm going to cook…" Xiang Yi felt it was more polite to speak to him face to face, but she didn't realize Shi Sui had lowered his head. Following her movements, her lips lightly brushed his thin and distinct collarbones.

The girl went stiff.

A messy and unexpected flirtatious air suddenly spread throughout the room.

*Translator's note: 'Little fresh meat' is the term used to describe young or young looking idols who look very 'fresh' and baby like.

chapters.title: Chapter 100 - No Girl Has Ever Kissed Me Before
chapters.body:
Chapter 100 - No Girl Has Ever Kissed Me Before

Xiang Yi's brain was not prepared for this and it went blank; not a sound could be heard.

It took a full ten seconds for her to come around, stumbling back a few steps so quickly that she almost fell.

"S-Sorry." The girl stammered. Although she had traveled through many universes, she had always been in a supporting role. She had never taken the emotional route and had no experience handling these situations. The blush spread from her ears down her slender neck. "I didn't mean to, it it it it was an accident!"

Ah ah ah how could she have kissed??

How could I kiss my Zaizai??

Shi Sui blinked. "Mhmm."

Lazily, he leaned against the wall in a relaxed and leisurely posture, but his expression seemed innocent — when Shi Yingdi played a Sha Bai Tian, he was even more clever and natural than a certain kitten.

Xiang Yi wanted to escape, but just as she was about to slip out…

She saw the man's eyebrows droop, his eyelashes forming faint shadows on his porcelain face. A hint of grievance was present in his voice. "You kissed me."

"This probably can't be considered a kiss…" The girl gulped as she said carefully.

The man pretended not to hear as he faintly complained in a clear and crisp voice. "No girl has ever kissed me before."

"…"

Of course, he had used his acting skills afterward to silence all those who questioned him.

Xiang Yi only thought that his chastity was on screen and that he must have had several relationsh.i.p.s in real life. After all, he was already 27, and it was normal for regular men to have several relationsh.i.p.s by that age.

She suddenly felt a sense of guilt…

"I…I…" Xiang Yi stuttered for a long time but still ended up apologizing. "Sorry…"

The man lifted his head as his thin lips formed a reluctant curve. "It's nothing, you don't need to worry about it. This is an accident, and I'm also in the wrong."

The more he spoke, the more Xiang Yi blamed herself.

How could she not take it to heart!

She kissed Zaizai's collarbone!

'Where did Zaizai go wrong? He did nothing wrong! It's all my fault!!'

"Senior, if you want to eat anything in the future, just tell me and I'll make it for you!"

Shi Sui looked down at her with a gentle and naive gaze. "Really? Does this count as… compensation?"

"Nonsense, it's what I should be doing." Xiang Yi smiled dryly. "Then I'm going to cook."

This time, Shi Sui didn't pull her back but stared at the back of her slender figure. As she entered the kitchen, the corners of his mouth twitched.

It was quite fun to play with children.

…

Inside the kitchen.

Xiang Yi was preparing the ingredients.

Nimbly, she sliced the fish in a neat manner before removing the bones. The cut pieces were crystal clear and full of moisture.

"Where's Xiang Yi? Where is she?? I want to see her! Right now, this instant!"

Xiang Yi frowned slightly as she wiped her hands and walked out of the kitchen.

The living room was a mess.

Xiao Yang was wearing a formal suit with his shiny hair combed back, probably returning from a fancy banquet. In all fairness, his features were handsome and had the air of a rich family's heir when dressed like so.

Seeing Xiang Yi, Xiao Yang finally shut his babbling mouth as his gaze straightened.

This woman looked as if she had undergone plastic surgery; she was way too pretty…

Maybe… Since he couldn't help it, he should get back together with her?

chapters.title: Chapter 101 - What If I Don'T Apologize?
chapters.body:
Chapter 101 - What If I Don'T Apologize?

Thinking back to the delicious food Xiang Yi had cooked up during the livestream, then looking at her face which was beautiful even without makeup, Xiao Yang felt his heart begin to shift.

Bai Ruoruo came out of her room when she heard the movement. Seeing Xiao Yang look so obsessively at Xiang Yi, she chuckled in her heart as she quickly stepped forward and took his arm. Softly, she called out, "Xiao Yang gege…"

Only then did Xiao Yang recover as he coughed. "Ruoruo, I heard you were injured, so I came to see you."

"Gege, you're so busy, yet you still have time to see me. Isn't that too tiring?" Bai Ruoruo said softly, knowing Xiao Yang ate this up the most.

But today, Xiao Yang did not seem to indulge her as usual and looked toward Xiang Yi. "Come here, I have something to say to you!"

Xiang Yi raised her eyebrows. "Was the money from last time not enough?"

If she didn't mention it, he would have been okay, but Xiao Yang suddenly remembered the two million from that day.

This woman was simply humiliating him!

"Who cares about your stinking money!" Xiao Yang roared.

"Who the f*ck do you think you're talking to? Say that one more time." The moment Xiang Yu opened his mouth, the air of a rogue bandit emanated from him.

Xiao Yang didn't know his relationship with Xiang Yi and said with a sense of superiority, "I'm talking to my girlfriend, get lost!"

Bai Ruoruo quietly added, "His ex-girlfriend…"

Shi Sui squinted his eyes from his position on the couch.

Xiang Yi could guess what he was thinking: what kind of poor taste do you have to find such a sc.u.m for a boyfriend???

She was slightly embarrassed. Although the boyfriend had been courted by the one who had occupied her body, the one who had to bear the consequences would still be her.

She sighed. "What do you want to say? Just say it."

Xiao Yang: "Apologize to Ruoruo! Your cat bullied her, you're bullying her, I'm here to support her!"

A question mark undetectably formed over Xiang Yi's head.

For a while, she couldn't decide who was more brainless: him or the person who had occupied her body.

She really couldn't tell who was the bigger sc.u.mbag.

After several transmigrational journeys, Xiang Yi was not going to get worked up over such a little thing. Lazily, she sat on the sofa with her arms folded and slender legs crossed. Lightly, she tsked. "Ok, let's talk about how I mistreated her."

Xiao Yang was speechless for a while and suddenly felt that her sitting posture looked like…

He was obviously into the delicate white flower type, but when he saw Xiang Yi's face, he felt his heart throb.

Slowing down, he felt bold and confident. "Don't think I don't know, you're only jealous that I'm with Ruoruo, so you're targeting her on purpose. You embarrassed her in front of so many people during the livestream, which equaled slapping me in the face. You must sincerely apologize for that…"

Xiang Yi placed her elbows on the armrest, a hand cupping her cheek with one hand. Her eyebrows bent slightly. "And if I don't apologize?"

The girl's bright smile was more gorgeous than the sea of flowers outside the French windows.

Xiao Yang felt fireworks go off in his heart, and they continued to explode nonstop. Gulping, he said in a cowardly manner: "If you don't apologize, it…It's fine too. I feel like you didn't do it intentionally anyway."

Bai Ruoruo: ???

She had called Xiao Yang over to settle her accounts with Xiang Yi. Based on Xiang Yi's previous personality, she definitely would have lost her temper. The more trouble she caused, the more Xiao Yang despised her.

But today, Xiang Yi had been so arrogant, so why did Xiao Yang seem like he had been head over heels smitten?

Did this woman enrol in some vixen seductress course??!!

chapters.title: Chapter 102 - The Tool
chapters.body:
Chapter 102 - The Tool

"Pfft." Xiang Yi couldn't help but laugh as she motioned her fingers at him. "Come here."

The girl's laugh was sweet and beautiful. Xiao Yang could feel his heartbeat start to accelerate again.

What's going on…

Was this what love feels like…

"Xiao Yang gege…" Bai Ruoruo was panicking as she softly tried to press against him. Xiao Yang did not care for her at all as he ran forward to stand before Xiang Yi.

Bai Ruoruo, who almost fell into the air: "…"

Xiao Yang cleared his throat and said condescendingly, "If you want to get back together, I can consider giving you a chance."

"F*ck…" Xiang Yu exploded on the spot. "Who the hell are you to be treating her like that?!"

Although he did not like this man, he would tolerate it if his sister really liked him.

But if he dared mistreat her? Tolerate? Tolerate, my a*s! There was no way!

Xiang Yi raised her hand, motioning for him to be quiet, and smiled at Xiao Yang. "I think you're quite handsome, and tall, and have a great personality…"

Those few words made Xiao Yang's spirits soar to the sky. He was thinking in his heart this woman must love him so desperately…

Until he heard her pleasant and gentle inquiries: "Then do you know how to slaughter a rabbit? Can you skin one? Do you know how to remove the organs?"

Xiao Yang: ???

Bai Ruoruo: ???

From afar, Shi Sui seemed to have realized what was happening, the corners of lips twitching. "You can't even do that? Cheh…"

Xiao Yang couldn't bear this kind of treatment and shouted, "Who said I can't! It's just killing a rabbit!"

…

Half an hour later.

Xiao Yang was puking nonstop inside the washroom.

Fortunately, the rabbit had been killed beforehand, and Xiao Yang was only asked to clean the meat.

She was born in the year of the rabbit, and her nickname was Bunbun as well, so regularly she would not slaughter them herself. But bunnies taste the best when they are freshly slaughtered 🙂

Since Xiao Yang the Tool had delivered himself to her doorstep, it would be a shame if she didn't use him 🙂

Li Jianyu personally brought Lao Li over to take pictures of Xiang Yi's cooking, who had already accepted the set up for livestreaming the cooking process…

The netizens swarmed the livestream, and their enthusiasm was amazing.

— [Ahh that bunny is so cute, your death is so fragrant… Eh, how cruel!]

— [The Little Vase's knife skills are too incredible! She cut the fillets so thin!!]

— [Yi mei, slowdown! Let me bring my bowl over!!]

— [Heh, you must be inexperienced. Dinner, fruits, and snacks have all been prepared, it's time for mukbang!]

…

She cut up the rabbit meat into small pieces for better absorbance of taste. She marinated the meat in cooking wine, green chilies, star anise, chives, and ginger slices, then put it aside. Xiang Yi began to prepare the other pot of boiled fish fillet.

She put the thinly sliced fillets into the boiling water until they were half-cooked, and put them in a soup bowl with a layer of cooked bean sprouts, tofu, and konjac shreds. She then heated up the pot, added the oil with the chilies and other spices to fry out a fragrance. Finally, once the oil was crackling, she poured it over the other ingredients. The oil's temperature was very hot, and it would cook the meat for a second time to create a unique and spicy taste.

Both dishes were spicy with glistening red chilies, pearl-white fillet, and golden rabbit meat. It was visually very enjoyable.

"Gulp…" Li Jianyu and the others began to wildly gulp.

Xiao Yang felt even more restless in the living room.

How could it smell so good!

He was going to eat at least two bowls of rice!!

chapters.title: Chapter 103 - I'M Her Brother
chapters.body:
Chapter 103 - I'M Her Brother

…

In the kitchen.

Xiang Yi made a portion of egg fried rice and two vegetable dishes along the way.

When she was done, she poked her small head out the door. "Dinner's ready, come bring the plates."

Xiao Yang was the first to rush up. "I'll do it, I'll do it!"

He swiftly began to roll up his shirt sleeves, almost forgetting what his purpose had been.

There was only one thought on his mind: Eat!

The comments in the livestream:

— [Eh, where did this guy come from?]

— [He looks pretty good, but why is such a young person so greasy…]

— [Isn't this Bai Ruoruo's boyfriend? I think he's the heir to a big family and has a lot of money]

— [So, is he here to accompany Bai Ruoruo? He seems quite friendly]

…

Xiao Yang had taken the initiative to bring out all the dishes, and as everyone was about to move their chopsticks, he suddenly heard Xiang Yi's surprised voice. "Eh? Mr. Xiao weren't you just leaving?"

Xiao Yang froze.

The girl blinked innocently. "I didn't say I was going to keep you for dinner."

Xiao Yang: ???

"And Miss Bai, tonight's food is high in calories and not suitable for your diet. Here, I've already prepared your weight-loss meal."

Xiang Yi slowly pushed over a plate of boiled broccoli and two egg whites.

Bai Ruoruo: ???

The people who hated Xiang Yi were having a field day in the comments, feeling as if they'd finally caught her fox tail:

— [What kind of hospitality is this? Kicking people out when the food is done?]

— [I'm so sick of you guys calling her Little Vase; is she worthy? She's just someone who lives by her looks]

— [The Vase Fairy was probably the type of student who bullied her classmates. Look at how Bai Ruoruo has been mistreated by her! She won't even let her eat. This is too much!]

…

Xiao Yang's face turned blue and white in an instant. The delicious fragrance from the table full of delicacies went straight to his nose, but in his heart, he felt extremely regretful.

It was all his fault…

He had broken Xiang Yi's heart…

His eyes were full of pain. "Xiang Yi, I know I screwed up. Can you forgive me?"

Xiang Yi gestured to Shi Sui and Xiang Yu over to eat and asked him with a smile. "Then where did you screw up?"

When Xiao Yang saw her smile, his soul almost left his body. "I…I shouldn't have cheated on you. I shouldn't have dated Bai Ruoruo and hurt you…"

Bai Ruoruo's face instantly turned pale in horror and grabbed onto Xiao Yang's arm. "Xiao Yang gege, stop joking around…"

Xiao Yang immediately smacked her hand away and sharply said, "It's all your fault! If you didn't seduce me, I wouldn't have betrayed Xiang Yi! You ruined our relationship, you should sincerely apologize to Xiang Yi!"

Xiang Yi: "…"

Confirmed; this brain was a useless one.

Bai Ruoruo burst into tears. This was a livestream! Xiao Yang's words will ruin her!

The gossipy audience in the stream room were dumbfounded.

— [What the f*ck? So Xiao Yang and the Vase Fairy dated before, and he cheated on her with Bai Ruoruo?]

— [Oof I thought he was a warm boy, but I didn't think he would be the assault rifle of sc.u.mbags!]

— [??? To say this kind of thing in the livestream is basically guilt tripping Xiang Yi and ruthlessly ruining Bai Ruoruo. How terrifying; if I ran into a man like this, I'd die from anger]

…

From the side, Xiang Yu was suddenly fired up.

Motherf*cker, why don't you look in a mirror! How dare you cheat!!

Xiao Yang, however, had been moved by his confession of true emotions and expectantly looked toward Xiang Yi. "A man who turns back is more precious than gold. Baby, can you give me a chance?"

Xiang Yu was furious. "You're not worthy to call her baby. Who the hell are you!"

Xiao Yang was very uncomfortable. "Who the hell are you?" Just today, he had already cursed him twice, as if he'd swallowed a firecracker.

Xiang Yu smacked the table, shaking all the dishes and dots of soup splattering everywhere.

"Who am I? I'm her brother!! BY BLOOD!!!"

chapters.title: Chapter 104 - My Little Sister Called Me Big Brother!
chapters.body:
Chapter 104 - My Little Sister Called Me Big Brother!

As the voice of the young esports legend dispersed, the scene became silent and the comments in the livestream seemed to have frozen.

One second…

Two seconds…

Whoosh —

The netizens in the stream instantly exploded: [F*ck?! Brother?? Smog and the Vase Fairy are brother and sister!]

In the set, Xiao Yang, who was dumbfounded for a few seconds, had flipped faster than the pages of a book, his smile disappearing. "So you're my big brother-in-law! My bad, my bad; I was disrespectful, big brother. This drink is for you!"

In Nancheng, big brother-in-law was how one would address a wife's older brother.

As soon as Xiang Yu heard this, his trash talk switch flicked on. "Do you think I am a locksmith? Are you worthy?* You mother…."

Xiang Yi covered his mouth just in time as she said, "Big brother will be banned for swearing." Detecting his anger, the girl softly coaxed him, "Big brother, just ignore him. He's not worth your time or your anger…"

The esports legend, who had just been furiously explosive, calmed down in an instant and stared at the young girl with an incredulous expression.

Ah ah ah ah ah ahhhh!!!

His sister had called him big brother! Twice! TWICE!!!

He calmed his emotions and, in a seemingly callous manner, told her, "Tell him to get lost!"

However, everyone could see his smile almost reaching the end of his ears.

Xiao Yang was still thinking about the food as he hurriedly said, "Even if we don't get back together, at least let me have a bowl of rice. I killed that rabbit after all…"

"You want to eat my sister's cooking? In your dreams!" Xiang Yu began to swear once again. He pulled up the zipper on his tracksuit as if he was about to get violent.

Xiang Yu did not know what hit him as he suddenly felt unable to exert his strength…

He looked toward Xiang Yi with a puzzled expression, only to be greeted with a gentle smile. "Big brother, you're right: he's not worth it. He doesn't deserve to eat my cooking, but he's even less worthy of receiving your beating."

She gestured toward the garden.

The next second —

Several bodyguards dressed in black appeared as if they had just descended from the sky. They picked up Xiao Yang and walked out without a word.

Xiao Yang: ???

"Hey, put me down! I'm commanding you to put me down, do you hear me?! Xiang Yi, how could you treat me like this? I haven't had a bite of food yet!"

The audience laughed to pieces.

— [This sc.u.mbag doesn't seem very smart, ah. What time is it now to still be thinking about eating]

— [Haha this only means our Yi mei's cooking is impeccable!]

— [Woo! That feels so good! You have to be rough with sc.u.mbag men like that. Don't give him a chance to disgust you!]

— [They actually have bodyguards… Sorry, I underestimated the Little Vase's family background… OTL]

…

Xiao Yang was tossed out of the manor.

The world was calm once more.

The only person who was anxiously still sitting on pins and needles was Bai Ruoruo.

Her eyes were terrifyingly red, her lips quivering. She wanted to say something, but no sound could come out.

Everyone else was busy enjoying their food.

The spicy and numb rabbit was crunchy on the outside and tender on the inside. When bitten into, oil would spill out with traces of spiciness permeating every trace of the meat.

Xiang Yi had made two large plates. One was a numbing spice for Xiang Yu, who was already covered in sweat, while the other was mild and had been prepared especially for Shi Sui. The man savored his dish slowly, with a handsome expression that seemed as if he were enjoying a Michelin-star meal.

The broiled fish fillet was tender, and it melted in one's mouth, while the bean sprouts, konjac threads, vegetables and other sides had been perfectly blanched in hot oil. The flavors of all the vegetables were perfectly fused, elevating the fillet's fragrance. When eaten in intervals, the taste of the dish would slowly disperse, constantly stimulating the taste buds as if they will explode the next instant.

"Actually… Actually, I was fooled by Xiao Yang as well…" After holding it in for so long, Bao Ruoruo could only come up with this statement.

Xiang Yi didn't raise her gaze as she indifferently said, "I won't pursue this matter. But I did check the surveillance. You kicked Xiao Naofu first."

Bai Ruoruo felt her back go cold as she prepared her pitiful expression to the extreme.

She had only kicked that stray cat! Why won't you let it go?!

*Translator's Note: In Chinese, 'are you worthy' literally translates to 'do you match', so it's often paired with the term 'are you trying to match a key or are you a locksmith' and said in a derogatory manner.

chapters.title: Chapter 105 - The White Lotus Claims Her Lunchapter Box*
chapters.body:
Chapter 105 - The White Lotus Claims Her Lunchapter Box*

The comment section once again set off.

— [Bai Ruoruo kicked Xiao Naofu? Is she insane??]

— [I'm telling you… Xiao Naofu is so well behaved, there's no way it would scratch someone without reason]

— [Where are you heartless people who were telling them to euthanize Xiao Naofu?? Your face must be rotten from being slapped so much, right? hhhh]

— [Actually, Bai Ruoruo was kind of… Nevermind, I can't clean her image anymore. I'm not a fan anymore. She's the third party in a relationship, and she abused a kitty… Even if I was braindead, I wouldn't stan her]

…

Xiang Yu stroked Xiao Naofu, his heart aching.

Xiao Naofu seemed to be possessed as it nestled in his arms like a spoiled child.

"It's over now, it won't hurt now. Let's find something yummy to eat, okay?"

Bai Ruoruo felt wronged as she continued to w.h.i.n.e. "But… But he still scratched me… It's obviously your cat that has a problem…"

Xiang Yi frowned. "I think you've mixed up cause and effect. You kicked Xiao Naofu first, which is what justified its response to defend."

Bai Ruoruo felt the hatred from the bottom of her heart. It was only but a cat. How could it be compared with a human?

Of course it was okay for her to kick Xiao Naofu, but it was wrong for the cat to scratch her!

"I get it, I'm not even as important as a cat…" Bai Ruoruo was crying as her red eyes became more swollen. She looked toward Shi Sui.

She still harbored a trace of hope in her heart. No matter what, she was from the same company as Shi Sui. Since he was a senior who took care of the younger generations, he wouldn't leave her to die, right?

The man raised his eyes to meet hers, his pupils as clear as the moonlight on the horizon. His thin lips opened slightly as he said indifferently, "Apologize."

Bai Ruoruo felt as if she'd been struck by lightning.

That's ridiculous!

"It's only a cat…" But before Bai Ruoruo could finish her sentence, Shi Sui interrupted her in a cold tone, "You only kicked the cat?"

It was as if his voice had been wrapped in an invisible but powerful aura, shrouding Bai Ruoruo.

She began to shiver slightly as she recalled what she'd said about Xiang Yi…

Surveillance cameras usually did not have sound recording functions, though?

Shi Sui calmly continued the next second, "Little Rabbit Farm has surveillance equipped with adapters."

In other words, the cameras recorded sound.

Bai Ruoruo's eyes widened in horror.

In the stream chat:

— [So she did not just abuse the cat? She did something else, too?]

— [I'm guessing she was talking bad about someone, and it was probably Yi mei. Otherwise, Shi Yingdi wouldn't have been this worked up]

— [The Vase Fairy's stan up there. Can you get lost? Our Shi Yingdi wouldn't take an extra look at that person, OK??]

— [tbh, forming that celebrity with the last name Xiang with Shi Sui is just insulting. He is the pillar of the industry, a proper A-tier actor with several awards and nominations. What does that Xiang woman represent? A fake personality that only knows how to pout, with singing skills that can straight up kill ten audio editors at once?]

…

Bai Ruoruo knew that there was no chance of her washing herself clean. She could only be cruel to herself and follow the tide. "Okay. I'm sorry, It's my fault, it's all my fault…"

As she spoke, tears continuously flowed down her face as if she'd been wronged by god himself.

"I'll leave. I'll leave, okay? I won't stay here and get in your way…"

She paused for several moments as the atmosphere remained silent.

Not a single person tried to make her stay.

Including the entire production crew of "Two Under One Roof" and all the on-site staff.

Xiang Yi had prepared afternoon tea and sweet soup for them every afternoon, and Xiao Naofu was so cute. Even though they didn't have the influence of Bai Ruoruo as an entertainer…

They were sincere.

Li Jianyu finally spoke. "All right, you take care. We won't be seeing you out."

Bai Ruoruo stiffly walked out, sobbing loudly the moment she stepped out.

She had officially broken down.

*Translator's Note: Originating from the Steven Chow movie "King of Comedy", the term 'about to receive their lunchbox' refers to someone who is about to die or leave the show. In the movie, when an actor is done with their role, they are able to go claim their bento or meal box, signaling the end of their role on set.

chapters.title: Chapter 106 - Emotionless Eating Machine
chapters.body:
Chapter 106 - Emotionless Eating Machine

As soon as Bai Ruoruo left, the atmosphere at the dining table immediately became harmonious.

Xiang Yu continued to rub Xiao Naofu's belly with his pale and slender fingers, his eyes secretly darting toward Xiang Yi.

Feeling his gaze, Xiang Yi blinked. "What's wrong, big brother?"

'Oh~~~!!'

'Did you hear, did you hear… how sweet his little sister sounded when she called him her big brother!'

He feigned a nonchalant demeanor as he demanded like an arrogant prince. "Go and bring your big brother another bowl of rice."

If he'd dared to command Xiang Yi in such a way when they were back at the Xiang family, the several sis-cons at home would have broken both his legs.

But today's Yuyu of the Xiang family was Yuyu of the Niohuru family!*

Two words: Inflated ego!

Xiang Yi smiled as she indulged his childish willfulness, obediently bringing him another bowl of egg fried rice.

Xiang Yu couldn't even suppress the corners of his mouth from arching up. After taking a mouthful of the egg fried rice, his eyes lit up and his face was soon buried in the food.

He especially loved to eat rice. The easy-to-make egg fried rice that Xiang Yi had cooked was soft and chewy. Aside from eggs and shrimp, she had also added ham and peas. It was not only colorful but rich in taste as well.

The live comments:

— [Smog is so imm.a.t.u.r.e hahaha but I think he's really cute]

— [Simao brother: An emotionless eating machine]
