— […Now that you've mentioned it, that does seem to be the case. Shi Yingdi always gets his own food. What kind of attitude is this, Vase Fairy?]

— [Have you guys forgotten the trending forum about the Little Vase neglecting Shi Yingdi? Even though the SSJJ (the condensed spelling of the Shi Sui Sisters) refused to acknowledge it, it's obvious that your Shi Yingdi tried to get close to the Little Vase first. The Little Vase might be indifferent toward him, but she's been really polite and courteous nonetheless, ok?]

…

The netizens each brought out their magnifying glasses as they placed the events of the last few days under a microscope. Soon, a post on the well-known gossip forum Melon began to trend.

The title: [Every day, I am searching for crumbs of sugar in the shattered glass remains that come from the Untimely CP]

The main header: Good morning, Melon friends, I am the OP of the last article, [The famous scene where Shi Yingdi had been left out to dry].

After watching the livestream for "Two Under One Roof" for a few days and replaying countless times the scenes where Shi Yingdi and Yi mei are in the same frames, I will be honest with you: these two are too cautious. Moreover, they are so polite to each other, as if they were in an etiquette class. The words like 'sorry to trouble you/thank you for your hard work/excuse me/thank you' are always at the tip of their lips, and Yi mei still continues to call him Senior Shi. The more courteous they are, the more it shows that the relationship between them has not progressed… They could even just be acting formally for the sake of the show. Thinking about it makes my heart ache.

But—!

The candy from shattered glass tastes really sweet, too!

When Shi Yingdi put on glasses for Yi mei…

The scene of two people cooking together as if they've spent years together living a peaceful life…

And his gentle expression as he watched Yi Mei while she was on the swing… I can re-watch that a hundred times! I suggest everyone replay that scene!

And just now, he had ripped apart the White Lotus on Yi mei's behalf (OK, it's a stretch to say he ripped her apart, but he did help Yi mei in the end. I don't care, I don't care! He was protecting her!)

This stan of the CP does not ask for anything more. I just want Yi mei to treat Shi Yingdi a wee bit better! Humble.jpg

As soon as the post was uploaded, the Shi Sui Sisters became very discontent.

— [Is OP delusional from watching too many dramas? I am disgusted by your brainless love theories]

— [Hehe. OP basically just said that our Shi Sui Zaizai is on his knees/trying to butter up the Vase Fairy. How much money did they pay you to write this?]

— [Sigh, they're hopeless, take OP away, then the next one. Let me say this again, Shi Sui and the Vase Fairy will never be a couple!]

*Translator's Note: The Niohuru clan was a notably powerful Manchu family that spawned notable empresses and consorts in the Qing Dynasty. In fiction, the women are usually portrayed as very bold and fearless.

chapters.title: Chapter 107 - Big Brother Is The Best
chapters.body:
Chapter 107 - Big Brother Is The Best

At the same time.

Another user uploaded a post.

The title: [I am in shock. When I was researching for my thesis, I discovered an SCI paper by a certain female celebrity…]

The headline: I am a graduate student in agricultural science, majoring in resource utilization and plant protection. Recently, I have been going bald over my thesis paper everyday. This afternoon, I found an article that was shocking; first, because it was well written, and second, because it had great reference value for me.

At that time, my roommate had been watching "Two Under One Roof" to decompress, and when we heard Xiang Yi say the words, "The country is rooted in agriculture, so agriculture should come first", we immediately felt that this celebrity from the entertainment industry was competent. Then, I stumbled upon the publisher of the article, who was also named Xiang Yi. I thought it might be a coincidence, but then I looked at the university which is one of the Top 2 colleges in the nation. Out of curiosity, I couldn't help but confirm…

Now everything makes sense.

That's right, this thesis article was published by Xiang Yi the Celebrity 🙂

I also found the subject she had researched during her undergraduate degree. How should I put it… it is the level of a big boss that I will never achieve 🙂

Perhaps a lot of people don't know much about SCI papers, so I will provide the most popular example. Publishing an article is as meaningful as winning a gold medal in an international sports competition.

I am in a trance right now. Female stars in the industry are so powerful these days. I feel like I am not worthy of staying in the agriculture industry… _(:з」∠)_

The first dozen replies below the post all consisted of question marks.

— [????]

— [This is fake right?? You're telling me the Vase Fairy can write an SCI-level thesis??]

— [I'm dying. She's lying, right? If she's so badass, why did she go into the entertainment industry?]

The OP did not argue with the netizens but released a link to the paper instead.

The netizens would be greeted with an all English website. The terminology of the publication was very professional, but the column with the publisher's name…

It really is Xiang Yi!

The Melon forum had become a sensation as countless melonheads have sprung up like bamboo shoots after rain. The sensation of the topic had gained more traffic than when a certain fresh meat had announced his love affair a few days ago.

When the meal was almost finished, Xiang Yi stood up to wash the dishes but heard a roar from across the table. "Put it down and leave it!"

The girl jumped in fear.

"Ahem…" Xiang Yu cleared his throat uncomfortably. "You be good and sit here, our family doesn't have a rule that says girls do dishes!"

Xiang Yi felt her heart stir slightly. She could vaguely feel her brother's attitude toward her has shifted.

Was he finally willing to accept her?

The girl stared at Xiang Yu in a daze, eyes clouding with a hazy mist.

She was by no means a fragile person; on the contrary, she had been very strong willed and determined when transmigrating through the universes to complete her tasks.

But perhaps everyone had a soft corner in their hearts that was their weakness, their Achilles' heel.

Family was Xiang Yi's Achilles' heel.

She turned her small face and gently said with a slightly nasal tone in her voice, "Big brother is the best."

Xiang Yu's spirits were in the air as he happily whistled a tune on his way to wash dishes.

Netizens in the live chat appeared once again.

— [I can't take it anymore, the Vase Fairy is so lazy]

— [There's so many people, and you're making your brother do the dishes by himself? Can such delicate esports hands do this kind of rough work?]

— [Why is she so delicate? It's just dishes, what's wrong with a girl doing some work? She's so inconsiderate!]

chapters.title: Chapter 108 - I Expect No Less Of Miss Bai Fumei
chapters.body:
Chapter 108 - I Expect No Less Of Miss Bai Fumei

However, they had underestimated Xiang Yi's current number of fans as these remarks were immediately rebounded as soon as they were made.

Someone who was irritable:

—[Lazy, my ass! Who's been cooking these last few days? Does cooking not take effort? Only you lot can be so noisy, stfu!]

Some mysterious people:

—[Can't help it if she is spoiled by her big brother hehe. Some people are just sour lemons and nothing else]

There were also the foodie fans:

—[Her cooking is so amazing, aren't you guys happy to treat it as a mukbang? You're just blabbering]

The anti-fans were stunned. When did the Vase Fairy get so many fans?

What was an even bigger face slap——

Xiang Yu brought the chopsticks, dishes, and other utensils to the kitchen with a feigned pretentiousness.

He then placed them inside the dishwasher.

The netizens: ???

—[Master, I'm speechless! No wonder this show doesn't show any dishwashing scenes]

—[Is this a face-slapping variety show just to slap the haters? If you don't behave, I'll slap you silly]

—[Hahahah I've been imagining the Little Vase just washing dishes like Cinderella. Sorry to intrude, I expect no less of Miss Bai Fumei]

—[Eh, this dishwasher looks pretty nice. Does anyone know the brand? We just renovated our house and want to install a dishwasher]

And so after that day, a certain dishwasher company's online store's sales numbers suddenly soared…

The owner was still a little confused when he received the news.

His dishwashers were domestically produced in China and were durable and of good quality. However, he didn't have that big a market in the domestic scene, as most sales had been monopolized by the big name imported brands.

He had thought about advertising, but once he looked into it, good god. In these times, even advertising on the Weibo platforms of internet celebrities was quoted over six figures, not to mention television commercials and agency fees for live broadcasts.

So the advertising matter was put on hold. Fortunately, because his product had a good reputation, he was able to acc.u.mulate some supporters and his website sales were passable.

But it was only acceptable and nothing more.

But today's sales numbers had flipped several times that of last month!

After understanding the reason, the owner was excited and moved. Trembling, he typed on Weibo for a long time. Finally, to his couple thousand fans, he sent a letter of thanks to "Two Under One Roof" and to Xiang Yi.

[Xi Jingjing Dishwashers]: Thank you so much @TwoUnderOneRoofV @XiangYiV for the publicity. Although domestic products are not easy to produce, they are reliable. I really want to sponsor your show, but I am very ashamed that my pockets might not be deep enough. I would like to express my gratitude to your show and Miss Xiang Yi, and on behalf of Xi Jingjing, I will be donating 100,000 yuan to a charity to assume the social responsibilities belonging to my companies.

Attached was the screenshot of a donation receipt.

Normally, the Weibo statements posted by this account were of no interest, but since this particular post had tagged "Two Under One Roof" and Xiang Yi, the number of viewers had drastically risen as several netizens rushed to repost it.

—[I just put in my order, I hope the quality doesn't' disappoint]

—[This owner is so down to earth! He just donated straight up, it's too real!]

—[Hahahaha this celebrity Xiang Yi is too good. On the first day of the stream, she had been promoting clothes and hair clips, and now it's dishwashers!]

—[How naive. The tableware from "Two Under One Roof" from the last two days have been selling crazily, as well as the take-out industry. Basically whatever Yi Mei makes, take-out will sell out of that dish. Take a look at those of us eating spicy rabbit and broiled fillet!]

The netizen then proceeded to post two pictures of the takeaway platform showing 999+ sales on the respective dishes. How terrifying!

chapters.title: Chapter 109 - Kung Fu
chapters.body:
Chapter 109 - Kung Fu

In addition to the shock that had taken over many netizens at Xiang Yi's ability to promote products, several brands began paying attention to Xiang Yi too…

Overnight, several netizens woke up to surf the internet like foxes in a melon field.

The next day.

The sun rose in the east, casting a faint morning light.

Refreshed by the happy events of late, Li Jianyu had gotten up early, ready to go on a morning jog.

Yesterday, the broadcast numbers for "Two Under One Roof" had reached #1 in the variety show category. Even if the fans of the various guests on "Heartbeat" continued to praise it, it was still difficult to prevent the decline.

The seniors at Muyao TV had also contacted him a while back hoping he would return.

Li Jianyu had abruptly refused their offer.

"The peach leaves were pointy, and willow leaves covered the sky…" As he hummed, Li Jianyu inadvertently ran into Xiang Yi when he made it to the garden.

The girl was dressed in a pink and white sporty outfit, looking as if she'd walked out of a painting in her natural makeup. Only…

She was practicing Tai Chi??

Li Jianyu scratched his head as several questions emerged inside his mind.

He couldn't help but feel that mentor Xiang Yi… did not have the lifestyle habits of someone her age…

The girl's actions were soft and casual, and there was an inexplicably light rhythm between her gestures. Li Jianyu couldn't help but be unconsciously mesmerized by her movements.

"Good morning, Director Li." Xiang Yi greeted him.

"Morning, mentor Xiang Yi." Li Jianyu couldn't help but gossip. "Are you* practicing Kung Fu?"

Xiang Yi smiled. "Just exercising to stay fit, is all."

Li Jianyu let out a dragged out "Oh"; it made sense. How could a young girl know Kung Fu… it must have been just a hobby.

He did some stretches to loosen his muscles then ran around the manor. When he came back, he habitually took another look around to find…

She was practicing sword art??

Li Jianyu almost fell face first, his pupils widening in alarm.

The fair skinned and delicate girl was holding a simple longsword. Her swordsmanship had characteristics and form similar to Tai Chi, while her posture remained calm and comfortable, with a graceful style and seemed to emphasize the effortlessness of her actions.

She quivered her wrists, turning the sword to draw a flower in the air, its blade glinting coldly and producing a buzzing sound.

Li Jianyu: …!!

'F*ck! If this isn't Kung Fu, then what is?!'

'Mentor Xiang Yi, is this what you f*cking call exercising to keep fit?!!'

'With all due respect, if you come running at me with that sword, I will disappear!'

Xiang Yi retracted the sword then inhaled and exhaled. Realizing Li Jianyu had stopped running and was staring at her in a sluggish daze, she tilted her head and asked, "Director Li, I'm going to make breakfast now. Anything you want to eat?"

Li Jianyu shuddered and stepped back. "Mentor Xiang Yi, you are too kind…" He shivered, regretting his words right on the spot. "No, no. Master Xiang Yi, how could I trouble you for such a small thing like breakfast! I'll do it, I'll… call takeout! I'll treat everyone to breakfast!"

Xiang Yi: "…The formal 'you'? Master? Director Li, are you okay?"

"Ahha, who are you calling Director Li! Just call me Xiao Li, that's all!!!"

Xiang Yi's tiny milky face was completely blank.

She was… fascinated.

*Translator's Note: Li Jianyu uses the formal 'you' in this sentence.

chapters.title: Chapter 110 - Gates To A New World
chapters.body:
Chapter 110 - Gates To A New World

"Director, did you suffer some trauma? Or are you sick? Want me to check your pulse and brew you some herbal medicine…" The girl gently suggested as she shifted the sword to her other hand, scaring Li Jianyu into a frantic retreat.

Xiang Yi finally realized something and explained, "You don't need to be nervous, it's not sharpened."

Whoosh—

She drew out the sword to show Li Jianyu but ended up scaring the good man so much he began to scream in terror. From the soft light, a silhouette burst toward the other direction in complete disregard of the people around him.

Shi Sui, who had gotten up early to exercise, calmly dodged the large human flesh pendant that had suddenly emerged.

"Morning." he looked to Xiang Yi with a light smile.

"Good morning, Senior." Xiang Yi said helplessly. "Senior, tell Director Li this sword is really not sharpened."

"Let me see." Shi Sui lazily approached her side.

"Daddy Shi——!"

Li Jianyu watched Shi Sui approach Xiang Yi, even taking the sword from her hands to inspect.

"It's pretty heavy," he commented, making a few gestures with the sword.

Li Jianyu: ???

You know how to use that??

Xiang Yi: "Eh? Senior, you've studied swordsmanship too?"

"I learned a bit on set." Shi Sui said gently, squinting at Li Jianyu. "Ignore him, he's got the courage of a hamster, the type who is easy to frighten. I didn't know how he had the guts to leave his job."

Li Jianyu chuckled sheepishly and touched his head.

If it weren't for his personality, he wouldn't have stuck it out at Muyao TV for so many years.

"Uhm, since both of you are here, let me confirm some aspects of our livestream's broadcast time and broadcast duration. Yesterday, our program group came to the conclusion that we will stream all day Saturday and Sunday, while only streaming one or two hours on weekdays—"

Xiang Yi accidentally met his gaze….

Li Jianyu perked up. "Of course, this is only our thoughts! Mentor Shi Sui, Master Xiang Yi, if you two have any comments, we are very flexible and eager to adjust!"

The "Two Under One Roof" crew was probably the most cowardly crew in history…

Xiang Yi: "I do have a suggestion."

Li Jianyu: "Please do tell!"

"Don't call me Master."

Li Jianyu pondered for a long time and cautiously probed. "Then I'll call you… big boss?"

"… Whatever."

Shi Sui snorted with laughter from the side.

The staff woke one after another, getting up earlier than usual.

Of course, they were all anticipating mentor Xiang Yi's breakfast!

But all that awaited them was… the takeout their director had ordered.

The staff: ???

This? Just this??

Li Jianyu cleared his throat and said in a high-pitched voice, "Teacher Xiang Yi works so hard, how can we make her cook breakfast for us everyday? We must learn to be self-sufficient, understand?"

Everyone seemed to understand as they nodded in a daze and began to eat.

In fact, Li Jianyu had been quite generous and ordered a hearty breakfast, but everyone couldn't help but think…

It was lacking a soul 🙂

"Hey hey, guys, check the trending searches! Mentor XIang Yi has taken up three slots in the top 10 most searched!"

"#XiangYiSCIthesis#, #XiangYiPromotesDishwasher#. I just clicked into these two. Mentor Xiang Yi is incredible!"

"The third trending term of Untimely CP is amazing too!"

A few minutes later.

"I… I feel like I've opened the gates to a new world."

"Mentor Xiang Yi and mentor Shi Sui? These two can become a CP??"

Just as everyone was chatting and gossiping, someone suddenly reminded the crowd: "STOP! Shi Yingdi's manager is here!"

chapters.title: Chapter 111 - What Kind Of Perverse Operation Is This?
chapters.body:
Chapter 111 - What Kind Of Perverse Operation Is This?

The noisy pavilion went silent in a second.

Everyone was both scared and curious as a crowd began to build up.

A black Audi parked at the entrance of the manor, and a very elite looking man stepped out of the car. He was dressed in a stiff black suit and rimless glasses. Compared to someone from the entertainment industry, he looked more like a financial tycoon from an investment bank.

Si Chuanbai was a well-known agent in the entertainment industry. He was ruthless and decisive and had boosted several celebrities to fame with his efforts.

Passing by the pavilion, he pushed his glasses and greeted everyone present with a smile.

They all greeted him back:

"Good morning, Mr. Si."

"Hello, Mr. Si."

"Mr. Si, Shi Yingdi is in the living room."

Si Chuanbai: "Thank you."

"My god… Mr. Si has an even more oppressing aura than a domineering CEO…"

At the same time…

In the living room, Xiang Yi and her agent Ah Nan were happily slurping up bowls of braised beef rice noodles.

The sirloin beef had been simmered overnight so the meat was tender and fragrant. The stewed marinade seeped out of the meat when bitten. Matched with fine rice noodles made from sticky rice, the dish had a sweet and refreshing taste. Along with a few side dishes, Ah Nan was not able to stop.

Shi Sui was eating his noodles slowly and methodically. He was by no means a picky eater, and he happily ate anything Xiang Yi made with sweet vigor.

As for Xiang Yu, who was a standard night owl, was still asleep at this hour, so Xiang Yi had left him a bowl of rice.

"Another bowl! Burrrp!" Ah Nan couldn't contain a burp escaping from his mouth.

Xiang Yi smiled. "If you eat more, you'll go into hibernation."

Ah Nan gazed at her with watery eyes.

The door to the manor was open, and this scene was witnessed by Si Chuanbai at the door.

Unconsciously thinking of the posts that were about to grace the front page of the melon forum, his eyebrow twitched fiercely as he raised his hand and tapped on the door.

The three people at the table looked toward the sound.

Shi Sui greeted him in a natural manner. "Did you eat breakfast?"

Si Chuanbai calmly mumbled a 'mhm'. "I need to talk with you."

Shi Sui wiped the corner of his mouth and straightened his posture. He then stood up and followed Si Chuanbai to the balcony.

Ah Nan looked after him longingly. "So this is a top-tier agent… He seems so prestigious. Waah, and his hair is so dense, and his briefcase is made from top quality leather!"

Xiang Yi: "…" This observation was very "Ah Nan".

"Top-tier agent?" She asked.

Ah Nan explained, "That's the standard in our managing agency circle. Si Chuanbai has impeccable professional ability, and he can tear apart resources without being soft. The most important thing is that he has a good eye for talent; he was the one who had saved Shi Yingdi back in the day."

Saved?

Xiang Yi wanted to press on for the details when Xiao Naofu hopped into her arms. It rubbed against her fingertips and exposed its round white belly to Xiang Yi.

The girl said strictly: "No. The sirloin has a lot of seasoning, and you will get a stomachache."

"Meow~~"

— Just one piece! One piece!

Xiang Yi hesitated for a moment, unable to resist the cuteness of Xiao Naofu. Afterward, she picked up a piece of beef and rinsed it with water before giving it to Xiao Naofu.

Xiao Naofu ate it with one bite, its icy blue pupils instantly widening.

Meow?

Such delicious food actually exists on this planet?!!

Xiang Yi had been thoroughly interrupted by it and had forgotten what she had wanted to ask Ah Nan.

At the balcony.

Si Chuanbai handed Shi Sui a mobile phone, pausing on the page from Melon forum with the header [Everyday I'm Hunting for Candy Among the Shattered Glass of the Untimely CP].

"Look for yourself what kind of public opinions are fermenting right now."

Shi Sui scrolled through the post, reading the several hundred replies below it. Then…

He slowly tapped the like button of the original post.

Si Chuanbai: ?

Motherf*cker, what kind of an operation is this???

chapters.title: Chapter 112 - You'Re The One Pursuing That Young Girl?
chapters.body:
Chapter 112 - You'Re The One Pursuing That Young Girl?

"It's written pretty well, interesting and imaginative." Shi Sui commented with a sparkle in his eyes.

The most famous agent in the industry inhaled deeply and exhaled repeatedly before finally clenching his teeth and asking, "What the hell are you thinking? Are you just playing around, or are you for real? I need to know, so I can arrange your next project."

Innocently, Shi Sui said, "That will depend on her."

Si Chuanbai: ???

The man lost his usual calm demeanor and took off his glasses. "So the netizen's speculations are real? You're pursuing the young girl?"

"Not pursuing."

Si Chuanbai sighed in relief.

But the next second, he heard Shi Sui say with a lazy tone, "It's not the time yet."

"You must be familiar with her reputation in the industry; but if you are insistent, I have nothing more to say." Si Chuanbai grinded his teeth and exhorted like an old father. "Make sure to take appropriate measures, unless you plan to attend a certain daddy and child show in three years."

Shi Sui feigned a smile, its meaning unclear.

Si Chuanbai knew that Shi Sui always had his own opinion, so once his mind was set, nobody else could change it.

"As long as you know your boundaries. Next let's discuss next month's itinerary…"

Si Chuanbai was nimble and professional, and in thirty minutes, they had solved all their tasks.

"OK, I'm going to head off now. Call if you need anything." Si Chuanbai's expression was stiff as he worked in a professional manner.

Shi Sui filled another bowl of rice noodles for himself and looked up. "You really don't want to have a bowl before you go?"

Si Chuanbai said condescendingly, "I'm not interested in Chinese-style breakfast."

In truth, he could have finalized all his work with Shi Sui over the phone. He had only come in person to see Xiang Yi with his own eyes…

She didn't even fill Shi Sui's bowl with rice noodles for him!

If that was all, it would have been okay; but Shi Sui actually took the initiative to pour water for her, even going as far to ask her in a well-mannered way before pouring if she wanted it hot or lukewarm.

Si Chuanbai felt his heart become tight.

His eyes fell on Xiang Yi, who was busy packing small dishes and fruits while chattering with that colorful feather duster. "Do you want some numb and spicy beef? I have them vacuum-sealed so they can be kept for a long time. There's also pickled radishes and cabbage, I'll pack a bit more for you?"

"Darling, that's more than enough."

Ah Nan glanced at Si Chuanbai with a guilty conscience. The man's hair was combed back and greased with shiny wax. Ah Nan could tell his watch and cufflinks were expensive from the first glance, and his shoes were polished to an incredible brightness. His black briefcase seemed ordinary, but it was actually a custom piece from a very big name brand…

While here he was, wearing a 39.9 RMB-floral print shirt from Taobao and a 20 RMB-pair of loose shorts from a night market stall. The most expensive piece he was wearing was his 100 RMB-shoes from Adidas…

Ah Nan felt so embarrassed that he couldn't even lift his head. His attire would normally be quite passable, but today he was on vacation and he had really let himself go, dressing like this and leeching breakfast at Xiang Yi's home. Who knew he would run into Si Chuanbai…

Without comparison, there is no harm o(╥﹏╥)o

"Here, it's packed well. It should last you a long time." Xiang Yi wrapped the bentos stacked half a meter high in a floral print cloth.

Ah Nan was moved. "Oh, oh honey, you are so kind. I will work hard once I return, and continue finding profitable endors.e.m.e.nt opportunities for you! The most chill ones, too!"

Si Chuanbai: "…"

There's no issue here.

It was just too real.

Before he left, Si Chuanbai glanced at the packages in Ah Nan's arms and felt inexplicably…

Envious.

*Translator's Note: An oral medication used to treat fever, dizziness, sweating, tinnitus, irritability, aches, insomnia and other symptoms of menopausal women with a yin deficiency or liver issues, supposed to calm the heart and the mind.

chapters.title: Chapter 113 - Bossing My Sister Around
chapters.body:
Chapter 113 - Bossing My Sister Around

…

It was almost eleven o'clock before Xiang Yi woke up. Sleepily, he walked out of his room, rubbing his eyes.

Outside the French windows and among the sea of flowers, Xiang Yi was trimming the withered flowers and excess branches of the plants wearing a light-colored straw hat.

She was a patient person, and even if it was repeating simple tasks, she wouldn't get impatient.

Xiang Yu felt a lump form in his throat. It really was his little sister…

Yesterday had not been a dream.

He instinctively picked up his phone and sent a message to the family group chat. Just as he was about to click send, he suddenly paused —

If his older brothers were to find out about his little sister's secret, the crazy sis-con demons would once again appear… then would he still be able to order his sister around?

No way.

The self-acclaimed most clever member of the Xiang family, Yuyu, then decided to delete this message and swaggered into the garden arrogantly. He sat on the rocking chair next to Xiang Yi and crossed his legs, saying to his sister with the tone of a mob boss: "Sis, bring your brother a glass of water!"

Xiang Yi paused what she was doing and smiled, her eyes forming into half moons. "You're up? Do you want to eat anything?"

Oh~!

My~sister~is~so~gentle~ah~

How could he boss her around!

Xiang Yi felt full of guilt as he leapt from the rocking chair and indifferently said, "Your legs are so short; no need for you to run. I'll go to the kitchen and find some food myself."

"There's a thermos of rice in the fridge, just heat it up before you eat it."

"I know, I know, women are so naggy!"

…

Xiang Yu devoured the rice in the kitchen quickly, then poured a glass of warm water for his sister with a dollop of honey.

Hmm. One more!

After evenly mixing the water, Xiang Yi happily went to look for his sister carrying the glass of honey water. When he approached her, his expression immediately changed as he stuck a hand in his pocket and arrogantly said, "Eh, poured this for you on the way."

Xiang Yi happily received the glass and took a small sip. Immediately, the flattery began. "It's so sweet, and the temperature is perfect. Big brother, you're the best; anything you make is just instantly amazing."

"Hmph. Of course, who am I." Xiang Yu couldn't suppress the smile on his face, his spirits soaring to the sky. In a great mood, he snatched the garden prunes from Xiang Yi's hands. "See that rocking chair? Go sit in it. You work so slow I can't watch anymore, I'll show you your big brother's trimming speed!"

On the spot, Xiang Yu demonstrated his esport legend hand speed.

He had completely forgotten about bossing his sister around 🙂

…

The dull and warm day passed by in a fleeting nature.

At eight in the evening, the stream began.

Countless viewers instantly flooded into the broadcast channel for "Two Under One Roof".

—[I've been squatting all day waiting for this stream! Excited!!]

—[I see Shi Yingdi, that black shirt looks so good!]

—[Smog's creamy sweatshirt is so cute]

—[Danger!! The Little Vase has entered the kitchen. Friends, get ready to eat!!]

…

Xiang Yi tied her hair into a bun and went to check the stewed vegetables in her casserole pot.

As the cameras followed her, the lens focused on a pot of red sugar colored brine.

The duck wings, beef, eggs, shiitake mushrooms, and bean curd that had been marinating for the entire afternoon glowed a bright red. Just a glance was enough to stir one's appetite.

Xiang Yi turned off the flame, letting the vegetable soak in the broth. She quickly made some scallion noodles and assorted sides while the casserole was soaking. Remembering what Li Jianyu had instructed, she attempted to pay attention and interact with the netizens more, turning to the camera and saying warmly: "A simple and homely dinner is done, has everyone eaten dinner yet?"

— [You call this home-cooked? Sorry to disrupt you /depressed]

— [Ahhh I really want to bring a bowl to Yi mei's home and leech her food!]

— [I'm not like you. I want to bring a tub /doge /doge]

chapters.title: Chapter 114 - I Didn'T Think You Were Like That, Simao Bro!
chapters.body:
Chapter 114 - I Didn'T Think You Were Like That, Simao Bro!

…

In the living room.

Shi Sui opened a can of cat food for Xiao Naofu, who had its head buried in the bowl within seconds.

The man's slender fingers stroked the back of the cat's neck. Xiao Naofu stuck out its b.u.t.t in protest but accidentally fell to the ground with a 'thump' and a cute 'meow'.

Xiang Yu the Plush Addict clenched his fist and forced himself to remain calm.

'Ah ah ah such a cute cat… I can pet it 'til it turns bald!'

However, he had an expression of "noble, glamorous, and dismissive."

When the food was on the table, Xiao Naofu leapt into Xiang Yu's arms and stuck out half its head.

Although the canned food was delicious, it had been curious about human food since it tried the beef sirloin Xiang Yi had given it.

The small fleshy paws clawed at Xiang Yu's plate, hoping for a taste of the braised vegetables he had picked up…

"Xiao Naofu!" Xiang Yi's voice rang out, scaring Xiao Naofu as it burrowed deeper into Xiang Yu's c.h.e.s.t.

Xiang Yi: "Big brother, it can't eat spicy food. Don't feed it."

Xiao Naofu meowed coquettishly. "Meow~ meow~~"

Xiang Yu: "…"

It was his sister on one side, the kitty on the other…

Being a man is so hard T_T

The comment section:

— [Hahaha Simao brother's disheveled expression is so cute]

— [Why is the Vase Fairy so stingy? What's wrong with feeding the cat a bit of yummy food?]

— [Hey, do you know that cats will get sick if they eat too much salt and could even die from eating too much stimulating food?]

Xiang Yu hesitated for several seconds before wisely stuffing the cat to Shi Sui.

Sorry, brother Shi!

Xiao Naofu had a natural resistance toward Shi Sui as it kicked its little feet in the air, dissatisfied.

Shi Sui lowered his eyes and smiled slightly. "If you try to steal my food, I will…" He raised his eyebrows. "I'll kiss you, do you understand?"

Xiao Naofu: …!!

Ah ah ah this stinky man is so evil!

The chat in the stream exploded.

— [Blessings like this exist?!]

— [I'll eat it, I'll eat it. Hubby, you can kiss me!!!]

— [I don't know who I should envy… Shedding sour tears of lemon essence in front of my screen]

…

Shi Sui picked up a piece of braised beef and waved it in front of Xiao Naofu.

Xiao Naofu, bearing the burden of humiliation… turned away.

Xiang Yu was stunned as he watched. He didn't think that the problem that he couldn't solve had been resolved by brother Shi so easily!

But looking at the way Xiao Naofu hung its head, he felt an unbearable pang in his c.h.e.s.t as he sat through the entire meal absentmindedly.

After the meal.

Xiang Yu shooed away the cameraman and went to coax Xiao Naofu, holding a piece of dried fish.

"Xiao Naofu, I'm sorry it's my fault. It's not that I don't want to help you, but we must listen to my sister."

"Okay, okay, don't be angry. Come, eat dried fish."

"That's good… Eat slowly, there's no rush 'kay…"

"…"

Xiang Yu had assumed that without the cameraman, the stream viewers wouldn't see him.

However, he was not aware that Li Jianyu and the other crew members had installed affixed cameras in the bedroom, kitchen, summer pavilion, and other places…

This scene provoked the laughter of countless viewers.

— [Hahaha does he not know there's a fixed camera there?]

— [I'm going to laugh my head off. My girlfriend just said that iron men are not good at coaxing people, but that's not true: he just doesn't want to coax you!]

— [Smog is like my dad: every time my mom yells at me, he doesn't dare speak, but then he'll sneak behind her back to comfort me hahaha]

…

The satiated Xiao Naofu was lying on its back, pawing its own tail.

Xiang Yu looked down, and after confirming that nobody was watching, happily rubbed his face on the cat's belly.

Nani?? The esports legend… also loves cats??!

The netizens: [I didn't think you were like that Simao bro!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 115 - I Only Have Big Brother In My Heart
chapters.body:
Chapter 115 - I Only Have Big Brother In My Heart

After cuddling the cat for a few minutes, Xiang Yu still did not realize that his reputation was falling apart under the watchful eye of millions of netizens…

Xiao Naofu looked dumbfounded. At first, it had kicked its little feet in protest, but when it couldn't struggle free, it could only bear the humiliation…

'Stupid woman! This Huhu has sacrificed so much so you and your brother can be reunited!!'

Xiang Yu was satisfied from cuddling the cat, revealing a refreshed expression as he held onto the cat and kissed it on the cheek.

Xiao Naofu: …!!

'Motherf*cker, I am tainted!!'

"Be good, I'll come see you later." Xiang Yu rubbed his forehead against the cat's and reluctantly said, "I have to go back to the training base. Once I win our competition, I'll buy you all the canned food and snacks with the prize money!"

Buy food?

Xiao Naofu perked its ears and head-butted Xiang Yu's c.h.e.s.t, rubbing against his collar bone. It squeaked in a bright and milky manner, "Meow~ meow~"

As if it were saying: Big brother is the only man in my heart, big brother must come visit me~

The comments in the stream:

— [Hahaha and so the cat and human have made a deal]

— [I can't wait for Smog to realize that there was a camera. Can all the members of the logic esports team remind him to watch the replay!]

…

Xiang Yu arrived in the kitchen to see his sister packing up food for him to take away.

His heart suddenly softened, feeling as if it had been filled to the brim.

"Don't pack food, I can't finish it." Xiang Yu stuck his hands in his pockets, unable to meet Xiang Yi's eyes. "We have an aunty who cooks for us at the training base, and we can call takeout too."

Xiang Yi batted her eyelashes and softly said, "You can always share it with your teammates…"

Xiang Yu recalled the last conversation between him and his sister a year ago and suddenly felt his nose scrunch up.

—"Big brother, when you come back from your match, I'll make you more delicious food!"

—"(ˉ▽￣～) Cheh~ Whatever. Okay, okay, you don't have to see me off. There are mosquitoes outside, you're going to be covered in bites."

Suddenly panicking, he stepped forward and grabbed Xiang Yi's shoulders. The girl was thin, slender, and so skinny that her bones were poking at his hands.

"You… You're not leaving?"

Xiang Yi was shocked for a few seconds before she gently responded, "Mhmm."

Xiang Yu sniffed and fiercely said, "If you're lying to me, I… I'll never speak to you again!"

Emotions were contagious. Xiang Yi wasn't the type to be easily moved, but at the moment, her eyes turned slightly red as she gave Xiang Yu a big hug, her voice soft but firm. "I will never lie to you again. Big brother, I promise."

Although the big brothers from the Xiang family were all sis-cons, they still adhered to the measures of separation between men and women in front of Xiang Yi. After she finished kindergarten, they very seldom embraced.

"As a girl grows up, you can't go around hugging random men…" Xiang Yu mumbled slowly. "But… today, I will allow it. But aside from me, little sister can't hug any other men, got it?!"

The stream room:

—[Mama, how come when I see this scene I want to cry]

—[The other romance variety show next door is making me feel the second-hand awkwardness. "Two Under One Roof" is still the best! This kind of warm daily life is so nourishing~]

…

Shi Sui and Xiang Yi saw Xiang Yu off until they reached the door.

"I'm off. Brother Shi, I'll leave my sister with you, take good care of her!" Xiang Yu waved at the two.

Shi Sui pushed his gold-rimmed glasses up and calmly said, "For sure."

chapters.title: Chapter 116 - Late Night Eats, Barbeque
chapters.body:
Chapter 116 - Late Night Eats, Barbeque

Parting is always intertwined with melancholy.

Xiang Yi watched as her brother's car drove away and felt a sliver of sadness in her heart, mixed with a whole lot more gratitude.

Her big brother had forgiven her.

It was… amazing.

"The moon is lovely tonight." Shi Sui's deep and gentle voice resonated beside her ear.

Xiang Yi was slightly startled, raising her head.

The moon was crescent like a hook, the sky washed with stars.

She smiled. "Mhmm. The stars are beautiful."

"Care for a drink?"

Shi Sui's casual suggestion stunned all the staff on the scene.

Not to mention the netizens in the live broadcast room.

—[Holy f*ck? Alcohol? Two Under One Roof?

—[Shi Yingdi, what's wrong with you? Beautiful moon and now alcohol, are you really interested in the Vase Fairy?]

Xiang Yi's eyes lit up. "Sure, the rice wine I brewed last year should taste just right about now. I'll go get it from the cellar!"

"It's dark outside, I should go."

"Then I'll go get the side dishes! We can eat a late night snack as well!"

Shi Sui smiled lightly. "Okay, anything you say."

The netizens in the stream: ???

—[Shi Yingdi is inexplicably indulgent of her…]

—[I can't help but say that their appearances are super compatible. Any screenshot makes it seem like a idol drama]

—[Simao brother: I just left, and you're getting late night eats? Are you even human??]

There were several plates next to them with ingredients like pork belly, squid, tofu, eggplant and more as well as peanuts that were a necessity to be paired with wine.

Seeing Shi Sui enter, Xiang Yi apologized, "It's late, and there's limited food at home. Sorry, Senior, but you'll have to make do."

Behind the camera, Li Jianyu gulped back his saliva, his greedy eyes getting strained.

Boss… You call this make do?!

Shi Sui's tone was calm. "No need to make do."

He opened the vessel and the unique sweetness of rice wine filled the air. The young girl was skillful as she was able to give ordinary rice wine a unique fragrance.

Once the wine was poured and the meat was cooked, the atmosphere became naturally harmonious.

The comments in the live stream were going crazy:

— [God, as long as these two enter a frame together, my brain automatically starts playing a sweet BGM!]

— [Can the CP fans please shut up? I suggest everyone report them as they come!]

— [They're just eating. Shi Sui just sees the Vase Fairy as his little sister is all!]

— [Oh no, Shi Yingdi is pouring wine for the Little Vase! Isn't it usually the younger person who pours for the senior? This girl with a microscope doesn't think Shi Yingdi treats the Little Vase as his junior at all! /stretches]

Shi Sui had just finished pouring the wine before Xiang Yi hurriedly took a sip.

The fresh rice fragrance enveloped in sweet wine tasted truly unique. She squinted her eyes, and after a few seconds, quietly exclaimed, "It's delicious."

Shi Sui smirked. Of course, she was a little alcoholic.

He had realized this when she was seventeen.

The thinly sliced pork belly sizzled on the grill as the fat dripped onto a baking tray below. In no time, it was cooked.

"Senior, have some meat!" Xiang Yi graciously scooped the entire pan of cooked meat into Shi Sui's plate.

—[Heh, her true intentions are showing]

—[No matter how you suck up to him, he won't date you]

—[Poison. Can a woman's worth only be realized by courting men?]

The next second—

The faint voice of Shi Yingdi echoed throughout the broadcast room. "I remember you hate pork belly the most?"

The netizens: ????

chapters.title: Chapter 117 - Shi Yingdi Is No Good
chapters.body:
Chapter 117 - Shi Yingdi Is No Good

The netizens: ???

How are we supposed to talk sh*t about this now?!

"Ahem…" Having been discovered, Xiang Yi choked and put down her glass of rice wine. "Senior, your memory is really good."

She recalled altogether, she had only encountered Shi Sui a few times, right?

The number of meals they shared was even more limited; probably only two or three times total.

He actually remembered what her preferences were… maybe her little uncle had mentioned it in front of Shi Sui?

"No, you're still picky as you were when you were little." Shi Sui slowly dipped the meat in Xiang Yi's special barbecue sauce. The meat was oily but not greasy, and juicy when bitten into. The ingredients were fresh, and the slightly spicy sauce gave it an extra layer of taste.

Xiang Yi picked up some fried squid with her chopsticks and weakly said, "I'm an a.d.u.l.t now, and no longer picky about my food."

"Really now?" The man raised his eyebrows, his peach blossom eyes full of playful teasing.

Xiang Yi: "…Because once I grew up, I never bought food I don't like."

The stream:

— [Hahaha Yi mei's sternness is hilarious]

— [The truth comes out! No wonder my mom isn't a picky eater; it's because she has the rights to our family's grocery list!]

After the squid was cooked through, Xiang Yi rolled it around in the barbecue sauce a few times and rolled it in a piece of lettuce with kimchi and tofu. In one big bite, she stuffed it into her mouth as her cheeks bulged with food.

'Ah~ Grilled meat goes the best with vegetables!'

Li Jianyu quickly asked the cameraman, Lao Li, to pan in on the grill and take a close-up shot. The golden pork belly, red and tender squid, tender white tofu, and light colored eggplant… The sound of sizzling and oil splashing was also picked up. As the 'tsss' transmitted to the electronic devices of the netizens, the show truly became an audio and visual feast of food.

—[Yi mei is so cute! Anyone wanna group up and steal Yi mei?!!]

—[F*ck! Production crew, you are awful! I'm not losing this weight anymore ah ah ah!!!]

—[I just finished dinner but just called takeout anyway. After watching this stream for three days, I've gained two pounds :)]

—[F*ck, Shi Yingdi, can't you take the Little Vase and go be romantic? Or go off and hold your little hands and kiss your little lips together? Eat, eat, eat. All you know is eat. Shi Yingdi, you can't do this!]

Instantly, a very dumb entry entered the trending section of most searched and rapidly rose in the ranks.

With meat and wine, the melancholic sentiment in Xiang Yi's heart had disappeared without a trace.

Happily, she even tapped Shi Sui's glass with hers.

"Kanpai!"

Shi Sui followed in her pace, almost to the point of indulgence.

The live comments:

—[HEHEHEHEHEHEHEHE]*

— [This is basically their cross-cupped wine!*]

— [You guys sit still, once I'm done my take out I will bring the Civil Affairs Bureau to you!!]

Nobody could have predicted that because of a late night meal, the fanbase for the Untimely CP suddenly grew very powerful…

At 9:00 p.m., the stream ended.

The netizens continued to pickup and reshare the hashtags #UntimelyCP#, while some wives even started to produce fanart such as cookies and chibi figures on various media platforms.

After a long day of work, the health connoisseur Si Chuanbai had been about to soak his feet and was hit by a series of phone calls that he didn't even have time to stick his feet in the tub.

He clicked on Weibo to see loud and clear the hashtag #ShiYingdiisNoGood# hanging on the trending list.

Is this a f*cking PR account or not? Are they going to retract that search query or are they not??

With a sullen expression, he lit a cigarette for himself.

*Translator's note: The laughing text used here is pronounced xi (嘻), but the text reads (囍),which is a character most often used in weddings.

*At Chinese weddings, the bride and groom drink cross-cup wine

chapters.title: Chapter 118 - Very Sweet
chapters.body:
Chapter 118 - Very Sweet

…

In the manor.

Xiang Yi had prepared a few more ingredients for the staff, and everyone happily gathered for the barbecue, leaving Shi Sui and Xiang Yi alone in the living room.

Shi Sui leaned back in his chair as he lazily gazed at the little bunny in front of him.

The girl had her cheeks in both hands as she waited for the rice wine mulled eggs in the health pot on the table to cook. Her creamy white complexion revealed a tint of red from the alcohol, while her beautiful eyes were shining, full of stars, her persistent and expectant gaze as cute as ever.

Shi Sui recalled a memory from three years ago.

It's true, he had a good memory, but he would never remember irrelevant things. He couldn't even remember what he had done when he visited Xiang Feng's house that day. The only thing he could remember was little Xiang Yi, who had been secretly drinking alcohol.

The girl in bunny pajamas had opened the door for him. Following formalities, he should have left, but at that time, he had mysteriously felt the urge to step inside the Xiang family.

The girl had prepared a complete set of side dishes—from shredded dried squid, edamame, chicken feet with pickled peppers, peanuts, fried chicken… The portions were not large, but it covered the entire coffee table. There were also two bottles of fruit wine and half a bottle of red wine.

Shi Sui picked up the bottle and glanced at the percentage as he pressed his slender finger tips to his eyebrows.

The unsuspecting girl who harbored no doubts toward him patted the fuzzy cushion next to her and said, "Sit, sit here!"

Shi Sui murmured, "That's brave of you."

The girl was evidently drunk as she smiled sweetly at him. As she smiled and smiled, she ended up confessing.

"Big brother, you're so handsome!"

"I really, really, really like you!"

Shi Sui's brought his index finger to his thin lips as he coughed uncomfortably.

The one being played was not embarrassed, but the jester himself grabbed a pillow as he buried half his face in it, revealing only a pair of clear bright eyes.

Shi Sui bent his knees, half kneeling in front of her as he lazily dr.a.p.ed his arm around her neck. "You like me?" he teased with a smile. "Hey kid, if you fall for me before you are of age, your brothers will gang up and end my life, right?"

"I'm not a kid…" she softly muttered.

"You're not of legal age yet."

"Underage… You can't like someone when you're underage?" The girl asked in a daze.

"That's right." Shi Sui said casually, picking up a piece of dried squid only to have it snatched out of his hand by Xiang Yi.

Arrogantly, the girl said, "Then you can't eat."

Shi Sui smiled from her antics. "Stingy."

"I am stingy." Xiang Yi pursed her lips and thought about it. "When I grow up, can I like you then?"

Shi Sui pulled out his cigarette box, hesitated for a moment, and placed it back in his pockets. "Whatever you want."

The girl looked at the shredded squid, then at him, then split the already thin dried squid into two thinner pieces. She stuffed one into his hands and said in a friendly manner, "Then you can have a little bit."

After she spoke those words, the girl tilted her head onto the sofa as she felt her eyelids become heavy, falling asleep in the blink of an eye.

Shi Sui: "…"

He looked down at the piece of dried squid in the palm of his hand and bit it with the tip of his teeth. A faint sweetness spread through his palette as he lowered his eyebrows and smiled lightly.

Ding—

The health pot had finished brewing.

Xiang Yi served Shi Sui a bowl of rice wine and eggs first before pouring one for herself.

When Shi Sui regained his senses, his gaze fell on Xiang Yi. The girl was cooling the pot by stirring it with a spoon. The red goji berries, yellow egg flowers, and white glutinous rice rippled in the mixture. She tasted a spoonful and huffed at the heat.

Instantly, she was met by a senior's seemingly promiscuous gaze…

The girl licked the corners of her lips and instantly became sheepish. "It's very sweet. Senior, don't you want to try it?"

chapters.title: Chapter 119 - You'Ve Grown Up
chapters.body:
Chapter 119 - You'Ve Grown Up

Shi Sui squinted his peach blossom eyes. "Is that so?"

Xiang Yi looked at him innocently until a few seconds later, it finally dawned on her.

She picked up a clean spoon and stirred Shi Sui's bowl of rice wine and eggs, pushing it toward his hands. "The temperature should be okay now."

If it had been another man, Xiang Yi would never have done this.

But this was her Zaizai, and she had to take care of him.

Shi Sui smiled vaguely. "You've grown up."

Xiang Yi waited for a moment before responding. Curiously, she asked: "At times like this, shouldn't you praise me more with statements along the lines of 'you're so considerate and understanding'?"

Shi Sui slowly sipped at his rice wine and lazily said, "Evidently, you still don't understand anything."

Xiang Yi: ???

Alright, whatever Zaizai says goes.

The girl revealed the smile of a woman who has spoiled her child.

After they finished the rice wine and eggs, Shi Sui voluntarily went off to wash the dishes.

Since it was only two bowls and a health pot, he did not turn on the dishwasher and instead turned on the faucet to rinse them out.

"Oh, right. Senior, I have to go out tomorrow, so I might not make it for the evening stream." Xiang Yi's voice traveled through the splashing of running water.

He turned off the faucet and turned around. "Tomato Entertainment's Annual Gala?"

"Eh? You know it too?"

"Mhmm. I heard Si Chuanbai mention it today."

Tomato Entertainment was the company the person who had inhabited Xiang Yi's body had signed with.

It was not of a large scale, but because of their marketing skills, they were quite well known in the circle.

Xiang Yi: "I can prepare you a bento and leave it in the fridge so you can heat it up when you're hungry. Or I'll try to come back earlier to cook…"

Suddenly, Xiang Yi paused her speech.

She was only going out for the day, why was she making it seem like she owed him something…

Moreover, Zaizai can always order takeout; it's not like he had to eat her cooking.

She felt slightly embarrassed as she habitually rubbed her eyebrows. The man's calm and mellow voice finally calmed her nerves. "I'll wait for you to come back."

The warm light dissolved at the top of his head. Away from the camera, he was obviously a sharp and alienated man, yet at this time, he was as gentle as a husband waiting for his newly-wed wife to come home.

Xiang Yi's heartbeat instantly skipped a beat as she held her breath.

With a smirk, he lowered his head and added, "Along with Xiao Naofu, of course."

Huuu….

Xiang Yi let out a sigh of relief. Before she could tell what was going on with that strange heartbeat, she frantically nodded. "I'm going to bed, goodnight."

"Good night."

The two simple words sounded so inexplicably soft coming from his lips.

Xiang Yi increased her pace as she frantically rubbed at her glowing hot ears.

The next day.

After lunch, Xiang Yi began preparing the bentos.

Xiao Naofu's portion consisted of boiled chicken b.r.e.a.s.t and pumpkin puree.

Shi Sui's portion was made up of sweet and sour pork ribs, a thick fried egg, and rice balls made from purple rice and pork floss.

She filled Xiao Naofu's bowl up with cat food and water then went off to greet Shi Sui. "Senior, I'm leaving. Take care of yourself, and take care of Xiao Naofu as well."

Shi Sui gently replied, "Okay, take care and be safe. Don't go around drinking so indiscriminately."

"Of course not…" As soon as the words came out Xiang Yi remembered the day she had been drunk in Shi Sui's room…

The girl awkwardly smiled before turning her head rapidly and prattling away.

Once she'd left, all that was left in the living room was a man and a cat.

Xiao Naofu hopped on the sofa as the entire cat's body collapsed into a pancake. It looked towards Shi Sui with provocative eyes. "Meow! Meow meow meow!"

—— This is my territory now!

Shi Sui unceremoniously picked up Xiao Naofu and raised his eyebrows, smiling slightly. "There's nobody here to defend you, who are you trying to fight? Little, cat, meow."

Xiao Naofu: Σ(°△°|||)︴

chapters.title: Chapter 120 - You'Re More Of A Dog Than An Actual Dog
chapters.body:
Chapter 120 - You'Re More Of A Dog Than An Actual Dog

Xiao Naofu flailed its paws in the air, trying to kick Shi Sui in the process.

Shi Sui had seen through all of its motives. Seeing that he was tall with long arms, he raised the cat even higher.

No matter how much it tried to kick its short legs, it wouldn't reach him at all.

"Right now, it's just you and me here. A misbehaving kitty cat… if you're brewed into soup, nobody will find out." Shi Sui said casually.

Immediately, Xiao Naofu did not dare move as its watery pupils began to well up with tears.

'QQ Am I not the most beloved Huhu in this house?'

'How come once that stupid woman leaves, Shi Sui the Stinky Man is a different person!'

"So, behave, mmkay?" Shi Sui's gentle questioning tone made the little cat tremble.

It hesitated for a few seconds before giving a well behaved, "Meow~Meow~"

'Once Yiyi of the Xiang family returns, watch this Huhu's acting skills ruin you!'

Shi Sui held Xiao Naofu in his arms as he sat on the couch, stroking the cat's back with his slender fingers.

Xiao Naofu endured the humiliation. Since it couldn't resist, it might as well enjoy the process…

Happily, it meowed as it relaxed on the man's long legs, thinking that the muscles on the stinky man were quite comfortable…

The next second —

The cat's ears shot up as it heard the man's confident banter, "I hear cats can be neutered at six months. Hmm, I wonder how old Xiao Naofu is now…"

Xiao Naofu: …!!!

'Motherf*cker with the last name Shi, can you be any less human!'

'This Huhu is only a baby, how can you think of such a cruel thing!'

'The dogs on Little Rabbit Farm aren't as much of a dog as you!'

As the cat writhed in anger, Shi Sui's thin lips curled into a smile.

His deduction was right.

Xiao Naofu could understand human speech and even had the thinking ability of a small child.

But it probably wasn't very smart to be this easily discovered 🙂

Outside the manor.

Xiang Yi could see Ah Nan waving at her from afar.

"My sweet, over here, over here!"

Behind him was a magnificent looking van. The entertainment industry was a very realistic place. When Xiang Yi had been despised by the entire internet, the van her company had sent for her was in tatters. Now that "Two Under One Roof" had been streaming for a few days, the company had immediately changed her car.

Ah Nan opened the door for XIang Yi as he rattled off the day's itinerary. "I'll take you to makeup first and change your dress, and you'll be on the red carpet at six o'clock. At 6:30, the annual gala will officially begin…"

"Wait." Xiang Yi interrupted him. "If it starts at six, why are you here so early?"

"My dear, have you not recovered your memory?" Ah Nan said sadly. "Please have the consciousness of a female celebrity! I'm already very late. That little gremlin who wronged you already started fasting three days ago! This morning, she went in to try on her makeup and costume already, and she was so exquisite that she spent two hours doing eye makeup alone!"

Xiang Yi: "…"

'Sorry to disturb, it is I who did not understand the entertainment industry.'

"Oh right, you haven't seen the dress you're wearing today, right? Here, I took a picture."

Ah Nan flipped through his photo album and showed Xiang Yi a picture. "Doesn't it look good? I chose this after very careful consideration!"

It was a bright red dress with strong visual impact.

Xiang Yi pursed her lower lips as a memory flashed in her mind that she did not want to recall. She closed her eyes and softly said, "Thank you, it's beautiful."

Ah Nan noticed nothing unusual as he happily began browsing through the Melon forum. But as he browsed, his face became more sour.

A dazzling title hit him head on: [Take a look at how low* the Vase Fairy's fashion taste is]

*Translator's Note: In Chinese internet slang, the term "low', used in original English form, is used to refer to something very lowly status, often cheap, tacky, or inexpensive, whether it refers to a person or an item of clothing.

chapters.title: Chapter 121 - Goddess On Earth
chapters.body:
Chapter 121 - Goddess On Earth

Content of the post:

Today is FQ's* annual gala as everyone knows. After gathering all the outfits of the FQ artists, Jiang Chen lives up to being top class, wearing a custom black suit ASWL*!

There are several female celebrities. Lin Zhiya's mermaid gown shows off her figure very well, and Mo Li's gender-neutral suit is also great. The most beautiful is Qin Wanyan's star-adorned dress. I found a photo that her manager had taken and she simply looks like a goddess who has descended upon earth, OK!

Here comes the comedic content, though. A certain vase has been getting a lot of exposure recently, and after a long search, I finally found a promotional picture. But a friend has leaked to me that the dress her agent had selected for her looks like this! The attached picture is of the dress in question. Everyone, please take a look at the LOWEST forecast for today↓

The post also mentioned some of the most popular artists from Tomato Entertainment, hence it made the trending front page immediately.

—[Jiang Chen didi, slay me ah ah!! Come undo big sister's blouse buttons!]

—[Mo Li really has an elegant face, she's a walking clothes hanger! No wonder she started as a model]

—[Qin Wanyan is killing it! Actually a goddess on earth! Compared to the Vase Fairy's outfit emmmmmm…]

—[These bling bling sparkles… Miss Xiang, are you abandoning the cutesy style for the style of last century's call girls??]

—[Sisters, I've checked the price of that dress, it's made by a very small designer from overseas and only costs ten thousand RMB or so. She actually didn't even buy it and is renting it instead… This is LOW to the max]

—[To be honest, this dress reeks of cheap online retail. Even if you can't rent the latest styles from a luxury brand, at least wear something that was trending from last year's fashion week. It feels like today's Vase Fairy can't even qualify to be a vase anymore.]

Xiang Yi noticed Ah Nan's discomfort and warmly asked, "What's wrong?"

Ah Nan showed her the post as if he had been wronged. "This is so obviously sent out by Qin Wanyan's people! My dear, you see her as a sister and treat her so well, but this is how she treats you!"

This was not the first time she had heard the name Qin Wanyan. It would seem that she was the person Yan Nai continuously called "Sister Wanyan".

Xiang Yi inquired, "In the past year, were we really close?"

Ah Nan furiously complained. "Of course! You guys were so tight. But my dear, you are really too dumb. You listened to anything she told you. She said that all public best friend relationsh.i.p.s in the entertainment industry were fake, so she never mentions to anyone that you two are friends. She also said that singing was too hard, and it was easier to make money from variety shows, and you ate it all up…"

After going off for a while, Ah Nan paused. "Aigoo, my throat is about to catch on fire…"

Xiang Yi handed him a bottle of water, loosening the cap for him.

Ah Nan glugged the water, gaining back his power as if he'd just ingested steroids. "My dear, don't be too sad, I will go talk to them right now! Without experiencing the grievances of society, I don't think these keyboard warriors will ever learn how to respect people…"

Half an hour later.

Ah Nan, who wanted to roast the netizens, ended up being ruthlessly destroyed by them. Hugging his knees, he sobbed, "My dear, they are so mean wahhhh…"

#NoobAhNan, SelfDestructs#

"Want to come over to my house for hot pot once the evening is over?" Xiang Yi coaxed.

Ah Nan: "!"

"Okay, okay! I want to eat lamb rolls!"

"Alright, I'll tell Uncle Wang to slaughter a young goat before we get back."

"That's way too cruel." Ah Nan said as he gulped the saliva that was rolling down his chin, anticipating the taste of the lamb… No, he was anticipating the annual gala.

At 5:50 in the evening, all the major media outlets gathered at the entrance of the Zmoon hotel.

The thin rain that continued to drizzle was not enough to cap everyone's enthusiasm.

Tomato Entertainment's promotional stream began at this time.

*Translator's Note: FQ is short for Fan Qie or the online abbreviation for Tomato Entertainment.

*ASWL: Short for Ai Si Wo Le (愛死我了) – I love it to death

chapters.title: Chapter 122 - Red Carpet 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 122 - Red Carpet 1

—— [I've finally made it to the start of the stream. The marketing team is trying to start sh*t, I swear!]

—— [Welcome to Tomato Entertainment's large scale pageant, don't miss out on the court's concubine selection]

—— [Where is Chen Chen? I only want to see Chen Chen Zaizai Ah]

—— [Curious who Jiang Chen will be walking the red carpet with. I hear his female companion is a member of the group SEASEVEN?]

—— [Don't kill me, Sea7 (Abbreviation of Jiang Chen's boy group) Please don't smear our Jiang Chen brother's name, OK? He can't carry his garbage teammates]

—— [In all the entertainment industry, Jiang Chen's fans are the most disgusting. They are a group to begin with; if he's really strong, why not fly solo? Just because he doesn't have the support of the group's fans, does the guy think he's really top tier?]

Before the red carpet show even started, the fans were already tearing at each other.

Xiang Yi, who had just finished being styled, was resting back in the van as Ah Nan gossiped into her ear. "Oh my, Sea7's fans are tearing it up with Jiang Chen's fans again. They're greeting the opposition's ancestors in so many creative ways…"

Jiang Chen debuted as the center and the visual of the group SEASEVEN. After the group was formed, they could only be considered as slightly famous, while Jiang Chen's participation in a certain idol drama skyrocketed his popularity to be higher than the other six members combined.

Hence, Tomato Entertainment began to engage in petty operations, announcing Jiang Chen would conduct solo activities without actually leaving the group. From then on, it would spark the feud between group fans and Jiang Chen's solo fans.

Xiang Yi ran into them when she entered the studio.

The seven boys had outstanding appearances, but the atmosphere surrounding them was very depressing. Each one had a buddy to cling onto with the exception of Jiang Chen being the isolated one.

Xiang Yi's dressing room was at the end of the corridor, and while she had been waiting during her break in the van, she overheard the conversation between Jiang Chen and his agent outside the door.

"Jiang Chen, don't you know you're prone to edema? Who's going to like you with your face swelled up like that?! And if one member of your group is ignoring you, it might be their problem, but if all six members are ignoring you, maybe you should do some self reflection? With such an unpleasant character, could you even be standing here today if it weren't for me?"

Xiang Yi raised her eyebrows. Didn't this count as verbal abuse?

She then heard a clear but very sullen male voice, "Sorry, we practiced in the dance studio until late last night, I accidentally drank half a glass of water…"

"Why are you still dancing! You're never going back to that dinky group anymore, understand? If you return, nobody will like you! You guys won't have any stage performances either. Do you know of any variety shows that let you promote your album? Besides, you don't really think those dimwits will tolerate you, do you? Jiang Chen, you're different from them now, they need to look up to you…"

"Please don't say that." The youth rejected. "They are all good people."

"Whatever, I have nothing left to say to you. In a bit, you're walking the red carpet with Qin Wanyan, I've already prepared the draft. Don't let me down."

A few seconds later, the sound of high heels clacking on the hard ground gradually faded away.

The youth standing outside the door quietly sobbed spasmodically. Suddenly, there was a sound of a heavy object falling to the ground.

Xiang Yi didn't like to be nosy, but she was worried something had happened so she decisively opened the door.

Jiang Chen was passed out on the floor. He did not faint, but his face was terrifyingly pale.

In a daze, he felt the soft touch of a fingertip on his wrist before a milk candy was shoved into his mouth.

How sweet…

He opened his eyelids. In the dim light, the girl in front of him seemed to be a shining star in a dark night, looking at him with calm indifference.

chapters.title: Chapter 123 - Red Carpet 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 123 - Red Carpet 2

"I checked your pulse, you probably have low blood sugar. Does anything feel off? Headache? Nausea?" The gentle voice patiently asked.

Jiang Chen reluctantly stood up, leaning against the wall and weakly mustering, "I'm okay, thank you… big sister."

He had debuted before Xiang Yi, but he was only nineteen this year.

Xiang Yi was very fond of polite children like this and continued, "Do you want to rest in this dressing room for a bit?" She then added, "It'll just be you, I won't go in."

After all, she was still bearing the reputation of "spoiling" young fresh meats at every turn…

Jiang Chen was naturally aware of the rumors too as his expression became awkward. "No need, it's an old problem. No need to trouble big sister."

Xiang Yi nodded her chin slightly. "Okay, take care of yourself then."

Having said that, she really didn't plan on caring more about him as she lifted her skirt and walked back into the dressing room.

Jiang Chen felt an inexplicable strangeness in his heart as he eerily stopped Xiang Yi, "Big sister… Do you have more candy?"

Since he's been recording "Heartbeat" recently, his agent had informed him he looked fat in the live footage. In the last few days, he hadn't eaten much. Paired with squeezing in time to exercise and dance at night, he was afraid he'd faint again on stage at the gala.

Xiang Yi pulled out a few more pieces of candy from her purse and handed it to him.

Gummy candies, fruit candies, and chocolates were all there.

She loved little kids, so she would always carry candy on her.

But recently, it would seem they've been used more frequently to coax larger children…

Jiang Chen rubbed the edges of his candy wrapper and whispered, "Thank you." He wasn't the kind of person to actively reach out in social situations and was always the kind that needed to be persuaded to talk. However, at this moment, he began to find topics of discussion out of nothing. "Big sister, are you a TCM* doctor?"

"I just know some very surface skills," the young girl's clear eyes fell on him as she batted her feathery eyelashes. She could see through Jiang Chen's anxiety and embarrassment. "I'll grab you a chair?"

Jiang CHen was evidently relieved as he sighed, hanging his head in shame the next second.

He was inwardly feeling contradicted. He was afraid of creating a scandal with Xiang Yi, but he couldn't help relying on her like a helpless chick.

But Xiang Yi didn't seem to care as she brought a chair with a backrest for him, along with a cute pillow that belonged to Ah Nan.

At the end of the corridor where nobody paid attention to, after the voice-activated light was turned off and all was dim, Xiang Yi did not continue to talk to him. The atmosphere was quiet, yet Jiang Chen felt extremely safe.

He squeezed the suede pillow that was soft and warm.

The rich fragrance of milk bloomed on the tip of his tongue as his dizziness subsided, his vision and physical strength beginning to slowly recover.

He couldn't help but glance inside the dressing room through its half-open door. Vaguely, he could make out the hem of a girl's skirt, red as the freesias in his mother's garden back in their hometown, which looked brightest at full bloom.

She… was quite different from the rumors.

If he were to open the door a bit more, he would be able to see what the girl was doing.

Playing on her phone? Dozing off? Fixing her makeup?

But Jiang Chen's eyes burned for only a moment before dimming again.

A few pieces of candy wrappers were on the chair standing in attention as if in a military position, neatly placed as if done by a person with an obsessive-compulsive disorder.

Inside the van.

Ah Nan held Xiang Yi's purse for her. Feeling the bag constantly vibrating, he hurriedly pulled out the mobile phone.

"Sweetie, maybe someone has an emergency and needs to talk to you."

Xiang Yi opened the message to find a text message from an unknown contact.

When she opened it, they were pictures of Xiao Naofu. No more, no less—nine photos altogether.

Followed by two lines of text:

— It's behaving very well.

— In my arms, watching the stream.

*Translator's note: Abbreviation of "Traditional Chinese Medicine" used for easier translating

chapters.title: Chapter 124 - Red Carpet 3
chapters.body:
Chapter 124 - Red Carpet 3

Eh, a text from Zaizai?

As Xiang Yi flipped through the photos, her eyebrows curved more and more.

It would seem that the man and cat were getting along well.

"Who is it?" Ah Nan looked at the screen and let out a shriek of surprise. "When did your relationship with Shi Yingdi get so good? Isn't he famous for being distant??"

Xiang Yi: "I don't think so, I think Senior has a good temper and is really easy to get along with."

Ah Nan: ???

Was it because I've been in this business for too long and all the gossip I've acquired was for nothing?

In the manor.

Li Jianyu was still worrying about the contents of today's live broadcast. "Daddy Shi, what are you planning to stream in a bit? Why don't you try cooking, too? I remember you knew how to cook instant noodles or something…"

Humble little Li had been so immersed in his food stream that he had forgotten he was a variety show director.

Shi Sui lazily responded, "Not interested."

"Then what are you planning to do?"

"Pet the cat, watch a stream." Without Xiang Yi, a certain actor became passive toward his profession within minutes. "Why don't you stream me watching a stream?"

Li Jianyu: ???

Where did the extremely cooperative daddy Shi from two days ago go?

Why was he suddenly so rebellious today?!

But after pondering it over for a bit, he decided that it was not a bad idea. Overwhelmed, he exclaimed, "Okay, if you have the balls to watch, I have the balls to broadcast!"

A few minutes later…

The stream for "Two Under One Roof" began.

Netizens happily flooded in, in particular several Shisui sisters. Upon hearing that Xiang Yi would not be present today, they were so overjoyed they wanted to set off firecrackers.

Who would have guessed ——

A man in a gray satin shirt with his cold slender fingers c.a.r.e.s.sed a milky white kitten in his arms without a rush in the world. He had changed into a pair of gold-framed glasses with a thin chain. His brows seemed more deep set, his nose bridge more linear, like a noble gentleman from the middle ages, radiating an aura of cold indifference.

Yet, when he faced the camera and smiled lightly, his peach blossom eyes beamed with affection.

"Good evening, shall we watch a stream?"

The comments in the stream quickly became dense:

— [Ahhh what kind of evildoer is this? I'm gone, I'm gone!!]

— [I wish I could transmigrate as Xiao Naofu once again! But speaking of it, Xiao Naofu is so well behaved today]

— [??? Am I going blind? Is the tablet on the table playing the stream from Tomato Entertainment's annual gala??]

Outside the hotel.

Cheers from fans rang out ahead, signaling the beginning of the red carpet segment.

Ah Nan hurriedly opened the stream. The first few appearances were made by new artists who were not that popular, so there weren't many people in the live comments. It was only when the gender-neutral Mo Li walked in with short hair that the comment section exploded.

— [Wowowowow Mo Li is so A, what a boss!]

— [Models are on a different realm for real. She makes walking on a red carpet look like she's on the stage]

—[No wonder this sister is the darling of the fashion industry. That wide shoulder suit is the newest autumn piece from a high-end luxury brand!]

Following her was Lin Zhiya.

As soon as Ah Nan saw her, he became riled up with adrenaline. "This is the little demon! Ahhh she's so manipulative. Look, she even altered her dress to be low cut at the c.h.e.s.t!"

The sparkling champagne-colored mermaid dress enveloped Lin Zhiya's alluring figure as the stream suddenly became more vivid and captivating.

—[So Lin Zhiya's figure was always this outstanding?!]

—[I'm so jealous of her figure, how come her meat knows where to grow so well!]

—[I have a foreboding feeling that the Vase Fairy is going to be smashed into the dust /shaky legs /shaky legs]

chapters.title: Chapter 125 - Surprise 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 125 - Surprise 1

Following her, the members of the boy group SEASEVEN walked down the red carpet.

From left to right, there were six in total.

Jiang Chen was not among them.

The group fans and solo fans were in a deathmatch that could only be described as a bloodbath.

— [Oh yeah! Good job, Chen zai. Don't walk the red carpet with those good-for-nothing idols!]

— [This sh*tty group has no team spirit. I'm crying. wtf Tomato Entertainment? Can you stop funding them please?]

—[I'm fuming! Jiang Chen, how long are you going to torment the other members of Sea7? Please just make your solo debut, and let the other kids go!]

—[It's obviously the six of them leeching off Jiang Chen gege like a vampire, where are you finding the face to curse him? Do you pick up your bowl to eat then put it down to curse your mother?]

When random passers-by see the hate spewed by the fans, they have already lost all appreciation for the Sea7 group.

After all, the consequences to the actions of their fans will ultimately be atoned by the idols.

Meanwhile, the atmosphere in the "Two Under One Roof" stream was completely different.

Shi Sui wasn't paying attention to the stream at all as he was teasing Xiao Naofu the whole time.

He pulled out Xiao Naofu's favorite dried fish and softly waved it in front of the cat.

When the dried fish moved to the left, Xiao Naofu would lean toward the left; when the meat swayed to the right, the cat would follow.

"Want it?" Shi Sui lazily prodded.

"Meow~" Xiao Naofu pretended to behave.

Shi Sui stuck out his hand. "Handshake."

Xiao Naofu: ???

Bleh, this Huhu does not work for food!!

Seeing Xiao Naofu distressed, Shi Sui smiled gently, putting the dried fish back in the sealed bag.

Xiao Naofu: !!!

Wah the stupid woman would never treat me like this, she would have broken the fish into smaller pieces and placed them in this Huhu's mouth.

'This stinky man is evil!!'

The comments in the stream:

—— [Xiao Naofu is a foodie cat, no mistake!]

—— [Is Shi Yingdi trying to treat Xiao Naofu like a dog?]

——[Shisui, how could you have the heart to bully such a cute kitten! Let me feed it!]

Xiao Naofu was aggrieved and helpless, but he wanted the food so badly…

It could only stretch out its chubby white paws, pretentiously tapping on Shi Sui's palm.

Shi Sui gave it a piece of dried fish and squeezed its back, praising, "Good, good, Xiao Naofu is the smartest."

Xiao Naofu bit into the fish with its head raised proudly.

'This Huhu is indeed the most outstanding!/

Shi Sui pulled out another piece of fish and spoke a new command: "Roll over."

"…" Motherf*cker!

For the dried fish… I'll tolerate it!

The milky kitten attempted to roll around in his arms. Unable to completely control it, the cat fell face first on the man's pencil straight t.h.i.g.hs before rolling another half circle before finally succeeding with its belly and legs sticking upright. It's claws weren't as careful as they hooked onto the man's silk satin shirt, pulling it down to reveal a thin waist and looming lines of his abdomen muscles…

The netizens pounded at their desks. [F*ck! I didn't know I'd be envious of Shi Yingdi for petting a cat! Or be more envious of Xiao Naofu for being able to roll around on Shi Yingdi's legs!]

The next second —

Shi Sui smiled eerily. "Xiao Naofu, can you bark like a dog? I'll give you double the dried fish snacks."

The cat's ice blue pupils widened.

'Are you the devil?!!'

——[Hahaha Shi Sui really is only ten years old]

——[Xiao Naofu: I may not be a real human, but you're a real dog!]

——[My god, I'm in love with this bad boy Shi Yingdi! I have no resistance to the charm of m.a.t.u.r.e men!]

Unable to stand it anymore, Li Jianyu reminded, "Mentor Shi, did you forget you are watching a stream…"

It just happened to be Qin Wanyan's turn on the red carpet…

chapters.title: Chapter 126 - Surprise 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 126 - Surprise 2

…

Qin Wanyan emerged amid the fog left by the rain.

Under the spotlight, Qin Wanyan was wearing her maroon-colored hair down with curls, wearing a delicate crown-shaped barrette on her head embellished with diamonds in the shape of stars.

The most breathtaking part was her dress, a long dress with a color gradient from silver to blue layered with a translucent tulle material on the outside. A fragmented array of small diamonds shone brightly beneath the tulle like the Milky Way, so beautiful it's stifling.
