"Ah ah ah a goddess on earth, Qin Wanyan!" The screams of fans broke through the clouds, loud enough to be heard by everyone on the livestream channel.

The live comments grew evidently denser:

——[Wow, this really is a goddess herself!]

——[Big sister must be tired from descending from the heavens, tonight's best dressed must go to you!]

——[The moon won't descend to you, but Goddess Qin has brought the moon and stars to you!!]

Qin Wanyan was an expert at managing her expression so that even in the rain, her smile shined bright.

She approached the autograph board and signed her name as smoothly as flowing water.

Her well-designed handwriting was light and elegant as more and more people began to blow rainbow farts* in the live comments.

—— [This dress is too beautiful. You can feel her sparkling with each step!]

—— [Thinking back to the Vase Fairy's cheap call girl red dress, the little goddess is basically a dimensional blow to the Vase Fairy]

—— [Ah ah why doesn't big sister walk the red carpet with Jiang Chen? They are a couple on screen after all]

Although "Heartbeat"'s broadcasting numbers weren't as good as "Two Under One Roof", their trending search queries were quite terrifying. Because of the main trajectory of 'romance', plus the gossip brought about by the already controversial guests, god knows how many times each guests' fans had already ripped each other apart.

Jiang Chen's popularity was there. Although he had 0 CP synergy with Qin Wanyan, they still managed to force together a batch of CP shippers.

Jiang Chen's girlfriend fans were very fierce in combat though and demolished the CP supporters on the spot:

—— [It's just for variety show effect. Can this female artist stop lying to herself?]

—— [Qin Wanyan is exactly five years older than Chen zai, basically an old hang, taking away our Chen zai from her hmph]

—— [GTFO CP fans! Jiang Chen is the most popular trafficking idol in his career. Stop trying to barricade our didi!]

Meanwhile, inside the van, the agent was in a fit of rage toward Jiang Chen.

"Are you deaf, or are you mentally disabled? I told you to walk the red carpet with Qin Wanyan! Have your wings hardened now that you won't even listen to what I say? Let me tell you, without me, you are nothing! I can make you reach the top, I can also make you fall into the mud!"

The manager continued to curse while Jiang Chen remained silent.

After all… he was used to it.

He endured this kind of verbal abuse all the time.

Seeing his stubborn demeanor, the agent was furious and wanted to slap him once or twice.

She had already accepted the bribes from Qin Wanyan's agent! Now that things were messed up, wouldn't she have to spit back all the money?

This basically felt like cutting her own flesh!

She was not very capable, as it was based on pure luck she was able to bring up someone like Jiang Chen. Taking advantage of Jiang Chen's honest character, she had brainwashed him everyday. She couldn't even count how much money she'd made from Jiang Chen.

The agent turned her shrewd eyes to her money making machine and falsely coaxed: "Jiang Chen, later at the gala, you must interact with Qin Wanyan more. I can plead with the boss for you and ask for you to leave SEASEVEN. How about that? Isn't that what you've always wanted?"

Jiang Chen, who had been in a state of numbness throughout this whole ordeal, finally stirred…

*Translator's Note: This is becoming an increasingly common term throughout the novel, so I will begin translating it literally from now on. "Giving rainbow farts" in this case basically means to go so overboard with exaggerated and false flattery, to the point of 'ass kissing', usually done by fans of idols.

*I believe "wuli" means 'ours' or 'our' in korean, used to address idols in an intimate and fond manner

chapters.title: Chapter 127 - Fairy In A Bottle 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 127 - Fairy In A Bottle 1

…

As Qin Wanyan disappeared from sight, the fans on site were still reminiscing her stunning look.

"That dress is so beautiful. Oh, I must buy one like it in this lifetime!"

"Her skin is so nice. I feel like she looks skinnier and fairer in real life than she does on screen."

"Just now, did you hear the chatter of the Daipai Sisters (those who rely on making money from taking photos of celebrities and selling them) while they were filming Qin Wanyan? I finally understand the term 'long guns and short cannons'* the sound of those shutters going click click click…"

Another pile of rainbow farts surfaced in the livestream room as Qin Wanyan's fans felt extremely glorious.

—— [Nobody objects to goddess Qin slaying the whole stage tonight ,right?]

—— [Aside from a few seniors, only Jiang Chen and the Vase Fairy were left to walk the red carpet in the younger talent pool, right?]

—— [I just watched the red carpet order released by Tomato Entertainment. It seems Jiang Chen and Qin Wanyan were supposed to walk together]

—— [Wait, something's off? How come I see the Vase Fairy's agent?? Is she next?]

—— [Hahaha this is going to be good. What an interesting order of appearance. To appear after Qin Wanyan is basically suicde, this is actually a public beating!]

Ah Nan stepped out of the car and carefully opened a black umbrella before pulling the door open.

The Tomato Entertainment marketing team evidently wanted to rile up some drama. The photographer in charge of the livestream immediately rushed forward to take a closeup of the opening car door.

Some random fan on site screamed: "Show yourself, demon!"

There was laughter everywhere as unbridled mockery began to surface in the live comments.

The next second ——

What caught everyone's eye first was a pair of sparkling silver high heels. The girl's pale white ankles were delicate and slender, only visible for a fleeting moment before being covered up by the dress from a slight movement.

Xiang Yi leaned down and stepped out of the car in a burgundy dress with spaghetti straps covered in sequins. Her creamy skin appeared dense and white, while her figure was slender but not too thin. Her angled shoulders and swan neck arced toward the young girl's elegant face.

Her raven black hair had been tied up, but not in a stereotypical bun. Instead, it was wrapped in a printed scarf with some wisps of hair falling over her collar bone, making the whole look seem laid back and casual.

She wasn't wearing any heavy makeup either, with only a layer of clean foundation and an ombre-themed eye palette that was reminiscent of the most brilliant colors of the sunset. Her eyelids had been lightly glossed over with large glittery sequins, echoing the design of the dress and emphasizing her facial features to shine extraordinarily bright.

Xiang Yi thanked her agent holding her umbrella with a slight nod as she turned her bright eyes just in time to face the camera.

After a few days of streaming, Xiang Yi had a better grasp on being in front of a camera as her red lips bloomed into a beaming smile.

The live audience: "…"

The viewers in the stream: "…"

Instantly, the comment section exploded!

—— [What the f*ck?????]

—— [What the f*ck!!!!!]

Everyone seemed to be at a loss for words at the moment as if they had been bewitched, staring unblinking at the girl on the screen.

The fan who had screamed "show yourself, demon' looked as if she had seen a real demon, expression full of shock.

Suddenly, the noisy scene became silent for a moment.

Up until ——

Jiang Chen, who had just departed the bus, made a streamline for Xiang Yi with long strides, bending down when he arrived to lift up the hem of her trailing skirt, quietly saying, "Big sister, be careful."

Only then did Xiang Yi notice that there was a selfie stick straddled across the way ahead. She didn't know if it had been dropped by a fan or… if someone had placed it there on purpose.

Xiang Yi tilted her head slightly, her brows curving. "Thank you… little brother."

The silent scene broke out with an overwhelmingly noisy array of screams.

"Ah ah ah ah ah ahhhhhhhhhh!"

*Translator's Note: Describing the different sizes and lengths of cameras and film equipment used by journalists and media outlets

chapters.title: Chapter 128 - Fairy In A Bottle 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 128 - Fairy In A Bottle 2

There were so many comments appearing at once that the comment section began glitching:

—— [Who said the Vase Fairy is ugly! Motherf*cker, what kind of a heavenly fairy is this!]

—— [First time thinking the title "Vase Fairy" is not derogatory. Can you be called a Vase if you're ugly?]

—— [Was this scripted ahead of time? A top-tier celeb picking up her skirt—novels don't even dare make this up!]

—— [Do any sisters know how to read lips, what were Chen zai and the Vase Fairy saying just now ahhh]

—— [Top trafficking celebrity X eighteenth-tier female artist, ah… A strange CP has appeared again!]

—— [When a flower blooms, let us wish that it lives as long as it can, and when a person is idle, they can appreciate the flower nonetheless! There are so many ordinary flowers that people cannot see, but this sister is a fairy in a bottle!]

—— [The term Fairy in a Bottle is spot on. Yi mei's fan here. Looking at you with envy—you guys are so good at praising her]

In reality, Jiang Chen had just come to the realization that something was off.

He wasn't afraid of being scolded, but he didn't want to drag Xiang Yi into a mess too.

With his brain churning at a rapid speed, the youth carried her skirt across the obstacle before raising his arm and carefully asking, "Big sister, do you want to walk the red carpet together?"

If he voluntarily took the initiative, perhaps everyone would only flame him.

Xiang Yi was nonchalant. She already felt that walking the red carpet was just a formality, and since Jiang Chen invited her and she didn't hate him, she casually took his arm.

The screaming fans became even louder.

The combination of a handsome man and a beautiful woman was lethal. Jiang Chen wearing a black suit matched very well in appearance with Xiang Yi in a red strappy dress. Surprisingly, the temperaments of the two were very compatible as well.

Jiang Chen had a habitually gloomy face. Although he was handsome, it was inevitable that he looked cold and unkind all the time, making people feel distant.

But beside the gentle and fresh-looking Xiang Yi, it was as if a stream had melted last season's snow as his whole person seemed much softer.

In the manor.

When Qin Wanyan appeared on the stage, Shi Sui had looked up only to withdraw his gaze uninterestedly, indulging back in pinching Xiao Naofu's face.

Xiao Naofu didn't dare to be angered or make any noise as it grieved to an extreme.

The live comments were full of laughter.

—— [Xiao Naofu: I have "I'm willing.jpg" written all over my face]

—— [Gege, my face is really squishable too! Come squeeze me!!]

—— [Instead of dreaming, why not find a dream master to see if they can get you to possess Xiao Naofu]

To the Shisui sisters, it was already very satisfying to see Shi Sui even if he didn't speak much and was just teasing a cat; they were very happy to watch nonetheless.

"Aiyah, mentor Xiang Yi has appeared!" Li Jianyu blurted out, revealing a smile of a father watching his daughter. He even mimicked the tone of a fan as he spoke to Shi Sui. "Please Shi Yingdi, look at our pretty sister! It's not too late to invest your stocks in her!"

The live comments: [Hahaha the director is forcing likes on stream]

When everyone thought that Shi Sui wouldn't not take Li Jianyu's teasing, the man raised his narrow eyes and focused on the tablet.

When Xiang Yi appeared on screen, the man beamed with a smile.

The man who had always been of a lazy spirit suddenly curved his lips, saying in a sultry and soothing voice, "Meimei is quite pretty."

—— [Ah ah Shi Yingdi's smile is killing me!!!]

Then… Shi Sui saw Jiang Chen rush over to carry Xiang Yi's dress train.

Then, the girl had taken his arm and the two walked down the red carpet together.

"…" The dried fish the man had almost fed into Xiao Noafu's mouth was immediately retracted.

Xiao Naofu did not understand. "Meow? Meow meow??"

—— Huhu is hungry, Huhu wants dried fish!

An indifferent and strict voice sounded by the cat's ears. "No, you're not hungry."

Xiao Noafu: …Shi Dog, can you please be a human for once!!

chapters.title: Chapter 129 - Queen Xiang Yi And Her Maids
chapters.body:
Chapter 129 - Queen Xiang Yi And Her Maids

On the red carpet, Xiang Yi and Jiang Chen were not like those crazed celebrities who dragged out their time and would walk in tiny steps to maximize their exposure. Aside from Jiang Chen pausing in the middle for a few seconds to bow in thanks to his supporters, the two were at the end in an instant.

Jiang Chen signed his own name and added a wavy cartoon at the end, which was the unified signature of all the members of SEASEVEN. The fans in the stream almost cried when they saw this.

——[Ah ah ah Sea7's logo! Chen Chen still has the group in his heart!!]

The solo debut supporters were unhappy, but since it was their zaizai who had signed it, they couldn't say anything.

In reality, it was Tomato Entertainment that refused to let Jiang Chen leave the group. However, they also wouldn't let him attend group events either. To be stuck in the middle, Jiang Chen had to shoulder double the disdain from both fans and his group mates.

For the purpose of becoming the topic of discussions, the most popular news and gossip would come from conflict. Plus, they could profit off both the group fans and the solo debut supporters. Wouldn't that be a win-win?

Jiang Chen didn't even pay attention to the server lady in charge of handing out pens as his eyes stared straight at Xiang Yi.

The girl was so far she seemed to glow, but it was a natural whiteness, unlike that Qin Wanyan. From afar she was pretty fair, but up close you could tell even her limbs were covered in liquid foundation.

Xiang Yi received the gold colored marker she handed over and lightly said thanks. Her voice was polite and soft that even the server lady in charge felt her heart skip a beat.

Ah ah ah what kind of heavenly voice is this!

Her penmanship was steady but natural, like floating clouds or the flow of water.

Xiang Yi's calligraphy skills instantly stunned the netizens instantly.

—— [F*ck, that's Running (Xing) script right??]

—— [Respect! The Little Vase's handwriting is brilliant!]

—— [There is no harm if there is no comparison. Compared to the scribbles of the others, this sister's words are simply a refreshing stream!]

Even Jiang Chen couldn't help but peek back at Xiang Yi's handwriting.

He had been admitted as a trainee by his family when he was only in junior high. Although his signature was trained to look very chic, his real handwriting was equivalent to that of an elementary grader…

'Big sister is so amazing,' Jiang Chen thought.

A gust of wind blew by, and the server lady sneezed from the cold.

Xiang Yi placed the marker back in the tray she was holding and removed the silk scarf that was holding her hair. The green silk scarf was like a waterfall that gracefully flowed off her head. She wrapped the scarf around the server lady like a shawl and deftly tied a knot with her pale fingers.

"When you get home, make sure to drink some brown sugar and ginger soup. Careful not to get sick, thank you for your hard work."

The server lady: …!!

Her eyes were so full of shock her speech became muddled. "Th-thank you…"

Wahh Q_Q how can she be this gentle!!

It wasn't until Xiang Yi had walked away that she regained her senses. How would she return this scarf?

The live comments:

—— [I could watch that scarf scene a hundred times!]

—— [This is the charisma of a gentle girl… I'm smitten!]

In the banquet hall.

Xiang Yi sat according to the nametag her company had arranged.

The staff probably wanted to start some drama as they had deliberately lined up the most controversial female celebrities to sit together.

From left to right was Mo Li, Lin Zhiya, Xiang Yi, and Qin Wanyan.

When the other three saw Xiang Yi's outfit, their faces instantly became stiff.

To make matters worse, the cameraman in charge of the stream panned out for a panoramic view.

Suddenly, a god-tier comment appeared in the comment section:

—— [Pfft, this is basically showing Queen Xiang Yi and her maids!]

chapters.title: Chapter 130 - So What If You'Re Pretty
chapters.body:
Chapter 130 - So What If You'Re Pretty

Someone took a screenshot of this comment and posted it on Weibo. Quickly, it was reposted by a meme blog as a sea of hahahas exploded on the internet.

—— [Qin Wanyan and the other two look hilarious, vividly explaining what it means to look like you're 'eating flies']

—— [Hahaha everyone probably wanted to slay the audience but ended up being showed up by a black swan in an instant]

—— [To be honest, the spaghetti strap dress really does it in terms of elegance and beauty. Everyone knows there is a gap between internet celebrities and real life celebrities, and the gap between Xiang Yi and the other three is basically the one between a celebrity and a socialite]

—— [The term socialite is too accurate! The Little Vase is an authentic Bai Fumei at home, that gentle and calm demeanor isn't something ordinary people can possess]

Fortunately, the cameraman quickly changed to focus on Jiang Chen and the Sea7 boys group. The live comments took an abrupt turn as they began tearing at each other again.

Mo Li and Xiang Yi had no previous interactions, so they greeted each other with a light gesture.

Li Zhiya had been at odds with Xiang Yi for a long time. She played on her phone for a while before saying in a peculiar and tart manner, "Xiang Yi, do you know what the netizens are saying about you? They're calling you a vase! Isn't that the same as them calling you superficial and shallow?"

Xiang Yi responded indifferently, "Is it not directly complimenting me for being pretty?"

Lin Zhiya was dumbfounded.

What kind of stupid logic was that?!

She gnashed her teeth. "But some people say you only rely on seducing men, even Jiang Chen has been bewitched by you, which means…"

Xiang Yi: "Mhmm, means I'm pretty."

Lin Zhiya's eyes widened, her false eyelashes looking terrifying. "You, you, you— what is there to be proud of! What's so great about being pretty?!"

Xiang Yi: "Thank you, you flatter me."

Lin Zhiya was green with anger, but she did not have anything to retort with.

Qin Wanyan cursed Lin Zhiya in her heart for being too stupid to be choked up after three sentences.

But… Xiang Yi was a bit strange.

She had become sharp.

She mulled over her words and carefully asked in a low voice, "Sweetie, I sent you so many messages, why didn't you respond to a single one?"

"I haven't been checking my phone, and my phone number and social media have all been changed back to their original."

The person occupying her body didn't have her memory and couldn't unlock her phone nor log into her accounts, so they had registered for new accounts.

When Xiang Yi returned, she had changed all her numbers and accounts back to her original ones.

Qin Wanyan had already heard this excuse from Yan Nai, but she did not believe it at all. How could someone not know how to use technology these days?

She affectionately grabbed Xiang Yi's hand. "You're not close with me anymore. My dear, do you have some misunderstanding toward me… When I heard you lost your memory, I was so worried about you…"

Xiang Yi calmly withdrew her hand. She did not like having physical contact with strangers.

"Sorry, I don't remember anything that happened last year."

Her attitude seemed distant, but her deportment did not falter, so much that Qin Wanyan couldn't even use any of her statements to her advantage.

"Then let's add each other as friends." Qin Wanyan decided to play along with her at first. Either way, Xiang Yi will be thoroughly manipulated by her in the end. "We're going to become the bestest of friends in the world~"

Suddenly, Mo Li interrupted. "Xiang Yi, let's add each other, too?"

Xiang Yi was not keen on social interactions, but she wasn't reluctant either. Casually, she added the both of them.

Feeling left out, Lin Zhiya huffed, "Don't even dream of adding me as a friend. Even if you add me, you'll only be placed on my blacklist!"

Xiang Yi let her 'eyes watch her nose and her nose watch her heart'*. "Oh."

Lin Zhiya: ???

That's all???

chapters.title: Chapter 131 - The Melon Ended Up On Her Own Head
chapters.body:
Chapter 131 - The Melon Ended Up On Her Own Head

Lin Zhiya waited a long time, but Xiang Yi did not utter a word more.

Several question marks protruded from her head.

Shouldn't you say something courteous during times like this?

But Xiang Yi was sitting comfortably, her slender neck forming a beautiful arc with her shoulders as she looked straight ahead steadily.

Lin Zhiya: "…"

You're… You're really not going to add me??

Suddenly, she felt very left out…

At this time, the audience seats were filled up. It was an annual gala, so without exception, the big boss and little boss each had a few words to say, while the event was intercepted with several performances from the company's artists. This way, all the labor costs were saved.

Bored, Xiang Yi flipped through the program realizing that the final performance was a song and dance number from Jiang Chen's boy group.

She felt her phone vibrate.

Looking down, it was a message from Ah Nan.

[Nan on Nan]: Sobbing.gif…

Xiang Yi sent him a question mark.

[Nan on Nan]: QQQQ I'm in the washroom, but there's no more toilet paper! My dear, I'll come wash your dishes, clean your house, feed the pigs, collect the eggs as long as you ask someone to send me some toilet paper /sad /sad

[Nan on Nan]: Do not tell anyone that it's me in here!! I don't want to become the dumbest agent in the company!!!

Xiang Yi: "…"

She rubbed her forehead, unsure of what to say.

Out of all the guys, she only knew Jiang Chen.

She looked toward his direction only to see that he wasn't at his seat.

Where did he go?

Xiang Yi carefully left the scene.

In the washroom.

When Xiang Yi stepped out, there were cleaning staff on site. She asked one of them to rescue Ah Nan while she waited and daydreamed on a wicker chair at the corner of the terrace.

Since she was little, she had had no interest in banquets and events such as this. She was hoping once Ah Nan came out, she could suggest slipping out in advance.

She didn't know whether the man and cat at home had eaten yet, either.

"Clack, clack, clack."

The sound of high heels clacking on the floor sounded from afar. The person happened to stop at the terrace with the green plants as a barrier. She didn't notice Xiang Yi sitting in the corner as the woman exploded in profanities toward the youth in front of her. "Is your brain f*cking fried! I told you to walk the red carpet with Qin Wanyan, but you didn't listen to me. I told you to interact with her and you still didn't listen to me. But then you ran off to lift the skirt of that bitch, why are you such a brat!!! Without you, would she have fallen to death or be paralyzed?!"

A familiar but weak voice responded, "Sister Ling, please don't say that…"

Xiang Yi raised her brows. Did she forget to look at the almanac today? Did it say Yi was going to eat melons?*

The woman named sister Ling sneered. "Why can't I say it? Have you been fooled by the devil? How can she even be compared to a hair on Qin Wanyan's body? Look at her outfit today, so eager to show off her body with that spaghetti strap dress. It seems to me she'd make the dress split all the way up to her neck if she could… Why do you think she can go on a variety show with Shi Yingdi? She probably slept with everyone up and down…"

"That's enough." Jiang Chen raised his head and looked at her. Because of the acc.u.mulated fear, his voice trembled, but he was very angry. "It is the most basic courtesy to not speak ill of others behind their back…"

"Smack!"

A crisp slap on the face shook Jiang Chen so much his ears were shaking.

"How dare you talk to me like that? Are you allowed to speak to me like that? Did you forget who you are?!!"

Jiang Chen clenched his fists but resisted the urge out of habit.

Sister Ling felt very proud, as if she had successfully trained Jiang Chen to be obedient. He didn't even dare resist her and was more compliant than a trained dog.

The next second—

"You motherf*cking bitch! Heitui!!" From out of nowhere emerged a man whose pants were still loose. He spat a fat glob of saliva directly on her face!

*Translator's note: Eating melons in Chinese is the term used for someone who is spectating someone else's drama. The term is mostly used regarding celebrity gossip and their social media onlookers/spectators.

chapters.title: Chapter 132 - Physical Attack
chapters.body:
Chapter 132 - Physical Attack

Sister Ling screamed, "Ah—!!"

Jiang Chen was stunned, especially when he saw Ah Nan's flamboyant beach-themed boxers. Awkwardly, the youth looked away in embarrassment.

Sister Ling was wearing a skirt today and did not have any pockets on her to store tissues. Wiping her face with her hands, she was utterly disgusted as she shrieked like an insane person, "Ah Nan?? Are you insane!!!"

They were agents from the same company. Although there was a hierarchy, they were still quite familiar.

Ah Nan stuck his hands on his h.i.p.s, his rainbow hair on end. "It's your fault for being so vile! You deserve it! How dare you speak so ill of my dear, I'll… I'll drown you in my spit! I can't beat the netizens, but I can definitely take the likes of you!!"

Xiang Yi, who was still in the corner unnoticed, "…"

This was probably considered a physical attack…

Sister Ling's face changed as she quickly began to deny her actions. "Who did I scold? Do you have proof? How dare you assault a colleague! I'm going to find the boss and tell him to fire you!"

Ah Nan stared wide in amazement. He didn't expect her to be so shameless!

She actually hit back!

So he was big sister's agent…

Jiang Chen pursed his lips. "Sister Ling, it's fine, he was only angry in the moment…"

Sister Ling looked at him with contempt. "You're nothing but a mud buddha*, yet you want to protect others?"

Ah Nan was furious. "Okay, I can be petty too and tell the boss you hit Jiang Chen! You're so obnoxious to actually hit an artist!"

In Ah Nan's mind, his own artist had to be spoiled, even if he was just a noob agent. But he knew that the first thing he had to protect was the best interest of the artist. This was the most basic of professional ethics.

Sister Ling said in disdain, "Who will believe you? Where's the proof? Can you show the proof?"

"The human proof is right here…" Ah Nan looked toward Jiang Chen. The young boy froze, avoiding his gaze in shame.

Ah Nan suddenly understood.

This was not the first time, nor was it going to be the last.

The glamorous and popular idol was nothing but a child pinned under a weight and unable to escape.

But he didn't expect sister Ling to take it so far.

Ah Nan gritted his teeth, "So you're going to report me?"

"What? Are you afraid?" Sister Ling smirked. "Why don't you kneel and I'll consider giving you a chance."

"Kneel huh…" Ah Nan seemed to hesitate.

Sister Ling's lips formed into a smile. Even if Ah Nan got on his knees, she would still sue him. She just wanted to play with him for a bit beforehand was all.

Yet her smile was frozen after a few seconds.

Ah Nan burst forward and grabbed her hair. "HOW ABOUT I KNEEL ON YOUR MOTHER'S ASHES?!! SHE MUST HAVE BEEN SO DISTURBED TEN METERS UNDERGROUND AND ROLLING IN HER GRAVE TO HAVE GIVEN BIRTH TO A DUMB B*TCH LIKE YOU RIGHT? Oh right, let me clarify, I'm cursing your mom here, and not your maternal birth giver—the old lady is so innocent. This mom is only a spiritual figment of my imagination I've created for the sole purpose of this conflict, used to represent my disappointment in your dad…"

Sister Ling: ???

"Let go, Ah—you gay freak!"

"Stinky b*tch!"

"Are you even a real man!!"

"Hehe, are you even a human?"

On the side, Jiang Chen was dumbfounded.

Sister Ling reacted as she began to shout, "Jiang Chen, why aren't you helping me yet?"

"Motherf*cker, you bullied me first, you don't think I can call for help too?" Ah Nan said urgently.

Suddenly, a gentle voice sounded from afar.

"I'm coming, Ah Nan."

*Translator's Note: Mud Buddha refers to someone who is weak and useless, based on the saying of a mud Buddha trying to cross the river, but is unable to help itself, nonetheless help others. Unfortunately, it does not make it across the river because mud melts in water 🙁

chapters.title: Chapter 133 - Scared Already?
chapters.body:
Chapter 133 - Scared Already?

Eh?

Why does this sound so much like our little dear?

Ah Nan turned his stiff neck to face Xiang Yi's eyes at the corner of the terrace…

The girl smiled sheepishly, waving at him.

Ah Nan: …!!

The first second, he immediately let go of sister Ling. The next second, he stepped back. Three seconds later, his hands were behind his back, pretending to be an obedient zaizai: "She moved her mouth first!"

Sister Ling, face full of saliva and a head full of messy hair stared at Xiang Yi, speechless.

For the first time in her life, she understood what it meant for the bully to tattle first.

She shouted at Jiang Chen full of hate, "What are you frozen for? Are you just going to watch me get beat??"

Before Jiang Chen could respond, Ah Nan interrupted, "Jiang Chen didi, I suggest you do not mess with our sweetie who can slaughter a 200-pound pig with a butcher knife!"

Xiang Yi: "…"

I want to save face, too?

She lifted the hem of her skirt and trailed over as the dress flared in a nice arc. Lazily, she stepped forward and raised her eyebrows at Jiang Chen.

Jiang Chen immediately got the message and coughed. "I didn't see anything."

Sister Ling: ???

"Jiang Chen, how dare you treat me like this…" Sister Ling had barely finished her yelling when she started shrieking.

Xiang Yi's expression remained blank as she dragged Sister Ling by the hair all the way to sink and pressed her head in before turning the faucet on maximum—

"Ah ah ah ah!!!"

The girl's actions were clean and crisp like flowing water as she lazily reminded: "Ah Nan, cover didi's eyes, it is not healthy for children to see this kind of thing."

Ah Nan: "…"

Jiang Chen: "…"

The few seconds that followed the next felt like eternity to sister Ling.

The fast currents of flowing cold water made her feel as if she were dying.

Reluctantly, she put on a stern face. "Xiang Yi, do you still want to hack it in the entertainment industry?! Are you not afraid of a news scandal of a celebrity being violent?!"

Xiang Yi responded calmly, "Where's the proof?"

Sister Ling froze.

She suddenly realized that there were no surveillance cameras in the bathroom.

The bathroom was located in a remote area too, so there was nobody else around…

Even if there was, who was going to record a video with audio?

Without evidence, her remarks alone were not enough!

Sister Ling viciously looked at Jiang Chen, suspecting he had colluded with Xiang Yi to torture her!

Jiang Chen realized this as he went ghostly pale.

He wasn't too afraid of being threatened by sister Ling, but he was very afraid of sister Ling harming the members of SEASEVEN and their fans over and over again…

Even if he was able to take his vengeance this time, what was going to happen later? He still can't be rid of the nightmare that was Sister Ling…

Bzzz.

A faint sound of electric current buzz could be heard, a dialogue following soon after:

[Is your brain f*cking broken…]

[She probably slept with everyone up and down…]

Sister Ling stared at Xiang Yi in bewilderment.

The girl thinly spoke, "I recorded it just in case. Surprised, aren't we?"

Sister Ling was trembling as she began to panc.

Jiang Chen had been easy to handle because he had a kind heart. He had become a trainee when he was a child and was therefore as pure as a blank sheet of paper; he would never think of something such as video and voice recording.

Ah Nan was pleasantly surprised. "You dumb bitch, once I show this to the boss, let's see if you can still go on being Jiang Chen's agent!"

Until he heard the girl speak, the corners of her lips curled, her eyes gazing sharply. "Why show the boss? Wouldn't it be better to show the fans? Now, you should know the fan culture better than me, the violence of cyberbullies, the manipulation of information… Hey, why are you shuddering like that. Scared already?"

chapters.title: Chapter 134 - Big Sister, You Were So Cool Back There
chapters.body:
Chapter 134 - Big Sister, You Were So Cool Back There

Sister Ling was trembling like a sieve; but whether from the cold or the fear, it was hard to tell.

Meanwhile, Xiang Yi continued to describe to her, "If the fans were to know that their favorite idol not only has to endure verbal abuse everyday but also gets hit if he disagrees, how angry do you think they will be?"

"!" Sister Ling became more and more frightened.

"Let me guess what you've been threatening Jiang Chen with, his future? His group mates?" The girl was clearly smiling, but the warmth had vanished from her eyes. "Now, would you like a taste of how it feels to be threatened? If I were him, I wouldn't let you off so easily. I would keep you next to me and torment you slowly…"

Sister Ling finally broke as the tears began to stream down her face. "I was wrong, I know I was wrong now, as long as you delete the recording, I'll do anything you ask!!"

Xiang Yi was unmoved. "You're asking the wrong person."

Sister Ling suddenly realized this too as she knelt down in front of Jiang Chen. "Jiang Chen, Chen Chen, I have brought you up single-handedly until now. Even if I don't receive credit, I still put in hard work! I… I've always treated you as my brother and was only strict on you because I have high expectations! Please let big sister go, okay? Sister Ling will do anything for you in the future… Don't you want to leave the group? I'll help you! I promise I'll help you!"

Jiang Chen's expression was complicated as hesitation flashed through his amber eyes.

Sister Ling noticed this and tentatively asked, "How about… you delete the recording first, everything else will be easy to discuss."

Upon seeing this, Ah Nan wanted to persuade Jiang Chen but was stopped by Xiang Yi.

"Let him decide for himself." She calmly said.

If Jiang Chen really wanted to forgive her, she had no say as a bystander.

She was only acting on behalf of Ah Nan.

The girl's soft voice was like spring thunder, waking Jiang Chen. His gaze became firm and he coldly said, "You can leave first, I need to think about it."

"Chen Chen…"

"Get lost! Get lost this instant!" His eyes were glazed red.

Sister Ling was terrified. And out of fear of irritating him further that might cause him to play the recording to his fans, she bowed and nodded, "Okay, okay, I'll get lost right now! I'll get out of your sight!"

Sister Ling took off stumbling.

Jiang Chen inhaled, his whole body weak. His calves felt soft as he leaned his weight against the wall.

Nobody has experienced his fear, so they wouldn't realize how much courage that one statement had taken out of him.

He suddenly felt extremely ashamed. "Big sister… Sorry, I'm too weak… I'm too scared and too lost to make a decision…"

The youth's look of self blame was pitiful as he looked on helplessly, like a puppy abandoned on the side of the road.

Ah Nan felt bad for him as he tried to share the blame, "Uhm… My dear, I have a fault in this too. I was too brazen and shouldn't have taken action…"

Xiang Yi: "…"

"Ah. Jiang Chen, I will send you the recording. If you trust your teammates, you should discuss with them how to solve this issue. Whether it's handing it to their boss or something else, you guys can choose the most advantageous option."

"You're a kind person, but you must still maintain your edges and corners to protect yourself. Before the sacrifices you make for others, I hope you can find some self awareness first. Your own self should always come first, got it?"

"Also, when you encounter things, you must give priority to reasoning. It's actually very wrong to resort to violence and intimidation like I did just now…"

Ah Nan scratched his head. "Not at all, it felt great! Amazing!"

Jiang Chen gazed at her in worship. "Big sister, you were so cool back there…"

"…" You guys, aren't your sense of ethics a bit skewed?

Yiyi of the Xiang family couldn't resist letting out a long sigh.

chapters.title: Chapter 135 - Crushed
chapters.body:
Chapter 135 - Crushed

"Oh right, little brother, do you have a performance later?" Xiang Yi said, changing the subject.

Jiang Chen suddenly remembered. "I'm going to go get ready."

The youth took a few steps, paused, then turned to look at Xiang Yi with big puppy dog eyes. "Big sister, will you come watch us perform?"

With watery eyes and the traces of red imprint on his cheeks, the thin and handsome boy looked like a soft bear cub, making people feel pitiful with one glance.

Xiang Yi: "…I will, good luck."

Jiang Chen clenched his fists excitedly and promised like a elementary school student, "I… I will try my best!"

Xiang ·"Grandmother"· Yi nodded graciously.

After sending Jiang Chen off, Xiang Yi and Ah Nan were left alone in front of the sink.

Xiang Yi looked at Ah Nan and twitched her red lips. Before she could utter a single word—

Ah Nan: "I'm sorry!"

"I really am, I shouldn't have sworn at her, nor should I have resorted to violence…" Ah Nan lowered his head, playing with his fingers and meekly saying, "It's her fault for berating you first…"

Everyone had a line that couldn't be crossed. If sister Ling only chewed out Jiang Chen today, Ah Nan would have hesitated before acting.

But she had talked badly of Xiang Yi, which he was not going to tolerate.

Xiang Yi: "You've misunderstood, I'm not blaming you."

Ah Nan raised his head, poking Xiang Yi's arm. "Really?"

'Q_Q Sweetie really is the nicest person on Earth!'

Xiang Yi gracefully stepped away with one single step. "Did you wash your hands?"

"I just wanted to remind you to wash your hands, the front and back both, lathering for 30 seconds at least."

In order to watch Sea7's performance, Xiang Yi could only go back to her seat instead of slipping out as planned.

As the annual gala gradually came to an end, the host began to announce the program. The seven youths stood on the sideline, nervous and anxious.

It's been a long time since they'd performed together, and even longer since they've had a stage to perform on.

Although this time the lighting and sound equipment weren't the most professional, they were still going to be on livestream. As long as they performed well, they wouldn't disappoint their fans…

At this moment, the host pressed the headset to his ear and froze for a few seconds before regretfully saying, "Sorry, due to an equipment malfunction, there is no way to continue with the dance performance…"

The fans in the broadcast room exploded as they enthusiastically spoke their opinions.

—— [I waited so long just for this??]

—— [F*ck I'm crushed, the boys have worked so hard preparing for this stage! /sob /sob]

The seven youths looked stupefied as they stood in place, unmoving.

However, the host attempted to save the scene with the pettiest statement possible, "How about you guys send out Jiang Chen to perform a song for us on the guitar? How about it everyone ——"

The next moment.

Aside from Jiang Chen, the six youths all looked toward Jiang Chen unanimously.

They were spiteful, sad, and even more so, disappointed.

In order to cover the handprint on his face, Jiang Chen had smeared his face with another layer of foundation. Under the bright light of the gorgeous crystal chandelier, he looked paler and more cold-blooded than ever.

His lips moved as if he wanted to say something, but he was interrupted by the team leader. "It's fine, just shut up. We don't need your explanation."

The other members also avoided Jiang Chen's gaze.

First they lose a wave of fans, now this kind of petty operation… The fans would, for sure, be at each other's throats again.

Was this all they were worth?

Heh. They were nothing but tools.

chapters.title: Chapter 136 - Live Accompaniment
chapters.body:
Chapter 136 - Live Accompaniment

The fans in the stream comments were ready for war.

—— [Wah, is Sea7 having an internal dispute?]

—— [Our Chen zai has obviously been singled out! This stupid group doesn't know how to be grateful. What would they be without Chen zai? How dare they treat him like that!]

—— [??? It's obviously Jiang Chen's company's fault for suppressing the others! He rode Sea7's popularity to fame, but now he wants to be rid of all connection to them?]

—— [Being a fan for three years has been so exhausting. Even without team spirit, this is a crapshoot… ]

—— [QQQQ our gege is on the verge of tears, and you're still being mean to him. Team leader must die!]

—— [Wow, Jiang Chen is such a girl. He's probably the whiniest one in the entire group, right? Cry, cry, cry, all he knows is how to cry, how disgusting]

Jiang Chen instinctively wanted to escape, but when he inadvertently saw Xiang Yi in the crowd, he gritted his teeth. "Everyone please calm down, I will check specifically what equipment is wrong."

The group leader looked at him suspiciously.

Jiang Chen refused the host's offer and went off to find a staff member.

Very soon, the problem was revealed.

It was worse than imagined.

The speakers were broken.

Without the audio equipment, there would be no accompaniment.

Seeing Jiang Chen anxious, sweat rolling down his forehead, the group leader pursed his lips. "Hey, you go solo, we will be okay. We've long gotten used to it."

It wasn't the first time they had been left out.

Jiang Chen, who had always been taciturn, firmly expressed his thoughts for the first time ever. "We perform together, we're a group! Even if we are singing acapella, I believe we can do it together!"

"…" The group leader and the others were stunned.

Acapella?

The rapper from the group raised his hand: "I can B-Box, as long as there is a beat, you guys can proceed with our dance."

"Yes, yes, I can harmonize with everyone as well." The main vocal representative also stood up.

Even if the performance effect will be poor, they refused to give up.

The host on stage continued to tell dry jokes as the seven youth backstage ignited their fighting spirits.

Suddenly, a gentle female voice resounded, "I heard there was a sound problem, do you guys need accompaniment?"

Jiang Chen was happily surprised. "Big sister!"

The group leader looked at Xiang Yi with a conflicted look, politely responding, "Sister Xiang Yi, I've seen your stream. The accompaniment for our song is modern pop music, so I'm afraid it'll be difficult to integrate with traditional folk music…"

"Traditional folk music?" Xiang Yi suddenly remembered. "Oh, you mean the sanxian? Aside from that, I'm pretty alright with an electric guitar."

The Sea7 members: ???

'From the classic tunes of the sanxian to punk electric guitars… Sister, wasn't your contrast a bit too big?

Xiang Yi smiled without another word.

#YouWillNeverKnowWhatKindOfSkillsAPersonBoundToANannySystemCanKnow#

"Let's try it?" The group leader asked around.

Jiang Chen at this point was a smitten fan by his big sister. "I believe in big sister!"

"Alright, let's try it out."

"We're going to get flamed regardless, so might as well give it our all."

Jiang Chen began a wave of blind flattery once again. "I'm sure big sister will look super cool playing the electric guitar!"

The other members: "…"

In the livestream, fans were spamming question marks.

—— [What's the Vase Fairy doing over there with Sea7?]

—— [Shut up! What do you mean Vase Fairy! Call her Fairy in a Bottle!]

—— [… motherf*cker, what kind of a superstitious nickname is that??]

At this time, the host spoke once more:

"Dear guests and members of the audience, after some coordination, SEASEVEN will now perform their hit song "focus"! With live accompaniment from —— Uh… Xiang Yi?"

chapters.title: Chapter 137 - Calmly Watchapter Her Troll These Boys
chapters.body:
Chapter 137 - Calmly Watchapter Her Troll These Boys

In that instance, the host began to doubt his hearing.

But this was the name that had been transmitted in his earpiece.

The audience: ???

The netizens: ???

What the hell? Xiang Yi? Accompaniment? Can these two words even be put together?!

In the pile of female celebrities, Lin Zhiya had a dazed look. The glamorous-looking girl looked like a bewildered child as the cameraman in charge of the stream gave her an exclusive close-up…

—— [Ahahaha Lin Zhiya again, again and again failing at controlling her expression!]

—— [My expression right now is exactly the same as hers]

—— [Xiang Yi? Was this the girl who stepped into the folk music realm by playing the sanxian?]

—— [What folk music? SInce when did the Vase Fairy know folk music? What talent could SHE possibly have?]

Not everyone in the stream had seen "Two Under One Roof", nor had they watched the clip of Xiang Yi playing the sanxian.

Their understanding of Xiang Yi remained as the Vase Fairy from the variety shows.

Upon hearing that she was going to accompany a boy group, it was… it was fantasy!

The netizens who knew of Xiang Yi's sanxian skills were even more confused.

You're a folk music player here to provide accompaniment for a modern dance act? Do you think this is a game??

Did Sea7 change their act? Was it no longer singing and dancing, but stand-up comedy??

There were speculations everywhere. The livestream of an annual gala was about to become a detective program full of suspense.

Li Jianyu held his face in his hands as he followed the sentiment of the fans in the live comments. "Aiyah, our sister Yi is so pretty… Huh? Electric guitar? Punk?"

Shi Sui continued to pet Xiao Naofu as he muttered to himself, "Your nerves have gotten fat huh."

Xiao Naofu felt as if it was being stroked bald as it sullenly gazed into nothingness.

Thinking of Xiang Yi's Tai chi skills and swordsmanship, Li Jianyu shuddered all over as he stiffly said, "Ahem! I am older than her, what's wrong with calling her meimei?"

Shi Sui chuckled.

"Come, come, Xiao Naofu, let me hold you for a while."

Li Jianyu took the soft kitten from Shi Sui's arms.

Xiao Naofu felt as if he had been reborn and grateful tears began to well up.

'Oh! This Huhu is finally saved… Ahh f*ck!'

It did not react fast enough to see Li Jianyu's puckered lips landing directly on Xiao Naofu's head!

Xiao Noafu: …You ugly thing, your beard is poking me!!!

"Mhm… So soft! So sweet!" Li Jianyu finally understood Xiang Yu's happiness from kissing a cat as he revealed a petty uncle grin. "Ahh hehehe… Little baby, don't be scared, uncle will take care of you…"

Xiao Naofu: m… You motherf*cker, try that again!!!

The live comments filled up with laughter: [Hahahahaha poor Xiao Naofu just came out of the wolf's den to fall back into the tiger's mouth]

Whoosh——

At the annual gala, the lights went out. Upon turning back on, two spotlights were on SEASEVEN and Xiang Yi.

The seven youths were in their respective positions.

Xiang Yi adjusted her amplifier and gestured toward the lighting engineer.

Everyone was puzzled to see the spotlight above her go out.

—— [wtf? Isn't the Vase Fairy trying to stand out? Why turn off the light?!]

—— [Is this…so everyone's focus will be on Sea7? Unbelievable…]

—— [Hahaha it must be because she is embarrassed of her shitty skills. I'm going to calmly watch her troll these boys]

—— [Stupid little group has probably been forgotten completely and are beyond saving. They actually found someone who plays folk music as their accompaniment… ]

The next second, an electric guitar sounded.

The next next second…

Eh?

Huh?

Oh?

Holy sh*t!!!!!!!!!!

chapters.title: Chapter 138 - Explosively Incredible Performance
chapters.body:
Chapter 138 - Explosively Incredible Performance

The sharp but not harsh sound of the electric guitar caught everyone's attention in an instant!

Everyone was surprised by the powerful guitar, but the sound did not overwhelm the main performance. When the clear, high-pitched voice of the main vocals sounded, everyone's gaze focused on the seven teenagers on stage!

"Wow——Here-We-Are!"

The main vocal of Sea7 had an excellent and unique professional voice. He could be considered as one of the best male vocals in the domestic entertainment market.

Netizens in the stream lamented:

—— [I'm on my knees, this gege's singing is very nice]

—— [Not trying to kiss a.s.s or flame them, but I genuinely have goosebumps…]

—— [The long-awaited performance of the lead vocal! UwU I'm crying, I'm crying]

After signing a few lines, the audience realized…

Without musical accompaniment, does this mean that all seven members of Sea7 had their mics on??

If the mics weren't turned on, it would be lip synching.

Mics half-on meant that there were original soundtracks mixed into the accompaniment, so singers could save some effort when singing such as when they need to catch their breath while dancing or if they can't hit a high note while moving. That way, the background vocals could cushion for the 'vacancy' of missed lines.

But today, Sea7 did not have any vocal accompaniment in their performance!

They didn't even have any backup vocals or harmony!

But the seven boys were able to hold down the stage…

The formation of the group changed as the members took turns standing in the center spot, every member getting their time in front of the camera. Each members' dance moves were clean and nimble, translating accurately through the camera all the while as they maintained impeccable control over their expressions.

"everybody-focus-on-us!"

The rapper then added his B-Box segment alongside the group leader's harmony.

At the same time, the seven youths not only sang and danced to their high-intensity routine, but they were barely panting.

The fans in the stream were so excited they almost lost their minds.

——[Ah ah ahh this is our Sea7!!]

—— [Amazing, a small dinky group is actually among the top domestic talents]

—— [What do you mean top? They are the glass ceiling, okay! On such a plain stage with all open mics, they can still perform so well! Gogogo zaizais!!!!]

—— [If the zaizais dare to fly, we will follow after!]

—— [Holy, is the accompaniment being played by Xiang Yi alone? She's so badass, she didn't even look at the score…]

The rapper's verse instantly ignited the audience even more.

This song brought too much surprise for everyone!

When the last melody settled, just like they had trained countless times, the seven youths ended in their predetermined poses.

Their c.h.e.s.ts undulated violently, unable to tell if it were from exhaustion or from the excitement.

Sweat was dripping from all of their cheeks, but not a single one had bothered to wipe it off.

Even the cameraman couldn't help but take a long close-up of all of them.

A few seconds later, the seven youths linked their hands and bowed in the direction of the camera, uniformly saying: "Thank you, everyone!"

What followed was a flood of screams, cheers, and whistles.

—— [I'm in tears. Our deep-rooted belief has come true, sea7 does have group spirit!]

—— [I've changed my opinions on boy groups, they are so talented]

Whether it was the netizens on the stream or the live audience, everyone only had one thought at this time:

This live performance was explosively amazing!!!

chapters.title: Chapter 139 - Thank You For Your Kindness
chapters.body:
Chapter 139 - Thank You For Your Kindness

The interior lights finally turned back on, but the seven youths amid the crowd remained at the center of everyone's attention!

However…

When the camera accidentally panned over Xiang Yi, it just happened to catch the girl smiling warmly at Jiang Chen and the others.

Her pale and slender fingers had been flushed red from the strings on the guitar, while the skin on two fingers had been worn through. Yet, her gaze remained calm and gentle enough to make one's heart skip a beat.

Noticing the camera on her, she gestured toward the cameraman to resume filming the guy group.

—— [My god, how did the Little Vase's hands turn out like that?]

—— [Maybe she hasn't played in a while? Usually only people starting out will have blisters on their fingers]

—— [You must be joking. She can still play this good after not playing for a long time?]

—— [What… What is she after… She doesn't want the spotlight, doesn't want the camera…]

—— [Haha. She definitely has her eyes on our Chen zai!! Eighteenth-tier idol, stop trying to mooch popularity off our Chenzai!]

—— [??? What were you saying? Without Xiang Yi's guitar, could their performance have been so successful? Imagine what they would have sounded like without accompaniment! How awkward that would have been!]

The stream viewers began tearing at each other once again as they began to bicker.

Xiang Yi put down the guitar and picked up her dress hems to leave only to be blocked by the seven youths.

"Big sister, your electric guitar is god tier! Can you teach me?"

"Wow sister, you only looked at the score once to memorize it. Your memory is amazing!"

"Big sister, your fingers are hurt. Hold on, I'll go buy you some medicine! A goddess's hands cannot be scarred!"

The group of boys, with the oldest being under twenty years old, rattled on and off, lively and cute.

Jiang Chen: ???

Did you guys take a class on rainbow farts? How are you all so good at flattering!

Jiang Chen thought to himself. He resisted the urge but still ended up saying, "Big sister… Thank you for your hard work."

'Thank you for your gentleness.'

'Thank you for not turning back on me.'

The other members looked forward and bowed together, saying in unison, "Thank you, big sister!"

Xiang Yi: "…"

She really just didn't want to see these cute boys cry and came over to help.

In the manor…

Seeing Xiang Yi surrounded by a mob of little fresh meats, Li Jianyu broke into hysterical laughter, "Our Yi mei seems to be very liked by these didis, and she's so considerate toward them, too. Aiyaya, if it were me, I'd pick a didi too. What's so good about old men…"

The live comments: [Director, these are dangerous grounds you're on. Even the closet door cannot contain you]

Shi Sui grabbed Xiao Naofu from his arms and tossed the dried fish at the tablet, asking, "Do you want didi or do you want dried fish?"

Xiao Naofu smacked the screen as it firmly bit down on the dried fish.

"Meowuuu~!"

Chieh. You can't eat a didi; only a dumbass would choose didi over dried fish.

Shi Sui was very satisfied with Xiao Naofu's choice as he patted its head and turned to Li Jianyu. "What did you say just now?"

"…" Li Jianyu gulped and stiffly went off tangent, "Of course, little brothers are very little, the real charisma lies in m.a.t.u.r.e men…"

—— [Hahaha I giggled out loud]

—— [Shi Sui, you can't be more like a ten-year-old than you are now!]

—— [Funny, yes, but why does it feel like Shi Sui is feeling slightly jealous??]

—— [If you know, you know. This mum has tasted the sweetness of the Untimely couple again! Come say it with me: UNTIMELY——]

—— [It really is!!!!!!]

chapters.title: Chapter 140 - The Internet Is In A Frenzy
chapters.body:
Chapter 140 - The Internet Is In A Frenzy

Tomato Entertainment's annual board meeting ended with a bragging session by the big boss.

The short broadcast that lasted a bit over an hour had exceeded 20 million clicks with over ten terms in the trending search.

#TomatoEntertainmentRedCarpet# XiangYiMeimeiKillerRedDress#

A fashion blogger uploaded a post as well ——

[IncredibleV]: #TomatoEntertainmentRedCarpet# A brief review of a few looks I thought stood out today.

Mo Li can hold together a more masculine style, Lin Zhiya's mermaid gown was tailored to have a lower c.h.e.s.t, which made it seem a bit extra, but the girl's figure is very outstanding. Qin Wanyan's entire outfit can be outlined as textbook goddess. From her dress to makeup, she looked incredible, but it's only a pity that she met Xiang Yi…

If Mo Li has a high-class face, then Xiang Yi has high-class sense. I replayed the scene of her smiling at the camera a dozen times. I was really impressed by the beauty and temperament of this lovely sister.

This red spaghetti strap dress is an older style from last year. When it first came out, several people complained that it looked like a karaoke call girl's outfit, but Xiang Yi was able to give it a new definition today: A person's worth is not determined by their clothes; it is people who decide fashion.

The Weibo post received over 5,000 comments and tens and thousands of likes.

[One Gray Turtledove V]: Several netizens have @ me to comment on SEASEVEN's live stream performance today. I don't really know much about the idol industry, so I must admit at first I had a very stereotypical understanding of the industry. However, after I watched the broadcast today, I was tempted to change my mind. The boys were quite great at singing and dancing, especially their singing ability; even if they debuted as singers, they would have a platform in the entertainment circle.

But what surprised me most today was Miss @XiangYi's electric guitar. Your sanxian last time was amazing, and under your influence, my father was willing to receive treatment from western medicine and his condition is improving. Everyday, he listens to your sanxian improvisation.

I don't dabble in folk music much either, but I could be considered an expert in pop music. The electric guitar accompaniment was bright and melodic, with proficient skills such as shredding, trembling, tapping, and reverb. The legato of your sliding strings had been done in one go, sounding carefree and easy. You have reached a level of mastery of the instrument, rendering such an addictive atmosphere.

This Weibo post had over 10,000 comments, but it received a lot of controversy as well.

—— [Wow, cultured people are something else! Our Yi mei is amazing!]

—— [How much money did you collect to lie like this? Last time, you flattered the sanxian performance to the point it almost bloomed with flowers, and now it's the electric guitar. This is getting out of hand. Are you treating this like a cultivation series??]

—— [It was outstanding, but it was not enough to be called a master, right… A real master would laugh his a.s.s off if he heard this review]

Very soon, a domestic musician of master level updated his Weibo, which was almost overrun with weeds from lack of use ——

[Mu V]: The little girl plays the electric guitar very well. My hands were itchy, so I made a bass track. The product is rough, as it is just for fun.

The netizens were excited to munch on some melons. Eh? Why does this sound like Sea7's song?

It can't be?

…F*ck, it really was!

And if one would listen closely, Xiang Yi's electric guitar part could be heard in the background!

After adding in the low tones of a bass, there was a thicker and richer sound to the track with more tension, instantly elevating the piece to another level.

Within thirty minutes of posting, the comment count broke 50,000.

The internet was in a frenzy!

chapters.title: Chapter 141 - How Disappointing (Third Brother Arrives)
chapters.body:
Chapter 141 - How Disappointing (Third Brother Arrives)

—— [It can't be, it can't be? A national team athlete is playing a boy group dance song??]

—— [What the hell, is this guy even popular? I've never heard of him, okay? Where did he appear from to support the Vase Fairy]

—— [There are people out there who don't know Lao Mu? Question Mark. Are kindergarten kids surfing the web now?]

—— [Mother of god, it's Lao Mu! He's the record holder of China's largest album sales and the record holder for the highest number of audience at a concert in China. You really don't think he's popular??]

—— [Using the word popular to define Teacher Lao Mu is too insulting. Just buy a copy of any book regarding the history of modern Chinese music. This is a god-tier legend who takes up an entire chapter for creating a new genre, new rhythms, and new stage performance styles… Let's put it this way, if Sea7 is a junior, then Lao Mu is the ancestral god, understand?]

It was shocking enough for the master to descend from heaven, not to mention he actually played along to someone else's track!

Immediately, the popularity of Sea7's debut song, "focus", began to surge as it swept through all three music playing platforms with unstoppable force.

The little boy group that the self-depreciating fans had been supporting had, in fact, broke out of the circle!

More people also began to realize how badass Xiang Yi is….

Sanxian, electric guitar… Two musical instruments with contrasting styles had been interpreted to the pinnacle of musical refinement in her hands.

Unbelievable!

In the manor…

After watching the stream, Li Jianyu still had some trifles regarding the event. "Aiyo, why doesn't the cameraman give more screen time to our Yimei? No, once she returns, I have to give her more screen time! And we'll make her look like a beautiful goddess!"

Shi Sui lazed in his sofa, Xiao Naofu imitating his movements as it's fluffy body leaned against the sofa with it's little paws sticking in the air, playing with its waving tail.

As Xiang Yi was about to return soon, the atmosphere between the person and the cat became much more harmonious.

Shi Sui felt his phone vibrate.

Picking it up, his dark eyebrows jerked up sharply.

[Little Bunny]: Senior, my little uncle has asked me to go out drinking so I probably won't be going home tonight. Please take care of Xiao Naofu o(*°▽°*)o

Shi Sui gritted his teeth gently. Taking your little niece out for a drink this late at night?

Good.

Very good. 🙂

The netizens in the stream noticed Shi Sui's abnormality.

—— [Eh? Is Shi Yingdi angry?]

—— [Either way, you could tell he's not happy…]

—— [T_T Gege is so A when he's like this! This sense of intimacy is so strong, I feel like he will slam me into a wall any second!!]

—— [Stop talking, I can feel my unborn baby kicking!!!]

Outside a certain private bar in Nan Cheng.

This bar was owned by Xiang Yu's friend and was not open to the public. Only people in their circle could enter as it had an excellent degree of privacy.

Xiang Yi opened her WeChat. Just now, she had added all the members of Sea7 and they had formed a chat group. At this time, the notification from their group was at the top. She clicked it open to see the members sharing screenshots of their increasing number of fans on Weibo as they chatted, even sparking an emoji battle.

Her lips curled up as she returned to her home page and made a voice call to her uncle.

Inside the bar.

Xiang Feng had just poured a glass of dark liquid for his third nephew who had returned from overseas while answering Xiang Yi's call. "Xiao Qi, try this red wine from '82!"

"… stupid." What kind of red wine has bubbles? This is obviously coke.

A s.e.xy and gorgeous voice made people's ears soften as soon as he opened his mouth. His burgundy shirt and tie had long been pulled loose, revealing a cold, fair, and attractive collar bone.

"Little Xiang Yi, just come in, we're at the bar table…"

Xiang Qi raised his eyes and looked at him sharply. "Why are you asking her to come here?"

Coldly, he muttered, "How disappointing."

chapters.title: Chapter 142 - Tell Her To Come In
chapters.body:
Chapter 142 - Tell Her To Come In

The atmosphere became stagnant.

On the other end of the phone, Xiang Yi had become silent for a few seconds before she hung up.

Xiang Feng anxiously scolded. "Xiang Xiaoqi, how can you speak to your sister like that?! Do you know how happy your sister was when she heard you were back in China…"

"Happy?" Xiang Qi raised his hand to brush his sparse long hairs from his face, revealing a set of handsome but gloomy eyebrows. "Can't wait to make a joke out of me?"

Xiang Feng didn't know what to say. "…"

Thinking of the absurd things Xiang Yi had done in the past year, Xiang Feng couldn't say anything derogatory to him.

Xiang Qi was a famous fashion designer. He debuted at a young age and stepped on the runway at Fashion week by designing pieces for other fashion houses. However, he has always wanted to prepare his own personal show.

After working hard for several years, he finally had a set of ready-to-wear pieces for a line called "Winter Night". When he had been preparing for the big show, Xiang Yi had the whim to show off and posted the pieces all over her social media. It had been reposted on the internet by netizens, and Xiang Qi's work ended up being plagiarized by another designer who held their show before Xiang Qi's.

This kind of scandal was hard to clear up in the fashion industry since all evidence could only be based on the time of release. If Xiang Qi had used the same pieces for his show, plagiarism would have become a stain he would never be able to erase from his career.

Even then, Xiang Yi did not think she was in the wrong at all and accused Xiang Qi of holding his show too late. She only wanted to help her brother promote his work by posting on social media.

Xiang Qi had been so angry he tore up all the ready-made clothes and drafts. Because he had no more inspiration, he was unable to design a new line. As a result, his solo exhibit had been cancelled, becoming the laughing stock of the fashion industry.

In the past few months, he had been traveling around the world. Originally, he had been in a good mood upon returning to China, but the moment he heard Xiang Yi's name, he was unable to control his anger.

"Your sister is a different person now!" Xiang Feng tried his best to convince Xiang Qi. "If you don't believe me, ask Xiao Yu! He has the most to say. These are his words."

As he spoke, Xiang Feng dialed his mobile to Xiang Yu's phone, but nobody answered.

Xiang Qi looked at him coldly.

"…Why are you being so mean?" Xiang Feng meekly dialed the number of the gaming base's HQ.

This time, someone answered. It was Xiang Yu's teammate.

"Looking for Smog? He just returned from a variety show. We replayed him the video of him cuddling that cat, and then… and then, he completely shut down and locked himself in the training room for several days with his phone off. He hasn't logged onto any social media platforms either."

After rediscovering his sister, he had been in high spirits but was pretending to be a cold and unreachable esports legend. But when he saw his moronic behaviour in that video with his head buried in Xiao Naofu's belly and cooing like an idiot, he was instantly petrified.

Especially after he learned that this video had been seen by millions of netizens…

His reputation was gone, his face was gone, and Xiang Yu was gone.

Xiang Feng's lips twitched. "…Alright then. When he's done having a breakdown, tell him to call me back."

"Okay, uncle!"

After hanging up, Xiang Feng sneered at his third nephew. "Xiao Qi, you see here… This is an inevitable factor…"

Xiang Qi chuckled coldly and gracefully lifted his wine glass off the table to shake it. After drinking it, he realized that it had indeed been Coke as his movements were slightly stiff. Without changing his expression, he realized he had been using the motions of tasting expensive wine to taste… Coca Cola.

How stubborn!

Xiang Feng scratched his head. "Really, she's changed! Little Xiang Yi even made food for me, and it tasted so, so, so, so good!"

Xiang Qi's eyes lit up as he suppressed his emotions. Casually, he said. "Forget it. Tell her to get her a.s.s in here now."

"But… Little Xiang Yi says she doesn't want to disturb you. She left already."

Xiang Qi: ???

chapters.title: Chapter 143 - Take Care Of Cats And Cook
chapters.body:
Chapter 143 - Take Care Of Cats And Cook

In the manor.

When Xiang Yi returned, it was already past nine in the evening.

Through the floor-to-ceiling windows, the living room seemed undisturbed from afar.

The handsome and innocent actor leaned on a wicker chair by the window as he read a book, with the soft and milky cat sprawled across his legs and snoring happily in its sleep.

Xiang Yi felt an inexplicable warmth bloom in her c.h.e.s.t.

Since she was young, her older brothers and family members had coddled her. But they had all been too busy to really accompany her.

She possessed their love but also a long lifetime of loneliness.

During the most s.e.n.s.i.t.i.v.e days of her adolescence, Xiang Yi had secretly shed tears in finding that nobody was waiting for her after coming home from school.

Thinking back, she always found it kind of funny.

But at this moment, Xiang Yi suddenly felt a stable sense of safety.

So this was what it felt like to have someone waiting for you with the lights on.

Shi Sui seemed to have sensed something as he sat by the window; looking towards the motion, the gold chains on his glasses swayed slightly with his movement.

Under the soft lamp light in the garden, a slender and fair-skinned girl stood stupidly without moving.

She had changed into a cotton daisy-patterned floral dress under a thin apricot knit sweater, her demeanor radiating of softness and compliance.

Their gaze met for a few seconds until the girl quickened her pace and pitter-pattered into the manor.

Shi Sui pushed his glasses on his nose with a finger as the corners of his mouth curled up.

He picked up Xiao Naofu the Dumb Cat and tossed it behind the trash bin.

The cat opened its eyes with a blank expression on its face.

Who am I? Where am I?

The kitten hopped over the obstacle as it obediently ran toward Xiang Yi, only to realize that someone had been a step ahead…

"Senior, I'm back!"

"Mhmm, did you eat yet?"

"Not yet… Did you guys?" Xiang Yi changed her shoes at the entrance. "I suddenly crave instant noodles…"

Instant noodles could only taste so good; but it's a food you couldn't help but crave once in a while.

"You go rest, I'll go cook."

"Heh??" Xiang Yi paused.

Shi Sui looked at her helplessly. "Miss Xiang Yi, this much I can do."

Xiang Yi was embarrassed. "I wasn't doubting your abilities, I'm just a little surprised… Uhm, Senior, please don't call me miss; it sounds quite strange."

"Then what do I call you? Pretty girl? Fairy in a bottle? Punk Yi mei?"

Xiang Yi had a bad feeling. "Senior, you didn't watch my livestream did you…"

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows in admittance.

Not only did he watch it, he had done so in front of millions of netizens. 🙂

"Meow meow! Meow meow meow!!" Xiao Naofu circled around Xiang Yi's legs.

Xiang Yi hurriedly picked up the small cat.

Xiao Naofu furiously rubbed its head against her c.h.e.s.t as if it had been wronged, pressing on Xiang Yi's collar bones with its chubby paws, as if it was tattling on someone.

Shi Sui squinted slightly as a glint of threat flashed through his eyes.

"What's wrong, Xiao Naofu? Are you hungry?"

Xiang Yi touched its belly, which was round as a ball. It probably wasn't hungry.

Xiao Naofu looked at Shi Sui with watery eyes as it buried its head in the girl's arms, grieving. "Meowuuu…"

Shi Sui did not say anything.

Xiang Yi gently asked, "You mean to say, senior was bullying you?"

"Meow~" Yes!

Then next second, the girl coddled, "Don't misunderstand him; he's a very very good person."

Xiao Naofu: ???

Its pupils widened in shock.

Shi Sui chuckled as he turned and entered the kitchen.

Behind him, the young girl continued to flatter him with rainbow farts. "Look here, look here, you see, Senior is entering the kitchen, he knows how to take care of cats and cook. What a godly man!"

chapters.title: Chapter 144 - Does This Work?
chapters.body:
Chapter 144 - Does This Work?

Ten minutes later.

Xiao Naofu nestled in its luxurious three-story cat tree, sticking its chubby bum in Xiang Yi's face.

This Huhu isn't this stupid woman's favorite baby, this Huhu is not happy anymore! So angry!

It didn't know that Shi Sui was Xiang Yi's white moonlight from her youth, and she was currently his aunty fan as well. Naturally, it came with a double-layered filter when she viewed him, and anything he did was wonderful.

On the dining table, a pot of instant noodles with ham, eggs and greens exuded a captivating aroma alongside two small plates of sides. In the quiet and warmth of the late night, it looked particularly appetizing.

Xiang Yi tasted a bite and overly exaggerated as she praised, "Senior, you're a culinary god in making instant noodles!"

Xiao Naofu from the cat condo: "…"

Uwuuu you're actually praising this stinky man! You don't know how evil he is!!

Shi Sui smiled lightly. "Bunny, your mouth is so sweet."

Xiang Yi: "Ahhh don't call me by my nickname!"

"How about we do an exchange." The man slowly served himself a bowl of food. "I won't call you by your nickname, and you stop calling me senior."

"Then… how should I address you?"

"Just my name is fine."

Xiang Yi felt a bit conflicted. "Is that really okay?" Although they were mutual peers, Shi Sui was seven years older than her.

"Is it not?" Shi Sui looked at her innocently as he persuasively asked, "Then what do you think…I should be called?"

"Uh… director calls you daddy Shi, how about I call you brother Shi or brother Sui?"

Shi Sui responded leisurely, "Doesn't that mean I have to give you my nong zhang blessing?"

The joy of 'nong zhang' is usually a congratulatory message given to others for having a boy.

Xiang Yi's ears turned red. "That's now how that term is used…"

It sounded as if Director Li had become her and Shi Sui's son…

Shi Sui calmly teased: "It was just a cold joke."*

"I see…" It was very cold indeed.

Xiao Naofu licked its claws in the cat condo with furious vigor. Stupid woman! He's deliberately trying to take advantage of you!

All men are pigs!!

Uwuuu why haven't you come to coddle me yet… if you coax me once—no, it has to be at least twice—this Huhu will acknowledge you!

The Xiang family did not have a 'no talking at the table' rule, so Xiang Yi naturally began to converse with Shi Sui,

"Have you ever experienced the moment when you suddenly want to cry, like coming home to an empty room, and it rained heavily the whole way home, and someone else's mother was chasing after a child and beating them…"

Shi Sui gazed at her silently, asking in a soft voice, "Are you upset over something?"

Xiang Yi always thought that she had good control over her emotions, but she began to feel her nose crinkle at Shi Sui's words.

She thought she was strong enough.

Yet because of Xiang Qi's words, she had uncomfortably fled.

Perhaps the evening light was too gentle, or because she had no fortifications against the man, Xiang Yi unconsciously blurted out: "…My brother hates me."

Shi Sui's thin lips moved slightly, wanting to comfort her before he realized he did not have any experience in this area whatsoever.

"It's just a bit sad." Xiang Yi smiled. "But do you really not even know how to comfort girls?"

Shi Sui's eyes were gentle. "I guess not really."

"Eh? Then you…" Xiang Yi wanted to ask if he had a girlfriend before or something, but she felt this topic might be too abrupt so she changed her trajectory. "Then I'll teach you how to coax people! Here…"

She felt out a piece of candy and placed it in front of him. "This is an omnipotent weapon…"

The next second—

A big warm hand fell on the top of her head, gently ruffling her hair a few times.

"Does this work as coaxing?"

*Translator's note: Cold joke usually refers to jokes that are either too corny/cheesy/dry or dark to be actually funny, rendering the room 'cold' with awkwardness.

chapters.title: Chapter 145 - Heartthrob
chapters.body:
Chapter 145 - Heartthrob

The warm-toned light softened the man's chiseled face. In his eyes, he saw only her.

She could feel the temperature through his fingers as the air became thick with chemistry.

Whoosh—

Xiang Yi's tiny, pale ears had turned crimson to her disappointment.

Her starry eyes were wide with surprise, but more so…

Embarrassment.

"Our Yi mei worked very hard today." Shi Sui said in a low and somewhat shaky voice as he tried to coax her patiently, "Your brother doesn't hate you, he's just having trouble now. Don't think too much of it, hm?"

Thump thump thump…

Her heartbeat was terrifyingly fast.

Xiang Yi sat back in her chair to create some distance between the two as she stuttered, "You…I…You…This…"

She was an aunty fan, how come she felt her heart skip a beat just now?

"I'll go check on Xiao Naofu!" The girl found an excuse and left.

The man's deep eyes chased her silhouette and paused.

In front of the cat condo.

"Xiao Naofu, are you still angry? How about some milky milk?" Xiang Yi said gently.

Xiao Naofu: Not listening!

Its tail however began to waver.

Xiang Yi continued to coax. "How about I buy you a bell tomorrow? It's every tiger's favorite, super cute!"

Xiao Naofu twitched its cat ears and turned its face, meowing compliantly. "Meow~"

— This Huhu doesn't want to walk; hold me!

Xiang Yi understood as she picked up the soft cat and made it some goat milk powder.

The cat licked the milk a few times before provocatively lifting its head to look at Shi Sui.

Hmph, she still likes this Huhu the best!

A certain actor chuckled lightly and lazily opened his mouth. "I held the cat for too long today and my hands are kind of sore… Can you pour me a glass of water?"

His slender fingers casually rubbed at his wrists. It was clearly a question void of any pretense or coquettishness, but it made a person feel pity and distress.

Xiang Yi: "I'll go right now!"

Shi Sui turned to the cat and batted his eyes.

"…" Motherf*cker!

Xiao Naofu didn't expect that he couldn't win against him in green tea skills, nor white lotus skills; it even lost! At being babied!

The goat milk in his bowl immediately tasted sour.

…

At dawn.

"Whoosh—"

Xiang Qi opened the curtains as the faint morning light enveloped his torso, a black bathrobe loosely dr.a.p.ed over his body. The collar was open, revealing the outline of distinct abdominal muscles.

There were faint bluish-black bags under his eyes. He had stayed up all night to finish watching "Two Under One Roof".

Although he couldn't be sure, it seemed like… his sister was back.

He had to go see for himself.

Xiang Qi dialed his uncle's number.

It took a while for the other end to answer as a dazed and sleepy Xiang Feng sounded from the other end: "Old Three, I don't have an issue with you calling me in the middle of the night, but what the hell do you want this early in the morning?"

Xiang Qi went straight to the point. "I want to go on that woman's variety show. Arrange it for me."

"Huh? What woman? Why are you trying to pursue now?? Heh, if you want to talk about this, I'm suddenly very awake."

"…'Two Under One Roof'."

"Ah? But I hear they have the upcoming guests planned already…" XingChen app was Xiang Feng's company, and the biggest collaborating partner of "Two Under One Roof".

Xiang Qi said coldly: "What kind of domineering CEO are you if you can't even cut the line?"

Xiang Feng: [email protected]#($#@()$*!

He took a deep breath, telling himself this was his dear nephew. Blood-related nephew!

"Okay, I'll try to arrange it for you. But you have to promise me you won't bully your sister…"

"None of your business."

Slam.

Mercilessly, he hung up the phone.

chapters.title: Chapter 146 - Nothing Less From Our Yi Mei
chapters.body:
