Chapter 146 - Nothing Less From Our Yi Mei

…

…

A few days later, Friday.

Li Jianyu returned from his run to see Xiang Yi finishing up her sword practice. Like a maid, he immediately poured her tea and handed her a towel.

Xiang Yi: "…Director Li, you don't have to be so polite."

"Please do not address me like that, you can just call me Xiao Li." Li Jianyu said poorly as he took out his phone for his daily browse through.

It didn't take long for the sound of geese screaming to be heard from the garden.

"Hahaha eheheheheh… Chen Mian is done for!!!" Li Jianyu stuttered excitedly. "The director for "Heartbeat", the netizens uncovered his plans to poach money from fans to raise the popularity ranking of the stream, but something went wrong internally and someone ended up stealing money from the profit pool. They can't even find him now."

With this kind of commotion, the fans were bound to be upset. Chen Mian wanted to cover it up at first, but he had severely underestimated the combat abilities of the fans. After a night of fermentation, he successfully became the most searched subject in the trending section.

"Heartbeat" was only streamed on the weekends, but the official blog had just issued a notice that this week's schedule had been canceled due to technical issues.

Any discerning person would know at first glance that the show would require a new director if it wanted to remain relevant.

Xiang Yi: "The fans have it the worst. They just wanted to support their idols but ended up getting trampled on like this."

"That's true." Li Jianyu sighed and suddenly began to flail his hands about. He picked up his phone and spoke in a distressed manner. "It's over, it's over. Is this heaven's retribution for my reaction just now? The guest we had arranged for needs their schedule adjusted."

The guest had collaborated with Shi Sui before and has won the title of film queen. She was very highly regarded and had only agreed to attend the show on behalf of Shi Sui. Li Jianyu didn't have much power to say anything, nor did he dare to…

It wasn't easy to find a replacement temporarily. All aspects had to be coordinated accordingly, and it would also depend on whether other people's willingness to come and save the show.

Li Jianyu was heartbroken. "How about… Yi mei, you cook some more meals? Or demonstrate your amazing swordsmanship? Oh, you know calligraphy too and drawing as well…"

Xiang Yi raised her eyebrows. "Why don't we get Xiao Naofu to perform jumping through a fire ring, or jumping through a fire ring while breathing fire?"

Li Jianyu was overjoyed. "Xiao Naofu really has this kind of talent?!"

"What do you think?"

"…I understand."

It turns out Yi mei also knew how to crack jokes.

Joking aside, Xiang Yi really wanted to help him too. But she probably knew less people in the entertainment industry than the lighting engineer or the cameraman. She browsed through her friends list and asked, "I can ask Jiang Chen?"

"Heh? That's right! Jiang Chen is not filming "Heartbeat" anymore, he should be available."

"I asked, Jiang Chen is available, and so is the rest of Sea7."

Tomato Entertainment currently valued Sea7 very much. Jiang Chen and the others also used the recording to threaten Sister Ling. Immediately, her attitude made a 180-degree turn and was now helping the group develop a long-term plan. They didn't take any commercial activities or jobs as the boys had been preparing for a new album.

But they did have time to record a variety show for a day.

Li Jianyu looked toward Xiang Yi like looking at a treasure. "Okay, okay, let them come!"

Coincidentally, Shi Sui was on his morning jog as well. He was dressed head to toe in black sportswear, making his complexion appear even paler. "What are you guys chatting about?"

Li Jianyu was excited. "Yi mei has invited some pretty little brothers onto our show!"

Shi Sui: "Heh?"

"Seven of them too! Nothing less from our Yi mei!"

"……"

Shi Sui's eyebrows jerked upwards.

chapters.title: Chapter 147 - Little Cats Who Don'T Run Will Be Neutered
chapters.body:
Chapter 147 - Little Cats Who Don'T Run Will Be Neutered

Li Jianyu lived on Weibo and Melon gossip forums all year round and was well aware of the comments and interests of the netizens as he dabbled:

"Daddy Shi, please use your imagination, a cute little brother picking fruits and looking at the camera with a sweet and adoring smile. They will ask the audience: Which is sweeter, me or the fruit? Another cute little brother is working hard in the fields as he lifts his t-shirt to wipe away his sweat, revealing abdominal muscles and mermaid lines; another little brother is tired from operating a drone and is so hot he has to pour some water over his head to cool down, wetting his clothes so they stick to his young and slender figure…"

Shi Sui's expression was cold.

Heh, wasn't he sweet? Didn't he have abs too? Or mermaid lines?

Li Jianyu became more and more engrossed in thought. "One of them is enough to excite everyone! But seven! F*ck, I want to take over Yi mei's mind and experience what it feels like to run a harem in the back palace…"

Xiang Yi: "…"

What kind of dangerous speech was he bordering on?

"Okay, okay, I'm going to discuss this with the cameramen and the planners." Li Jianyu happily left, unaware of the eerie demeanor of a certain actor.

Xiang Yi finished her stretching exercises as she prepared to shower. Turning around though, she saw Shi Sui standing still in his spot, unmoving.

"Brother Shi?"

The man's peach blossom eyes fell on her with a dark and unclear glaze. "Are you close with Jiang Chen?"

Why would Zaizai suddenly ask her that?

Xiang Yi had an innocent expression. "Not bad, we haven't known each other for long."

Shi Sui turned his head slightly and headed for the living room.

Xiang Yi didn't understand. "You're done exercising?"

Shi Sui responded casually,'"Xiao Naofu ate too much, I'm taking him for a run."

Xiang Yi: "Eh?"

…Was this the same kind of running that she was thinking of?

But poor Xiao Naofu, who had been happily sleeping in its soft cat bed, was ruthlessly dug out by a pair of slender hands…

Blindly, it blinked its pupils and softly protested. "Meow?"

Shi Sui: "Little cats who don't run will be neutered."

Xiao Naofu: ???

Saturday, six in the morning.

Seven youths embarked on the white van leaving Tomato Entertainment's dormitories.

"Captain, filming doesn't start until nine right…" Jiang Chen yawned as his eyes glistened with moisture.

Sea7's captain, Shen Ci, earnestly said, "You guys don't understand, I especially watched the cuts of big sister's cooking. The breakfast she makes is very delicious!"

Bright eyes adorned the group of boys who never had enough to eat.

"Wow! Big sister cooks? How talented!"

"What can big sister not do?"

"Big sis is definitely a goddess visiting from the heavens."

Jiang Chen: "…"

'You haven't even seen sis yet, and the flattery begins already??'

'Have you guys been blowing rainbow farts behind my back?!'

"But wouldn't sis be overworked making breakfast for so many of us alone…"

Someone meekly mentioned as the whole group went silent.

A few seconds later, Jiang Chen raised his hand to speak. "We can each take one bite, that one only one bowl is enough!"

Hearing this, Shen Ci spared no effort in boasting. "Chen Chen, you really are a clever one! Everyone clap!"

"Clap clap clap…"

The atmosphere was lively and harmonious. Jiang Chen pressed on his baseball cap, but the smile forming on his lips could not be suppressed.

…

The van parked outside the manor as the seven youths uttered a unanimous 'wow' when they came upon the towering iron gate.

chapters.title: Chapter 148 - So Mean
chapters.body:
Chapter 148 - So Mean

"Holy, I've seen that sports car in a magazine! It's a globally limited edition!" The lead singer Tian Tian was a car fanatic as his throat rolled out, almost drooling.

Whoosh——

The door opened as a tall, upright figure stepped out of the car. He was about 188cm tall with good body proportions and a high waistline. Looking at him straight, it seemed like his legs were two-meters long, as if he could step on the runway within a minute.

His camel-colored trench coat had a designer edge to it, and from the white shirt and beige trousers inside to his sunglasses and cufflinks…

He radiated an aura of luxury.

The seven boys were dumbstruck.

This time, the captain Shen Ci reacted first and took the initiative to bow to the man. "Hello senior! We are SEASEVEN!"

The group of boys bowed over like frightened quail, bending over 90 degrees one after another.

Xiang Qi removed his sunglasses as his slender eyes curved outwards, revealing a romantic gaze. He surveyed the clothing choices of the boy group members and said in a very unfriendly manner, "Heh. Your tastes are worrying."

Sea7: "…"

It felt as if they were being judged… yet the judgment was coming from a logical standpoint…

Jiang Chen was the most popular member and could be considered the most experienced person in their small group. He hesitated for a moment before asking, "Are you… Mr. Hades?"

Hades… originally the king of the underworld in Greek mythology but was now the name representing a mythological figure in the Chinese fashion industry.

Their debut work "Alice In Wonderland" was showcased during fashion week,

And their series of clothing had broken annual sales records both offline and online;

…

In order to rent the clothes designed by him, even an A-tier entertainer must squeeze their heads for ideas to get in line. Jiang Chen had the honor of wearing a custom-tailored suit made by Hades once. It was a vintage style suit, cut and tailored by himself. His fans had blown rainbow farts about it for months before they disappeared.

Xiang Qi responded perfunctory, slightly displeased. "Are you guys the guests for today? There are so many of you."

Shen Ci explained, "Because Senior Tang temporarily had to change their schedule… We're here to…"

"Even the numbers, right, got it." He replied, irritated.

Shen Ci was distressed. "Senior, are you also a visiting guest?"

The program crew hadn't told him that Hades was going to come…

Xiang Qi smiled coldly. "What? Have you never seen someone buy their way in?"

"…" They had seen plenty of people pay their way in, but never one so arrogant…

Xiang Qi put on his sunglasses again and took a big step with his long legs, as if he were walking on wind… like a model.

The young boys followed him like a herd of tame sheep, like a mob boss and his young disciples.

Upon entering the gate, Big Boss Xiang Qi suddenly halted.

The boys froze in their step.

Jiang Chen secretly grabbed Shen Ci's sleeves.

Shen Ci was thinking to himself: why are you tugging on me, I'm scared too QQ…

"When it's time to eat, if anyone dares fight for food with me——" Skillfully, Xiang Qi paused and looked gloomily at them like a devil. "Will be dead! UNDERSTAND?!!!"

The boys nodded furiously.

With that, Xiang Qi was satisfied as he began his model walk again. He approached the manor along the cobblestone path with familiar ease, not even bothering to ring the doorbell. He raised his chin and looked at Jiang Chen, who was closest to him.

"You, come here and announce our arrival."

The entertainment's most popular little fresh meat was being ordered about.

Trembling, Jiang Chen rang the doorbell. When nobody answered, Xiang Qi frowned and spammed the button several times, scaring Jiang Chen so much his face turned pale.

Can a doorbell be… abused like this?

'This senior is so mean, will he bully big sister?'

Uh oh…

chapters.title: Chapter 149 - Be Good, Open Up
chapters.body:
Chapter 149 - Be Good, Open Up

…

The door opened with a "creak".

The handsome and elegant actor raised his eyebrows at the group of people standing by the door.

"Morning." He lazily said as he casually greeted them. "You must be tired, come in."

Several pairs of slippers had been left at the entrance as the boys from Sea7 timidly entered the door and changed their shoes. They then formed a neat row sitting on the sofa, organized and well behaved.

Outside the door.

Cooly, Xiang Qi asked, "Yo, where's that woman?"

Shi Sui crossed his arms. Without speaking, he stared at Xiang Qi.

"…"

Under his gaze, Xiang Qi silently took off his glasses and reluctantly addressed him. "Brother Shi."

Ever since he was young, Xiang Qi could cross anyone, except for Shi Sui.

Shi Sui nonchalantly responded with a 'mhm'.

Xiang Qi couldn't help but ask. "Where's Xiang Yi? Is she a pig, still asleep at this hour."

Shi Sui was indifferent. "You look at the time."

Xiang Qi looked down at his watch… it was only seven in the morning…

Heh? He had waited several minutes after dawn to leave, how was this still so early?

"Go sit down." Shi Sui said. Immediately after, he felt something was wrong.

The little bunny had a regular schedule, sleeping early and waking up early. She also had the habit of exercising in the morning; she should be up by now.

"Meow! Meow meow!!" He felt Xiao Naofu grab onto the hem of his trousers, dragging him toward Xiang Yi's room.

Shi Sui felt his heart skip a beat. Without thinking of how improper it was to be entering a girl's room, he pushed the door open.

The room was decorated differently from the guest room. It has a warm theme, with furniture made of untreated wood. Strewn everywhere were plushies of rabbits and other rabbit paraphernalia, and a row of lush and healthy green plants lined up the windowsill.

Xiao Naofu's legs were short; it attempted to jump several times before landing on the bed, tapping its paws on Xiang Yi's pillow.

Humans were very fragile and could die from a disease. Thinking of this possibility, Xiao Naofu burst into tears.

It didn't want the stupid woman to die.

Shi Sui raised his hand to take her temperature, frowning.

She has a fever.

…

"What? Sis is sick? Is it serious? Should we call 120…"

Shi Sui was scrummaging through the medicine cabinet in the living room as the seven boys from Sea7 looked on in worry.

Even Xiang Qi had stopped shaking his leg, nervously l.i.c.k.i.n.g the corners of his mouth.

"I called the family doctor. He said to eat some anti-fever medicine, and if it persists, he will come over."

Digging out the medicine box with his slender fingers, Shi Sui raised his eyes at Xiang Qi. "Can you administer the medicine?"

Just now he had been in a hurry, but after calming down, he realized it wasn't appropriate for him to give her medicine when her brother was present.

He had underestimated Xiang Qi's fragile ego. The man crossed his legs and raised his chin. "Who wants to feed her. I'm not going!"

They haven't reconciled yet, and that woman hadn't sweetly called him big brother and asked for forgiveness yet. He wasn't going to give in first!

"…" Shi Sui was speechless. He didn't quite trust the female staff members of the crew, so he ended up entering Xiang Yi's room and personally giving her the meds.

Xiang Yi was in a feverish state of confusion, feeling dazed at the pair of powerful and warm hands that supported her back. A muted voice coaxed, "Be good, open up."

Compliantly, she ate the medication.

The next second.

The water droplets at the corner of her lips were wiped away by pale fingertips.

In a soft and nasal voice, she mustered, "Heh… zaizai?"

chapters.title: Chapter 150 - Breakfast 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 150 - Breakfast 1

A few seconds later, her hazy consciousness returned. Xiang Yi felt as if her brain had been scared awake.

Shi Sui looked unamused. "What did you just call me? Zaizai?"

The girl shrank into the thin blanket with a guilty complexion.

"So, this is what you meant when you mentioned aunty fan last time?"

Heh. What else did she say before? She saw him as a cat?

Turns out she treated him like a son. 🙂

"Meow?" Xiao Naofu leaned forward and touched her cheek with its paw.

It was still burning.

It glared at Shi Sui as if saying: can you cure her or not?!

"Big brother, can you give Xiao Naofu something to eat." Xiang Yi's voice was faint and sickly. "Oh, is the guest here yet? I made some shrimp dumplings that are in the fridge, you can eat them after you steam them. There's fish soup in the electric cooker, so you can cook some rice noodles and mix it with that. Add seasoning as you please…"

In addition to having a fever, the girl had a stuffy nose, so her voice was much more nasal sounding than usual. It was slightly raspy as well, like a small feathered brush, and was inexplicably intriguing.

She was so pitiful that nobody could be angry at her.

Shi Sui sighed and said rather helplessly, "Don't worry about it. Sleep a little longer."

He poured half a glass of water for the girl, tucked her in, then picked up Xiao Naofu and left.

Inadvertently, he glanced at the pillow stained with cat hair and shifted his squinted eyes at the cat.

'So this dumb cat… actually gets to sleep with her at night??'

…

Inside the living room.

Li Jianyu had been chatting with the Sea7 boys. "Aiyah, so many handsome boys. I have a foreboding that the comment section will become i.m.p.r.e.g.n.a.t.ed once I click it open…"

The boys were evidently nervous. "Two Under One Roof" was popular, and that was a fact. Plus, it had resident guests like Shi Yingdi. They listened to Li Jianyu talk as if a group of school children was listening to a teacher.

"And Uncle Hades, nice to meet you, nice to meet you…"

Initially, Li Jianyu was opposed to the last-minute guest Xing Chen app had stuffed him, but they were offering way too much to pass up…

One top-tier magazine cover shoot, two sponsorship endors.e.m.e.nts; and this Hades didn't even charge an appearance fee.

This wasn't just a pie falling from the sky, this was the lord f.o.r.c.i.b.l.y shoving the pie in his mouth!

Xiang Qi looked him up and down, full of shock at Li Jianyu's outfit.

Surrounded by exquisite models, celebrities and artists all year round, Xiang Qi refused to believe that such unruly human beings existed.

He shook his head. "Bleh, you're polluting my eyes."

Li Jianyu: "…"

Was this… was he expressing distaste for him?

Also, why were these boys from Sea7 looking at him with a look of pity??

At this time, Shi Sui walked out holding Xiao Naofu.

Of course, this attracted everyone's attention.

Li Jianyu hurriedly asked, "How is Yi mei?"

All seven members of Sea7 spoke at once. "Is sis better?""Is her fever gone?""Does sis need someone to be with her?"

Xiang Qi's thin lips began to move. "…"

These noisy brats!

"She's asleep." Shi Sui said calmly. "Did you guys eat breakfast? Xiang Yi had prepared fish noodles and shrimp dumplings in advance."

Immediately, the eyes of everyone in the room lit up.

The seven boys from Sea7 were a bit timid as Li Jianyu rubbed his hands together excitedly.

While Xiang Qi, arrogant as ever, graciously pulled out from his limited edition luxury bag…

A gigantic bowl.

Everyone present: ????

chapters.title: Chapter 151 - Breakfast 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 151 - Breakfast 2

Noticing everyone's strange expression, Xiang Qi raised his jaw slightly and got straight to the point. "What? Never seen someone bring their own tableware before?"

"…" They had seen people bring their bowls, but not one this big…

Li Jianyu awkwardly praised, "Hades, you really are… detail-oriented."

He thought that since Hades was a fashion designer and a considerably artistic guy, it was normal to have a few strange habits.

"Cheh." Xiang Qi dismissed his commentary. "It's nothing but a bowl."

#As long as I'm not awkward, then everyone else will be the awkward ones#

In past family gatherings, eating meals cooked by his sister was like going on the battlefield. Xiang Yu and Xiang Feng would even bring pots and pans to battle.

Now that's called a bloodbath ～(~￣▽￣)~～

Shrimp dumplings and fish noodles were both semi-finished products. Li Jianyu volunteered to cook the dishes himself while calling on Lao Li the photographer to film some special content.

Meanwhile, the task of feeding Xiao Naofu was won over by Jiang Chen.

The seven boys were chattering about as they surrounded the soft white kitten, blabbering nonstop.

"So this is sis's cat."

"It's so small, it's smaller than my palm."

"It looked at me, it looked at me! Its eyes look like sapphires."

"…"

Jiang Chen looked at it with puppy eyes. "Little cat, can I please pet you?"

Xiao Naofu pouted and arrogantly sat on its haunches, coldly rejecting him.

'Heh. You don't even have dried fish jerky, don't even think about touching its fur!'

And Jiang Chen's reaction was: "Ah, it's so cute when it sticks its b.u.t.t in the air!"

Xiao Naofu raised a question mark.

…

Twenty minutes later, breakfast was served.

Lifting the steamer made out of wood, the steam escaped and fogged up the room, revealing delicate shrimp dumplings inside after the steam dissipated. The wrapper of the dumplings was thin and transparent and white as snow, with shrimp and green bamboo shoots filling peeking through. Each dumpling contained two shrimps, stuffing it into a round and adorable shape.

Inside the electric crockpot was a milky white and viscous fish soup. A fresh crucian carp had been slightly fried to get the white soup color, mixed with ginger and cooking wine to get rid of the gamey smell. The soup was delicious and perfectly cooked so that it could make one salivate at glance.

Li Jianyu cooked a large pot of rice noodles and added some sides and fish soup based on his own tastes before mixing them well.

Recently, Li Jianyu had consumed several of Xiang Yi's meals and had become more reserved. He placed two steamed baskets of shrimp dumplings in front of Jiang Chen and the others. "Eat up, the recording will be tiresome later."

The boys recalled Xiang Qi's threats and weakly looked toward him.

"…" He paused for a moment and clutched his chopsticks.

On the outside, he was arrogant and condescending.

But his heart was roaring loudly.

It's! So! Good!!!

It's his little sister! It has to be his little sister!!!

In a good mood, Xiang Qi looked toward the little brats which seemed much more pleasing to the eye. Compared with his nonchalance just now, his tone could almost be called kind, "Eat up, eat up. I was just scaring you, did you think I was serious?"

The boys: "…"

'Senior, you weren't just scaring us, it was more like a threat, okay…'

The boys carefully tasted a shrimp dumpling…

"!"

Everyone's eyes lit up as they slowed down their chewing speed to prolong the deliciousness in their mouths for a while longer.

"Wow…" Someone gulped as the eyes of all the boys turned red.

Li Jianyu was taken aback. "What's wrong?? Was it so good you're crying??"

chapters.title: Chapter 152 - The Kids Are Still Young
chapters.body:
Chapter 152 - The Kids Are Still Young

"It tastes so good."

"Waahh I thought we were about to miss out on this…"

"I suddenly… miss my mom…"

"…"

On the subject of moms, the atmosphere at the dining table turned down and felt even a little melancholic.

Li Jianyu was confused. "I…You…I…Daddy Shi, how do you comfort them?"

As a middle-aged man, he was okay at coaxing little girls, but he had no experience with young boys.

Shi Sui handed them each a bowl of rice noodles with fish soup without a word.

This terrified the children. One by one, they stood up to receive it with both hands, almost bowing down 90 degrees to Shi Sui on the spot.

Once they had the rice noodles, they did not touch the shrimp dumplings anymore. Quietly, they s.u.c.k.e.d up their noodles silently and took a sip of warm and fresh fish soup. They looked so obedient it almost made one distressed.

The kind of children who didn't dare ask for extras even when eating at a relative's house.

Li Jianyu looked a little sad. They all say children who know how to cry can get candy, but these honest children… must have endured so much.

"Ah. Don't be so polite, eat more, we'll take care of it! Yi mei has made a lot of dumplings." Li Jianyu persuaded.

The members of Sea7 responded, but they were still buried in their soup.

Shi Sui's warm voice rang out. "Today, we will be filming some farm work. It will consume a lot of calories, so it's alright to eat a bit more."

A sneer suddenly sounded.

On the other side, Xiang Qi slammed down his chopsticks and ruthlessly said like a mob boss: "Eat! You all better eat! Nobody leaves until it's finished!"

Everyone present: …!!

Jiang Chen shuddered as he subconsciously shrank behind Li Jianyu, who was closest to him.

Li Jianyu, who was easily frightened, almost dropped his bowl, coughing. "Ha… Uncle Hai Dai Si*, the kids are still young, don't scare them too much."

"What did you call me?"

Li Jianyu anxiously responded. "I, I, I… My big mouth! My English is fake! I'm sorry, Hai Dai Si… no, Uncle Hades!"

Xiang Qi was furious. He was so western, tall, and noble, with such a compelling name, but this guy had called him seaweed?!

Seeing that the man was about to explode, Shi Sui spoke out to calm him. "Xiang Yi is still sleeping."

The words were as sharp as knives as Xiang Qi instantly shut up.

He inhaled and exhaled, repeated it several times, then calmed down. Gritting his teeth, "Do you know how many models have starved themselves to death in order to pursue a size-0 figure? Do you know how many people have developed an eating disorder? Besides, if you're all eating so little, will you have the strength to work later?!"

Xiang Qi directly pushed a basket of shrimp dumplings over and viciously exclaimed, "Open your mouths and eat! If you dare waste any food, I'll kill you!"

The next second —

Jiang Chen and the others picked up their chopsticks and furiously began scooping food in their mouths.

Q_Q It turns out being threatened to eat was such a happy experience.

…

After breakfast.

Jiang Chen satisfyingly patted his belly, the corners of his mouth curling up. The other boys had similar reactions, as they were all satiated to the extreme.

Li Jianyu took a look at the time. "Alright, let's go get ready. We will begin streaming soon."

At nine o'clock, "Two Under One Roof" began to stream on time.

Through the transparent glass, the seven teenagers greeted the camera with a smile.

"Hello everyone, we are SEASEVEN!"

The lens moved to their side and focused on Xiang Qi, his voice lazy yet elegant. "Self-intro? I'm Hai Dai… Hades."

The members of Sea7 held in their laughter.

But Shi Sui laughed out loud.

Li Jianyu was even more out of control as his goose-like laughter echoed throughout the stream instantaneously. "Ehehehehehe hahahahaha kekeke …."

*Translator's Note: Hai Dai Si is a very accented and poorly pronunciation of "Hades". It means seaweed strips.

chapters.title: Chapter 153 - First Exposition Of Medical Skills 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 153 - First Exposition Of Medical Skills 1

The comments in the stream exploded.

—— [Wow, the didi from Sea7 are here!]

—— [Who is this leggy gege?! I want all his information within a minute!]

—— [Seven little brothers, one gege, and an elegant Shi Yingdi. Any miracle can happen if you live for long enough!]

—— [Let me explain to everyone: The long-legged gege is a famous fashion designer, Hades. He is exceptionally talented and has won several awards. Don't judge him by his young age, as he can be described as the pinnacle of the fashion industry!]

—— [What the hell is a Hai Dai? Hades misspoke just now, right]

—— [This director is poison. Every time he smiles, I can't help but cackle in front of the screen]

…

Xiang Qi coldly glared at Li Jianyu. Li Jianyu could only retain his smile. With a serious expression, he began to narrate, "Today, Yi mei, or Mentor Yi, has a fever, so she won't be able to attend today's recording of the stream…"

As soon as he was finished speaking, the camera panned to Xiang Yi's bedroom door as it opened. A girl in a fuzzy fleece sweater seemed to be digging around for something in the living room storage.

"Sis, what do you need, I'll help you!" Jiang Chen was the first one to approach.

The other members of Sea7 did not let up as they all surrounded her.

Shi Sui: "…"

Xiang Qi: "…"

The fans in the stream: "…"

—— [Did the woman with the Xiang name poison these little brothers? Why are they being so nice to her?]

—— [Whoa, Yi mei looks so soft when she dresses like this! There are bunny ears on the hood, too. As a girl, my heart feels aflutter—what more with the guys!]

—— [? ? ? What did I see? A needle?? Wait, I'm scared of sharp objects. Is she crazy? Does she not care about the audience's feelings?!]

…

At this time, the cameraman entered the living room and zoomed in.

They could only see Xiang Yi pulling out a gold needle from the wooden box and began to disinfect it.

Li Jianyu swallowed. "Yi mei, are you trying to… use acupuncture?"

"Mhmm, I'll give myself a few doses, it'll speed up the recovery."

Li Jianyu: ???

The netizens: ???

—— [Is this the mythical realization of the saying, 'I'll even stab myself?']

—— [Is she crazy? You can't mess around with acupuncture; you have to hit the right acupoint for it to be effective]

—— [Yi mei's nasal tone is so cute… I think I'm focusing on different things than you guys]

…

Seeing Xiang Yi about to perform acupuncture on herself, Li Jianyu hurriedly tried to talk her out of it. "Hey, hey Yi mei, even if you know acupuncture, you're still sick, what if you prick the wrong acupoint…"

Before he could finish his sentence, the girl had already raised the needle and steadily pricked the hegu and quchi acupuncture points on her arm and hand. Gently, she twisted the needle before releasing it, then calmly tilted her head to look at him. "Hm? What did you say?"

Li Jianyu was shocked.

So were the netizens.

—— [She's done?? That's it???]

—— [Why do I feel like she's faking it… You don't have to f*cking pretend to be a person with medical skills]

—— [How can it be useful? Lmao. Our Chinese medicine doctor downstairs still uses the needles after performing acupuncture. I don't think this fake actress Xiang even knows what keeping a needle means.]

…

Jiang Chen looked at Xiang Yi in a worshiping gaze. Curiously, he asked: "Sis, are you a TCM doctor?"

"Mhmm." Xiang Yi smiled. "I'm going to brew some medicine. By the way, what do you guys want to eat? I'll prepare the ingredients in advance."

The boys' eyes lit up.

Right after breakfast comes lunch. How joyous!

The comments in the stream suddenly began to tear at each other regarding Xiang Yi's statement…

chapters.title: Chapter 154 - First Exposition Of Medical Skills 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 154 - First Exposition Of Medical Skills 2

——[Did she just admit she was a Traditional Chinese Medicine doctor? Can you just lie without a draft nowadays?]

——[Graduates from TCM colleges who haven't obtained their doctoral qualification certificates don't even dare call themselves a Chinese medicine doctor, miss. Xiang, how inflated is your ego?]

——[Hahaha lmao, my best friend just roasted Xiang Yi saying the way she talks is revealing of her poor demeanor, and she even said she's Zhang Zhou's* younger sister, who is a fake poser]

——[Recently, a drama with a strong female lead has been trending. I have a bold thought— the Vase Fairy is trying to copy the female lead…]

——[People are never satisfied. She is kind of talented in music, why can't she stick with that? Why does she have to keep faking it like this? It's so annoying to watch]

…

In the comments, several eerie netizens began to appear. Xiang Yi's reputation was already pretty negative, and several people had already developed the habit of berating Xiang Yi regardless of her outstanding performance on "Two Under One Roof", refusing to change their perspective.

As long as they are persistent, they could find faults in a saint.

But they had underestimated how many fans Xiang Yi had acc.u.mulated, as several people immediately jumped out to refute:

——[Hey, you keyboard warriors, try randomly stabbing yourself with a needle and see if you bleed or not!]

——[Keeping the needle embedded is an acupuncture method, but pulling it out is also a method, okay?]

——[Some people have their eyes clouded by lard. Can you not tell how familiar her actions were? Our whole family is watching the stream together, and my grandfather is a TCM doctor. He says although Yi mei doesn't have a TCM certification, she seems to understand medicine quite well]

…

The comment section was tearing at each other's throats, yet the scene was incredibly peaceful.

Acupuncture is effective in treating fevers, and Xiang Yi had ingested the fever-reducing medication Shi Sui had given her. Soon, her condition was much better with the help of both factors.

The boys from Sea7 looked at her in unison, waiting for her to assign them tasks.

Xiang Qi pretentiously stuffed his hands in his pockets. Removing his sunglasses, he couldn't help but glance at her every couple of seconds…

"You go pick some jasmine flower buds…"

"Can the two of you chop some wood? Remember to wear gloves…"

"The four of you can go to Little Rabbit Farm and harvest some carrots…"

The girl's voice was soft and clear, making sure everyone had a task to do that wasn't overwhelming.

Happily, the boys set out energetically.

Xiang Qi sounded annoyed. "Hey, what should we do?" He pointed at himself and Shi Sui. However, his vicious attitude made it seem like he would give Xiang Yi the middle finger at any moment.

Some people in the live comments were overjoyed. [Judging by Hades' attitude, he must hate her guts]

Seeing her third brother, Xiang Yi felt a lump in her heart. She sniffed and weakly said, "What do you want to do? I'll listen to you."

The crew: ???

The netizens: ???

——[Is the poser trying to gain Hades' favor?? One thing leads to another, it seems like only Hades and his domineering attitude can subdue her!]

But what nobody expected was…

The internationally renowned designer grumpily picked up a paper box, pulled out a few tissues, and stuffed them at Xiang Yi's nose without an explanation.

Her face was small, and his hands were big. The motion basically covered the girl's face.

"What are you standing there for! Blow your damn nose!"

Xiang Yi was confused but could only do as she was told.

Xiang Qi continued to scold her. "Blow harder!"

The girl's slender figure began to tremble at the motion.

Millions of live viewers watched the incredible scene…

Xiang Qi tossed out the tissue and drew a clean one to clean her nose. Displeased, he said, "Ick. So gross."

*Translator's Note: Zhuang Zhou refers to Chinese philosopher from the Song dynasty, Zhuang Zi known for heavy and long reflections on normativity of Daoism.

chapters.title: Chapter 155 - Pretty Mean~
chapters.body:
Chapter 155 - Pretty Mean~

The audience: ????

'If you think it's gross, then why are you wiping it for her?!!'

Xiang Yi looked at her brother in a daze.

She was…not that strong.

The mundane acts of kindness between family members could always make her tear up.

It was just that during her transmigration journeys, there was no family she could rely on, and she had no choice but to become strong.

From Xiang Qi's perspective, he could see the pinkish tint of his little sister's nose. He wrinkled his brows slightly. Had he been too rough and hurt her nose?

Looking up, he realized her eyes had turned swollen red and were filled with moisture.

Xiang Qi began to panic. "No crying!"

Even the bunny ears on the girl's sweater were drooping as the tears clung to the bottom of her eyelids, wetting her feathery eyelashes.

A pair of slender hands suddenly flipped the bunny-eared hood over her head and turned her shoulders so that her back faced the camera.

His silent tenderness was as considerate as ever.

Shi Sui's gaze slightly turned to Xiang Qi. "I'm going fishing. Coming?"

Behind the manor was a medium-sized pond. Last year, Uncle Wang had come and planted some fish eggs, so they should have fattened up by now.

"Yes, yes, yes." Xiang Qi's lips agreed, but deep down, he still worried for his sister. He wanted to coax her, but when he opened his mouth, all he could utter was some hurtful jargon. "Hey, let me tell you, if you dare cry… I won't wipe your tears for you!"

This was considerably mean~

The netizens: "…"

——[I don't even know how to roast this]

——[I don't understand what the Poser Fairy is trying to do. Why is she crying? Is she trying to be a White Lotus? How fake]

——[Why does it feel like Hades is a bit prideful? Although he's rude and mean to Yi mei, he wouldn't help her wipe her nose if he really hated her! Even a boyfriend would hesitate before wiping her nose!]

…

Xiang Yi took a few minutes to compose herself before heading into the kitchen to brew some herbs.

Seeing the flavors of herbs the young girl was tossing into the clay pot, the stream began a wave of berating once again.

…

The shores of the pond were lined with willow trees and climbing vines that were growing just right. The air was filled with a faint fragrance as insects sang hidden among the branches and the vines. Round water lily leaves sprouted from the surface of the water. The scene looked to be out of a painting, and the two people fishing on the shores made it all the more amazing.

The netizens:

——[All I could see are long legs… /drool /drool ]

——[Eh, Hades is pretty tame. I thought he was the kind who couldn't sit for longer than a minute]

The next second, the camera zoomed in and gave Xiang Qi's handsome face a closeup.

The loose strands of hair on his forehead shadowed his closed eyes.

He was, of course, asleep. 🙂

The netizens: ???

Shi Sui seemed to have anticipated this. Ripples swayed in the water as he calmly retracted his fishing pole, easily holding up a plump grass carp.

…

Time slowly passed.

Soon, the young boys who had set out for Little Rabbit Farm had returned carrying some freshly harvested carrots. Amid their happy jesting, someone had tossed a shoe at one of their teammates, but it had accidentally ended up on the roof of the small kitchen…

This segment was amazing in creating a variety show atmosphere. The netizens in the stream couldn't stop laughing at the boys and their dumbfounded expressions.

"Heh? What now?"

"Ask sis if she has a ladder?"

"…"

The boys were bickering about when a cold chuckle came from behind them.

"Heh. You need a ladder for that?"

chapters.title: Chapter 156 - An Accident
chapters.body:
Chapter 156 - An Accident

Heh?

This voice belonged to…

They turned their heads to see their senior, Hades.

At some point in time, the man had put on his sunglasses again. Just standing there, his stature was even more alluring than that of a model on the runway.

"Hello, senior." The boys greeted in a hurry.

Xiang Qi walked toward a tree nearby and tossed his jacket to them.

The live comments:

——[What's Hades doing???]

——[I have a feeling something spectacular is going to happen…]

——[No way, no way, I don't think this kind of demonic man can climb a tree…F*ck! He's actually climbing it?!!!]

Xiang Qi climbed the tree with his long, lanky limbs. He picked up the shoe and casually tossed it on the ground, then leaned arrogantly against a tree branch as if he were a professional saying, "Didn't even have to try".

Shi Sui, who had seen all this from the pond: "…"

No wonder he was from the Xiang family notable for their tree-climbing abilities. There's not a tree in this world that a member of the Xiang family cannot climb.

The boys from Sea7 were dumbfounded for several seconds. After snapping back to reality, they began to applaud Xiang Qi in unison.

"Senior, you're so cool!"

"Wow, I expect nothing less!"

"…"

Xiang Qi's expression did not reveal anything, but he was delighted at the praise.

What a group of easily impressed brats.

——[Kids, you must have a lot of questions???]

——[How come the tree-climbing scene reminded me of Simao brother? He was so fast…]

——[Gege, that shirt you're wearing is a high-end custom piece!! Are you not afraid of ripping it?!!]

…

It was almost time for lunch as the boys from Sea7 surrounded Xiang Qi, worshipping him like a hero returning from war.

Shi Sui returned with a full cage of fish, keeping his distance from the rest of the group.

The scene captured an inexplicable joy.

When the group returned to the manor, they heard a sudden blood-curdling cry.

It was followed by the sound of an axe clanking to the ground.

"Move over." A low and clear tone shrouded in a powerful aura sounded that could not be defied. Shi Sui strode over, the people around him subconsciously making way.

Shen Ci, the group leader of Sea7, was on his knees, clutching his right arm with his left hand. His skin was pale as beads of sweat rolled down his forehead, the blood gone from his expression.

"Don't move." Shi Sui instructed Shen Ci before calmly saying, "Call the emergency line immediately."

Li Jianyu was concerned. "But we are quite a distance away from the closest hospital…"

After all, the villa was in the countryside of the countryside.

Call first and prepare a car just in case."

The Sea7 fans in the stream were on edge.

——[Ah ah ahh, poor gege! How can you make him do labor!!]

——[Ci zai is still a child. What did he do wrong to suffer like this??]

——[I'm crying. Our gege has an old injury. Why isn't Xiang Yi chopping the wood and making our gege do it?! Go die, go die!!!]

——[Hehe, I just want to say one word to the celebrity with the surname Xiang: Farewell /candle /candle]

Under Shi Sui's instructions, the scene moved along swiftly.

Suddenly, Shi Sui remembered something as he looked towards Xiang Qi. "Call Xiang Yi over."

The attitude of the live comments became more infuriated.

——[Shi Sui, you motherf*cker, are you trying to kill our gege??]

——[I'm saying it now: if anything happens to my Ci zai today, everyone on site is a criminal!]

chapters.title: Chapter 157 - Miracle Doctor
chapters.body:
Chapter 157 - Miracle Doctor

The SEASEVEN fans were worried and couldn't help but say some brazen things.

But it did bring a lot of negativity to the other netizens.

——[Hey, are you guys concerned for Shen Ci or cursing him? There's no external injury or any blood; he probably just pulled a muscle, fractured a bone, or sprained something. It's not like he can't be cured, yet you're here calling murder. One fan is really worth a dozen haters]

——[??? Can Shen Ci's fans grow a brain, okay? Xiang Yi is the only one in the group that slightly knows medicine. Let me say something bold, if something really happens, she could at least perform basic CPR]

But no matter what their attitudes were, everyone had their hearts in their throats.

At this time, Xiang Yi hurried over with glutinous rice flour still on her hands. She didn't even care to wash her hands before rushing over as she wiped it on her shirt, half kneeling in front of Shen Ci. Carefully, she supported his left arm and carefully felt around, asking him about his condition.

Shen Ci responded accordingly.

But in the eyes of the fans, no matter how they looked at it, Xiang Yi was nothing but a nuisance.

——[Look how serious the situation is, and she's trying to take advantage of our Shen Ci!]

——[Please, I'm begging you: stop faking. You can f*cking stab yourself, but don't use our gege as a lab rat!]

——[If I were there, I would slap her across the face right away! Her hands are so dirty, she's not worthy of touching our gege!]

——[Don't touch our gege! Call an ambulance! If it's a fracture, he needs surgery! What the hell can TCM do!]

…

Xiang Yi's methods were light at first and gradually became heavier. Plus, with Shen Ci's responses, she was very quickly able to deduce: "Shen Ci, don't be scared, it's just dislocated, so you're not in any life-threatening danger. Moreover, I have a professional TCM certificate of practice, so I can help you realign your bones."

She paused for a moment and gently added, "Don't feel pressured though. We can wait for the ambulance and fix it at the hospital as well."

The fans: "…"

The implication of her words: I'm a badass, but I don't have to treat you either??

'Shouldn't she be coddling our gege? How come her temperament is so calm, even cold??'

Shen Ci tried to cover his pain and said stiffly, "Sis, I trust you."

His forehead was brimming with cold sweat, and teeth marks had formed on his lips. He looked at Xiang Yi with watery eyes, innocent and helpless.

Xiang Yi: "Okay, let's count two eight-figure beats. Come, 5, 6, 7, go…"

Many years as a trainee had cultivated a subconscious habit within Shen Ci that allowed him to start counting beats without hesitation. Before he could even finish the first count, he heard a 'crack'. His bone had been realigned.

"OK, it's done." The girl said calmly.

The crew: ???

The netizens: ???

Wait, that's it?!!!

Even Shen Ci himself was surprised, but the first thing that came to his mind was that the pain was gone!

His eyes widened in shock. "Sis, are you Hua Tuo* himself…"

Xiang Yi casually responded, "It's just realigning a bone. Not too hard, right?"

Grandpa Xiang was a TCM doctor, and most of his friends that he interacted with were Xin Lin* masters. She had been intrigued by their practices since she was a child. Grandpa Xiang had taken note of this and consciously trained her to be able to prescribe medicine and give treatments. Strictly, he had mentored her in all the necessary education and experience for over ten years.

Later on, when she had transmigrated through the world, Xiang Yi's medicinal skills had also improved greatly. However, everyone she had come into contact with were masters, the kind of masters from Xianxia universes, so Xiang Yi had always felt she was only of an ordinary level.

The more you know, the more insignificant you feel.

But in the eyes of other people, taking a few seconds to diagnose, treat, and align a bone was really the level of…

A miracle doctor!

*Translator's Note: Hua Tuo is a famous physician from Eastern Han Dynasty in China. He published several historical texts regarding medicine still relevant today and was known for his expertise in anesthesia and surgery, as well as acupuncture, cupping, and herbal medicine.

*A term used in the TCM universe to describe someone of high medical skill and experience. Originates from the Three Kingdoms and was a title possessed by Hua Tuo and other famous doctors of the time.

chapters.title: Chapter 158 - Illegal Practice
chapters.body:
Chapter 158 - Illegal Practice

From acupuncture to realigning fractures, the crew was one hundred percent convinced by Xiang Yi's medical skills even if they had been doubtful in the beginning.

"Sis, you're amazing!" Jiang Chen clutched his fists and said happily.

'I did it! I finally blew the first rainbow fart!!'

The others did not show weakness as they continued to praise her.

"Sis, you have so many talents!"

"Sis, what do you not know how to do?"

"…"

The boys praised her back and forth like so without end.

The stream comments:

——[A pretty sister is being surrounded by pretty brothers. I'm so jealous]

——[Our Yiyi is so outstanding! An amazing chef, a genius with instruments, and a miracle doctor in TCM!]

——[Is Yi mei looking for adoptive parents? I can move in with my bags right away. I've been to college and know how to wash dishes and sweep floors]

——[I'm different from you, I can move in with my bowl right away]

——[Hades: Thanks, I have been imitated]

——[No, no, no; it should be Hai Dai Si: Oh? You're bringing tableware, too?]

——[Hahahahaha lmao at Hai Dai Si, I think we've broken Pluto]

Meanwhile, the fans who had been slapped in the face were not convinced, not wanting to admit that they were wrong.

——[She could just be lucky. How can you call her a miracle doctor? Stop joking around]

——[The Poser Fairy just said that she had a TCM certification. Come, everyone! Come look at this farce]

——[Hehe, only those who major in Chinese Medicine and those who work in medical or healthcare facilities can be admitted for a TCM certification. You're lying so much your mother doesn't even recognize you]

——[Anyone with a discerning eye can tell that the actress named Xiang is a blind cat who has run into a dead rat. With her strange homeopathic TCM methods, she could only trick the idiotic grandpas and grandmas in her neighborhood. If TCM was that powerful, how come the recent Nobel Prize awards have all gone to western medicine?]

…

…

However, the people who provided this clamor were quickly slapped in the face.

When the ambulance arrived, Shen Ci was already wrapped in a fuzzy fleece blanket and holding a cup of hot tea. Jiang Chen had also stuffed a sticky mango mochi roll in his mouth.

Made of mango filling and wrapped in glutinous rice flour and rolled in coconut flakes, the mochi was soft to the bite, and its sweet, appetizing taste was enough to brighten anyone's mood.

The doctor checked Shen Ci and said in surprise, "Young man, who realigned your bones? Their skill is absolutely perfect!"

The live comments: […Did she bribe this doctor??]

Shen Ci pointed at Xiang Yi, confused.

When the doctor realized that it was such a young girl, and she had performed the realignment in a few seconds too, he was even more in awe as he gave Xiang Yi a big thumbs up. "Amazing! We have a few TCM masters in our hospital. If they are watching the stream, I'm sure they will want to connect with you!"

"You flatter me." Xiang Yi responded lightly.

The doctor was mindlessly praising Xiang Yi for several minutes before remembering something. He quickly said to Shen Ci, "Get lots of rest, and listen to her more."

The netizens: ???

——[Hahaha other doctors will just tell you to drink more water, but this doctor says to just listen to her]

——[Wow, it means that this doctor really respects Yi mei's medical skills! She has the professional's stamp of approval, so can the haters stop circle-jerking? It's quite embarrassing]

——[Let's be real though, I can't get used to seeing the Xiang woman acting so fake, but okay, so what if she knows traditional medicine? She didn't graduate from a TCM profession, so how could she have a certificate? If she is practicing without a certificate, this counts as illegal practice!]

——[Yes, it's illegal to practice medicine illegally! I don't mean anything else, but I think she needs to apologize for her mistakes /smile /smile]

chapters.title: Chapter 159 - Beg Me
chapters.body:
Chapter 159 - Beg Me

…

Endless quarreling ensued in the live comments. Some people thought it was fun and took screenshots to post on Weibo. Since it came with the #TwoUnderOneRoof tag, the photos started to trend.

For a moment, the netizens surfing the net were confused.

——[Are these people under some IQ-lowering curse? ]

——[I have so many questions. What kind of seductive statement is that?]

——[Watching these live comments is giving me so much joy. Do you even know what illegal medical practice is to be using it so indiscriminately?]

…

It didn't take long for the peaceful atmosphere to be restored in the live comments. It wasn't that the keyboard warriors had stopped fighting, but because…

It was lunchtime!

Li Jianyu even joked around, "It's time for the mukbang. Hello everyone, I'm the new director of the cuisine network, Xiao Li. I have one complete ab and a healthy appetite. Next, let me show everyone today's menu…"

The camera zoomed in and gave a closeup of the dishes one by one.

The boys from Sea7 were taken aback.

'This… is this heaven??'

Xiang Yi looked around. "Why is everyone frozen? Let's eat." She thought that the boys were afraid of ruining their figures as she gently explained, "Today's meal is very light, there's very little oil and very little salt, plus I've selected low-calorie and healthy foods. It won't make you gain weight."

With her present, the atmosphere at the table was obviously much more harmonious than the morning. The boys did not hold back and began to eat happily one by one.

"Wow, this steak is so good…"

"Ah, ah, ah, the sea bass is amazing!"

"Wahhh the vegetable dipped in preserved fruit sauce is absolutely perfect…"

"…"

Shi Sui bent his long legs slightly as he tasted every dish in a relaxed manner, as if he were a gourmet food connoisseur enjoying the delicacies.

"Heh, give me a bowl of rice."

"Hey, I don't want to cut the steak, do it for me. Be careful, and don't forget to add lemon."

"Hey, I want soup. Don't be stingy, the bowl is so shallow it's not enough for anyone to drink!"

Xiang Yi's voice was gentle. "Your bowl is too big…"

Xiang Qi glared at her, "Are you saying I eat too much?"

"I didn't…"

"Hmph."

The stream was stunned by Xiang Qi's petty actions.

——[Did the s.e.xy Hades turn into a petty child?]

——[He's really mean but cute, that prideful "hmph" was too cute~]

——[Yi mei is so obedient, Hades is bullying her on purpose. To be honest, I want to steal her home as a little wife]

——[No, you don't.]

——[Have you guys noticed, Yiyi only poured soup for Hades! Even Shi Yingdi doesn't get this treatment!]

——[!!! Is our Shisui zaizai not worthy?]

——[Sigh, the Untimely CP fans are still hunting for candy in shattered glass ]

…

After lunch.

The boys who had agreed to eat only one bite per person in the morning were all stuffed… When they had arrived, they neatly sat in a row, nervous and stiff, while now, they were lying on their backs like salted fish.

Xiang Qi rushed to wash the dishes, so Shi Sui didn't fight with him. Either way, they were stuffing it in a dishwasher.

When Xiang Qi returned from the kitchen, he found his sister holding onto a rabbit's ear that had fallen off her sweater, sighing.

Xiang Qi acted high and mighty as he swaggered in front of her with one hand in his pocket and stuck an obnoxious pose.

"If you beg me, I'll sew it back for you!"

Innocently, Xiang Yi responded, "But I can sew it myself…"

Qiqi of the Xiang family was shocked. Angrily, he roared, "Hurry up and beg me! Otherwise, I won't sew it for you!!"

"…"

chapters.title: Chapter 160 - Xiang Qi Sewing Rabbit Ears On Stream
chapters.body:
Chapter 160 - Xiang Qi Sewing Rabbit Ears On Stream

"It's just a rabbit's ear…" In order to prove that she could sew, Xiang Yi pulled out her sewing kit and made a few gestures. "Just a few stitches here and it should be good…"

The next second, Xiang Qi snatched the kit from her hands. "You're so clumsy, what if you stab yourself?"

The girl blinked before realizing what was happening. Lightly, she pleaded with him. "Then… can you please help me sew it?"

"!"

Under his calm appearance, Xiang Qi felt his heart surge like ocean waves.

'My sister just asked me to do something! She pleaded with me!!'

The internationally acclaimed fashion designer was drunk with happiness as he skillfully threaded the needle through the stitches with familiar ease.

The boys: "…"

They thought that Hades' hands should be used for beating people and not for holding sewing needles…

There was a very strong sense of contradiction when the man began to sew the rabbit ear sweater, especially after seeing their senior climb a tree…

Shi Sui got up to pour himself a glass of water. When he passed by Xiang Yi's side, he casually slid a cushion behind her waist.

"Thanks, big brother." Xiang Yi thanked him as she clutched her knees and leaned back. Compliantly, she watched as Xiang Qi sewed the fabric.

When Xiang Qi heard her call out "big brother", he almost stabbed his hand with the needle!

Only then did he realize, it had already been an entire morning and his sister hadn't called him brother once!

Not once!!

Yet, she called Shi Sui big brother; this was basically inviting the wolf into one's house and calling him big brother!

After all, when Xiang Qi was young, Shi Sui would often put him in his place. He couldn't overpower him or even outrun him. Aside from crying for mercy, he had no other way of dealing with Shi Sui…

Xiang Qi ground his teeth. He bit the thread loose and tossed the sweater aside.

The sweater landed on the girl's head, as if he was bullying her.

Immediately, Shi Sui gave him a warning glare.

Xiang Qi instinctively shuddered.

Xiang Yi pulled off the sweater with the firmly sewn-on ears. The stitches were so fine they were almost hard to see.

Her eyebrows formed into shallow arcs. "Thank you."

Xiang Qi: ???

That's all?? That's it???

'Where was the "My beloved, handsome, good looking big brother" that should come after thank you?'

'Or 'my dear big brother' at least?'

'At the very least, "big brother"??!'

Furiously, Qiqi of the Xiang family wanted to flip the table.

His sight fell on the table. The light beige table cloth was dotted with small floral patterns, painting the room a warm country-style, yet it brought serious irritation to Xiang Qi.

He knocked on the table and began to sneer. "Heh, what a dumb table cloth. Such bad taste and zero aesthetic sense, how ugly!"

Xiang Yi's mouth opened slightly. "This… you gave me this."

"…"

"……"

The atmosphere in the living room fell into a strange silence.

The viewers in the live comments were hysterical.

——[How come Yi mei can always be so serious yet so funny!!]

——[Yiyi: I'll prick my own finger; Qiqi: I'll slap my own face!]

——[To be honest, these guys have chemistry. Their appearances are similar, too. This must be the legendary husband and wife synergy!]

——[Am I the only capable detective here who has discovered something? Xiang Yi and Hades have known each other from before?!]

…

Xiang Qi was silent for over thirty seconds until…

"Hmph, a real designer dares to question himself, deny himself, and overthrow himself! UNDERSTAND?"

Xiang Yi appropriately nodded her small head. "Mhmm."

"Very good, I will send someone to bring the latest fabric I've dyed over. I will show you what real taste is!"

After pausing for several seconds, Xiang Qi angrily bellowed, "How come you're not saying 'WOW'?!"

Xiang Yi: "Wow."

"Come on, put some emotion into it; that wow had no soul!"

Xiang Yi: "…"

chapters.title: Chapter 161 - Wow~
chapters.body:
Chapter 161 - Wow~

A year has passed and her brother still…

Hasn't grown up.

The girl complied with him as she responded, half-coaxing and half-coquettish: "Wow~"

The soft and sweet voice fell into Xiang Qi's ears like sugar. His entire body was in a trance as he suppressed the corners of his mouth from madly curving up. Correcting her, he continued, "You're missing some vigor. I'll teach you, WOW~"

Xiang Yi: "…Whao?"

Xiang Qi: "It's WO~~OW~~ with emphasis on the O. Here, I'll give you a tune, do re mi and change…."

The netizens in the stream:

——[Hahaha where is my head, where did it fall??!]

——[That 'wow' just now is deadly. The manly Hades is about to lose his cool reputation]

——[Huh where's this manly impression coming from? Please explain. Hades doesn't have the body type of a muscular and manly dude]

——[It's based on a fashion doc.u.mentary~ Hades demonstrated his cropping and embroidery, as well as other skills on it. What was most amazing is that the whole doc.u.mentary had several cuts of him stepping on the sewing machine pedal. As soon as his foot hit that pedal, there would be several live comments barraging the doc.u.mentary saying these were manly actions, and it soon became a running joke]

…

Nearby, on the rug, the boys from Sea7 were sprawled on the bean bag chairs.

The carefree Xiao Naofu had found a new toy, treating the little brothers as human spring beds as it jumped from one to the other, stepping on their abs one by one. The bell on its neck jingled as it moved…

The comments:

——[Those abdominal muscles mmm… Hehe, this kitty is so cute!]

——[UwU Q_Q I've been chasing celebrities for ten years, and I'm no match for this cat!!]

——[What do you guys know? Xiao Naofu is actually playing a tune. When its whittle paws step on different abdominal muscles of different degrees of tightness, it will undulate a unique sound, while the sound of the bell is the chord! This is a symphony, sisters!]

——[You've convinced me with your sorcery!]

——[Green Tea Fufu: I hope you and I are a never-ending song /doge /doge]

Different from the other fast-paced variety shows, "Two Under One Roof" gave an impression of slow-paced, easy-going, and lazy. However, it was engaging, and it made viewers very comfortable.

The comments, however, were noticeably less than during mealtime. The audience members that had been slapped in the face began to reemerge again.

——[So she's still not going to apologize for illegally practicing medicine? /smile /smile]

——[Let's talk facts: she can help treat someone, but she shouldn't lie. If everyone was like her, where is the trust between people?]

——[If you don't have a TCM qualification certificate, you are not qualified to practice medicine! What kind of reasoning is saying you do? I'm shocked. Fake Fairy is really out here drugging people's food. There are so many celebrities present, yet all of their brains have been turned to mush]

…

There were several comments like this. Some viewers inevitably began to ride the waves as they joined in on the argument, demanding Xiang Yi for an explanation.

When Li Jianyu learned of the trajectory that the broadcast was going, he would have been negatively impacted if it had been his first day on set.

But after interacting with Xiang Yi, he felt the girl was very trustworthy.

Since Yi mei was too lazy to shut them up, he would come help!

Li Jianyu straight up asked Xiang Yi with confidence, "Yi mei, the netizens are very interested in your medical skills. Can you briefly tell us about it?"

Xiang Yi hadn't opened her mouth yet when Xiang Qi suddenly sneered. "What is there to say? She's been trailing after my grandpa learning prescriptions and traditional medicine since she was seven or eight years old. In the words of western medicine, she has ten years of clinical experience! So to treat a run…a zaizai should be an everyday practice?"

chapters.title: Chapter 162 - Lying Fairy
chapters.body:
Chapter 162 - Lying Fairy

'Little runt' Shen Ci: "…"

He very much suspected that senior Hades wanted to say he was the runt but had changed his wording because he was afraid of being roasted by the stream comments…

"Ten years?" Although he was prepared for this, Li Jianyu was still shocked by this number.

Suppose a medical student graduated at the age of 25 or 26, they would be in their thirties before they gained ten years of medical experience.

In traditional conventions, TCM practitioners got better with age. After all, age symbolized experience.

Yet Xiang Yi had broken everyone's expectations!

Seven or eight years old… Most people were still in the first grade when Xiang Yi had begun learning clinical TCM prescriptions??!

Xiang Yi responded calmly. "Mhmm. I learned it for a decade or so and received my TCM practitioners certificate in my first year of university."

Li Jianyu: "Ah, I see. Yi mei, fighting!"

Jiang Chen, who was a beat behind everyone: …!!!

'Ah ah ah I should be the first one to flatter sis!'

However, Li Jianyu underestimated the determination of the haters.

——[Let me circle the keywords. Prescribing medication at the age of seven or eight, and received the certification in her first year of university. But! She personally admitted that her university degree was in agriculture! This is conflicting. Did she just reveal herself?!]

——[Why is Hades covering for her so much? If she was treating people at the age of seven or eight, isn't that still illegal medical practice? How sly]

——[Hahaha I expect no less of the Fake Fairy. Based on her logic, I attend college in Beijing, so I can get a certificate from Tsinghua University?]

…

Some netizens were too eager to search Xiang Yi up on Weibo.

This time, in addition to the Fake Fairy tag, they also added the nickname Lying Fairy.

There were a few female celebrities in similar degrees of popularity with Xiang Yi. Seeing her popularity rise, they began to feel slightly threatened. Immediately, they had paid out a hoard of navy members to try and put out the fire that was about to be Xiang Yi's rise to fame.

Lying was not too big a shortcoming on its own, but as long as they rode the waves, it was easy to ruin her reputation and continue to fuel the public's hatred of Xiang Yi.

Soon, several cryptic messages began appearing in the comment section.

——[Congratulations, Xiang Yi, on receiving the Nobel Prize for Traditional Chinese Medicine~]

——[Started practicing at seven, huh? Even Hua Tuo will have to call you master if he was alive]

——[You guys are all mistaken, the Lying Fairy is actually a witch doctor, specializing in poisoning and seducing men. If you don't believe me, just look at Shi Yingdi, Hades, the boys from Sea7, Director Li Jianyu… Which one of them hasn't been desperate to defend her?]

…

When #LyingXiangYi# began to trend on the search terms, a TCM blogger suddenly posted a Weibo —

[One TCM tip a day]: Our country's TCM qualification exam is an industry admission examination. How can it be explained? Simply put, it evaluates whether you have the ability and knowledge to practice as a physician.

Normally, applicants must have a major in Chinese medicine and intern at a hospital or a health clinic, which means you must not only know theory but have experience in practice as well.

However, there is a system of apprenticeship or master and disciple process for TCM in our country. That is, well-known masters can take in apprentices, like a father taking in a son. So, our country has that special examination method as well.

Basically, this is the traditional qualification method for physicians and doctors. Using layman's terms: If you have a master, and your master is a TCM physician, as long as you study under him for over three years and your master thinks you're adequate, ok, you can take the test! As long as you pass, you can be certified!

…

When this Weibo was posted, nobody paid attention.

Up until a notification popped up——

chapters.title: Chapter 163 - Treasure Girl Yiyi
chapters.body:
Chapter 163 - Treasure Girl Yiyi

Shi Sui had over ten million fans on Weibo, so within a few minutes, the comments broke the thousands.

——[Gege, you finally remembered your Weibo password!]

——[Let me make the bold assumption that he shared this for Yi Mei! ]

——[Holy sh*t, I just read the explanation. So this Xiang woman really has the certifications to practice medicine?!]

…

Shi Sui's fans weren't the only ones who were surprised.

His influence was there. This repost quickly made it to the trending list as well as the most searched. Immediately, it was in the top ten.

The search term #XiangYiLying# disappeared and was replaced by the entry #PhysicianXiangYi#!

The anti-fans were dumbstruck.

They didn't expect Xiang Yi to not only be skilled in medicine, but she had the qualifications to practice too!

She had not been bragging, but only expounding facts!!

Several passers-by were curious as well. What's the origin of this girl named Xiang Yi? What did she have to do with Shi Yingdi??

The fans Xiang Yi had acc.u.mulated were quite prideful that their baby had been discovered. They began to educate the passers-by.

——[Our Yi mei is naught but a fairy from the heavens~]

——[Treasure girl* Yiyi ❤ natural beauty Yiyi ❤ Culinary connoisseur Yiyi ❤ Master of musical instruments Yiyi ❤ Traditional Chinese Medicine Physician Yiyi ❤ ]

…

Spontaneously, like drops of water, the praise and flattery became a river of unstoppable trends!

The relatively unpopular and out-of-date CP fans also began to raise their banner in search of sweetness. All kinds of small videos, GIFs, chibi drawings, and fanfictions began to emerge and were discovered by netizens passing by. Randomly, it garnered a large wave of fans…

…

The living room at the manor.

Slender fingers lightly tapped on the screen of the phone. Shi Sui put away his phone without mentioning what he'd just posted.

He had only done a trivial thing that was not worth mentioning.

The man pushed up his gold-framed glasses, gaze falling on Xiang Yi. As if soaked with sprint water in the lightness of march, his temperament was gentle and soft.

Regardless if he was static or in motion, every frame seemed like he'd just stepped out of a scene from a movie.

The live comments:

——[I came from the Weibo trending search. How come the celebrities on this show are either lying down or sitting?]

——[I am a new fan of the Untimely CP! The moment I got here, I was showered with PDA. What a wife con Shi Yingdi is!]

——[Ahh if you didn't mention it, I wouldn't even notice. Shisui really seems to have his eyes glued to Yi mei!]

——[I'm satisfied!]

…

"Ding—"

Xiang Qi's assistant was extremely efficient as he delivered the fabric as soon as possible.

"Mr. Hades, do you have new inspiration?" As soon as the assistant entered, he had ignored the crew members as he was excited to the verge of tears. "Please tell me of any instructions, I will do my best to meet them at all times!"

Xiang Qi remained calm. "No need, I'll do it myself."

His assistant's voice trembled. "You… What are you planning to design, sir? A dress? An evening gown?" Dresses were Xiang Qi's most favored designs and the ones he excelled at the most.

"Oh, that reminds me." Xiang Qi seemed deep in thought. "Aside from a tablecloth, I need to make a few aprons."

His cutest sister had to have the cutest apron!

His assistant: …???

The netizens: …?????????

*Translator's Note: Treasure girl refers to a girl that has many hidden positive attributes, but they are not public quite yet. The more they are understood, the more they resemble a treasure that is being constantly discovered.

chapters.title: Chapter 164 - Big Brother Making Scrunchies And Aprons
chapters.body:
Chapter 164 - Big Brother Making Scrunchies And Aprons

…

…

A few minutes later, the steady sound of the sewing machine rang throughout the stream.

Xiang Qi tied the hair on his forehead into a small ponytail, revealing clear and defined eyebrows as he focused attentively… Adding white lace to the edges of the tablecloth.

The live comments:

——[Ah, this is what a real tough guy should be doing!!]

——[Holy f*ck, for a manly dude like Hades, his hands are really nimble!]

——[Our Hades' professional abilities must be seen! He is proficient in tailoring, sewing, and embroidery!]

——[Why does his little assistant look so stunned? Doesn't seem super bright to me]

…

Roman, or Hades' assistant, watched with big eyes as his designer cut the precious fabrics into a tablecloth!

This fabric had been prepared for future projects!

Some designers use ready-made fabrics that were on the market, but Hades was different. Every piece of his was individually designed by himself, sometimes even dying the fabrics himself as well.

The raw materials, techniques, and dyes he'd used were all top of the line even in the industry, but now it was being turned into a tablecloth…

With every tablecloth, Roman felt his heart bleed.

Xiang Qi made seven or eight tablecloths, unable to stop. It was Xiang Yi who stopped him.

"It's enough, more than enough, even if we change it every day, we can use it for a long time."

"Okay. This will be enough." Xiang Qi suddenly perked up. "Heh, I suddenly feel inspiration…"

Roman shook his eyes open, unable to hide his excitement.

Was he going to design a new piece?!

Was he going to witness the birth of a prodigious designer piece?!!

The next second——

"This lace edge would go so well with a creamy yellow apron!" Xiang Qi pointed at the other fabric that Roman brought and instructed, "Since you already have an apron, then we must make some matching hair ties! Right now, aren't those — what's it called, sausage braids? Aren't they trendy…"

Jiang Chen raised his hand. "It's not called sausage…"

Xiang Qi: "Eh, then what is it? Cured meat?"

Jiang Chen carefully explained, "Last time, the makeup miss told me that since they looked like large intestines from a pig, they were called large intestine rings*…"

"Eh, sounds gross." Xiang Qi said with a look of disgust. He then turned to Xiang Yi. "Hey, I want to eat stir-fried peppers with large intestines tonight."

"…Okay."

With that, Xiang Qi happily turned back to his work.

Roman once again shut his eyes…

…

Two hours later.

Under Xiang Qi's instruction, Roman complied in helping him make a dozen or so aprons in various styles. Some had lace edges while others had oversized bows, and even some had fuzzy pom-poms on them.

Along with them were a dozen or so scrunchies…

A series of rainbow farts began to take off in the stream.

——[My god, Hades is amazing! All of these are so youthful and girlish!]

——[I want it! I need it! I want to buy them! OP, hurry, give me a link! /doge]

——[No wonder he is a master; even a small object he makes out of the blue is so beautiful Q_Q I am so envious of Xiang Yi!]

…

Xiang Qi was very satisfied with these finished products as he held them in his arms, pretending to walk out of the kitchen for a stroll as he cleared his throat.

Xiang Yi, who had been busy preparing the ingredients, turned around at the sound. Seeing it was him, her eyes formed into little half-moons as she happily trotted over to him. She then stood on her toes and stuffed a small biscuit in his mouth.

"Is it good?" The girl sweetly smiled.

"!"

Xiang Qi's throat choked up. He forgot how to chew as he swallowed the biscuit whole!

*Translator's Note: I believe this refers to oversized scrunchies

chapters.title: Chapter 165 - She'S Not Worth It At All!!
chapters.body:
Chapter 165 - She'S Not Worth It At All!!

His eyes met his sister's anticipating gaze.

Xiang Qi: "…"

He hadn't tasted anything, and his throat felt sore…

The man was expressionless as he coldly said, "It's alright."

"As long as you like it." Xiang Yi turned around and picked up a tray. "I just finished baking two trays. I'll bring them to the living room."

Was she going to feed them to those little brats and that old man?!

Xiang Qi blocked the entry, refusing to let her out. "Hey, do you want these or not?"

It was then that Xiang Yi finally noticed the scrunchies in his arms. Girls had no resistance to cute things like this as her eyes lit up. "Cute!!! Are they for me?"

Xiang Qi sniffed arrogantly. "Don't be so vain. I only made them to match the little aprons since it was convenient. This is a designer's pursuit for perfection. If you want them, trade me with those biscuits."

Xiang Yi blinked. Seeing that his hands were occupied, she picked up a biscuit. "Bend down, I'll feed you."

"Short legs are such a hassle." Xiang Qi said in annoyance. Yet, his legs bent over obediently. "Ah——"

The girl fed him a biscuit.

It was a very common cookie, yet it tasted extra delicious because she had baked them. It was sweet and crispy when bitten into, still warm and soft from the oven. It had a rich flavor of milk mixed with the delicate taste of sesame that made you want another bite immediately.

Xiang Qi imm.a.t.u.r.ely announced, "These scrunchies are yours, so all these biscuits are mine!"

"But…"

"No buts! I want the specialty!" Xiang Qi said fiercely.

Xiang Yi raised her small face and innocently asked, "Then… can I have one?"

She had spent so long baking them, and she had not gotten to try one yet.

Whoosh —

Xiang Qi's sis-con heart was struck.

Xiang Qi raised his chin. "Since you're pleading, then I guess I'll let you have a taste."

The stream was still going on. As netizens saw the scene, the live comments grew dense immediately.

——[Ah, this is so hard to understand. Why is Yi mei being so unconditionally nice to Hades?]

——[The hearts of all Untimely CP fans are breaking. I kind of want to ship these two instead…]

——[Let's be real here, Yiyi's gentle demeanor has chemistry with anyone. Weren't she and Yan Nai didi so cute?!!]

——[Little milk dogs are nothing. I just want to see s.e.xy men like Hades who can also work a sewing machine! ]

Xiang Qi stuffed the scrunchies in his sister's pockets as the two siblings demolished the entire tray of biscuits in the kitchen.

In the Xiang family, it was a battle just to get food, let alone eat alone. Now that he could enjoy the bliss of eating alone with his sister, Xiang Qi was overjoyed. He hummed a small tune as he returned to the living room, showing off to everyone there:

"Xiang Yi made me biscuits! Just for me!"

Everyone present: "…"

Roman began to mumble to himself as he circled a pile of leftover trim.

He'd been with Xiang Qi for a long time and knew of their relationship.

It was precisely because he knew that he felt Xiang Qi was being taken advantage of!

The woman who had ruined his career… It's fine if he wanted to stay in touch, but why did he have to waste these precious fabrics on her!!

She's not worth it! Not at all!!

'God, I, Roman, would like to ask you sincerely to make this woman, who is seducing Hades and corrupting his soul, to stay away from him!'

At this moment, a sweet smell rushed into his nose.

Reluctantly, his gaze followed the source of the fragrance.

The girl wearing an apricot-colored fleece sweater walked out from the kitchen carrying a tray of fresh golden egg tarts…

Whoosh ——

Roman's world as he knew it began to collapse.

'Oh my lord, is this woman the devil herself?? How come I've been bewitched by this fragrance as well!!!'

chapters.title: Chapter 166 - Big Brother, Please Don'T Ignore Me
chapters.body:
Chapter 166 - Big Brother, Please Don'T Ignore Me

At that moment, Roman suddenly thought of the mythical siren of the sea, bewitching sailors out at sea with their inhuman singing voice and causing the sh.i.p.s to crash into rocks and sink.

In his eyes, this fair-skinned and gentle eastern girl was basically a siren!

Except, in place of a heavenly singing voice was the sinfully delectable cuisine she made!

So what, it's just a few egg tarts. The desserts from France were the number one ranking in the world!

He had to maintain his composure!

Xiang Qi felt as if he'd been struck by lightning.

'Aside from the biscuits, my sister made egg tarts as well?!'

'And it wasn't just for me?!'

He watched as she handed them out to the boys of Sea7, one per person, and gave Shi Sui two portions. She even politely asked his assistant if he wanted to try it.

Roman's thoughts: 'I won't eat it! I won't eat it even if I die!'

However, Roman's actions: He received the tart with both hands and opened his mouth to its maximum width before biting off half the egg tart in one bite.

His brain exploded with fireworks, crackling throughout, turning from a gorgeous scene to a blank canvas. It took awhile for him to wake up.

Roman stared at the half-eaten egg tart in his hands with disbelief.

How? How was it possible?!

How can such a delicious egg tart exist on earth!!

In a daze, he pondered. Perhaps the sailors were willing to be bewitched by the sea monster, sacrificing their boat into the rocks so that they could listen to the heavenly voices of the sirens forever!

Roman couldn't bear to eat the remaining half of the egg tart in the luxurious way he had just now. He carefully sipped away a crumb with his lips, enjoying the exquisite taste that captivated all his taste buds.

Roman mentally drew a cross on his c.h.e.s.t.

'Oh my good lord, I didn't know being bewitched by a banshee was such a joyous thing.'

'Amen ——'

The boys were already eating their tarts, faces buried in the delicious aroma. They continued to blow rainbow farts, which made the viewers in the stream overtly envious.

——[Why are they eating again! Ah ah, I want afternoon tea too!]
