——[I didn't like Xiang Yi at first, but then remembering that the Zaizais will have a full belly on this show, I can't dislike her anymore Q_Q]

——[Sisters, I'm back. The didi and Hades' assistant only got one egg tart, but Shi Yingdi got two! Two!]

…

At this time, Xiang Yi approached Xiang Qi.

"Hmph." Xiang Qi turned his nose up, ignoring her.

"There are three egg tarts left. Do you want them?" The girl's voice was soft as if she were coaxing a child.

The haters finally found a time to strike as they began typing fervently:

——[Ah, here it goes again. Is this Xiang woman the type to please? It seems she's trying to please everyone all the time]

——[It's because of people like her who don't see themselves as human beings and become slaves to men that women have no status in society today!]

——[There's a sad thought that women are seen as objects. Objectifying women is the most shrewd thing and most damaging to a woman's confidence. A woman's existence is not so she could please others. But Xiang Yi? How many people are watching this stream? And how many underage girls are being taught wrongly by her actions?!]

…

Those who were triumphant in front of the screen believed their arguments had been steady like the seas, bringing on waves and waves of support. Then they heard the girl's soft, warm voice.

"Big brother, please don't ignore me." Her pale, slender fingers began to tug at the man's sleeves. "Don't be angry, okay?"

chapters.title: Chapter 167 - The Soft, Coquettish Girl
chapters.body:
Chapter 167 - The Soft, Coquettish Girl

Shi Sui casually glanced in the direction where Xiang Yi was.

The didi, who had their faces stuffed with egg tarts, were all stunned.

Especially Jiang Chen, who had seen Xiang Yi disciplining sister Ling. He was so shocked his eyes turned round!

Wasn't his big sister cool and strong?

Who was this soft, coquettish girl!

Everyone had heard the complete sentence just now.

However, in Xiang Qi's mind, only two words circled round and round again.

Big brother…

Big brother…

His dull brain finally came full circle as he stood up with vigor and raised his voice, "What did you call me?!"

Xiang Yi was at a loss. "You… If you don't like it, then I won't call you that anymore…"

Perhaps from the perspective of an outsider, blood ties between a family were inseparable.

However, harming a family member was still one of the most painful experiences.

In the past year, there was no doubt that the person inhabiting her body had ruined her third brother's career.

She was in the wrong.

Nobody had the right to forgive her on behalf of her third brother.

Seeing the girl looking like a cautious, frightened bird, Shi Sui's brows furrowed.

He had seen several sides of Xiang Yi, her bright side, her gentle side, her confident side, her proud side, her arrogant side, her drunk side, her crying side…

But he had never seen such a timid and downcast expression on her in front of anyone.

…

The live comments were even more intense.

——[Did I hear that right? She's calling him brother now?!]

——[Didn't Yi mei say she was an only child in an interview beforehand?]

——[Does anyone know what Hades' Chinese name is? I have a bold guess…]

——[Heh. Obviously, this is scripted; they're just trying to become a CP. Do you really think this is some gourmet cooking show? Love and drama are the most grossing points on a variety show!]

Xiang Qi took several deep breaths before adjusting his heart rate.

"Big brother?" He lightly said, "So you remember I'm still your brother?!"

Xiang Yi softly said, "I've always known…"

"Hmph!"

Xiang Yi tilted her little face. "Big brother, I was wrong… I'm sorry."

She didn't know how to explain her transmigration experience; after all, it would sound illogical to regular people. It would almost seem like she was desperately trying to make excuses.

Hence, Xiang Yi decided to explain once an opportunity presented itself.

Right now, she only wished for her brother to stop being angry.

He would make her dresses, read her poems, teach her to dance, and make up fairy tales to tell her under the moonlight. When he felt inspiration, he would draw stacks and stacks of manuscripts and plaster them on the walls and windows and drag her over to show them off.

Her third brother was definitely more perceptive than most, but he was also much more susceptible to emotions than most people. When he was angry, it was difficult to find design inspiration.

Xiang Qi glared at her firmly. The girl's eyes started to swell and turn red and cloud with moisture, sad and fragile.

Her gaze was…different.

In the beginning, he had been suspicious if his sister had been possessed by a strange being, or her personality had been split by bipolar disorder.

But now, he was completely sure. His 'sister' this last year was not his sister at all!

Fiercely, he said, "Do you think if you say sorry, make some delicious food, and call me big brother, I will forgive you?!!"

Xiang Yi shrank as her glittering eyes dimmed. She sniffed. "Oh…"

The next second, she heard her brother's loud and determined roar.

"I'll tell you what, OF COURSE, I WILL!!!"

chapters.title: Chapter 168 - Don'T You Know How To Coddle Me?
chapters.body:
Chapter 168 - Don'T You Know How To Coddle Me?

…

…

The living room was so quiet that the only sound that could be heard was the live broadcast equipment running.

Xiang Yi raised her head and stared at Xiang Qi, dumbfounded.

Xiang Qi had finished yelling before finally feeling… embarrassed.

His ears were burning as he ground his teeth, feeling as if his anger was fueled by his embarrassment.

But when faced with his sister's pure eyes, his anger instantly disappeared.

He grabbed the girl's soft hands and shoved the corners of his shirt into her hands domineeringly.

Xiang Yi was stunned.

Xiang Qi was furious. "Hurry up, suck up to me and call me big brother! You don't even know how to coax me when I'm angry?!"

"…"

The audience in the stream was dumbfounded by the scene in front of them.

——[This… this… this script isn't your usual line!]

——[Ahh Hades is so cute; he's devilish on the outside but a big baby on the inside. I'm in love!]

——[The interaction between these two is so confusing. They don't look like a couple, so what's their relationship???]

——[Those of you accusing our Yi mei of trying to please Hades, please open your eyes and take a close look; who's trying to please who! Evidently, Hades is the one making aprons and scrunchies for Yi mei!]

…

Xiang Yi's emotions were complex. She tightened her grip on her brother's shirt as her voice became nasal, tears coming out.

"You… you don't blame me anymore?"

The Sea7 boys didn't know what this meant, but Shi Sui and Roman understood.

Especially Roman.

He had witnessed the birth of Hades' most genius works and also personally saw the destruction of those pieces.

How could he forgive her so lightly?!

But… thinking of the delicious egg tart, Roman felt like it was okay to forgive her, just a little bit…

Of course, this woman had to make up for her actions with her sincere confession and practical actions!

"I know that wasn't you." Xiang Qi said these words in a voice that only they could hear.

Xiang Yi froze.

She thought that even if she explained, her brother wouldn't believe her.

Unexpectedly, she was not even able to provide an explanation before her brother had discovered the truth and had chosen to believe her.

Seeing his sister's eyes turn red like a rabbit, unable to hold back the tears, Xiang Qi recovered his ferocious tone. "Idiot, do you not know how to suck up to me? Do you need me to teach you??"

Xiang Yi: "Okay."

Xiang Qi: "…Okay, let me demonstrate." He pinched his throat and imitated the voice of a shy girl. "Big brother is the best in the world! Big brother is the most handsome guy in the world!"

The boys of Sea7: ???

Where did that arrogant and cold senior Hades from this morning go??

The viewers in the stream: ???

——[Hades: I'll coddle myself.]

——[I want to see Yi mei acting cutesy! I've already begun to record my screen!]

——[It makes sense that men are much less fussy when acting cutesy!!]

…

Xiang Yi closed her eyes, her pupils overflowing with moonlight, gentle and clear.

She tugged at her brother's shirt sleeve and gently said, "Big brother, you're the best…"

Fireworks exploded in Xiang Qi's world.

'My little sister is the cutest in the world!'

"Hmph, I was the best to begin with." He squeezed her cheeks with a large hand as he suddenly felt a spike of inspiration. Quickly, he turned around to pick up his pen and paper, then knelt on the ground and began to draw.

The live comments in the stream began to speculate once again: [Hades is going to design an apron again hahahaha]

Roman leaned over to take a look, then immediately covered up the camera. Tears of excitement began to form in his eyes!

'A work of art! This is a real work of art!'

chapters.title: Chapter 169 - Who Could Resist A Coy Hades
chapters.body:
Chapter 169 - Who Could Resist A Coy Hades

…

Everyone knew that inspiration was hard to come by, especially for a world-class designer like Xiang Qi. Everyone had tacitly decided to remain quiet, with fewer comments appearing even in the stream.

——[Shh! Let's not disrupt Hades!]

——[Qui——et! No whispering about!]

——[(Whispering) This is so engaging, I'm nervous on his behalf! It's been a year… Can Hades still design new pieces?]

…

Xiang Qi had very strong artistic foundations. In only a few strokes of the pen, he had outlined a set of clothes. Casually, he tossed the draft aside and moved onto the next one…

After experiencing a drought of inspiration, it was as if his ideas were inexhaustible this time around as countless wonderful ideas continued to pour out.

Li Jianyu asked the cameraman to change his angle so that he could take pictures of everyone in the living room while avoiding Xiang Qi's manuscripts.

The boys of Sea7 had their mouths covered, not even daring to breathe in fear of being too noisy.

Xiang Yi was also nervous. It turns out Shi Sui was the calmest one among them, shoving a fluffy cushion at her which she tightly clutched.

Looking at the exquisite sheets of designs Xiang Qi had produced, Roman could feel his tears streaming down.

This was a spectacle!

No ——

This was a miracle!

At this moment, the muse of art herself had kissed Xiang Qi's fingertips, while the banshee of the deep sea had been conquered by him, convincing him to work to the rhythm of the heavens.

This process felt both slow and fast at the same time.

His brain was tingling, but his spirits were soaring.

Xiang Yi hurriedly tossed her cushion aside and knelt down beside him, pressing on his temples and the acupuncture point between his eyebrows.

With her professional massage techniques, Xiang Qi's headache was relieved tremendously. Following was a wave of exhaustion. He rubbed the girl's palms with his head and w.h.i.n.ed. "Remember to make me stir-fried spicy pig intestines… I also want pudding and…"

Before he could finish, his thick eyelashes closed as he fell into a deep sleep.

Xiang Yi: "…"

The stream comments:

——[Asleep just like that?? Incredible]

——[How does he still remember the pork intestines lmao]

——[Tbh I get him, it's really exhausting to overexert your brain]

…

Roman quickly sorted out Xiang Qi's manuscripts, then habitually took out a blanket and carefully tucked the man in.

In order to find inspiration, a certain person had even slept on a tree before, much less the floor…

"Do not worry everyone, you can laugh and talk as usual, it will not disrupt him. Even an earthquake or thunder won't wake him up now." Roman stretched. "With these design drafts, there will be a lot of work to do. I'm going to head out first."

Li Jianyu assigned a few staff members to see him off.

Meanwhile, the stream continued.

Sure enough, Xiang Qi slept like a corpse, just like Roman said.

It began to drizzle outside, making it unsuitable for filming. Fortunately, the crew had already prepared an alternative activity for the guests, instructing them to play a game in the living room.

"Before the game begins, can everyone please write down a punishment? Whoever loses will have to draw from the pile later."

Xiang Yi randomly wrote 'sing a nursery rhyme'. She was curious what Shi Sui had written next to him as she bumped his elbow. "Hey, what did you put?"

Shi Sui smiled lightly and handed her his paper directly.

On it were two distinct words: Drink vinegar.

"We are a bit too cruel." Xiang Yi sighed.

Little did they know, the little brothers of Sea7 were fervently making trouble…

chapters.title: Chapter 170 - Game Penalties
chapters.body:
Chapter 170 - Game Penalties

The cameraman gave a closeup of everyone's little notes so that the audience in the stream could see what they all wrote.

Shi Sui: Drink vinegar.

Xiang Yi: Sing nursery rhymes.

The live comments: [These two are so compatible, their punishments are elementary level]

When it came to Sea7, the direction immediately changed.

Shen Ci: Girl Group Dance.

Jiang Chen: Post ugly photos on Weibo.

…

——[Hahaha you can tell the boys troll each other often]

——[Chen zai, mummy wants to tell you over the screen, you might lose at this game too!]

——[Holy f*ck, Ah Kai is too cruel; sit in a confined space and listen to ghost stories? That's terrifying ]

…

Once everyone submitted their papers, Li Jianyu happily announced the contents of the game. "This game is called All the Villains. Every round, there will be one princess, two assassins, one knight, and the rest of you will be civilians. The assassins must either kill the princess or live until the end to win the round, while the knight has to protect the princess. Each round, each person gets one vote on who the assassin is. If they manage to vote out all the assassins, then the princess wins."

Jiang Chen raised his hand: "What about the civilians? Are they also supposed to protect the princess?"

Li Jianyu: "Who says the civilian has to protect the princess? You can protect the assassins too."

The guests: ???

The viewers: ???

"So you're saying villagers can be both good and bad?" Shen Ci stroked his chin. "So every round is basically every man for himself? Interesting."

Li Jianyu took out the identity cards they had prepared earlier. "Let's try a game first, there will be no punishment for this one."

…

After one game, everyone seemed to have gotten the hang of the game.

"OK, the party that loses this time will have to receive punishment." Li Jianyu was giddy as he grinned widely, as if he was a bystander in a fight.

After everyone drew their identity cards, the cameraman shot a closeup of everyone's roles.

Xiang Yi had drawn the princess card, while Jiang Chen and Shen Ci pulled the assassin cards. The knight card went to Shi Sui.

The first round began.

"I…I'm a good guy." Jiang Chen evidently was not good at lying, as he was finally able to muster the sentence after a long pause. "Really, you guys have to trust me."

The stream:

——[I'm so angry I am shaking, this stinking boy group has no team spirit! (I'm just trolling, please don't take me seriously)]

——[Patting Chen zai's head… Mummy knows you're a little dumb, this kind of dangerous game does not suit you]

——[In comparison, Shen Ci is so calm and even voted for Jiang Chen too. Add oil, Ci zai! Kill the princess!]

…

Using her conditioned psychological deductions, Xiang Yi was able to survive two extra rounds.

But she had never played this type of game before. She was obviously the good guy but had been suspected of being a villain.

Shen Ci more or less knew everyone's identity by now as he fueled the fire. "Sis, you must be the assassin, right? Everyone with me, we have to vote her out!"

Everyone began to vote.

Shen Ci urged: "Senior Shi, you should vote…"

Shi Sui nudged his glasses on his nose bridge and looked towards Xiang Yi with a gentle expression. "Are you not going to plead with me?"

His deep and mellow voice was sultry and appealing.

Xiang Yi weakly responded: "But you only have one vote… It doesn't matter who you vote for."

"That makes sense." Shi Sui smiled. "Well, if we can't live together, we can at least die together."

As he spoke, he randomly pointed to a person in a lazy manner.

"Game over! The assassins win!"

"The princess and the knight are both deceased!"

"Next, please draw your penalties for losing the game!"

chapters.title: Chapter 171 - Untimely Couple Is Locked In
chapters.body:
Chapter 171 - Untimely Couple Is Locked In

Upon announcing the results, Li Jianyu sounded a little too eager.

He never thought he'd see the day daddy Shi was brought down!

What a nice feeling!

He secretly looked through the slips of paper with punishments on them. Girl group dance, take ugly photos; these were nothing.

He didn't know who had written it, but the most savage one by far was 'wear women's clothes'!

Li Jianyu couldn't help but chuckle at the thought of his daddy Shi wearing women's clothing.

The comment section in the stream also erupted in laughter.

——[Mr. Director, your laughter is too noticeable!]

——[This director is poisonous; everytime he laughs, I can't help but laugh along]

Shi Sui drew a piece of paper first as his lips twitched.

Xiang Yi pulled one as well, her eyes widening upon reading it.

The game can be played like this??

"Please show us what penalties you have drawn."

When the camera turned over, Xiang Yi had drawn 'listen to ghost stories in a confined space', while Shi Sui had drawn the 'girl group dance', successfully living up to everyone's expectations.

The live comments: [Hahahahaha how can someone so gentle and reserved like Shi Yingdi dance a girl group dance? I'll bet this is going to trend instantly!]

"How do I dance a girl group dance?" Shi Sui asked, exasperated.

Shen Ci: "Chen Chen, do demonstrate for your senior!"

The others chided in agreement.

"Yes, yes, yes. Chen Chen, let's go!"

"Welcome our main dancer, Chen Chen!"

Jiang Chen was dumbfounded. "Oh, okay."

Obediently, he began to show off a dance segment. After all, his foundations in dance were solid and was even able to make the girl group dance look good.

In the live broadcast room, the fans of Sea7 felt a wave of satisfaction wash over them.

——[Our derpy Chen zai doesn't even know he's been trolled 2333]

——[Now that's what I call "All The Villains", the boys are all so entertaining~]

——[Officially a fan of Jiang Chen now. On "Heartbeat" before, he seemed so cold and had a droopy face, quite boring if you ask me. Who knew he was actually this cute!]

After watching the dance, Shi Sui rubbed his eyebrows. "Can we trade?"

Xiang Yi: "…I don't know how to dance either."

…Girl group dances… Sorry, this was really out of her jurisdiction.

Li Jianyu had no trouble being a spectator as he fueled them on. "Since Yi mei doesn't agree to a trade, then how about daddy Shi does the same punishment as her? You can both listen to ghost stories together in a confined space!"

"Wooooo——" The boys began to whistle.

Contrasting remarks began to appear in the live comments:

——[Ah ah someone give this director an extra chicken drumstick!*]

——[Surprise! The director leads the ship! Gogo Untimely Couple!]

——[Is this crew crazy? What if the Vase Fairy secretly takes advantage of our Shi Yingdi?!]

——[How gross, stop trying to force this couple to happen. if it were it should be with someone worthy, okay? Does she have any notable works in TV, film, or music?? No! So get lost!]

At the house.

Shi Sui's eyelids drooped as he gazed idly, as if he didn't care what punishment he received.

In a low tone, he asked Xiang Yi, "Is that okay?"

Xiang Yi did not think too much of it. She would be scared listening to stories alone; maybe having another person there could turn it into something more lighthearted.

"Mhmm." She lightly replied.

A group of youthful and noisy boys happily pushed the two into a utility room and played a ghost story through a Bluetooth speaker before locking the door firmly.

There were more Shi Sui fans than Untimely CP fans watching the stream, but their comments took over the screen entirely regardless.

——[Going by formalities, they've entered the bridal chamber!]

——[囍囍囍囍囍囍囍囍囍 ]

——[Congratulations, newlyweds! Have a baby soon!]

——[Sisters, the Untimely Couple is officially locked in!!! This ship has officially sailed!]

*Translator's Note: "Adding a drumstick" is a term used in the film industry for when actors or directors receive an extra drumstick in their takeout meal, signaling they've done great work or gone above and beyond at their job.

chapters.title: Chapter 172 - Wearing Girl Clothes 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 172 - Wearing Girl Clothes 1

172 穿女装1

…

The two main characters barely even made eye contact on stream, yet they were now locked in a utility room together. The CP fans were overjoyed, eager to hang up the firecrackers of marriage at any minute.

Their only disappointment was that there was no video; only sound could be heard.

The dimly lit room was not very large, and with two people inside it, the place felt even more confined.

From the Bluetooth speaker, a ghost story began to play.

"Late at night that day, the husband returned home and realized his wife had disappeared. He said, 'Honey, do not play hide and seek with me, I see you!" He suddenly opened the closet door to find it empty inside… Only, as he looked toward the window, the face of a woman appeared outside…"

Xiang Yi nudged past Shi Sui and fumbled for the light switch.

As they were already in close proximity to begin with, the faint gardenia scent of the girl's hair rushed into his nose. Shi Sui felt his throat constrict. "Did you change your shampoo?"

"No, I'm just used to switching between bottles." Xiang Yi responded gently. She found the switch and turned it on as the light bulb above them buzzed, flickering for a moment as if it could burn out anytime.

Meanwhile, the story in the speakers continued: "He couldn't find his wife's silhouette in the surveillance camera, as if she'd disappeared into thin air…"

"The husband in this story is probably lying; just because he can't find a living person doesn't mean he won't find a dead person. Instead of worrying about ghosts, he should probably check his refrigerator and underground reservoir," Xiang Yi said nonchalantly.

The netizens in the room who had been waiting to see some PDA: ???

The next second, Shi Sui's gentle voice resonated. "I've seen a movie where they hid the bodies in the walls or in wax figures."

"Heh? What movie is this? I want to watch too."

——[F*ck, my backside suddenly felt a chill!]

——[Can you two please respect the ghost story!]

——[Why am I imagining Yi mei terrified as she falls into Shi Yingdi's arms??]

In reality, the two eagerly began discussing horror movies, completely ignoring the ghost story being told.

Xiang Yi was getting tired of standing as she pulled out an old chair, prepared to sit. She didn't expect the chain reaction to occur as piles of artifacts and random objects began to fall over like dominoes…

A gentle and large hand grabbed onto her hood and pulled her towards him.

"Careful now."

"Thanks." Xiang Yi suddenly remembered something, nervously asking: "Did my ear fall off again?"

Shi Sui chuckled and raised his hands to lightly tug at her ears. "They're still here."

"Not that, the bunny ears my brother sewed on for me—he will be angry if they fall off again…" Xiang Yi put on her hood and felt the top of her head. When she found that they were both still affixed, she let out a sigh.

Sure enough, her brother's sewing skills were top-notch!

Shi Sui's eyes were dark. After putting on the fuzzy hood, he had realized the girl's face was much smaller and fairer. One of the ears stood up while the other one was folded over. Suddenly overcome by a strong urge, he stood the other ear up as well.

Xiang Yi wanted to avoid him, but with the fallen objects lying around, the space had become more cramped. Her back had hit the wall, and there was nowhere else to go.

Weakly, the girl protested: "Stop twisting them…"

Shi Sui looked as if he'd found a new toy. He stood the rabbit ears up, then folded them back down, having a great time.

Xiang Yi bit her lip. "You… Do you like…"

Shi Sui paused his movement.

Then he heard the girl's next words.

"….my sweater?"

Graciously, she exclaimed: "I can let you borrow it if you want?"

chapters.title: Chapter 173 - Wearing Girls Clothes 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 173 - Wearing Girls Clothes 2

Shi Sui paused for a moment, smiling as he gazed down at her.

Xiang Yi was afraid he had misunderstood as she quickly explained, "It's not that I don't want to buy you a new one, but there's only one sweater like this in the whole world, so…"

This sweater had been a piece her brother used to practice. She had worn it for a long time, cherishing it. Even if it was pilling, she couldn't bear to toss it out.

"Why are you so stingy?" Shi Sui's voice was lazy with a hint of deliberate stubbornness. He adjusted his loose tie as his eyes curved into peachy half moons. A smile formed on his lips. "It's okay, I guess you can let me wear it for a while."

"!" Xiang Yi was a bit surprised but recovered quickly. He must really like this sweater, she thought…

It can't be helped. Her brother's designs were #1 in the universe, who could resist it!

The live comments:

——[Shisui, blink twice if you're being threatened?]

——[The Fake Fairy is at it again. Only one in the world, bleh]

——[Director, open the door now. I want to see Shi Yingdi in women's clothes!]

——[I am greedy, I want to see Shi Yingdi dance to girl group songs while wearing womens clothes!]

Coincidentally, the ghost story in the speakers finished.

The door opened.

The naive boys began to chide in. "Sis, give your sweater to Senior Shi now!"

Xiang Yi looked toward Shi Sui, confirming once again. "You… You really want to try it on?"

"Hm? You're not regretting it are you?" Shi Sui joked as his thin lips curved into a smile.

Xiang Yi took off her sweater and handed it to him.

The heat from her body remained infused with the sweater, vaguely immersing it with flirtatious warmth.

Shi Sui, without any embarrassment or shame, carefully put on the girl's fuzzy sweater.

The sweater was styled to be oversized and loose. When dr.a.p.ed over the tall and slender man, aside from the sleeves and the bust being a bit too short, the rest unexpectedly fit…

Well.

Li Jianyu, who had been snickering under his breath suddenly couldn't even laugh anymore.

He thought daddy Shi would look ridiculous in women's clothes, but…

Shi Sui: "Huh, not bad." Calmly, he put the hood on and stuck his hands in the pockets. A charming smile formed on his face as his peach blossom eyes sparkled. "Thank you, Yi mei~"

The stream:

——[Once you put on our Yi mei's clothes, you are Yi mei's person!]

——[Shi Yingdi is so manly, dress shirt with rabbit ears… just kill me!]

——[That sweater is adorable! I reverse searched it on Taobao, and there really isn't a similar style. What kind of niche boutique is it from?]

For the remaining duration of the game, Shi Sui wore Xiang Yi's sweater. His performance remained calm and natural, and the people present disregarded it as well.

Only Xiang Yi felt something was off…

She played two more rounds with the group before heading off to the kitchen.

Xiao Naofu circled around her legs, softly meowing. "Meow~"

"Hungwy?" Xiang Yi patted its belly, which was still full and round. She didn't know what to do. "Xiao Naofu, have Jiang Chen and the other boys been sneaking you food again?"

Xiao Naofu looked innocent.

Hmph. Those stinky boys wanted to hold this Huhu; of course there is a price!

"If you eat too much, you'll get fat." Xiang Yi tried to reason with it.

Hearing this, the squishy cat sprawled on the floor, revealing its round and white belly. It tilted its head and cooed: "Meow~ meow~~"

——Sissy, do you not love me? You are the only one in my heart. Everytime I see you, I can't even blink my eyes~

Xiang Yi: "…"

"You… You actually learned to act cute just for a bite of food!"

"Xiao Naofu, this kind of schemy routine ——"

"Can become more frequent in the future!"

chapters.title: Chapter 174 - Is She Worthy Of Calling Hades Big Brother
chapters.body:
Chapter 174 - Is She Worthy Of Calling Hades Big Brother

She squeezed Xiao Naofu from head to toe. Xiang Yi decided that the cat wasn't hungry, just greedy.

She cut off a piece of fish and cut it into thin pieces. After it was cooked thoroughly, she sprinkled a little bit of spice on it before feeding it to the small cat.

The fresh meat had been cooked at just the right heat and tasted much better than the snacks the stinky little boys had fed it.

Happily, Xiao Naofu scarfed down the food.

After it got to the last few pieces, the cat's round pupils retracted. It picked up the fish fillet, cat walking elegantly to Shi Sui's side.

Shi Sui and the others were still playing games by the table.

The cat nudged Shi Sui with its head. After its opponent turned its head and cast it a suspicious look, it slowly ate the grilled fish under Shi Sui's nose.

Jiang Chen: "Eh? Isn't Xiao Naofu eating the fish you caught?"

Xiao Naofu felt even more proud.

——Heheh. Stinky man, Yiyi loves me the most! You're only worthy of fishing for this Huhu~!

Shi Sui remained calm. "Do you guys have any reliable pet boarding facility recommendations?"

"Is Xiao Naofu sick?" Jiang Chen asked nervously.

"Not sick." Shi Sui smiled. "I just want to understand what precautions I should take before a kitten is neutered."

Xiao Naofu: Σ(°△°|||)︴

You motherf*cker!

Jiang Chen: "But, Xiao Naofu doesn't even have a girlfriend yet… If you neuter him, you will take away his happiness."

The live comments: [Chen zai, I suspect you're up to something and have sufficient evidence!]

Shi Sui: "Losing something is the most painful when you've just gained it."

The boys seemed to have been persuaded, as if what he said made sense.

But to Xiao Naofu, it was as if he'd been struck by lightning!

Q_Q what is he going to do now.

Xiao Naofu suddenly felt a chill at its tail.

It hesitated for a moment, ran towards Shi Sui and spat out the grilled fish, urging him, "Meow meow!"

The netizens poked fun at this scene.

——[Hahaha the green tea cat is once again admitting defeat on livestream]

——[Poor Fufu: Bro, please try this fish, it's delicious!]

——[Have you guys noticed, Shi Yingdi only bullies Xiao Naofu when Xiang Yi isn't around. Just like how my dad trolls me when my mom's not around Q_Q]

Shi Sui lovingly rubbed Xiao Naofu's back and fed it the grilled fish once again. "Be good, hm?"

Waaaah stinky man!

Xiao Naofu shed tears in its heart as tears began to flow down it's mouth. With a chomp, it bit onto the grilled fish.

The live broadcast for the afternoon had gone smoothly, and their popularity was high as well.

#HadesInspirationExplosion#, #JiangChenGirlGroupDance#, #ShiYingdiGirlsClothes# had all received a high degree of discussion.

In the blink of an eye, it was dinnertime.

Xiang Yi didn't know when her brother would wake up, so she left food out for him. The rest she had asked the boys to help carry to the dinner table.

Passing by her sleeping brother, she tucked him into his blanket. To some, it was quite considerate and warm of her, but in the eyes of others, it was a vain, unforgivable crime…

——[Does nobody see a problem with this?]

——[Do you guys remember how disgusting the Xiang woman had been just now? Let me remind you: she snuck into Shi Yingdi's room :)]

——[She's the kind of girl I hated most when I was in school, finding big brothers everywhere. She's so fake and tacky while acting like an innocent white lotus. Is she worthy of calling Hades big brother?!]

——[She's flirting with Hades on one side while giving her sweater to Shi Yingdi on the other. If this isn't cheating, then what is?!]

chapters.title: Chapter 175 - Negative Competition
chapters.body:
Chapter 175 - Negative Competition

Some netizens rebutted the negative comments. [Hades calls Xiang Yi little sister* too, maybe they are really related.]

Immediately, a hoard of people countered.

——[Hehe, she already said in an interview that she was an only child. Where did this older brother come from?]

——[I'm questioning if Smog is even her brother now! Maybe he's just colluding with her to start a scandal!]

——[There can't be this many coincidences in this world. Do you think real life is more entertaining than TV dramas?]

The comment section became noisy as several people were unknowingly brought into the fray. Some people simply closed the stream, while others blocked the barrage.

Why was there so much bickering for a variety show?

The staff immediately reported the live comment situation to Li Jianyu.

Li Jianyu frowned. There were so many netizens, it was normal for a few haters to show up.

But it was meal time right now.

The most appealing aspect of "Two Under One Roof" over several days had been Xiang Yi's culinary endeavors.

Usually, comments during mealtimes were very peaceful and harmonious, so for a large scale dispute to happen like today…

Suddenly, Li Jianyu thought of something and opened Chen Mian's—the "Heartbeat" director's—WeChat moments.

He updated his status a few minutes ago.

[ChenMian – Muyao TV]: Muyao TV's new livestream variety show "Delicious Three Meals" has officially set sail, thank you Meijia milk, Milky Clean Laundry Detergent, and Great Sports for their endors.e.m.e.nts. Two top-tier celebrities will descend, and their identities will be revealed tomorrow at 9:00 am!

Li Jianyu gritted his teeth. He didn't expect Chen Mian to be able to start another variety show in light of what happened lately with cheating fans of their money!

And with this title, plus the number of attendees, it was obviously copying "Two Under One Roof"!

"Shameless…" Li Jianyu said fiercely. He didn't think Chen Mian could still be so vile after leaving Muyao TV!

The PR Department at Muyao TV was quite powerful. It wouldn't be completely off to assume all the bad reviews from their own stream had spawned from there.

In order to promote their own variety show, they wouldn't hesitate to bring down their competitors. This kind of vicious competition was really low!

At the dining table, nobody present knew of the feud that was happening in the comment section.

Xiang Yi didn't understand. "What's wrong? Does it not suit your taste? Do you want me to make you something else?"

She had taken into account the fact that the boys were still growing but still had to watch their figures. Hence, she'd made dishes that were high in protein but low in calories.

The most nutritious dish had been a medicated diet soup to nourish the kids, where the oil had been skimmed.

Jiang Chen gazed at her and pitifully said, "Sis, tomorrow we won't be able to eat your cooking…"

The atmosphere at the dinner table suddenly became sullen.

They probably won't even be able to eat a full meal, let alone Xiang Yi's cooking.

Only then did they realize how accurate the phrase Senior Shi had said earlier "losing something hurts more after you've obtained it" was.

Such wisdom; no wonder he is their senior!

A casual sentence spoken by him can be the truth of humanity!

"How about this? If you guys want to eat anything, you can message me on WeChat. I'll cook it and get the driver to bring it to you." Xiang Yi was quite patient toward the pretty boys.

"Really?!" Jiang Chen and the others could feel their eyes light up.

"Mhmm. I always keep my word."

With this, the live comments in the stream became more brutal.

——[Is she going crazy thinking about men? Spreading her net wide, I see]

——[I suggest everyone report this show! The reason? It's setting bad examples!]

——[Is the production team dead? Hurry up and set your dogs to drag this Xiang woman away! You can't let her ruin Shi Yingdi, Hades, and these poor little boys! She can go die alone to atone for her sins!]

*Translator's Note: Just like gege can be used to call a guy who is not actually your brother (Like Oppa in korean), people can call girls little sister, or "meimei" too without being related.

chapters.title: Chapter 176 - Are You Trying To Teachapter Me? 1
chapters.body:
Chapter 176 - Are You Trying To Teachapter Me? 1

At Muyao TV.

Inside the conference room,Chen Mian propped his feet up on the long table as he browsed through the comment section on Weibo on his phone. The corners of his lips curled up.

"The navy we hired this time is pretty good."

The person in charge of PR smiled. "Right now, not only has "Two Under One Roof" fallen into a slew of hateful comments, the posts we arranged in the comment sections are also beginning to spread around in full.

Sure, they weren't as good.

Might as well compete on who's more rotten; after all, Muyao TV has never lost in this regard.

Numerous blogs and forums began to release the rampant negative opinions:

——["Two Under One Roof" is too hostile; why not look forward to "Delicious Three Meals", a real lifestyle gourmet variety show]

——[Do you guys really believe that Shi Yingdi had returned to rural life and doesn't need any popularity? You're wrong! Think about how many times "Two Under One Roof" trended on hot searches, who's gonna believe that they aren't buying views?]

——[The Xiang woman has attracted too much hate for "Two Under One Roof". One thing at a time, the comments she's attracting puts her at the edge of 'celebrityhood'. Publicly trying to seduce and flatter men; choosing her to come on this show is the biggest failure of the production crew. ]

Everyone has some herd instincts. Seeing the overwhelming negativity bombarding "Two Under One Roof", the netizens who hadn't seen the show before naturally did not want to start it. Even those who were following the show decided it was better to watch something else. The situation was looking grim.

The number of viewers in the stream began to noticeably drop.

Yet——

"Why are there still so many viewers?" Chen Mian raised an eyebrow.

Muyao TV's PR representative was also speechless. Weren't netizens supposed to be dumb? Often, they could follow the direction set by anything, like a group of idiots charging off a cliff in order to get the d.e.s.i.r.ed effect they want.

They had planned this with the d.e.s.i.r.e for the viewer count to drop!

Although the views had declined, the proportion was not high as there were still millions of viewers watching!

F.o.r.c.i.b.l.y, she tried to salvage some face. "Probably because it's meal time…You know that fans of gourmet shows are very loyal. Those dumb fat foodies only have food on their minds. They probably muted the live comments…"

Chen Mian exclaimed: "Add more fuel! Worse comes to worst, contact those hackers and shut down their stream!"

They had used this tactic the day "Two Under One Roof" aired. That's why the stream had been interrupted several times that day.

"There are some high-level security personnel at Xingchen app, ordinary hackers can't break through their walls…"

"Then find me some master hackers!"

"….Master hackers are very expensive."

"That's pocket change! Women, the longer your hair, the shorter your perspectives. As long as "Two Under One Roof" falls, "Delicious Three Meals" will earn it back in minutes!" Chen Mian added. "Don't forget, I managed to get Zhuo Yi and Jiang Yun'er!"

Zhuo Yi was a two-time award-winning actor, famous for his martial arts ability. He was nationally acclaimed.

Jiang Yun'er debuted as a singer. She had won the highest award for singing and had produced countless popular songs.

These two could be considered top-tier individuals out of S-tier celebrities.

A few years ago, when rumors regarding the two's hidden marriage surfaced, Weibo had been paralyzed by the commotion. Fans felt as if they'd been tricked, and both of them had been impacted negatively.

They had come to "Delicious Three Meals" firstly because Muyao TV had offered a large sum of money, but also because they wanted to rebuild their image by showing off their love for each other.

The PR representative grimaced. "Okay, I'll go contact them now."

At the manor…

Leftovers from lunch had been cleaned away. Xiang Yi inadvertently turned to realize her brother had woken up sometime. His slender fingers were rubbing against his forehead as he stared at his phone screen. His expression…

Extremely unflattering.

chapters.title: Chapter 177 - Are You Trying To Teachapter Me? 2
chapters.body:
Chapter 177 - Are You Trying To Teachapter Me? 2

Xiang Yi stood up. "Big brother, you're awake. I left you some food, hold on a second."

Hearing her voice, Xiang Qi made a faint grunt before returning to his normal cold demeanor. His fingers seemed to be tapping on something.

Xiang Yi happily trotted to the kitchen to bring the dishes. Naturally, this scene fell under the scorn of the comments.

——[Haha she can suck up all she wants, but she ends up with nothing!]

——[Did Hades realize she's a player?]

——[How despicable of her to suck up to him. Hades doesn't want to see you at all, OK? ]

But unknowingly, the seemingly noble, glamorous, and arrogant Hades at the moment was happily slewing profanities in the stream comments.

Just as he had posted a comment, a notification popped up on his screen.

[Hello valued customer, your account "My Sister Is The Cutest In The World" has been suspected of violating the rules of our platform and has been banned for the next 24 hours. In the future, please surf the web in a civilized manner and speak politely.]

Xiang Qi: "…"

He took a deep breath and headed to the bathroom to flush his face with cold water. Only then did he feel a little more stable.

He dialed his uncle Xiang Feng's number and barked out when the receiver picked up: "Unblock my Xingchen app account!"

"Do you think I'm a magician? Running to me for every miniscule thing??" Xiang Feng retorted.

"Heh, what kind of a domineering CEO are you if you can't even do such a trivial task?"

Xiang Feng: "…Send me your account, I'll see what's up."

Xiang Feng took a screenshot of his user profile and sent it over WeChat. Xiang Feng forwarded the message to the staff of the IT department and took a look at his little niece's stream while he was at it…

Suddenly, one more white knight appeared in the face of the anti-fans…

And thus, an extra account for the IT Department to unblock…

Xiang Qi exited the washroom to see his sister bringing two plates of food.

One dish was the spicy pig intestine stir-fry he had asked for, and the other was his favorite dish, seafood pasta.

Xiang Qi walked up to her and snatched the plates from her hands. Viciously, he snapped: "I'll carry it myself!"

How could his sister's precious hands be used to carry plates!

Xiang Yi blinked. "Bro what's wrong? Who made you angry?"

Xiang Qi: "None of your business."

Xiang Qi sat at the table with a thump before keenly noticing Shi Sui's sweater. Angrily, he shouted: "Why are you wearing her sweater?!"

Shi Sui responded nonchalantly: "She let me borrow it."

"Lies!" Xiang QI roared as his eyes fell on Xiang Yi. "Did he steal your sweater? Such an old man to be bullying little kids…"

No matter how old Xiang Yi was, she was still a child to him.

The words "old man" successfully stabbed Shi Sui deep in the heart.

Slowly, he began to roll up his shirt sleeves.

Immediately——

A row of [ danger danger danger danger danger ] figuratively floated across Xiang Qi's head. He slapped his chopsticks down and let out his anger:

"Don't come over here. If you come here… I'll run away; don't think you can touch a hair on my head!"

Xiang Yi: "…"

The Sea7 boys: "…"

Shi Sui chuckled in disdain.

Xiang Qi shuddered as he tugged at Xiang Yi's sleeve, whispering. "So what if he stole it, I'll…I'll make you another, even cuter sweater!"

Xiang Yi smiled helplessly. "He didn't steal it, I lent it to him."

"How are you still defending him!" Xiang Qi was heartbroken. "Don't forget you have an older brother protecting you! Even if big brother can't beat him in a fight, I can still beat him at tree climbing, right?!"

chapters.title: Chapter 178 - Are You Trying To Teachapter Me? 3
chapters.body:
Chapter 178 - Are You Trying To Teachapter Me? 3

'Alright. Whatever her brother says, goes.'

Xiang Yi's gaze was gentle as she pushed the dishes toward Xiang Qi. "Big brother, eat it while it's hot."

Xiang Qi tasted the spicy pork intestine stir-fry. If the intestine wasn't handled properly, the pungent smell would be very evident. But Xiang Xiang Yi's fried intestines did not have any smell at all, and even had a delectable aroma. Matched with green peppers and onions, it was particularly chewy.

He was happily eating when he heard Shi Sui say casually, "Do you know there's a tool on earth called a ladder?"

Xiang Qi: …!!

The pig's intestine in his mouth instantly became less delicious.

"Big brother, stop teasing him." Xiang Yi persuaded.

At first, Xiang Qi thought she had been calling after him, but it took him awhile to realize she was calling Shi Sui big brother!!

The man was shocked; he had been the one to use the cute aprons and hair ties in exchange for his sister to sweetly call him big brother… Why does this Shi Sui deserve it?!

"No calling him big brother!" Qiqi of the Xiang family said furiously.

Xiang Yi jumped. "Wh-What's wrong?"

"I don't care, I don't care." Xiang Qi was miserable. "You can only call me big brother!"

The stream was already going downward because of the navy, which influenced several netizens to follow the hate train.

——[Is nobody going to refute this Xiang woman's green tea acts? This show is so disgusting with her]

——[Shi Yingdi and Hades have really lowered their self respect. What kind of girls can these good men not find? Why get jealous over a girl like this? It's lowering your value]

Xiang Yi coaxed Xiang Qi for a long time before he finally calmed down.

Only when she met Shi Sui's innocent eyes, she felt inexplicably sorry…

The girl went silent for two seconds and picked up Xiao Naofu. In a low voice, she asked: "Xiao Naofu, can you help me?"

"Meow?"

"Help me coax Senior Shi, he doesn't seem happy…"

Xiao Naofu: ???

What? You want this Huhu to coax that stinky man?!

No way!

"Do what you did just now, act cute and try to persuade him okay?" Xiang Yi discussed it with the cat. "Tomorrow, I'll make you three-days worth of luxurious tiger rice! Da Naofu's* favorite!"

Xiao Naofu: Do you think you can persuade this Huhu with that?

No way…

"Seven-days worth! No more! Otherwise, I'll get Jiang Chen to help…"

Xiao Naofu became fl.u.s.tered. "Meow!"

It high-fived the girl's hand with its paws as if they'd come to a satisfying conclusion.

Xiang Yi happily hugged and kissed the cat.

By now, Xiang Qi was almost done with his food as he took out his phone to see that Xiang Feng had been very efficient. His account had been unbanned, as he opened up the stream app and continued his good fight. However, he realized the messages had become even more unsightly. Some people even began to "teach" him.

——[Hades, just play with Xiang Yi, don't actually be moved. You're too good to be protecting a woman of her kind. This can't even be explained]

"Thump!"

Xiang Qi slammed the table as he clicked into that person's profile. He sent a voice message:

"ARE YOU TEACHING ME HOW TO BE A PERSON?"

"You're not worthy of judging my little sister!"

"Do I need to explain myself about protecting my own damn sister?!"

Eh?

The netizens in the stream were dumbfounded as the live comments became spammed with question marks.

——[Real sister???]

Xiang Qi looked at the comments and said coldly, "That's right, I'm Xiang Yi's older brother, Xiang Qi. Anyone got any more problems?"

*Translator's Note: Xiao Naofu means 'small tiger', Da Naofu then is 'big tiger'.

chapters.title: Chapter 179 - Public Opinion Reversed
chapters.body:
Chapter 179 - Public Opinion Reversed

The stream comments became lively once again.

——[Are you kidding me? Hades is Xiang Yi's real brother??]

——[What the hell. First came a Smog Xiang Yu, now there's another brother?]

——[Then why did Xiang Yi say she was an only child? I even watched that interview; she said it herself!]

It wasn't just the netizens. The staff on site were also very confused.

Xiang Qi began to interact with the comments.

"Before, we got in a fight, that's why she called herself an only child. But I am her real brother, by blood."

"Xiang Yu? Although I don't want to admit it, that derp is my little brother."

"We're from one family."

Xiang Yi had been staring blankly from the side. She didn't think her brother had used this method to disclose their relationship…

He had used the name Hades and not his real name because he'd wanted to rely on his own skills instead of benefitting from the Xiang family.

Yet, for her… He had revealed the status he'd concealed for so many years.

Suddenly, she felt someone grab at her thin wrists. Xiang Yi raised her head to find her brother had appeared in front of her at some point.

Xiang Qi's expression was unprecedentedly solemn.

"She's my little sister, not someone you can easily bully!"

"If you're smart, stop the rumors now. I won't allow anyone to slander her anymore."

"Online hate is easy to spread, yet oftentimes you don't realize how much harm you bring to another individual with just one sentence."

"If you can't learn to be kind, then at least——learn to shut up."

[…] Silence befell the comment section, where even the hired commenters didn't know what to say.

A few seconds later, the comments exploded.

——[Ahhhh Hades is so A, he's so cute and silly when he was climbing the tree, but he looks so handsome and serious when he's protecting his sister!]

——[What the f*ck? One brother is an e-sports legend, the other is a famous fashion designer; other people's brothers do not disappoint hey]

——[So everything makes sense now, Yi mei treats Hades well because she spoils her brother, and Hades made aprons and scrunchies for Yi mei because he loves her. They aren't players trying to cast their nets wide; it's just love between siblings!]

The comments that were hating on Xiang Yi for flirting with Hades were immediately responded to in an instant.

——[Case closed, they're siblings!]

——[Don't you guys think it's a little weird? Why is Yi mei the one being sniped everytime?]

——[I just heard from a master who works in media, he says the main attraction of "Two Under One Roof" might seem to be Shi Yingdi, but it's actually Xiang Yi! Yes, the variety show relied on Shi Yingdi's popularity, but what kept people coming and stabilized their fan base was Xiang Yi's culinary abilities! If it were another celebrity, the result would be completely different! In other words, this show wouldn't be as successful as it is now without her!]

The public opinion was immediately reversed!

chapters.title: Chapter 180 - Kissy
chapters.body:
Chapter 180 - Kissy

– Xiang Yi flirting with Hades?

– Are you joking?

– Xiang Yi cheating on two people at once?

– Are you joking?

Thanks to the convenient speed of the world wide web, any information could be spread at the speed of light.

#XiangYi'sBrotherHades# became the trending hashtag in the searches, as the related topics also soared. It had immediately suppressed the pre-paid searches for #DeliciousThreeMealsPilot#.

…

Muyao TV.

Seeing the astonishing turn of events, Chen Mian wanted to vomit blood. He cursed irritably, "How could they be related? How many god damn brothers does she have?!"

The PR representative also had a sour expression. She never would have guessed that Xiang Yi and Hades were brother and sister!

The anti-fans and navies she had hired won't be useful at all!

The only premise of trying to fuel fire was so that unfounded rumors would not have much of an effect.

They watched as the number of viewers in "Two Under One Roof" rose from four million to five million, then to six million…

The numbers made her heart pound against her c.h.e.s.t.

If the growth continues at this rate, it will eventually rise to 10 million viewers by the evening peak!

What would that mean?

It meant "Two Under One Roof" was going to explode!!

"Where are the hackers? Did you find them yet?!" Chen Mian yelled.

The PR representative awoke from her daydreaming and hurriedly checked through her mobile messages.

Her eyes lit up. "They replied!"

Chen Mian smiled contemptuously. "Break ten million? In your dreams…"

…

Xiang Qi continued to interact with the netizens, basically bragging about his sister the entire time.

"Of course, my sister is the cutest in the universe."

"Don't just think she's simply good at cooking, she has a great sense of taste too. With one bite, she can figure out the seasoning and cooking techniques."

"Xiang Yu is Simao bro, so I'm Sanmao* bro? WHO SENT THAT!! First, it was Hai Dai Si and now Sanmao bro, DO I NOT HAVE SHAME?!"

"…"

At this point, the scream suddenly went black; it had been interrupted!

All the audience in the stream were immediately kicked out of the channel.

When they tried to reenter the room, they were met with a bug that would stop them from entering the stream channel for "Two Under One Roof!"

…

On site.

Li Jianyu hurriedly ushered the staff to troubleshoot the issue.

To the side, however, side Xiao Naofu hesitated for a long time before running toward Shi Sui and exposing its creamy belly, its watery eyes giving off a humiliated hue…

Shi Sui raised his eyebrows and hesitantly scratched its belly a few times before eagerly withdrawing his hand.

Hmph, what a stinky man who's afraid of being caught!

Xiao Naofu did not believe in curses and began to b.u.t.t at Shi Sui's palm with its head. The man remained motionless as it pushed the cat back with disgust.

Whoosh.

The sky had fallen.

Xiao Naofu sat down with a thump, questioning its life choices.

This man, he he he he… he's not interested in this Huhu's body at all?!

Jiang Chen held the cat's paws and teased it, "Sis just kissed you, yet you're leaving her to cushy up to someone else?"

He paused for a second.

Then a big slender hand grabbed the cat by the nape of its neck and lifted it to meet his eyes.

Shi Sui's eyes narrowed.

She had kissed the cat?

Xiao Naofu c.o.c.ked its head: "Meow?"

Shi Sui's lips curled up as he closed in on the cat. While the small cat was innocent and unaware, Shi Sui gave a quick 'peck' to the top of Xiao Naofu's head!

Jiang Chen was dumbfounded as a strange thought appeared in his mind.

Would this count as Senior Shi… doing a kissy with big sister?

Xiao Naofu: …!!

Motherf*cker, why did you kiss this Huhu?!!!

Wahhh, this Huhu feels so dirty, this Huhu is no longer chaste!!

*Translator's Note: Simao directly translates to 'four hairs', so Sanmao would mean three hairs.

chapters.title: Chapter 181 - Sis, Listen
chapters.body:
Chapter 181 - Sis, Listen

…

A few minutes later, Li Jianyu helplessly announced, "Xingchen streaming services have contacted me saying that there has been a malicious attack by hackers on our database, which caused our stream to go dark… Even if we switch channels, I'm afraid we will be targeted once again. Let's end the stream today; thank you everyone for your hard work."

The Sea7 boys had a schedule to follow the next morning, and despite their reluctance, they had to leave regardless.

Before heading off, the boys bowed toward all the staff members to express their thanks.

The boys had left the production team with a great impression, with Li Jianyu even adding their WeChat. If there was an opportunity in the future, he would recommend them to other directors in the industry.

Finally, it was their turn to say goodbye to Xiang Yi.

"Sis…" There were thousands of words in his heart, but Jiang Chen didn't know where to begin. His eyes began to well up. "Thank you for inviting us to 'Two Under One Roof', I feel…very happy."

"Yes, yes! Sis, me too!"

"Thank you, sis, for your delicious meals, you've worked so hard. I hope sis can be happy every day."

"Mhmm. Sis, best of luck!"

"…"

During her transmigration sequences, Xiang Yi had experienced way too many separations and partings. Upon returning to the real world, she did not take much initiative to socialize since interacting with people meant there would inevitably be separation.

But "Two Under One Roof" had given her a different perspective.

"Here, the food I prepared for you. Remember to eat well, especially if you are not in a good mood, so you can have the strength to face everything." She pulled out a few stacks of packed bento boxes and warmly smiled. "I look forward to seeing you guys shining on the stage. You can come by for food anytime you want. You're forever welcome here."

Someone began to sob, and soon, the emotions began to spread. The boys received the bento from her and left without looking back.

Afraid that if they turned around, the tears wouldn't stop flowing.

They were not afraid of the cruelty in this world.

Yet, they could never be indifferent in the face of kindness.

…

After seeing the boys off, someone blocked Xiang Yi's path.

"Big brother?" The girl lifted her head and addressed him.

Xiang Qi's face was as grim as a devil. "Let's talk?"

Xiang Yi bit her lip and nodded.

…

Below the sycamore tree.

"…" Xiang Qi lifted his hand and pushed her on the swing before pondering for a moment. Then he asked, "Where… Where have you been over the last year?"

Xiang Yi momentarily didn't know how to respond.

"It's fine if you don't want to talk about it. As long as you're back, it's all good." Xiang Qi lowered his voice as a trace of hoarseness escaped.

Xiang Yi felt her nose shrivel up. She put her toes on the ground, stopping the swing, and then looked at Xiang Qi seriously. "Bro, I went on a vacation to a very, very far-off place. I've met all kinds of strange people and learned all kinds of strange skills. Now that my trip is over, I've returned home, because you guys are here."

Xiang Qi looked slightly moved as he turned his face away, asking awkwardly. "Hey, did anyone bully you? Do you need your brother to avenge you?!"

Xiang Yi smiled lightly. "No, it was mostly me doing the bullying."

After all, she was the strongest support in all the transmigration universes 🙂

Xiang Qi was relieved. Suddenly, he pinched Xiang Yi's small face and squeezed it a few times, threatening ferociously:

"Next time you go on a trip, you must take me!"

"Or at least…tell me first."

"Because big brother…is really worried about you."

"Sis, you gotta listen, okay?"

chapters.title: Chapter 182 - Family Of Three
chapters.body:
Chapter 182 - Family Of Three

…

After the rain, the air was exceptionally fresh and filled with a faint floral fragrance, with a few sparse streetlamps dimming the field with a warm light. Even the night breeze felt extra gentle.

Xiang Yi wanted to cry but held it back.

"Mhmm." She mumbled softly as her nose became stuffed.

"No crying!" Xiang Qi said viciously through his own nasally voice. He sniffed, pulled out his phone, and opened the camera. "You, hurry up and coax me!"

Xiang Yi: "Big brother is the best in the world?"

Xiang Qi corrected her. "Third Brother is the best in the world!"

Xiang Yi complied and filmed the video.

Xiang Qi was overjoyed. "I'm going to send this to Xiang Chen and them right now!"

The atmosphere between reconciled siblings was transparent with warmth.

A minute after the message was sent…

Xiang Yi curiously asked, "Did they respond?"

Xiang Qi took a look. Their eldest brother, Xiang Chen, had not replied. Probably because of the time difference, or because he was too busy working abroad.

Xiang Yu, the fourth brother, also didn't respond. He was probably still shut in.

However, her busiest second brother, Xiang Li, had replied.

[Xiang Li]: Heh.

[Xiang Li]: /smile /smile

[Xiang Li]: The sun will rise as usual tomorrow, but you might not be able to see it.

Xiang Qi: …!!!

He hurriedly shoved his phone in his pocket, refusing to let Xiang Yi see the responses.

"Brother, just let me see it…" Xiang Yi w.h.i.n.ed.

"See what! Go to bed!" Xiang Qi turned on his big brother status. "Uhm, I have to go back to the studio and finish some designs."

"Heh? So rushed? Won't you stay one more night? You can leave after breakfast tomorrow…"

Ah ah ah he wanted so badly to eat the breakfast his little sister will make!

But… he needed to be alive to eat that…

Xiang Qi was conflicted for a few minutes, then solidified his stance. "No need to see me off, I'm going now, bye bye."

Xiang Yi: "…"

Her imm.a.t.u.r.e third brother was always so strange.

But at least she had reconciled with her third brother now, too. Thinking of this, the girl's lips formed into a smile as her footsteps became light.

…

In the living room.

When Xiang Yi entered, Shi Sui was adjusting the projector. The screen was paused at the beginning of the film, which seemed to be a horror movie.

She just remembered they had bought the projector several years ago but had never used it.

"You want to watch a movie?"

Shi Sui turned around and raised a brow. "Xiang Qi won't let you call me big brother, so you're really not doing it?"

"Eh…" The girl wanted to take back her words but heard Shi Sui's casual response. "Whatever you call me is the same."

Xiang Yi: "Then… why don't I just address you by your name?"

Calling him a senior seemed too strange indeed.

Calling him zaizai… She was afraid he would object.

Thinking back and forth, it seemed addressing him by his real name was the most appropriate.

Shi Sui's eyelids drooped lazily, the light mildly reflecting around his soft silhouette. In the ray of light, an indistinct "mhm" could be heard.

"Shi Sui."

The girl's voice was soft. He had heard these words countless times, yet it had a different charm coming from her.

Inexplicably, it sounded even more intimate than when she had called him big brother.

He looked at her from a distance, his temperament as gentle and considerate as always. However, a faint flicker appeared in his dark eyes.

"Wanna watch a movie?" He asked.

"Okay, I'll go get the popcorn!"

…

Waiting for Xiang Yi to return with her homemade milk-flavored popcorn.

Shi Sui poured out two glasses of juice and mixed a bowl of goat milk for Xiao Naofu.

Xiang Yi's slow brain twitched for a moment and blurted out, "Aren't we like a family of three, watching a family-friendly movie together."

The room went quiet for a moment.

chapters.title: Chapter 183 - Brotherhood
chapters.body:
Chapter 183 - Brotherhood

An invisible awkwardness permeated the air.

Xiang Yi sheepishly added: "I…I'm just joking. Funny, right?"

Shi Sui raised his eyebrow. "A cold joke?"

"It's fresh out of the oven, so it should be a warm joke?"

"…"

It felt even more like a cold joke now.

The girl simply applied the most logical thought process to the situation taught by her brothers: As long as I don't feel awkward, it will be others who are!

She calmly sat down on the sofa and stuffed popcorn in her mouth. "You can start it now."

The room darkened. The gloomy film's terrifying sound effects were amplified on the screen. Xiao Naofu burrowed into Xiang Yi's arms.

Xiang Yi held on to it, which made the creamy cat purr against her collarbone like a baby.

Suddenly, the sound of an electric drill appeared in the film. Xiao Naofu was so frightened it buried its face in Xiang Yi's c.h.e.s.t. But before it could move, a ruthless hand appeared at the nape of its neck and lifted the cat mid-air.

"Meow meow meow!" Xiao Naofu squirmed as it kicked its feet, so scared that its fur stood on end.

Shi Sui calmly stuffed the cat into the pockets of his pajamas. "I'll take care of Xiao Naofu, you can eat your popcorn."

Xiao Naofu was pitiful as a sad dog as it stuffed its face into the pocket, not daring to move.

Xiang Yi: "I thought of another joke, do you want to hear it?"

Shi Sui: "Hmm?"

Xiang Yi: "Just now that felt like: dear wife, I'll take care of the runt, you eat your popcorn."

Darkness enveloped the man's eyebrows, though he seemed to chuckle slightly. His voice was low and captivating in a sultry and lazy way.

"When did our Yi mei learn to take advantage of people?"

"Ahem…" Xiang Yi almost choked on her popcorn. Thankfully, Shi Sui noticed and handed her a glass of honey lemon water. She took a few gulps and feigned calmness. "If I really wanted to take advantage of you, I'd call you zaizai. Then you can be of equal status alongside Xiao Naofu."

Xiao Naofu: "Meow!"

This dog doesn't deserve to be brothers with this Huhu!

Shi Sui raised his brow. "Speaking of which, it's not taking advantage then if I call you 'the kid's mother'*?"

"No… I was just joking…"

"You don't have to… beat around the bush." Shi Sui folded his long legs and leaned back against the sofa. "If you want to take advantage of big brother, I'll give it to you. How about that?"

Xiang Yi: …!!

Why did it feel like she was being played?

Xiang Yi abruptly changed the subject. "Where is the plot now? Where's the ballet dancer from just now?"

She asked, casually expecting Shi Sui to answer. Unfortunately, he remained silent for at least ten seconds before saying with uncertainty: "Probably went to claim their lunch?"

The next second, the camera panned to the female ballerina.

Shi Sui: "…"

With her beside him, it was extremely difficult to focus on watching the movie.

Thankfully, the girl had been very into it and did not mind his response. She even became drowsy as she ate, head bobbing up and down. It looked like she would fall to the other side of the sofa any minute——

Shi Sui quietly placed his hand on the back of the girl's neck and gently leaned her toward his shoulder.

She leaned on his shoulder, peacefully asleep with her eyes closed.

His lips formed into a smile.

Xiao Naofu's eyes widened. This felt even more shocking than the horror film being played!

This dog of a man… actually has such a gentle side to him?

This Huhu is not going to gain a new dad…bleh, a new brother, right?!!

*Translator's Note: While it means 'the kid's mom', the term is usually only used by the husband, kind of like darling or dear or wifey.
